C: ◆ 活动奖励 ◆\n活动期间登录游戏，开拓者即可在「旅情事记」中领取奖励：星轨专票*<unbreak>10</unbreak>。

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
开拓者每日登录游戏后，可在「旅情事记」中领取当日奖励。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
奖励将根据开拓者累计登录天数依次解锁，当日奖励将在<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>（服务器时间）刷新。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
Trailblazers can receive daily rewards in the Travel Log after logging in to the game each day.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
The rewards will be unlocked in sequential order according to the Trailblazer's accrued login days. Daily rewards will be refreshed at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> AM (server time) every day.

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
若开拓者在以往版本完成过对应角色的试用关，可以直接领取奖励。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.
If Trailblazers have already completed the trials of corresponding characters in past versions, they can directly claim the rewards.

C:
◆简介◆
通过侦察发现目标，发起进攻并尝试击退敌人。开拓者每日可进行3次侦察，侦察次数会在4：<unbreak>00</unbreak>刷新。
根据进攻中的表现，开拓者将被授予荣誉之星。获得的荣誉之星越多，能够领取的奖励也越多。

◆参与条件◆
开拓者的开拓等级需≥<unbreak>22</unbreak>级。

◆进攻&联合进攻◆
发起进攻需要消耗至少一枚像素弹头。消耗的弹头会在次日回复。
开拓者也可以选择发起联合进攻，将自己侦察到的目标共享给好友或其他开拓者，从而获得协助。
协助其他玩家，则可以获得额外的荣誉之星。

◆作战◆
发起进攻后，开拓者将与目标展开总共7个轮次的战斗。当轮次耗尽，则战斗自动结束。
每次作战中对目标造成的伤害值会累积，直至目标被完全击退。
开拓者也可以选择消耗3枚像素弹头，在一次作战中提高对目标造成的伤害。

◆荣誉之星◆
侦察目标，参与作战，并在目标逃逸前将其击败，就可以获得荣誉之星，目标的发现者还能获得额外的荣誉之星。
在作战中造成的伤害越高，目标的危险等级越高，最终获得的荣誉之星也越多。
此外，通过每日完成太空大战争•任务，也能获得荣誉之星。
获得了足够的荣誉之星后，可以领取作战奖励。

◆作战记录◆
开拓者可以查看每次进攻的作战记录，回顾击败敌人的过程。
如果是联合进攻，还能看到其他开拓者的作战过程。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
Scout out targets, attack them, and try to defeat them. Trailblazers can scout 3 times a day, refreshed daily at 4:<unbreak>00</unbreak> AM server time.
Trailblazers will be awarded Stars of Honor based on their performance during attacks. More Stars of Honor gained means more rewards can be claimed.

◆ Participation Requirements ◆
Trailblaze Level must be <unbreak>22</unbreak> or higher.

◆ Attacks & United Attacks ◆
At least one Pixel Warhead is consumed to launch one attack. Consumed Pixel Warheads will be refreshed daily.
Trailblazers can also launch United Attacks by sharing targets they scouted with Friends and other Trailblazers to obtain assistance.
Assisting other players will grant extra Stars of Honor.

◆ Battle ◆
After launching an attack, Trailblazers will fight 7 Cycles with the target, and the battle will automatically finish at the end of Cycle 7.
Damage dealt to the target per battle are accumulated until the target is completely defeated.
Trailblazers can choose to consume 3 Pixel Warheads to increase the damage towards the target in one battle.

◆ Stars of Honor ◆
Scout out targets, participate in attacks, and defeat targets before they escape to gain Stars of Honor. The Trailblazer who discovered the target will receive extra Stars of Honor.
The more damage one deals to the target and the more dangerous the target is, the more Stars of Honor will be granted.
Completing daily Cosmic Warfare missions also grants Stars of Honor.
Claim battle rewards once sufficient Stars of Honor have been obtained.

◆ Combat History ◆
Trailblazers can review Combat History for each attack to re-live the process taken to defeat the enemy.
For United Attacks, the battle process for other Trailblazers can also be reviewed.

C: 我方前台目标发动攻击后，貊泽会额外造成1次等同于自身<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的雷属性<u>附加伤害</u>，并积累1点充能。积累<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>点充能时，消耗<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>点，貊泽会对生命值最高的敌方目标发动1次<u>追加攻击</u>，对<color=#f29e38ff>其和相邻目标</color>造成等同于自身<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的雷属性伤害，并使<color=#f29e38ff>受到的伤害</color>提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>回合。
E: After an on-field ally launches an attack, Moze will additionally deal 1 instance of <u>Lightning Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK and gains 1 Charge. At <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> Charges, Moze consumes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> Charge(s) to launch a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> at the enemy target with the highest HP, dealing Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK to the <color=#f29e38ff>target and adjacent targets</color> and increases their <color=#f29e38ff>DMG taken</color> by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> turns.

C: 使我方小队弱点击破效率提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>，造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，羁绊内队员造成的伤害提高双倍。
E: Increases the ally squad's Weakness Break Efficiency by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, increases DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and doubles the DMG dealt by Bond members.

C:
敌方目标在进入战斗时或每受到1次持续伤害时，有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>的<u>基础概率</u>陷入<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]</unbreak></color>层【<u>奥迹</u>】。<color=#f29e38ff>我方小队发动攻击后</color>，有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color>的<u>基础概率</u>为目标叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]</unbreak></color>层【<u>奥迹</u>】。
【<u>奥迹</u>】状态下，敌方目标每回合开始时受到等同于黑天鹅<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的风属性持续伤害，每层【<u>奥迹</u>】使此伤害倍率提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>，随后重置为1层。【<u>奥迹</u>】最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak></color>层。
仅在敌方目标回合开始【<u>奥迹</u>】造成伤害时，黑天鹅根据目标陷入的【<u>奥迹</u>】的层数触发额外效果：
大于等于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>层：对相邻目标造成等同于黑天鹅<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的风属性持续伤害，并且有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>的<u>基础概率</u>使相邻目标陷入1层【<u>奥迹</u>】。
大于等于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>层：使本次造成的持续伤害无视该目标及其相邻目标<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color>的防御力。
黑天鹅造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E:
When enemy targets enter combat or receive 1 instance of DoT, they have a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to be inflicted with <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]</unbreak></color> stacks of "<u>Arcana</u>." <color=#f29e38ff>After the ally squad launches an attack</color>, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to apply <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]</unbreak></color> stacks of "<u>Arcana</u>" to the target.
While afflicted with "<u>Arcana</u>," enemy targets receive Wind DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK at the start of each turn. Each stack of "<u>Arcana</u>" increases this DMG's multiplier by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>, then resets to 1 stack. "<u>Arcana</u>" can stack up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak></color> times.
When "<u>Arcana</u>" deals DMG at the start of an enemy target's turn, Black Swan triggers additional effects based on the number of "<u>Arcana</u>" stacks inflicted on the target:
When there are <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> or more stacks, deals Wind DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK to adjacent targets, with a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting 1 stack of "<u>Arcana</u>" on adjacent targets.
When there are <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> or more stacks, allows the current instance of DoT dealt to ignore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color> of the target's and adjacent targets' DEF.
Increases DMG dealt by Black Swan by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 知更鸟进入【协奏】状态，使我方全体前台立即行动。\n处于【协奏】状态时，我方小队攻击力提高，提高数值等同于知更鸟攻击力的<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>+<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>点，羁绊内成员获得双倍提高。我方小队每次施放攻击后，知更鸟会额外造成<color=#f29e38ff>2</color>次等同于其自身<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的物理属性<u>附加伤害</u>，该伤害视为<color=#f29e38ff>追加攻击伤害</color>，暴击率固定为<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>，暴击伤害固定为<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color>。\n行动序列上出现【协奏】倒计时，倒计时回合开始时知更鸟退出【协奏】状态，倒计时固定拥有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>点速度。
E: Robin enters the "Concerto" state and makes all on-field ally targets immediately take action.\nWhile in the "Concerto" state, increases ally squad's ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Robin's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>, with bonded members receiving double the increase. After each attack by the ally squad, Robin additionally deals <color=#f29e38ff>2</color> instances of Physical <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK. This DMG is considered as <color=#f29e38ff>Follow-Up ATK DMG</color>, with a fixed CRIT Rate of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> and fixed CRIT DMG of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nA "Concerto" countdown appears in the Action Order. When the countdown's turn begins, Robin exits the "Concerto" state. The countdown has its own fixed SPD of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 新的危机「末日兽」来袭，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人完成汇合。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.

C: 从银鬃铁卫的口中得知，名为「贝洛伯格」的城市是雅利洛-Ⅵ唯一的聚居地，人类文明的最后堡垒。\n开拓者们在这里会见了贝洛伯格的「大守护者」，随后遭遇了背叛……
E: From the Silvermane Guards, you have learned that the city named Belobog stands as the sole settlement in Jarilo-VI, serving as humanity's last bastion.\nThe Trailblazers meet the Supreme Guardian of Belobog, but their meeting takes an unexpected turn with an act of betrayal...

C: 梦中的两起命案实在离奇，就连向来以机敏著称猎犬家系都没能掌握有效线索。但加拉赫似乎认为本案与美梦大亨「钟表匠」脱不了干系，因此告给众人一则惊人的事实：\n「钟表匠」的真实身份并非享誉寰宇的超级富翁，而是遭到家族陷害的「叛徒」。
E: The peculiarity of the two murders in the dream stump even the usually quick-witted Bloodhound Family, who couldn't seem to find any useful clues. But Gallagher was seemingly convinced that dream mogul, the Watchmaker, was definitely linked to the murders, and revealed a shocking truth to everyone:\nThe Watchmaker's true identity was not some renowned, respectable mega-mogul, but someone framed as a "traitor" by The Family.

C: 你们带着乱破回忆制成的彩墨来到了蕉授创造的梦境「睡蕉的时刻」，使化作小猴的人们惊醒，最终与乱破一同击败了汲取小猴愿望的蕉授。虽然蕉授的真身逃出了阿斯德纳，但梦境也恢复了安宁，折纸大学的校庆得以重新举行。返祖实验的危机看似告一段落，但对巡海游侠来说，这只是下一场狩猎的开端……
E: Bringing colored ink made from Rappa's memories, you arrive in the Moment of Slumbernana, a Dreamscape created by Profnana, and awaken everyone who has been transformed into monkeys. Together with Rappa, you defeat Profnana, the mastermind who has been exploiting all monkeys' desires. Although Profnana's true form escapes from Asdana, tranquility is restored to the Dreamscape and Paperfold University's anniversary festival can finally kick off again. While the crisis of the atavistic experiment may seem to be thwarted, it only marks the prelude to the Galaxy Rangers' next hunt...

C: 身负「理性」火种的那刻夏主动联系元老院，并承诺帮助元老院扳倒黄金裔、停止逐火之旅，以此交换元老院的庇护。合作达成后，那刻夏在「神礼观众」的授意下动身前往泰坦断崖，觐见刻法勒的奥体…在登山道上，他再度经历濒死体验，见到了不寻常的记忆。
E: With the Reason Coreflame, Anaxa reached out to the Council of Elders, promising to help topple the Chrysos Heir and end the Flame-Chase Journey in exchange for their protection. As the cooperation sealed, Anaxa, under the guidance of Theoros, set out for the Titan Cliff to meet Kephale's mystical body. On the treacherous ascent, he once again brushed death, witnessing haunting memories.

C: 梅姐的细致交待之后，一直有所犹豫的芦慧似乎在心中得出了答案。\n你只是她们漫长生活中的短暂且偶然的相遇，就是这短短的经历改变了很多事。
E: After receiving Mei's meticulous guidance, Luhui, who has been hesitant, found her answers.\nYour encounter with them was merely a coincidental moment in their long lives, yet it brought about significant changes.

C: 餐馆经营当然要求新求变，你们决定要定期举办主题活动。缇宝提出的甜蜜蜜节获得了认可，但她们三人对什么是「最甜的菜品」却有不同的想法……
E: Restaurant management requires constant innovation and change, so you all decide to hold regular themed events. Tribbie's proposal for a Sweetie Festival is approved, but the three of them have different ideas about what constitutes "the sweetest dish"...

C: 蜥蜴村长觉得村子不该麻烦外人，拒绝了钟表小子的请求。但村民们还是为钟表小子找来了武器，善良的他们坚持要为蜥蜴村长报仇。
E: Chief Lizard feels that the village should not trouble outsiders, and rejects Clockie's request. But the kind villagers help Clockie find weapons themselves, persisting in avenging Chief Lizard.

C: 钟表小子拿笨拙的鳄鱼讲了个笑话——\n「这并不好笑…但你努力逗笑我的样子很好笑！」
E: Clockie tells a joke about this clumsy crocodile...\n"That's not funny at all... but your effort to make me laugh is funny!"

C: 钟表小子上前帮镜子公主撑住房屋，但没有抵抗住暴风。房屋轰然倒塌，大家都受了伤。\n「滴答，怪我，今天没上够弦。」
E: Clockie steps forward to help Mirror Princess hold up the building, but he can't withstand the might of the storm. The house crashes down, and everyone is wounded.\n"Tick-tock, that's my bad. I didn't wind myself up enough today."

C: 钟表小子没舍得让猫头鹰老师拆掉太多房子，因为这是他们宝贵的家。\n「咕，旧的不去，新的不来。」
E: Clockie hesitated to let Professor Owl demolish too many houses because they were their beloved homes.\n"Hoo, out with the old, in with the new."

C: 钟表小子接受了石头老板的「好意」。但这笔不怀好意的财富，真的能带领小镇走向正途吗？
E: Clockie accepts Boss Stone's "good intentions," but can these ill-gotten gains really lead the town down the right path?

C: 罗盘号没有收到钟表小子的消息，他们正在汹涌海浪中冒险，信件全部被海浪卷走了……「滴答，大海上没信号吗！？」
E: Clockie's letter did not reach The Compass. The crew was busy navigating the rough sea, and all letters were swept away by the waves...\n"Tick-tock, is there no signal on the ocean!?"

C: 钟表小子和木头老爷一起修复了被破坏的镇史，但镇民们似乎更喜欢骗人杯编造的那一版——因为那更有趣。\n「滴答，真是的，假故事为什么总比真故事好听呢？」
E: Through Clockie and Old Man Wood's joint effort, the town's history was restored. Yet, the townsfolk seemed to prefer Scammer Cup's tampered version because it was more intriguing.\n"Tick-tock, I'm baffled — how come fake stories are always more captivating than genuine ones?"

C: 钟表小子坐着飞艇泼洒着自己的金币，人们都冲到了街上争抢金币，没人参加木头老爷的庆典。\n「记得带把结实点的伞，不然容易被砸伤。」
E: Clockie was scattering his gold coins around in an airship. Everyone scrambled to the streets to grab the gold coins, and no one attended Old Man Wood's celebration.\n"Take a sturdy umbrella with you, or you might get hurt."

C: 木头老爷给他钱财，美梦小镇不能有不满足。\n「滴答，金币不值钱，快乐值钱！」
E: Old Man Wood gave the person money. No dissatisfaction should be in Dreamville.\n"Tick-tock, gold coins are worthless. Joy has worth!"

C: 钟表小子听闻了伙伴们的噩耗，他的悲痛涌上心头。他知道，如果不让哈努兄弟结束这场荒唐的争斗，将会有越来越多的朋友遭遇危险。
E: Clockie hears the bad news about his mates, and is overwhelmed with grief. He knows that if Brother Hanu doesn't put an end to this ridiculous struggle, then more and more friends will be harmed.

C: 噩梦小镇对哈努兄弟的反对声越来越大，街头经常发生冲突与暴乱，必须想一个解决方法。哈努兄弟召集了几个伙伴，询问他们的方案。
E: A Nightmareville faction against Brother Hanu grows in size with riots and skirmishes out in the streets. A solution has to be found. Brother Hanu summons several of his mates and asks them about their plans to fix things.

C: 最终，哈努兄弟取得了战争的胜利。他重新划分了噩梦小镇的边界，宣布此处再也不是石头老板的领土。
E: Finally, Brother Hanu wins the war. He redraws the boundary lines of Nightmareville and pronounces it is no longer territory under Boss Stone's control.

C: 为了继续收集石头，左轮队长提出了一个建议——去镇旁的山洞中寻找宝石。他们组成了冒险小队，进入洞中找宝贵的石料……
E: To continue collecting up gems, Captain Revolver makes a suggestion: Go over to a cave outside town to look for gems. They team up into an adventure squad, and enter the cave in search of valuable stones...

C: 小镇里的人越来越多了，木头老爷坐在自己的大公馆里远程听取着各种报告，审批着一份又一份新的规矩。钟表小子想起了自己的责任，开始帮木头老爷管辖小镇。
E: The population in town begins to grow. Old Man Wood settles in his grand mansion as he diligently listens to various reports remotely and approves each new regulation that emerges. Clockie recognizes his duty and steps forward to assist Old Man Wood in governing the town.

C: 钟表小子继续调查美梦小镇的秘密，他发现木头老爷正在用枝蔓偷走大家的情感，用来修补坍塌的街道……
E: As Clockie dug deeper into Dreamville's secrets, he found out that Old Man Wood is stealing everyone's emotions with his branches to repair the collapsing street...

C: 将《美梦往事》全集汇总的总集篇，在各大影院轮播上映，能拍出多长的影片是对导演能力的考验……
E: The Anthology of the Dreamjoy Memoir complete series that will be screening in all major theaters. The director's skill will be tested in their ability to produce films of considerable length...

C: 战场的废墟上建起了小屋，镇民们重新获得了自由，噩梦小镇也改名为「美梦小镇」——因为噩梦再也不会笼罩在此处。
E: Houses are built over the debris of war, and the residents regain their freedom. Nightmareville is renamed to Dreamville — because nightmares will never blanket this place ever again.

C: 但灾难无法轻易消解、美梦小镇百废待兴——钟表小子又该如何面对接下来的危机呢？
E: But a disaster is not so easily quashed. There are many matters of import yet to be accomplished in Dreamville — how will Clockie overcome the crisis that looms?

C: 美梦小镇的疆域扩大了数倍，原本人烟稀少的地方现在建筑密集，星星点点的灯火闪耀其间。
E: Dreamville's domain has expanded manyfold. What were sparsely populated locales are now packed with myriad buildings, their flickering lights like shimmering stars across the landscape.

E: Increases Skill DMG taken by enemy targets by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After an ally character attacks enemy targets using Skill, the ally additionally regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy.

C: 在战斗开始时以及当装备者回合开始时，随机生效1个效果。该效果生效时，替换上次的效果且本次不会与上次重复。效果包含：使我方全体攻击力提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>；使我方全体暴击伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>；使我方全体能量恢复效率提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>。同类效果无法叠加，在装备者陷入无法战斗状态时解除。

C: <color=#42a8b9>#见鬼实录#</color>我家邻居是一位狐人鳏夫，叫文远。平日里我们街坊之间都互相接济一下。但最近几天文远白天不怎么出门。晚上见到他的时我问他最近干嘛，他说他老婆回来了，打算带她去金人巷逛逛？？可是他老婆若昔不是早就在三十年前殉职了么？而且我看他这几天气色不太对劲，不会是被鬼上身了吧？
E: My neighbor is a widowed foxian man named Wenyuan. Usually, we help each other out in our neighborhood. However, in recent days, Wenyuan hasn't been seen outside during the daytime. When I asked him what he's been up to lately, he said his wife has returned, and he plans to take her to Aurum Alley for a stroll??? But wasn't his wife, Ruoxi, deceased thirty years ago? Moreover, he doesn't seem quite himself these past few days. Could it be that he's been possessed by a spirit? <color=#42a8b9>#GhostSighting</color>

C:
◆ 虚构叙事 ◆
「虚构叙事」是一系列难度较高的关卡。挑战关卡获得通关所需积分即为完成挑战，可以领取丰厚奖励。此外，达成特定的关卡条件还可以获取额外奖励。「虚构叙事」的关卡难度和奖励不受均衡等级影响。

「虚构叙事」会周期性更新关卡内容与奖励。

在进入「虚构叙事」后，会暂时断开与外界的联系。您将无法进行下列操作：
●调整队伍成员；
●更换/升级/晋阶光锥与遗器；
●升级、晋阶角色；
●使用背包内的任何消耗品。

我方角色消灭敌方目标时恢复的能量，在「虚构叙事」玩法中，为常规战斗的<unbreak>50%</unbreak>。

◆ 玩法概述 ◆
在「虚构叙事」挑战中，敌方非首领单位阵亡后会不断补充。当非首领单位阵亡后会扣除首领单位生命值。当首领单位被击败后，即可通过该波次。
在每期「虚构叙事」更新后，具有独特的「战意机制」，触发后可快速积累「战意值」，充满后进入「战意汹涌」阶段，获得强大的关卡增益击败敌人！

◆ 战意值 ◆
积累「战意值」的方式包括：
●击败敌方单位，可积累少量战意值。
●战斗中触发「战意机制」，可积累大量战意值。

◆ 战意效果 ◆
在每期「虚构叙事」更新后，具有独特的「战意效果」，分为「战熄潮平」和「战意汹涌」两种不同的关卡增益。
●战斗开始时，处于「战熄潮平」阶段，获得初始增益效果。
●进入「战意汹涌」阶段时，可额外获得每期独特的强大增益。
●「战意汹涌」阶段持续一定行动值后，返回至「战熄潮平」阶段。
●「战意汹涌」阶段持续期间，击败敌方单位会积累「战潮复归」，在「战意汹涌」阶段结束时返还一定的「战意值」，返还值存在上限。

◆ 荒腔走板 ◆
在每期「虚构叙事」更新后，「荒腔走板」中会更新若干种战斗增益效果。
挑战「虚构叙事」的关卡前，可以为每支队伍选择其中一种增益效果。

◆ 积分 ◆
战斗过程中，敌人会在有限的轮次中不断出现，击败敌人或对首领敌人造成伤害均可获得积分。
每个关卡包含节点1和节点2两场战斗，最终以两场战斗的总积分进行结算，将根据本次挑战积分更新关卡最高积分。

◆ 快速解锁 ◆
「虚构叙事」的最高3星通关关卡进度会被记录。后续任何一期开启后，会根据记录快速解锁对应的关卡以及其全部前置关卡。
快速解锁后，可直接挑战记录中的最高3星通关关卡，3星通关后，视同3星通关全部前置关卡，并获得前置关卡的全部奖励。
目前该功能最多可快速解锁前3关。
E:
◆ Pure Fiction ◆
Pure Fiction contains a series of challenging stages. In this mode, you need to challenge the stages and earn the required number of points to pass the challenge and get splendid rewards. In addition, you will get bonus rewards for achieving specific targets. The difficulty and rewards of Pure Fiction stages are not affected by your Equilibrium Level.

Stages and rewards in Pure Fiction are regularly updated.

You will be cut off from the outside world when entering the Pure Fiction, with the following actions temporarily disabled:
● Changing team setup
● Changing, leveling up or ascending Light Cones and Relics
● Upgrading or ascending characters
● Using Consumables in your Inventory

In Pure Fiction, when characters defeat enemies, they regenerate only <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of the Energy that they would normally do in regular battles.

◆ Gameplay Overview ◆
In the Pure Fiction challenge, non-Boss enemy units will continuously respawn after being defeated. Each time a non-Boss unit is defeated, the Boss unit's HP will be reduced. Defeating the Boss unit allows you to clear that wave.
With each update of Pure Fiction, a unique "Grit Mechanics" system is introduced. When triggered, it allows for rapid accumulation of Grit Value. Once fully charged, player enters the "Surging Grit" phase, gaining powerful stage buffs to defeat enemies!

◆ Grit Value ◆
Methods to accumulate Grit Value includes:
● Defeat enemy units to earn a small amount of Grit Value.
● Trigger the Grit Mechanics in battle to earn a large amount of Grit Value.

◆ Grit Effects ◆
With each update of Pure Fiction, unique Grit Effects are introduced, divided into two different stage buffs: "Concordant Truce" and "Surging Grit."
● At the start of the battle, players are in the Concordant Truce phase, gaining initial buff effects.
● Upon entering the Surging Grit phase, players receive an additional powerful buff unique to that update.
● After the Surging Grit phase, has lasted for a certain amount of action value, the stage reverts to the Concordant Truce phase.
● During the Surging Grit phase, defeating enemy units accumulates "Resurging Tide." At the end of the Surging Grit phase, a portion of Grit Value is returned, up to a limit.

◆ Cacophony ◆
Cacophony updates with various combat after each Pure Fiction update.
You can select one of the buffs for each team before challenging any stage in the Pure Fiction.

◆ Points ◆
In this mode, enemies will appear for a limited number of Cycles. Defeating enemies or dealing DMG to the Boss enemy earns you points.
Each stage contains two battles, namely Node 1 and Node 2. Your final points are the total points earned in both battles, and your highest points will be updated at the end of each battle.

◆ Quick Unlock ◆
All stages in Pure Fiction that have been cleared with a 3-star rating are recorded. When a new event starts, all the cleared stages and their prerequisite stages will be immediately unlocked.
After Quick Unlock takes effect, You can directly challenge the last recorded stage that you passed with 3-stars. Once you have passed that stage with a 3-star rating, all the previous stages will be immediately cleared with a 3-star rating, and all rewards from those stages will be delivered to you.
Currently, only the first 3 stages can be quickly unlocked in this way.

An elegant and demure young lady.\nThis time, she has been invited home by The Family to grace everyone with song during the Charmony Festival.\nShe can use the power of "Harmony" to broadcast her music, manifesting "resonance" among not only her fans but all manner of lifeforms.

C: 舞步翩跹，光影悄然更迭。她牵着对方的手，含笑望向那双淡漠的眼睛。 「美丽的游侠…欢迎来到『记忆』的舞台。在这个距离…你比看上去更迷人。」 四周逐渐变得黑暗，一束光芒从穹顶倾泻而下，追随着两人不断变换的舞步。 「不过，有些人本该与我们共舞，但他们却迟迟未到……」 在旋转的瞬间，她凑近那副毫无表情的脸庞，握紧冰冷的手，轻轻问道—— 「可以告诉我，你做了什么？」 在越来越急促的舞步中，支离破碎的过往片段顺着指尖涌入她的脑海。 在越来越遥远的过去，她听见雨声，听见生命消逝之前发出的哀叹，然后她看到面前的舞者在微茫的雨中撑着血红的纸伞，而在她视线所及的地方—— 无数溺亡者的尸骸正在洪流中载沉载浮。 她惊慌地试图抽出手，向后跌落。 四周再次明亮起来，宴会的喧闹声重新涌现，对方轻轻托住了她的腰，仿佛浑然不知刚刚发生了什么。 「忆者，多么优美的舞蹈，要再来一次么？」
E: Their dance glides gracefully, shadows and light silently exchanging places. She takes the other person's hand, her smile beaming into those indifferent eyes. "Beautiful Ranger... Welcome to the stage of the Remembrance. At this proximity... you are far more enchanting than one might perceive." The surroundings darken, a beam of light cascading from the dome above, tracing their evolving steps. "However, some were meant to dance with us but have yet to arrive..." In a spinning moment, she draws closer to that expressionless face, grips that cold hand, and softly inquires— "Tell me. What have you done?" As their dance steps grow hurried more and more, fragmented snippets of the past rush into her mind through their joined fingertips. In a past that stretches back further and further, she hears the sound of rain and the lamentations just before life's extinguish. Then, she sees her dance partner holding a blood-red paper umbrella in the drizzling rain. Finally, as far as her eyes can see— A field of drowned corpses bobbing in the deluge. Panic-stricken, she tries to withdraw her hand, falling backward. The surroundings brighten again, the banquet's clamor resurfacing. Her dance partner gently supports her waist, as if oblivious to the ordeal that just unfolded. "What a lovely dance that was, Memokeeper. Shall we have another go?"

C: 「将军，此事请务必慎重…往后历史会怎么评论将军您……」 云骑将军双目半阖，听取手下来报。 「历史自然会有判断，但我对历史的结论无甚兴趣。」 「事成，我此时便是胸有成竹，神闲气定。」 「事败，我此时便是逸乐无度，爱雀失众。」 一只雀儿跳下他的肩膀，他顺势抬手接住。 「我只是做了我的判断罢了。」
E: "Do not make this decision lightly, general... Think about how you will be remembered in history..." The general of the Cloud Knights listens to his subordinates' words with eyes half-closed. "History will make its own judgment, but I have no interest in my legacy." "If I succeed, history will state that I am currently supremely confident in my masterful strategy." "But if I fail, then history will state that I am currently neglecting my duties in wanton pleasure, preferring finches over my people." A finch jumps down from his shoulder, and he extends his hand to catch the small creature. "I have simply made my own decision."

C: \n鹿死不择音。
E: \nA desperate deer will resort to any means to escape.

C: \n朝幪幪，暮枯瘁。蜉蝣朝露，来日苦短。
E: \nProsper in dawn, perish by dusk. So much sorrow in so little time, such is a mayfly's life paradigm.

C: \n成名的人未必是最棒的——许多才华横溢的人一辈子都默默无名。
E: \nFamous people are not necessarily the best. Many talented people live their lives in obscurity.

C: \n晨昏之眼合睑时，便将那阴云和雨雪赐予万民。
E: \nWhen the Eye of Twilight closes their eyes, they bestow clouds and snow to the people.

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《生苦不绝，烦漏难尽》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Life's Suffering, An Endless Tide."

C: 《天下熙熙》
E: "Anthropic Domain"

C: 《折翼的耀斑》
E: Solar Flare of Broken Wings

C: 当人子饮下晶核，便失却了觉察人心的机能。此后，星月轮转，俯瞰成了它唯一的天职。 它仍热爱生命，却再也无法将邻人视作生命。 「匍匐于大地，试图触碰那片湛蓝。身处天空时，青草的芬芳却无价…」
E: When the child of humanity drank of the crystal core, they lost the gift to sense human hearts. From then onward, their only purpose was to watch over the earth, bound to endless cycles of stars and moons. They continued to cherish life, yet could no longer perceive neighbors as living beings. "Prostrate upon the earth, longing for the touch of blue skies. Yet, once soaring high, the humble fragrance of grass is beyond all price..."

C: 忆域之中，万千思绪如尘埃纷扬。破碎端绪沉淀堆积，作为迷因的质料。\n\n「刹那心念，或一瞬生灭，或积聚成障。」
E: Within the Memory Zone, thousands of thoughts flutter like dust. Broken thoughts accumulate, serving as nourishment and components for memes.\n\n"A fleeting thought may dissipate into thin air or amass into obsessions."

C: 列车所存储的后备能源，为开拓之旅提供了坚实保障。\n\n「后备能源，那有没有后备的后备能源？——{NICKNAME}如是问道。」
E: Reserve resources for the Express that functions as a reliable safeguard for the trailblazing expedition.\n\n"Resource reserves. Hmm, do we have reserves of reserves? Such was {NICKNAME}'s question."

C: 连家族都不知其发行源头的神奇钞票，正面印着钟表小子的经典形象。这种货币被禁止用于梦境世界的常规买卖交易，只有极少数人知道它的真正用途。
E: A mysterious banknote, whose origin is unknown even to The Family. It features the classic image of Clockie on the front. This currency is prohibited for regular transactions in the Dreamscape world, and only a few people know its true purpose.

C: 钟珊交给你的计算机模块。将它加装到那些损坏的机兵身上，似乎就能让它们「死而复生」。不知怎么，这模块上还装了一块太阳能板。
E: The computer module that Zhongshan handed to you. Adding it to those damaged automatons seems to be able to "resurrect them from the dead." Somehow, this module also has a solar panel attached to it.

C: 这份合同能够证明金人巷商会经营码头的正当权利。
E: This contract can prove that the Merchant Guild has legitimate rights to operate the dock.

C: 一个看起来颇为昂贵的戒指，侧面刻着「钟珊家传」几个字。
E: An expensive-looking ring. The words "Zhongshan's Heirloom" are carved on its side.

C: 一枚古怪的梦泡，据说收录了已陨星神阿基维利的梦。\n\n「对不起…我真是世界上最糟糕的无名客。」
E: An unusual dream bubble said to contain the dreams of Akivili, a fallen Aeon.\n\n"I'm sorry... I truly am the worst Nameless in the world."

C: 螺丝咕姆交给你的神秘药物，或许它能勾起查德威克博士埋藏于意识深处的记忆。
E: A mysterious medicine Screwllum handed to you. It may evoke the memories buried deep within Professor Chadwick's consciousness.

C: 记载了预言的卷册。仔细观察才能发现，卷面是由金丝织就的。\n「此中包含着一则预言，它只向开卷者示现。」
E: A scroll with prophecies inscribed. Upon closer inspection, one will discover that the scroll is woven from golden threads.\n"There is a prophecy within that will only be revealed to the one who opens the scroll."

E: Miners' Ultimatum

C: 前五分钟都在想该怎么下嘴。
E: You spend the first five minutes contemplating how to take the first bite.

C: 据说曾经有一位享誉银河的流行巨星，他只需要在舞台上站着不动就能引得众生倾倒。
E: Rumor has it that there was once a galactic pop star so renowned that merely standing still on stage was enough to make his audience crazy.

C: 闭上眼，放下一切，然后酣眠。
E: Shut your eyes, put everything aside, and just rest.

C: 信则存在，不信则无。
E: Believe, and THEY shall exist. Don't, and THEY shall not.

C: 从现在起，我也要为了自己歌唱。
E: From here on out, I will also sing for myself.

C: 不知名的树脂如纤尘般细腻，似乎是来自裂界之中，被无形之手塑造成愿望的形状。\n\n「根据学会的研究来看，自塑尘脂极有可能是裂界复制的基础……」
E: This unknown resin is as smooth to the touch as finely-grained dust. It seems to be from the Fragmentum, and has been shaped into the form of a wish by an invisible hand.\n\n"Based on the Guild's research, the Self-Modeling Resin may be the basis of the Fragmentum's capacity to replicate entities..."

C: 你意识深处的种种开拓经历，将其完整回忆后能为游戏提供灵感。
E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 选用上好糯米，优质麦曲，辅以波月古海之水，再贮以时日，产出独属于琥珀花雕的风味。琥珀花雕以陈为贵，市面常见十年陈、百年陈、甚至千年陈，越陈越香。 「当女儿下地第一声啼哭，父亲便酿成三坛琥珀花雕，待到女儿出嫁之日再作为贺礼。」 「我这琥珀花雕已经酿成有五百年了，她还是没有找到对象。」
E: Made with high-quality glutinous rice and yeast then combined with water from the Lunarescent Depths, the mixture is then stored over time to produce the unique flavor of amber huadiao Wine. Amber huadiao wine gains value with time. It is common to see ten-years-old, hundred-years-old, and even a thousand-years-old amber huadiao wine out in the market. The older it is, the more fragrant it gets. "When a daughter is born and wails for the first time, the father will make three jars of amber huadiao wine to be saved for the day she is married as a wedding gift." "My amber huadiao wine have been with me for five full centuries, but my daughter is still without a partner."

C: 盒子开启前的那一刻，你永远不知道盒中贮装的是什么物品。 「这和买彩票有什么区别？」 「……至少我们不必担心这盒子里装着一只又死又活的猫咪。」
E: You never know what's in the box until you open it. "So it's essentially like buying a lottery ticket?" "At least we don't need to worry about finding a cat that is both dead and alive."

C: 星神「药师」执掌的命途。\n无私、利他、治愈的行为是「丰饶」命途的体现。
E: The path presided over by the Aeon Yaoshi.\nSelfless, altruistic, and healing actions are manifestations of the Path of Abundance.

C: 登上星穹列车的{F#少女}{M#少年}。\n为了消除星核带来的危机，选择与星穹列车同行。
E: A {F#girl}{M#boy} who boarded the Astral Express.\n{F#She}{M#He} chose to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the dangers posed by the Stellaron.

C: 追求长生的远行者。\n在星辰海洋中寻找星神药师的所在。
E: Far-flung voyagers in pursuit of immortality.\nThey search for the location of the Aeon, Yaoshi, in the ocean of stars.

C: 仙舟「罗浮」天舶司的首领，久历战阵的飞行士与射手。\n而今却陷于繁冗公务，难以抽身。
E: Head of the Sky-Faring Commission on the Xianzhou Luofu. Yukong was a seasoned pilot and a deadshot.\nSince heading up the commission, she's been buried under mountains of paperwork.

C: 翁法罗斯的泰坦是维系天地的力量，是从古至今的命运，是世间万物的规则。\n凡人们生活在它们的喜怒哀乐中，学识、战争、情爱以及生死都与它们的神权息息相关。
E: The Titans of Amphoreus are the forces that sustain the heavens and the earth, the fates flowing from ancient times to the present, and the rules governing all things in the world.\nMortals live within their joys and sorrows — knowledge, war, love, life, and death are all deeply entwined with their divine authority.

C: 「毁灭」的令使，绝灭大君之一。由权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>升格而成。\n纯粹的黑潮载体，没有自我的无首巨人，以毁灭「智识」命途为唯一动力。
E: An Emanator of "Destruction," one of the Lord Ravagers. Ascended through Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>.\nA bearer of pure black tide, a headless giant without self-awareness, driven solely to bring destruction to the Path of Erudition.

C:
#02号动物实验

进行了广谱动物的注射实验。实验对象皆出现了明显的活跃倾向，但药理剂量还需要再继续推敲，那两只雪雀已经连续三天叫个不停了，我根本没法入睡。

来雪原做测试确实是正确的选择，不用应付之前伦理委员会那群蠢蛋，也不用天天向机构申报写那些所谓规范的废话报告，明明两句话就能说清楚的实验，写那么多给谁看呢？

#14号动物实验

用裘鼠进行了几组对照试验，目前来看给药的「途径」对吸收的速率影响较大，初步观测的结果为：腹腔注射大于皮下注射大于灌胃服用的药效。腹腔注射组出现了休克反应，注射剂量还需要进一步调整，加快将人体测试提上议程。

这几只裘鼠我还挺不舍得的，总让我想到娜塔莎小时候养的那窝。虽然在这里效率高了不少，但材料和实验对象匮乏也是个大问题。南边有个铁卫的前哨站，也许可以试着去交易一下物资，木柴和油脂都快用完了。

#01号皮下实验

在自身的右手臂静脉进行了皮下测试，<unbreak>12</unbreak>小时内出现了大规模的过敏反应，并伴随有呕吐与眩晕的症状，但药理上的可行性得到了验证。在接下来的<unbreak>50</unbreak>小时内都没有寒冷反应。

报告写得很慢，这几天感觉手指有明显的麻痹感，不知道是不是皮下测试的后遗症。背部与手臂的浮肿和红斑缓和了很多，下次再试试更稳定的配方。
E:
Animal Experiment #02

I carried out a broad-spectrum animal injection experiment. The animals all appeared to grow more active, but the dose needs to be adjusted because the two snow finches have been screeching nonstop for three days. I couldn't sleep at all.

It is absolutely the right decision for me to come to the Snow Plains to conduct the experiment. I do not have to deal with those cretins on the ethics committee, nor do I have to produce those so-called daily reports. Why would I waste time writing so many words when two phrases can adequately explain the experiment?

Animal Experiment #14

Several controlled experiments with mice have been conducted, and it appears that the route of administration impacts the rate of medicine absorption, with preliminary findings indicating that intraperitoneal injection is more effective than subcutaneous injection and oral gavage. Shock symptoms were observed in the intraperitoneal injection group, indicating that the injection dose should be further reduced. Human testing should also be expedited.

I was hesitant to experiment with these mice because they reminded me of the ones Natasha had as a child. Despite the fact that I've been much more productive here, the limited supply and test subjects remain a major issue. There's a guard outpost to the south. Perhaps I can trade with them. I'm running low on firewood and oil.

Subcutaneous Injection Experiment #01

A subcutaneous injection was given into a vein on my own right arm, and I had a severe allergic response that included vomiting and dizziness within <unbreak>12</unbreak> hours, but the medication's effectiveness on the human body was confirmed. For the following <unbreak>50</unbreak> hours, I didn't feel cold.

I've made little progress on the report since I've been experiencing numbness in my fingers for the past several days, and I'm wondering if it is a side effect of the subcutaneous injection. The swelling and rashes on my back and arms have subsided significantly. Next time, I'll try a more stable formula.

C:
对于化外民而言，地衡司无疑是最常接触的司部。

在路上盘查居留证的是地衡司、上门调查人口的是地衡司、在各大节日庆典上维持秩序的是地衡司、在街上抓小偷的是地衡司、在永狩原考察生态的是地衡司、在仙舟途经强引力星体时颁布最新「星时制」的也是地衡司……

化外民和地衡司的接触如此频繁，以至于有那么一段时间，我不禁怀疑这篇考察文章根本就是多余的，任何人只要在仙舟上住些时日，自然能对地衡司的职能如数家珍。

可是，当我坐下来来仔细审视地衡司时，却发现地衡司是一个非常奇怪的组织。

翻阅他们公开发行的官方文件——比如每个化外民都会收到的《化外民趣味法律宝典》和因内容荒谬而广为流传的政绩宣传纪录片《守护星槎海》，你所看到的地衡司，或者说地衡司呈现给你的样貌，都是一个标准的执法部门。

可是，当你审视他们的实际工作，却会发现他们的工作范围广到不可理喻。

治安、消防、人口、历法…建制齐全的政府部门很难同时具有以上众多职能。

另有一点，我觉得颇为奇怪：地衡司在名义上负责处理仙舟的普通刑事案件（重案似乎是十王司的工作），可大部分普通刑事案件的抓捕行动却是由云骑兵负责的。同样，地衡司在名义上负责颁布历法，可数据收集是天舶司的工作，而数据推算则是太卜司的工作。

根据我收集的资料来看，地衡司对外展示的面貌，就是替所有司部打杂、为兄弟机关善后的职能部门，换句话来说就是「下水道」。他们辛苦劳累，为了仙舟上所有人平静的生活而忙得团团转……

然而，真的是这样吗？难道世上会有这么一群人，就甘愿为了别人的幸福而辛劳吗？我想肯定不会是这样简单。

基于我的社会常识推测，人们实际上弄反了地衡司和各司部之间的关系。地衡司并不是所有司部的下属，而是所有司部的实质上级。

他们遍布社会的各个角落——从穷街陋巷到象牙塔顶，辛苦的执法者是他们，伏案的学者是他们，幕后的操控者依然是他们。在仙舟上，没有任何人逃得过地衡司的眼睛，因为他们是明牌的间谍，堂而皇之地站在我们当中，而我们却对此视而不见。

想到这里，我不禁感到有些悚然，冷汗沾满了脊背。
E:
Without a doubt, the Realm-Keeping Commission is the one department that outworlders get to interact with the most.

Checking resident cards on the streets? That's the Realm-Keeping Commission's job. Doing surveys for census records? That's the Realm-Keeping Commission's job. What about maintaining order for major festivals and ceremonies, arresting thieves, and inspecting the ecosystem of the Ever-Hunt Plains? These are once again within the purview of the Realm-Keeping Commission. Finally, which department is in charge of issuing the updated star-time standard when the Xianzhou is passing through the strong gravitational pull of a celestial body? You guessed it, it's the Realm-Keeping Commission...

Outworlders interact with the Realm-Keeping Commission so frequently that there was a time when I couldn't help but wonder if these notes about the commission were superfluous. Anyone who stayed on the Xianzhou long enough would naturally become familiar with the functions of the Realm-Keeping Commission.

But when I sat down and examined the Realm-Keeping Commission in detail, I discovered that it turned out to be a highly unusual organization.

If you were to flip through some of their publicly released official materials — such as "A Collection of Interesting Outworlder Laws," which every outworlder would get upon arrival, and "Protecting Starskiff Haven," the commission's self-celebratory propagandist documentary, which only went viral due to its absurdity — you might think, or rather the commission wants you to think, that they are just a typical law enforcement agency.

However, when you take a closer look at what they actually do, you'll find that the scope of their work is mind-boggling.

Public security, firefighting, population statistics, calendar system... Even a fully staffed government department would be hard-pressed to take on all these duties.

Another thing that I found to be particularly unusual. The Realm-Keeping Commission is nominally in charge of handling misdemeanor cases in Xianzhou (felony cases seem to fall under the jurisdiction of the Ten-Lords Commission). But in the vast majority of misdemeanor cases, arrests are actually made by the Cloud Knights. Likewise, the Realm-Keeping Commission is the one department nominally responsible for releasing the calendar system, yet the data collection work is actually done by the Sky-Faring Commission and the data extrapolation is handled by the Divination Commission.

Based on the documents that I've sourced, the Realm-Keeping Commission presents itself to the public as a body that does odd jobs and offers support for all other departments. To put it bluntly, it functions like a sewer into which all the work flows, always working hard so that everyone else on the Xianzhou may continue their peaceful way of life...

Is that actually the case, though? Is there a group of individuals who are prepared to endure everything for the happiness of others? In my opinion, it can't possibly be this simple.

Based on my basic understanding of how human society operates, I'm of the opinion that people have in fact misconstrued the relationship between the Realm-Keeping Commission and all other departments. The Realm-Keeping Commission must have been superior to all other departments, contrary to what most people would have you believe.

Members of this commission can be found in every corner of society, from rundown ports to the ivory tower. They are the executive branch of the law, they are the hard-working scholars, and they are the scheming masterminds behind the scenes. On Xianzhou, no one can evade the watchful eye of the Realm-Keeping Commission as they are the officially licensed spies. We just can't spot them, even if they are standing right before us in plain sight.

When I start to think about all this, I can't help but feel a chill running down my spine.

尊敬的「蜗居公主」以及灰子：

你们可能早就猜到了，我并没有在驮兽工坊里露脸的打算。当然这也就意味着，我并没有在工坊里归还礼物的打算…这只是「猫鼠游戏」的暖场罢了。

不过你们也猜到了，猫咪怪盗的目的根本就不是*偷走一个廉价的手工品*，对吧？

——我要偷走的，是你们的心。

开玩笑的。

我对你们的心并不感兴趣。既然「蜗居公主」能追踪我的痕迹，那你们就来试试吧。我会在终点等着你们，放心，这次我们面对面谈。

又及：灰子，你哪弄的神血蜜露，不会是裁缝女给你的吧？我替你尝尝。

Dear Princess Homebody and Gray Mystery:

You probably guessed already — I had no intention of showing up at the pack beast workshop. This means, of course, I had no plans to return the gift there either... This was just a warm-up for our little game of cat and mouse.

But surely you've realized that the Kitty Phantom Thief never cared about *stealing a mere trinket*, right?

I have no interest in your hearts. If Princess Homebody can track my path, then by all means try. I'll be waiting at the end. And rest assured, we'll meet face-to-face this time.

P.S. Gray Mystery, where did you get that Dew of Divine Blood? Don't tell me it's a gift from the seamstress? I'll taste it for you.

C:
「对不起，我迟到了！」
我靠着识之花的力量翻越藤蔓，冲刺来到教室前，忐忑不安地拉开大门，却恰好与约定的对象四目相对。
刚刚年过三十的教授倚靠在墙上的讲课石板旁，松垮地站立着，学者服在永夜的微光下璨璨生辉，散发出一种近乎神圣的氛围感。

「哼嗯？第一节课就选择迟到。看来有人想去见塞纳托斯了啊……」
换句话说，这是我们的第一次一对一教学。而我这个开场就搞砸了的家伙，正可谓瑟希斯看了都觉得丢人。
好在我已经想好了对策案——

「对不起，教授，我愿意做任何事情来补偿！」
「任何事？」
「那个…还，还请手下留情…」
听闻此话，教授的脸上划过一丝带有魅力的笑容。

「那，我要你来教我。」
「等等，教授？」
「我希望，你能把这篇论文里的知识点，拆解开来，一字一句地，慢慢讲给我听。」
虽然这里没有镜子，但我猜，自己的脸已经因为突如其来的直接攻势而变得通红。

「那个，教授…我还只是实习生，现在做这种事，会不会，太早了？」
「唔…明明是我好不容易才鼓起勇气说出来的！你是想让我备的课白费吗？你这个笨蛋！」
「至少，至少等到课后！」
「…既然你都这么说了，那好吧。别忘了，我还没原谅你呢…今天我们先来学什么？」
「要不要先看一期学术期刊？最近好像新出版了对自然数字规律的研究」
「听起来不错嘛，快，来看看吧」

那篇研究报告十分具有价值，但我却连它的论点都没能理解，因为我无法把视线从教授犀利的眼眸上移开。
他沉浸于数字时的样貌是何等理性。不愧是我珍视的教授。

那之后，我们经历了充实的一课。在古典文学的展览中游逛，如饥似渴地嘬食着泰坦信仰调查的新编，最后，在赤陶学派新作带来的梦境中流连，以至于忘记了——

象征幕匿时的钟声响起，我们彼此相视。下课了。我不止一次地怨恨时刻为何近似线性流淌，然而却无法对其进行干涉。
教授看向了我顿了顿，仿佛下定了某种决心似的，喃喃道：

「把论文…拿出来吧。我会为你改稿的。」
「真的，可以吗？」
「嗯，你是我引以为傲的学生。我早已有此打算。」
「教授…」
「请让我理解，你的思想，你的研究成果，你的…一切。」
无需进一步的言语，两位理性的追寻者基于本能，开始了对知识点的探讨。
我们此时还未曾想，这一课过后，论文的致谢一栏会多出一个名字。而这最终，成为了我们成立学术研讨会的起因。
E:
"Sorry I'm late!"
I used the power of a Cognos Bloom to climb over the vines, rushing to the classroom and nervously pulling open the door, only to make eye contact with the person I had an appointment with.
The professor, barely over thirty, was leaning casually against the stone lectern, loose and relaxed. The scholar's robe gleamed bright in the dim light of the Evernight, giving off an almost divine aura.

"Hmm? The first class, and already late. Looks like someone is eager to meet Thanatos..."
In other words, this was our first one-on-one lesson and I just totally blew it from the start. Probably even Cerces would've felt embarrassed looking at such a sorry scene.
Luckily, I had already come up with a plan—

"Sorry, professor! I'll do anything to make it up to you!"
"Anything?"
"Well... please, I hope you'll be lenient..."
At these words, the professor's face broke into a charming smile.

"Then, I want you to teach me."
"Wait, Professor...?"
"I want you to break down the points in this paper, word by word, and explain them to me slowly."
Although there was no mirror here, I could guess that my face had turned red from the sudden and direct request.

"Um, but... Professor... I'm still just a student intern. Isn't it... a bit too... early for me to do something like this?"
"Hmph... I finally worked up the courage to say it! Do you want me to waste the lesson I prepared? You fool!"
"At least... at least wait until after class!"
"...If that's what you'd prefer, then fine. But don't forget, I still haven't forgiven you... So, what should we study first today?"
"Why don't we peruse this academic journal? I think they recently published a paper on the patterns of natural numbers."
"Sounds good. Come on, let's have a look."

The research paper was immensely valuable, but I couldn't even grasp the basic arguments, as I was too deeply engrossed in the professor's sharp gaze.
He looked so rational when he was immersed in numbers. Nothing less than I'd expect from the professor I cherished so much.

After that, we experienced an enriching lesson. We wandered through the classical literature exhibition, eagerly absorbing the newly compiled Titan Faith Studies. Finally, we lingered in the dreams woven by the latest works of the Erythrokeramism School, so much so that we completely forgot.

The bell signaling the Curtain-Fall Hour rang, and we looked at each other. Class was over. More than once, I had resented time for its seemingly linear flow, yet I remained powerless to interfere with it.
The professor looked at me and paused for a moment, as if making some kind of decision, then muttered:

"Take out your paper... I'll help you revise it."
"Really? You mean it?"
"Yes. You are a student I take great pride in. I've been considering this for some time."
"Professor..."
"Let me understand, your thoughts, your research, your... everything."
No further words were needed. Two seekers of knowledge, driven by instinct, began their deep exploration of ideas.
At that moment, we had yet to realize that after this lesson, another name would appear in the acknowledgments of the paper. And in the end, this would be the very spark that led to the founding of our academic symposium.

C: …… 卡宾慌慌张张地躲在地髓矿的货箱后面。「帕瓦被抓走了！」恐慌的念头始终挥散不去，「也许，我们一开始就不应该寻找德雷克的宝藏。」光是后悔并不能将帕瓦救回来，卡宾必须想想现在还能做些什么。 贝琪将手放在卡宾的肩膀上，试图让卡宾没有那么慌张。几天之前他们还在吃着太阳薄饼，商量着假期里要去怎么度过；而现在，他们却卷入了未曾设想的阴谋之中。那些集会者到底为什么想要得到宝藏，德雷克藏在地下的暗门会在哪里，而帕瓦到底会被怎么对待…她一时之间很难想明白。 「等等，」贝琪捡起了一张纸，这是来自三只小鼹鼠学校的信笺纸，也就是说这是帕瓦留下的纸。「可是纸上什么也没有，反而是黏黏糊糊的。」 「黏黏糊糊的？那么这可能是帕瓦留下的『无字天书』。」卡宾想起了自己曾经在秘密基地里做的小发明，曾经用到过隐形墨水。如果是用盐水写在纸上的，那么只需要稍微加热一下；如果是用白蜡烛写下的，那么就需要一些黑炭粉……「让我来试试吧！」 不出所料，这张纸条是有加密信息的。卡宾将它凑近矿灯，一行断断续续的文字浮现了出来。 「货架，货箱，摆放，相同。」 信息只是由一些单词写成，这也不奇怪，帕瓦在写下这些信息的时候没有办法知道自己写了什么，只好用言简意赅的方式避免让字母挤在一起。贝琪略微思考了一下，她好像明白了帕瓦留下有关德雷克暗门的线索了。 「货箱就是钥匙，打开暗门就像做家务一样简单。」贝琪得意地说。 ——亲爱的小读者们，你们知道她该怎么做了吗？ 鼹鼠提示： 仔细观看两边的货架，自然可以找出答案。
E: ... Carbine rushed to hide behind the crates used to store Geomarrow. "They took Pava!" This terrible thought kept echoing in his mind. "Maybe we shouldn't be looking for Drake's treasure in the first place." However, regret won't bring Pava back. Carbine needed to think of something to do to help. Becky placed her hand on Carbine's shoulder, trying to calm him down. Just a few days ago, they were eating suncakes and talking about how to spend the holiday. Now, they were involved in an unexpected conspiracy. Why did those who attended the gathering want the treasure? Where was Drake's underground hidden door? And what would they do to Pava... She couldn't answer any of these questions. "Hold on." Becky picked up a piece of paper. It looked like something used by the school they went to, which meant it was left by Pava. "There's nothing on the paper, and it's sticky." "Sticky? It might be Pava's invisible ink." Carbine recalled the small things he made in the secret base, and how he used invisible ink to write things down. If the text was written with brine, you heat the paper. If it was written with white candle, use charcoal powder to make the text visible... "Let me have a go!" And sure enough, the piece of paper carried secret information. Carbine moved the paper under the light of a miner's lamp, and a line of fragmented text appeared. "Shelves, crates, arrange, same." The text was just some words pieced together, which is of no surprise, given Pava couldn't see what he was writing. He had to make things simple and space out the letters. Becky gave it a quick thought and it dawned on her that Pava was sharing clues that could lead to Drake's hidden door. "The crates are the key. Opening the hidden door is easier than doing chores." Becky read with excitement. — Dear readers, do you know what she should do? Mole Tip: If you pay close attention to the shelves on both sides, you'll be able to figure out the answer on your own.

C: 由理性之种长成的生命花园已失去赖以生存的阳光。也许在未来它会枯萎，但至少现在还独自静静孕育生机。
E: The Garden of Life, grown from the seeds of reason, has lost the sunlight on which it depends for survival. Perhaps it will wither in the future, But at least for now, it still quietly nurtures vitality on its own.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

E: <color=#f29e38ff>Luocha</color> prepared an outfit in the style of the Purity Palace. <color=#f29e38ff>Dr. Ratio</color> tailored it and let that peacock-esque <color=#f29e38ff>Aventurine</color> wear it... Actually, it suits him pretty well!

C: <color=#f29e38ff>娜塔莎</color>种下一枚种子，<color=#f29e38ff>布洛妮娅</color>为它扫尽荒芜，<color=#f29e38ff>希儿</color>将它的果实轻轻取下——来自贝洛伯格的希望果实，定会流淌着甘甜的汁水。

C: 你是一个与众不同的人，拥有丰富的情感世界，和卓越的想象力。\n你擅长理解并共情他人的感受，对新事物感兴趣，也同样怀旧。\n你重视个性，崇尚自由，追求浪漫，这便是你强烈的艺术之源。
E: You are an extraordinary person rich in emotions and have a remarkable imagination.\nYou are good at understanding and empathizing with the feelings of others, displaying an interest in novel experiences while cherishing nostalgia equally.\nYou value individuality, freedom, and romance, which serve as the foundation for your profound artistic expression.

C: 原本是搭载了通用教材的「圆幕先生」，受到模因病毒的影响，教材变成了蕉材。在蕉石般的严厉与蕉阳般的热情间转换，必不可少的猿工，值得蕉往的猴友。
E: Originally a Mr. Domescreen loaded with the general syllabus. The educational materials became banaducational materials due to the influence of the memetic virus. It shifts between banarocky seriousness and sunny banapassion. An indisposable banamployee and a monkey who's a worthy banafriend.

E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

E: Deals minor Fire DMG to one target and adjacent targets, with a high chance of inflicting "Burn." This ability can only be used while in the "Classroom Channel" state.

C: 对我方随机单体造成4次冰属性伤害，如果目标身上拥有护盾，则造成伤害后还会对自身造成冰属性伤害，并大概率使自身防御力降低。
E: Deals 4 hits of Ice DMG to one random target. If the target has Shield, additionally deal Ice DMG to self with a high chance to decrease this unit's DEF.

C: 使所有「秩序的傀儡」均成为【司律】并进入【守备】状态，每回合可再次行动并小幅提高其速度。当目标的弱点被击破时，使其行动延后；如果此时所有「秩序的傀儡」都处于弱点击破状态，则会对自身造成伤害、额外延后所有「秩序的傀儡」的行动，并使其受到的伤害提高。当「秩序的傀儡」从弱点击破状态恢复时，会重新被选为【司律】。
E: Causes all Puppets of the Order to become "Impresario" and enter the "Safeguard" state, granting them an extra action each turn and a small increase to their SPD. When the target's Weakness is Broken, causes their action to be delayed. If all Puppets of the Order are Weakness Broken at this time, this unit will receive DMG and delay all Puppets of the Order's actions while also increasing the DMG they receive. When a Puppet of the Order recovers from being Weakness Broken, they will be designated as the new "Impresario."

C: 在行动序列上添加【孤狼之哮】，每次【孤狼之哮】行动时，解除场上所有「斯科特」的控制类负面状态与弱点击破状态，将全体「斯科特」的【讥讽】状态转变为【狂乱】状态，并施放【致孤狼：卑劣人生】。每当有一名「斯科特」的弱点被击破时，【孤狼之哮】的行动将小幅延后。
E: Adds "Roar of the Lone Wolf" on the Action Order. Every time "Roar of the Lone Wolf" takes action, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs and Weakness Broken states on all "Skott" units on the field, switches all "Mocked" states on all "Skott" units on the field to "Rabid" states, and uses "To the Lone Wolf: Ignoble Life." Every time a "Skott" is Weakness Broken, the action of "Roar of the Lone Wolf" is slightly delayed.

C: 进入蓄力状态，自身获得3层【无明火】和1层【地之刺】，每次行动施放【痛恶如刺剔骨】，自身被弱点击破后解除蓄力状态。
E: Enters the Charging state, gains 3 stacks of Obscure Blaze and 1 stack of Terrathorn. Deals Bonepiercing Odium with each action, and loses the Charging state after being Weakness Broken.

C: 召唤4个【枪尖】。如果场上已经有雕塑，回复其全部生命值。
E: Summons 4 Speartips. If statues are currently present on the field, heal their HP back to full.

C: 芒寒色正的银骑士会在战斗中切换自身<u>战斗姿态</u>，召唤不同雕塑进行战斗；我方消灭【灵魂释放】状态的雕塑时，会使本次战斗中我方全体造成的伤害提高。
E: The Silver Knight of Virtuous Gallantry can switch their own <u>Combat Stance</u> in battle and summon different statues to fight. When characters defeat statues in the "Soulfreed" state, DMG dealt by the team in this battle will be increased.

C: 升华一个雕塑中纯美的灵魂，使被灵魂升华的雕塑技能效果增强并立即行动。
E: Frees a Soul of Beauty from one of the statues. Causes the ability of the Soulfreed statue to be enhanced and to immediately take action.

C: 召唤【天谴斗士】。
E: Summons "Furiae Warrior."

C: 对我方全体造成大量虚数属性伤害，伤害由目标<u>平均分摊</u>。
E: Deals massive Imaginary DMG to all targets. The DMG is <u>distributed evenly</u> among the targets.

C: 拥有一定层数的【战甲】，使自身受到的伤害降低。受到攻击后减少自身1层【战甲】，减少到0层时，【战甲】被破坏，对自身造成大量虚数属性伤害，并使自身行动延后，使破坏【战甲】的我方单位恢复能量。【战甲】被破坏后，自身受到攻击时额外再受到少量虚数属性伤害。【战甲】在自身回合结束时恢复到最大层数。
E: Possesses a number of "War Armor" stacks, which decreases DMG taken. Loses 1 stack of "War Armor" on this unit after being attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit and delaying their action. The target that destroyed "War Armor" will regenerate Energy. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

C: 施放【不磨不灭的灾厄】时为我方全体目标施加<u>【荣耀】</u>，每层<u>【荣耀】</u>提高目标造成的伤害和能量恢复效率，施放战技或终结技时可叠加<u>【荣耀】</u>；【蛮神，疯王，纷争的化身】下次行动后解除所有我方目标的<u>【荣耀】</u>状态。
E: When using "Calamity Eternal," apply <u>"Glory"</u> to all targets. Every stack of <u>"Glory"</u> increases DMG dealt and Energy Regeneration Rate. When the affected target uses Skill or Ultimate, <u>"Glory"</u> can be stacked. After the next action by "Savage God, Mad King, Incarnation of Strife," dispel <u>"Glory"</u> from all targets.

C: 每个我方角色生成1个对应的【征服或被征服】，并使对应角色进入【受征服】状态。【受征服】会降低角色可回复的生命上限，降低对应【征服或被征服】的生命值可恢复对应比例的可回复生命上限。
E: Every target character generates 1 corresponding "Conquer or Be Conquered," which inflicts "Conquered" to the corresponding character. "Conquered" will decrease the character's Maximum Restorable HP. Decreasing the HP of the corresponding "Conquer or Be Conquered" can restore an equal percentage of the character's Maximum Restorable HP.

C: 使所有处于弱点击破状态下的【哀悯长臂】解除弱点击破状态，恢复所有韧性，并立即行动。

C: 自身陷入【重创】状态时，下次行动回复所有生命值并解除【重创】状态。

C: dev_把合适重量的雪球推到对应称重板上
dev_在不被发现的情况下跟踪卢卡
「你尽可仰望璀璨的繁星，但切忌凝视虚无的深渊…那片黑雾中空无一物，仅一瞥便足以令凡人摒弃理智。」 ——混沌医师慕榕 「虚无」的存在是一个谜，祂的形象被层层叠叠的迷雾包裹着。 Ⅸ不与其它星神往来，祂相信多宇宙的本质乃是虚无，因而存在毫无价值。
E: "You may gaze deep into the vast grandeur of the stars, but do not glance at the abyss of the void... for it holds nothing except for the ability to make mortals lose all reason and thought." — Murong, Doctor of Chaos The existence of Nihility is a mystery itself, THEIR form enshrouded by layers of mist. IX doesn't interact with the other Aeons. THEY believe that the ultimate fate of the multiverse is nothingness, and therefore, worthless.

E: Obtained from the Dreamflux Reef station

C: 伤重的云骑军士兵转化为魔阴身，白露从人群中冲出将其击倒。与此同时，更多的魔阴身士卒向白露逼近。
E: A Cloud Knights soldier, gravely wounded, was stricken with mara. Bailu burst forth from the crowd and struck him down. Meanwhile, more Mara-Struck Soldiers closed in on Bailu.

C: 那刻夏以炼金术将「岁月」火种自盗火行者的仪式剑中取出，缇宝随即带大家返回当下。盗火行者欲从往昔中挣脱，万敌赶到支援战斗。
E: Anaxa used alchemy to extract the Coreflame of Time from the Flame Reaver's ceremonial blade, and Tribbie immediately returned everyone to the present. As the Flame Reaver fought to escape the past, Mydei arrived as reinforcement.

C: 赛飞儿发动「诡计」权能，将一枚硬币高高抛起。待到硬币落回赛飞儿手中时，你和遐蝶已经被赛飞儿带到斯缇科西亚。
E: Cipher used her power of "Trickery," tossing a coin high into the air. By the time the coin fell back into her hand, she had already transported you and Castorice to Styxia.

C: 「长夜」接受三月七所献出的全部记忆，化身为长夜月。
E: Evey accepted all of March 7th's offered memories and transformed into Evernight.

C: 你在椅子上醒来，艾丝妲与螺丝咕姆正在讨论空间站受到的袭击。真理医生认为，你身上有关于袭击的线索。
E: You awoke in a chair to find Asta and Screwllum deep in discussion about the space station attack. Dr. Ratio suspected you might hold clues related to it.

C: 丹恒念动祷词，建木封印却毫无反应。丹恒将祷词教授给白露，在两代龙尊的合力下，成功修复建木封印。
E: Dan Heng chanted the prayer, yet the Ambrosial Arbor Seal remained inert. He then passed the prayer to Bailu, and together, the two generations of high elders managed to restore the seal.

C: 诊所物资告罄，希儿申请替娜塔莎从被侵蚀的城区中收集物资。你与布洛妮娅正碰见这场会谈，主动提出与希儿一同前往。
E: With supplies at the clinic running out, Seele asked to retrieve materials from the corroded area on Natasha's behalf. You and Bronya arrived just in time for the discussion and volunteered to join Seele on the mission.

C: 丹枢落败，却向停云伸出手，呼唤「绝灭大君」<color=#f29e38ff>幻胧</color>兑现承诺。「停云」一脸失望，称这有悖于她的「毁灭」美学。
E: Defeated, Dan Shu reached out to Tingyun, urging the Lord Ravager, <color=#f29e38ff>Phantylia</color>, to honor their pact. "Tingyun" expressed her disappointment, stating this contradicted her aesthetic of Destruction.

C: 景元重提旧事，丹恒却称自己不再是前世罪人<color=#f29e38ff>丹枫</color>。景元要丹恒以「丹枫」身份再帮他一个忙，就任由其前世彻底死去。
E: Jing Yuan brought up the past again, but Dan Heng claimed that he was no longer the sinner of his past life, <color=#f29e38ff>Dan Feng</color>. Jing Yuan asked Dan Heng to do him another favor as "Dan Feng," and he'd let his previous incarnation die once and for all.

C: 猎犬家系的治安官出现，斥责猎犬家系成员们误将客人当逃犯，为你们解围。
E: An officer from the Bloodhound Family appeared, and scolded the other members for mistaking guests as criminals. This relieved you of the situation.

C: 进入翁法罗斯后，三月七以迷因状态走遍世界。为寻求保护你和丹恒的方法，三月七向长夜月献出她的全部记忆。
E: After entering Amphoreus, March 7th wandered the world in a memetic state. In search of a way to protect you and Dan Heng, March 7th offered all her memories to Evernight.

C: 史瓦罗承认卢卡的强大，其表现值得让史瓦罗重新评估人类的极限。卢卡遭受重创，倒地不起，在搏击对局中落败。
E: Svarog acknowledged Luka's strength, saying his performance warranted a reevaluation of human limits. Luka suffered a heavy blow and collapsed, losing the match.

C: 星穹列车收到一条来自仙舟罗浮的消息。景元邀请列车组诸位拨冗赏光，参观罗浮即将举办的「星天演武」仪典。
E: The Astral Express received a message from the Xianzhou Luofu. Jing Yuan cordially invited the Crew to attend the upcoming "Luminary Wardance" ceremony.

C: 符玄带卡芙卡离开后，你与三月七、瓦尔特探索长乐天。三月七担心自己的冒失之言会惹太卜生气，但瓦尔特认为符玄是通情达理之人。
E: After Fu Xuan took Kafka away, you explore the Exalting Sanctum with March 7th and Welt. March 7th was concerned that her reckless remarks might have angered the Master Diviner, but Welt believed that Fu Xuan was a reasonable person.

C: 你成功打开只能感应人类的宝库大门，垃圾桶们欢呼你为救世主。你获得「信任的证明」。
E: You successfully opened the treasure vault door that could only detect humans. The trashcans heralded you as a savior, and you gained a Proof of Trust.

C: 你遇到一位正在数垃圾的「阿圾米德」。若你想要「信任的证明」，可以帮它数完最后三桶。
E: You encountered Trashiemedes, who was counting trash. If you wanted a Proof of Trust from them, you had to help them go through the last three cans.

C: 卡卡瓦夏从卡提卡人手中赢回母亲遗留的项链，姐姐告诫他再勿涉险。卡卡瓦夏怀疑，若自己受到地母神的注视，为何命运将一切夺走？
E: Kakavasha won back the necklace his mother bequeathed to him from Katica. His sister warned him not to put himself in danger again. Kakavasha was suspicious, if the Mother Goddess truly watched over him, why did fate rob him of everything?

C: 黄泉欲前往匹诺康尼，被告知所行之路不为「同谐」包容。黄泉自阴影中归来，唯余一丝色彩，她将凭此抵达「虚无」的尽头。
E: Acheron intended to head to Penacony but was told that the road she treaded was not embraced by the Harmony. Acheron returned from the shadows, retaining only a trace of color, and with that, she would reach the end of the Nihility.

C: 你饰演创业逐梦者，为争夺雨伞市场与甜猿泰山激战，重现商战冲突，顺利通关第二场挑战。
E: Next, you portrayed an entrepreneurial Dreamchaser, battling Sweet Gorilla over control of the umbrella market, reenacting a dramatic business rivalry, and successfully clearing the second challenge.

C: 战斗落幕，乐手退场，星期日欲驱逐「同谐」，建立秩序新国。
E: The fight was over, and the musicians exited the stage. Sunday intended to expel the Harmony and create a new nation of the Order.

C: 列车组召开会议，投票决定下一站开拓目的地。
E: The Express Crew held a meeting and held a vote to decide the next stop on your trailblazing journey.

C: 流萤偶然听见酒吧内两名客人议论你的举止奇特，提醒彼此远离。
E: Firefly happened to hear two guests in the lounge talking about your bizarre behaviors, and how they told each other to avoid you.

C: 你来到典礼现场，打算稍作休息，等待谐乐大典开始。
E: You arrived at the venue of the festival and planned to rest while waiting for the Charmony Festival to start.

C: 作为匹诺康尼的股东们，白日梦酒店为列车组的各位腾出了六间铂金客房。前台艾丽称，有一位「帕姆」先生已经入住酒店。
E: As shareholders of Penacony, the hotel prepared six Platinum Guest Rooms for your stay. The receptionist Alley mentioned that a Mr. Pom-Pom had already checked in.

C: 丹恒觉得家族成员的妥协有些奇怪，像是突然改变了想法。学生志愿者呼唤你，催你去参加试镜。
E: Dan Heng found the families gave in too easily, as if they had suddenly changed their minds. A student volunteer called to you, urging you to participate in the audition.

C: 米凯介绍，自称「助蕉」的人组成「睡蕉社」，在流梦礁大肆宣传「睡蕉小猴」。米凯认为这是镇民们的自由，但波提欧决定出手管管。
E: Micah explained that people calling themselves Assistanana had formed the Slumbernana Association and were heavily promoting Slumbernana Monkey at Dreamflux Reef. Micah believed this was the townsfolk's freedom of choice, but Boothill decided to intervene.

C: 万维克违规则吃冰淇淋却无事，星期日察觉异状，怀疑秩序被扭曲。
E: Wonweek broke the rules and ate the ice cream, but nothing happened. Sensing this abnormality, Sunday suspected that the Order might have been corrupted.

C: 星期日回忆设立「勿扰鸟类」是为了保留师长的静谧时光。
E: Sunday recalled that setting up the "do not disturb the birds" rule was to preserve some peaceful and quiet time for his teacher.

C: 大地兽商队抵达，你与丹恒、白厄、缇宝以及神殿中的难民们出发前往如今唯一的人类城邦，<color=#f29e38ff>「圣城」奥赫玛</color>。
E: When the Dromas Caravan arrived, you began your journey to <color=#f29e38ff>the holy city of Okhema</color>, the last human city-state, along with Dan Heng, Phainon, Tribbie, and the temple refugees.

C: 你调查水池，遐蝶称此处是树庭一切水流之源。你无法以常规方法灌满水池，只好去取「卡吕普索」所称的宝物。
E: You investigated the pool, and Castorice said it was the source of all water in the Grove. Unable to fill the pool through conventional means, you decided to go after the treasure Calypso mentioned.

C: 阿格莱雅的金丝开始颤抖，时间所剩无几。你与迷迷念动祷言：「欧洛尼斯，我呼唤你！揭开记忆的帷幕，激起往昔的涟漪——」
E: Aglaea's golden threads began to tremble — not much time was left. You and Mem joined in prayer: "Oronyx, heed my call! Lift the curtain of memory, stir the ripples of past reverie—"

C: 圣杯破碎后，老奥帝与芮克先生交易在这场战争中留下的记忆遗产，并签署声明放弃以阿斯娜之名注册的商标，及其创作成果的所有权。
E: After the Holy Grail broke, Old Oti struck a deal with Mr. Reca for the memory legacy from the War. He signed a document giving up the trademark registered under Asna's name and all ownership rights to her creative works.

C: 面对孤狼兄弟的威胁，正义斯科特坚持保护折纸知更鸟。你加入对抗恶灵的战斗，却遭受诅咒变化为小小哈努的模样。
E: Facing the threat from the Lonewolf Brothers, Skott of Justice insisted on protecting Origami Robin no matter the cost. You joined the fight against the evil spirits, but got cursed and shrunk into a Tiny Hanu.

C: 遐蝶让缇宝和海瑟音在斯缇科西亚创造一条通往创世涡心的密道，并由她永远看护。悬锋王欧利庞携王储迈德漠斯加入同盟，守卫圣城。
E: Castorice had Tribbie and Hysilens build a secret passage to the Vortex of Genesis in Styxia, which would be guarded by her forever. The Kremnoan king Eurypon, along with the crown prince Mydeimos, joined the alliance to safeguard the holy city.

C: 你在办公室发现归来的黑塔。黑塔并不在乎你们要做什么，只要别去烦她就行。
E: You found Herta back in the office. She made it clear she didn't care what you were doing, as long as it didn't involve bothering her.

C: 真理医生希望阿兰带你们去寻找阿德勒，却被告知阿德勒也已失踪。他最后一次出现是在主控舱段，你们前往调查可能的线索。
E: Dr. Ratio wanted Arlan to accompany you in the search for Adler, but was informed that Adler had also gone missing. He was last seen in the master control zone, so you headed there to investigate potential leads.

C: 巴列维确认「矿脉探测器」是稀罕货，可惜他没能力将其修好，但仍愿意以高价回收。虎克有些失落，带着损坏的探测器与你一起回去。
E: Balaway confirmed that the "vein detector" was a rare item. Unfortunately, he couldn't fix it, though he was still willing to buy it at a high price. Hook felt a bit disappointed as she headed back with you, carrying the damaged detector.

C: 你们找到一架废弃的无人机，其外壳上的漆字遭到故意刮花。卢卡请你搭把手，把废弃的无人机修好。
E: You found a discarded drone with its painted markings deliberately scratched off. Luka asked you to help him repair it.

C: 半夏找到了梁沐，而梁沐却把她当成了怪物。
E: Banxia found Liangmu, but he only mistook her for a monster.

C: 彦卿发现一个被魔阴身士卒包围的女人，当即拔剑，准备将其救下。
E: Yanqing discovered a woman surrounded by Mara-Struck Soldiers. He unsheathed his sword and readied himself to rescue her.

C: 丹恒告诉三月七，现在空间站很危险，并要求三月七跟上他。
E: Dan Heng warned March 7th that the space station was dangerous, and told her to stay close.

C: 在桂乃芬的惊声尖叫后，藿藿一时间也慌了神。你与藿藿四下张望，发现桂乃芬已经不见踪影。
E: After Guinaifen let out a piercing scream, Huohuo panicked for a moment. You and Huohuo looked around, only to discover that Guinaifen had already disappeared without a trace.

C: 副警长为两人介绍嫌疑人情况：店员阿佑是皮皮西人，富商佐罗同花火有商业竞争关系，赌徒钟珊曾将自己的传家宝输给花火。
E: The Deputy Sheriff briefed them on the suspects: Wright was a Pepeshi shopkeeper, Lefton the businessman was a business rival of Sparkle's, and Zhongshan was a gambler who had lost a family heirloom to Sparkle.

C: 母女二人望向天空，思绪翻涌。还是不要打扰她们了。
E: The mother and daughter gazed toward the sky, lost in their thoughts. Better not disturb them right now.

C: 银手指
E: Silver Finger

C: 已买，根本没有鲱鱼。大家避雷！
E: I bought it, but there was no herring. Don't fall for it!

C: 尚有提升空间，但…还算不错。
E: There's still room for improvement, but... it's not bad at all.

C: 旅途定格为瞬间，瞬间连缀成回忆，回忆讲述为故事…「开拓」之旅仍在继续，故事也不会就此停止。
E: The journey freezes into moments, moments weave into memories, and memories tell a story... The Trailblaze expedition continues, and the story will not end here.

C: 路边的大理石雕塑，让人想起一位故人…或许他能为拍摄下一张照片慷慨相助？
E: The marble sculpture by the roadside reminds one of an old friend... Perhaps he could generously lend a hand in capturing the next photo?

C: 花火送来了「镜头万花筒」，不知打算使什么坏…先用它实验一番吧。
E: Sparkle has sent over the "Camereidoscope," but it's unclear what mischief she intends... Let's experiment with it first.

C: 没有拍摄到目标
E: Did not capture subject

C: 「纷争荒墟」悬锋城
E: "Strife Ruins" Castrum Kremnos

C: 「龙骸古城」斯缇科西亚
E: "Dragonbone City" Styxia

C: 迴星港
E: Stargazer Navalia

C: 三月七的「记忆」
E: March 7th's "Memory"

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 「做选择时，不要让自己后悔。」
E: "When you make choices, make ones that you won't regret."

C: 赶紧分析原因，不然就被炒了！
E: Gotta get to the bottom of this before you're fired!

C: 向众人展示你隐藏的厨艺。
E: Demonstrate your hidden cooking skills.

C: 你使用了强力吐真剂。
E: You use a high-effectiveness truth serum.

C: 用飞行表演测试最高速度。
E: Push the speed limit with a flight show.

C: 别忘了星穹列车是谁修好的。
E: Don't you forget who repaired the Astral Express.

C: 直觉告诉你，必须做点什么。
E: Your instincts tell you that you must do something.

C: 不禁让人感慨「熙熙攘攘、我们的城市。」
E: Can't help but think about the bustling city.

C: 「猫」是一下子的事，帅是一辈子的事。
E: Stealth lasts a moment, but style is eternal.

C: 鲸群奔向梦境的裂口，仿佛要坠入深渊，又像是在追逐光明。
E: The whale pod rushes toward the rift of dreamscapes, as if about to fall into the abyss, yet seemingly chasing the light.

C: 头饰
E: Headwear

C: 雕像
E: Statue

C: 武器架
E: Weapons Rack

C: 观赏风景
E: View Scenery

C: 控制装置
E: Controller

C: 普通战利品
E: Basic Treasure

C: 「无尽膨胀碎片」位面获得<unbreak>55000</unbreak>试炼点数
E: Obtain <unbreak>55,000</unbreak> trial points in the "Infinite Expansion Fragment" plane

C: 完成所有限时奖励任务
E: Complete all limited-time missions

C: 打开任意#4个战利品
E: Open #4 treasure(s)

C: 累计获取#4活跃度
E: Reach #4 in Activity

C: 每日实训活跃度达到<unbreak>500</unbreak>
E: Reach <unbreak>500</unbreak> on Daily Training Activity

C: 在「实验助手请就位」中协助完成所有实验报告
E: Help to finish all experiment reports in "Lab Assistants In Position"

C: 在「忘却之庭」中累计获得<unbreak>15</unbreak>星通关奖励
E: Obtain a total of <unbreak>15</unbreak> stars in the Forgotten Hall from clearing stages

C: 累计进行#4次跃迁
E: Warp a total of #4 time(s)

C: 完成开拓任务「在第八日启程」
E: Complete the Trailblaze Mission "A New Venture on the Eighth Dawn"

C: 在「末日幻影」中累计击败#4个首领
E: Defeat a total of #4 bosses in Apocalyptic Shadow

C: 完成开拓任务「黎明啊，执耀于全世之终」
E: Complete Trailblaze Mission "Dawn, Shine at the World's End"

C: 在「银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇」活动中，累计进阶#4把不同的传说武器
E: Ascend a total of #4 different legendary weapons in the "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King" event

C: 使用「存护」命途完成「模拟宇宙：寰宇蝗灾」第五难度
E: Use the Path of Preservation to complete Simulated Universe: Swarm Disaster at Difficulty 5

C: 在折磨难度，难题等级大于等于#1时通关
E: Clear a run at Conundrum Level #1 or higher in Torturous Difficulty.

C: 在折磨难度，难题等级大于等于#1时通关
E: Clear a run at Conundrum Level #1 or higher in Torturous Difficulty.

C: 在浅层「梦境迷钟」中完成#4个关卡
E: Complete #4 stage(s) in the Shallow Dreamscape's Dream Ticker

C: 在深层「梦客漫步」中完成#4个关卡
E: Complete #4 stage(s) in the Deep Dreamscape's Dreamwalker

C: 击败第3波次首领
E: Defeat the third wave's boss

C: 完成微缩星球的挑战后解锁
E: Unlock by completing the Miniature Planet challenge

C: 击败残响回廊决胜乐园的所有挑战者
E: Defeat all challengers in the Corridor of Fading Echoes Victory Zone

C: 自由挑战模式下，在3场不同的「挑战」中取得胜利
E: Achieve victory in 3 different challenges in Open Challenge mode

C: 累计领悟#4次剑招
E: Master Sword Moves a total of #4 time(s)

C: 在银枝训练中击败第1阶段首领
E: Defeat the 1st phase boss in Argenti training session

C: 在「翁法罗斯」收集#4个「战利品」
E: Collect #4 treasure(s) in Amphoreus

C: 在海选赛第三轮-Ⅱ取得前二
E: Place in the top 2 in Qualifier Round 3 — II

C: 在风暴回响「超巨星」模式中，击败#3波敌人
E: Eliminate #3 wave(s) of enemies in the Echoes of Storm "Supergiant Star" mode challenge

C: 在当前关卡冒险挑战中，积分达到#2
E: Reach #2 points in the current Stage's adventure challenge

C: 在「缤纷大乱斗」活动的「双豹成行」与「群鸟争锋」模式中，总计达到#4积分
E: Achieve a total of #4 points in "Double Seals" and "Best of the Flock" modes during the Colorful Mayhem event

C: 在任意赛场累计使用#4次道具
E: Use items a total of #4 time(s) in any arena

C: 累计购买#4次经验
E: Purchase Experience #4 times in total

C: 完成浅层#1所有关卡后解锁
E: Unlocked after completing all stages in Shallow #1

C: 军团虽已退走，异变仍在发生。多个区域出现了裂界化的征兆，艾丝妲组建了调查队前往现场勘察。
E: The Legion has retreated, but the mutation hasn't stopped. There are signs of Fragmentum in multiple areas. For that reason, Asta assembled a probe team to go deep into the field to investigate the unknown crisis.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「黄金替罪羊」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by Golden Scapegoat. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 一场漫游宇宙的探索之旅！谁知道途中会发生些什么呢……
E: An adventure that spans the universe! Who knows what you might encounter along the way...

C: 缇宝梦境深处
E: Depths of Tribbie's Dream

C: 深层「气泡弹珠」难度II

C:
奥克莱的毡帽继承自去世的父亲，她把野穗别在帽带上作为装饰，看上去可爱了许多。赏金客们有意无意地创作自己的标志，希望可以留给后人作为传说的开头。

星际和平公司利用悬赏招募奇人异士去追缉星际盗团，而独来独往的奥克莱总是选择那些难捱的荒漠边陲。

烈日数日，寒夜也数日。孤独的旅途中，奥克莱枕着毡帽、靠近篝火便能悄然入梦。梦境中总会被一名神秘枪手闯入，自称是来自远方的赏金客，他身形瘦削，却目光锐利。枪手要求奥克莱的父亲同他在正午决斗，枪声响起，毡帽飞离，父亲仰面倒下，随即便是母亲的嚎啕哭声……

小奥克莱怔怔地盯着神秘枪手，那人的动作一气呵成，父亲毫无胜算。

从梦中醒来，毡帽上留下泪水的痕迹。小奥克莱就是想要父亲那顶帅气的帽子，才开始学枪的。
E:
Oakley inherited this felt hat from her deceased father. Now that she tucked ears of wheat into the hat as ornaments, it looked much cuter than before. Bounty hunters, whether intentionally or not, always sought to craft emblems of their own, in the hope that these items could one day become the beginning of great legends.

The Interastral Peace Corporation offered bounties to enlist experts of the highest caliber to hunt down Interastral Pirates and Oakley, as one who always worked alone, forever sought out the most challenging regions of desolation among the farthest reaches of the world.

Days under the scorching hot sun were coupled with bitterly cold nights. In her lonely odyssey, Oakley could fall asleep with her head pillowed on her felt hat whenever she was near a bonfire. All her dreams were intruded by a mysterious gunslinger, who claimed to be a bounty hunter from afar. His scrawny figure was in sharp contrast with his fiercely stern gaze. The gunslinger challenged Oakley's father to a duel to the death at high noon. Shots were fired, a felt-hat was dropped, and Oakley's father was falling backwards to the ground, followed by the sounds of weeping and wailing from Oakley's mother...

Little Oakley gawked at the gunslinger in stupor, whose aptitude with a gun was so superb that her father could never stand a chance.

Waking up, there would be traces of damp tears on Oakley's felt hat. As a child, she learned how to shoot a gun only because she had wanted her father's handsome and stylish hat.

C:
教宗骑士同僚挥剑相向，庄严和礼仪逐渐崩塌，誓约守护的戒指开始变得浑浊不堪。

星海降下的力量赋予教会惩戒恶魔的实力，同时也传播了丧失人性的疯病。

疯病折磨的教宗骑士已经分不清礼仪与秩序，叫嚣着要驱逐出所有的恶魔后裔，让教会得到救赎。面对迫近圣女的威胁，萨菲娜没有犹豫的间隙，即便对方是净庭教会的骑士长，她也不能手下留情。

肃静骑士必须要保护好圣女，萨菲娜没有忘记。

「我亲爱的萨菲娜，你不必愧疚，这是觊觎星神力量的下场，理应如此。」教堂只剩下最后的圣女和守护骑士。
E:
Bit by bit, solemnity and decorum crumbled, and the Knights of the Church raised their swords against each other as the rings they swore to protect grew dim.

The power granted from the stellar seas gifted the Church the strength to punish devils, but also spread an insanity that ate away at human rationality.

Tormented by this madness, the Knights of the Church could no longer discern decorum and order, obsessed with expelling all devil-spawns for the salvation of the whole church. When these threats came for the Maiden, Safina had no time to hesitate. She cannot stay her hand even if her opponent was the Arch Knight of the Church of Purity Palace.

The Solemn Knight must always protect and defend the Maiden. Safina did not forget that creed.

"My dear Safina, there is no need to feel guilty. This is the consequence of coveting the power of the Aeons." All there were left in the church were the last Maiden and her guardian knight.

C:
铸造神兵利刃对于火匠一族来说，既是天赋的使命又是伴生的诅咒。

被解放的火匠一族自从来到战争熔炉的世界中，才华在极致的释放下开始染上毁灭的气息。

炉光与火花耀目灼眼，在漫长的锻造过程中，胚料铸成神器，而匠人失去视力。弗埃曾在火山底部找到一簇罕见的曜石焰晶，将其仔细打磨做成了护目镜片，激烈的火花从此化作苍白的剪影。但是贪心的匠人未能逃避诅咒的命运，他也在极致的火光中燃尽了一切。

弗埃将战争熔炉中的反物质军团视作锤炼的素材，而自己便是那升腾的烈火。

「有没有一种可能，比如说，将热核反应变成我的熔炉？」弗埃寻找提升至极限的炉火，并在失控的聚变反应中毁灭。
E:
To the Firesmith clan, crafting unparalleled weapons is both their talent's calling and a lifelong curse.

Ever since the arrival of the liberated Firesmith Clan in the world of Warforge, their skills bloomed to the extremes while also becoming tainted with the aura of Destruction.

The dazzling light of the furnace, the sparks of metal clashing, and the long-lasting forging process can turn raw ore into a fine weapon, but can also gradually strip the firesmith of their eyesight. One day, at the bottom of a volcano, Foy found a deposit of rare obsidian flame crystal. From this, he carefully polished a pair of protective goggles, which transformed the fierce sparks of fire into pale-white silhouettes. However, the greedy smith was unable to fully escape his cursed fate either, burning everything he was into cinders in the ultimate fire.

Foy deemed the Antimatter Legion in the Warforge as the raw materials for his creations, and himself as the rising flame.

"I wonder... is it possible to harness the power of a thermonuclear reaction in my furnace?" Foy's pursuit of the ultimate fire came to an unfruitful end in an out-of-control thermonuclear fusion.

C: 「试着各退一步，把个体的人视为最小单位。将一位命途行者的信息打散扫描，是否能就此掌握命途行者的构造原理？」██对自己的罪行供认不讳，但直到行刑开始，他的脸上都带着笑容。 走进星空以前，长鸣星的咕噜多教授一度认为，仅需四种基本作用力，人类就能掌握宇宙。后来，学者们将这一模型戏称为「天国」。正如琥珀王所做的一般，虚数能量与命途的不可观测及不可复现性，为大一统方程的建立树起一道无法逾越的高墙。纯粹造物学派，他们解析命途的实验被信徒视作渎神，但以最小单位为起点，重组整个宇宙，这不正是「智识」的体现吗？ 纯粹造物学派的学者就像烟花，他们转瞬即逝，却将无数星火留给了后世的求知者。 ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: "Everyone try taking a step back, and view the individual as the smallest unit. Disperse and scan a Pathstrider's information — will one then be able to grasp the structural principles of a Pathstrider?" ███████ candidly confessed to his crimes. But up to the moment of his execution, his face was all smiles. Before embarking unto the starry skies, Professor Groudo of Longchime once opined that humanity could master the universe using only four fundamental forces. Scholars would later mockingly call this model the "Heavenly Kingdom." Just like everything else the Amber Lord did, the unobservability and irreproducibility of imaginary energy and the Paths raised an insurmountable wall against the establishment of the grand unified equation. The experiments in analyzing the Paths by the School of Pure Creation are seen as blasphemous by the devout, but to reconstruct the entire cosmos with the smallest unit as its building block, is that not the true manifestation of the Erudition? Scholars of the School of Pure Creation are like fireworks — ephemeral, yet leaving behind myriad sparks for future seekers of knowledge. — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

C: <color=#87e0ffff>【扩散】</color>对韧性值最低的敌方目标造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>基础伤害的量子属性伤害，并无视弱点削减<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>点韧性。对其相邻目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>基础伤害的量子属性伤害，并无视弱点削减<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>点韧性，若目标处于弱点击破状态，对其造成等同于自身<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]%</unbreak></color>量子属性击破伤害的击破伤害，重复<unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak>次。攻击时为目标附加【演绎信标】：受到击破伤害后，使我方全体目标恢复<unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak>点能量且行动提前<unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak>，生效后清除，持续<unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak>回合。

Also, deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> base DMG to adjacent targets and reduces <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> Toughness regardless of Weakness, and deals Break DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]%</unbreak></color> of this unit's Quantum Break DMG if the target(s) are Weakness Broken, repeating <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> time(s). When attacking, applies to the target "Inference Beacon": After taking Break DMG, regenerates <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak> Energy to all ally targets and advances their actions by <unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak>. This effect is removed after it activates, lasting for <unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
