C: 自你的眼眸里折下苍翠的枝桠，没有疼痛，新芽悄然生长，哺育祂所哀怜的众生。\n觐见之人请颔首祈祷，愿人间苦难不再，愿溪流永不干涸。
E: Verdant branches taken from within your eyes. The extraction came without pain, and the new sprouts grow yet, nourishing all the living THEY do so pity.\nCommuner! Bow your head in prayer. Let there be no more suffering. Let the streams never dry.

C: 一片瑰丽繁荣的世界，此前从未有忆者的双脚踏足其间，你编织出一幅全新的面孔，既不青涩也不成熟，镜子里照不出你的模样，唯有在人们的双眼中，你优雅地漫步在小巷间。你用糖果从牧童的歌声里换来夜晚的冒险，在悲伤的少年眼里采下远行的爱人，你为年迈的老人找回战友们的面庞，而他则赠予你推倒通天巨塔的惨痛战役。\n\n智慧生命不过是宇宙的蜉蝣，从边远的草原到占据了半座城市的跃迁站，它们的建造者经历了漫长的岁月，可这些甚至不如赤羽狼在演化中花费的时间。你知道，眼前的故事终会消逝，但在超越物质的净土中，仍有记忆永恒不朽。
E: In a flourishing world of opulence, never before set foot upon by Memokeepers, you weave a brand-new visage — not too young, not too old, a face not even a mirror can capture, only in the eyes of people, as you elegantly stroll along the alleyways. You trade candy for a night of adventure from the songs of a shepherd boy and pluck a distant lover from the eyes of a sorrowful youngster. You retrieve a comrade's countenance for a wizened man, and he gifts you with the tragic war campaign of when the heavenly tower was toppled.\n\nIntelligent life — nothing more than mayflies in the folds of the universe. From faraway grasslands to warp jump stations that occupy half a city, their builders have experienced long stints of life. But these barely compare to the time it took for Redfeather Wolves to evolve. You know that the stories before you will eventually fade away, but in the paradise that transcends the physical, there are memories that remain immortal.

C:
你可曾听说过名为失心疟的疾病？
它席卷强盛的拉德罗城邦，让后者变为一座废都。
起初城里的居民只是神情呆滞，忘记回家的道路，
医生查不明原因，只能派遣人手照顾患者。
但这怪病感染的人越来越多，病情也严重加剧，
父母分不清亲生的孩子，大臣不认识效忠的君王。
直到一名游历经过的神医，发现是蚊子在作怪，
这蚊子不吸食血液，却独爱人类的记忆。
然而一切已经来不及，这里的人们已经如同行尸走肉，
神医无奈地叹叹气，一把火将蚊子连同城市付之一炬。
E:
Heard of the malady named heartless malaria?
It consumed the prosperous city of Radero and left it in shambles.
First, citizens were simply dazed, forgetting their way home,
doctors were clueless to the cause, and could only send their staff to care for the ill.
But this strange ailment started to spread like wildfire, its symptoms growing more severe
Parents forgot their children's faces. Chancellors drew blanks on their king's name.
That was until a roving medic found the cause — mosquitoes.
These mosquitoes did not feed on blood, but had a strong inclination for humankind's memories. 
But it was all too late. The people here were no more than the walking dead.
The great physician could only sigh and set the mosquitoes ablaze, reducing them to ash along with the entire city.

C: 颓唐的自灭者中流传着一个说法：即宇宙万物并无意义，人类在星神眼里亦不值一提。如果星神当真凌驾众生，高高在上，又怎会在乎凡人的爱恨苦乐？沉眠无相者Ⅸ的存在就是明证。为了向自灭者证明星神在乎，混沌医师结合秘学僧侣的巫神术制造了星神火漆，据说盖下这枚火漆，就会遥遥吸引对应星神跨越时空的瞥视——目前还没有成功案例，不过，确实有些自灭者盖下火漆后，重拾了对宇宙、星神及其它一切的信心。
E: There is a saying amongst the dejected Self-Annihilators that the universe has no purpose and humans are nothing in the eyes of the Aeons. If the Aeons truly stand above all lifeforms and rule supreme, then why would they care about the everyday concerns of mortals? The existence of the sleeping and shapeless IX is proof of that. To show the Self-Annihilators that the Aeons do care, the Doctors of Chaos combined the demon god crafts of the occult monks to create the Sealing Wax of Aeons. It is said that stamping with this Sealing Wax will attract a glimpse from the corresponding Aeon from across space and time — There are no successful examples yet, but some Self-Annihilators did regain their faith in the universe, Aeons, and everything else after stamping with this sealing wax.

C: 第二次机械危机结束后，大量机器人陷入应激状态，对一切可能发酵的矛盾十分敏感。一道流言称机械生命将带来最终的灾厄，于是立刻引起众机器人的重视，成立远征队三次涉猎未被开辟的陆地，他们到达陆地最南端的岛屿，在一片被笼罩在黑暗中的森林中揪出了制造流言机的罪魁祸首——躲在山中研究邪恶科技的工匠大师。
E: After the end of the Second Machine Crisis, many robots became very anxious and were sensitive to any possible conflict. A rumor claiming that mechanical lifeforms will bring about the final disaster immediately drew the attention of all robots, and they formed an expedition team to scout unexplored lands three times. They reached the island at the southernmost tip of the land and dragged out the rumor's creator from a forest enveloped in utter darkness — A master artisan who hid in the mountains to study evil technology.

C: 你能在任何一张星图上找到兹曼达联邦的遗址，哪怕是最白痴的导航，也会建议你远离那片失序之地。这个集体性崇拜熵减的文明，用高度流程化的生活，努力降低自身的熵增速率。他们举众星系之力创造出了吞噬熵的机器，以挑战至上毁灭者的法则。事实上，他们成功了一半，机器源源不断地将熵值转化为逆熵，但作为代价，更多的熵值被运作本身生产出来，仅一次自转的时间，四光年内的一切便已尽数腐朽。
E: You can see the ruins of the Zimander Federation on any astral chart, but even the most foolish of navigators would advise you to stay far away from that disorderly land. This collective civilization that worshiped the principle of the decrease of entropy utilized their extremely streamlined lifestyles in order to reduce the rate of their own entropy increase. They harnessed the power of their star system and created an entropy-destroying machine, so as to challenge the laws of the Supreme Destroyer. In actual fact, they were half successful — their machine endlessly converted entropy into anti-entropy. However, as a cost, the operation of the machine itself caused greater entropy. In just one spin, the machine caused everything within four light-years to decay and wither.

C: 揽镜人们创造出千奇百怪的仪式，只为践行心中的「纯美」。于塔洛伦斯基而言，美则意味着「虔诚」。他将超验之镜的碎片放入脆弱的肥皂泡，以泡沫象征自己的内心，踏上漫长的朝圣之旅。每当泡泡因旅途中的颠沛而破碎，他便会重回故乡的花园，重新将镜子封进泡泡。他一次次地折返，一次次地出发，直到今日也未能走出母星。但每逢有人相问，他仍会坚定地说出自己的目的地——「纯美」之神伊德莉拉所陨落之处：「失魂星域」，拉夫卡迪奥。
E: The Mirror Holders created all manner of bizarre rituals, all in pursuit of the ideal of Beauty in their hearts. To Talorensky, beauty means "devotion." He placed the fragments of the Mirror of Transcendence into a fragile soap bubble — the foam a symbol of his inner thoughts, embarking on his pilgrimage. When the bubble bursts from the ardor of the journey, he would return to the garden of his home and reseal the mirror in the bubble. Each time he would return, and each time he would depart, never stepping foot off the home planet to this day. But to those who asked, he would resolutely mention his destination — where Idrila, the Aeon of Beauty fell: The Consternation Starzone, Lafcadio.

C: 换上仙舟服饰的三月七，执剑的武侠少女。\n向云璃与彦卿拜师学艺，为在仙舟留下更多美好的「回忆」而跃跃欲试。
E: March 7th in a Xianzhou-styled outfit. A sword-wielding female martial artist.\nLearning swordplay from both Yunli and Yanqing, she is eager to create more beautiful memories on the Xianzhou.

C: 老成持重的前逆熵盟主，继承了「世界」之名，曾屡次拯救世界于灭亡的边缘。\n圣方丹事件结束后，瓦尔特被迫与事件始作俑者去向星门另一侧。\n或许连他自己也未曾料到，在那里等待着的，将是全新的旅途和同伴。
E: The wise and experienced former Anti-Entropy Sovereign who inherited the name of the world — Welt. He has saved Earth from annihilation time and time again.\nAfter the incident with St. Fountain came to a close, Welt had no choice but to venture with the initiator of the incident to the other side of the portal.\nPerhaps even he did not expect the new journey nor companions that awaited him there.

C: 希露瓦得以重拾过往的音乐爱好，是在她与朗道家彻底割席后。 于是，这远近闻名的机械屋便成为她尽情摇滚的根据地——虽然屡遭投诉，但这种产自寒潮前的先锋艺术还是受到大批跟风的年轻人追捧…… 「我真是…服了！你们这些杂志小报的所谓『音乐评论家』，能不能中肯一点啊！什么『屡遭投诉』？什么『跟风的年轻人』？我和我的粉丝们可不答应！」 「哎，不过我们『机械热潮』特别受年轻人喜爱倒是真的——大家在这个年纪，要么是满腔热血、要不就是怀才不遇……」 「无论是哪一种情绪，总归是要发泄出来才行嘛。而我的『摇滚』恰恰就是最好的解决方案啦！」 「…就像我当年做的那样。」 「嗐，没事没事！你放心，我只是突然想起过去的事情了……」
E: Serval was able to rekindle her passion for music after cutting off all connections with her family. This led to her prestigious workshop becoming a base for her to rock out — despite suffering constant complaints, this cutting-edge art style from before the Eternal Freeze is still sought out by hordes of hipster kids... "Oh, I give up! Can you trashy tabloids and your so-called "music critics" focus on what's important, please? 'Suffering constant complaints'... 'hipster kids'... My fans and I would dispute that!" "But I suppose it's true that Mechanical Fever is popular with youths — at that age, kids are either full of enthusiasm or are underappreciated..." "No matter what your mood is, you always have to vent sometimes. And rocking out with me just so happens to be the best way of doing that!" "...Just like what I did back in the day." "Ahh, it's fine! Don't worry. I was just suddenly reminiscing about the past..."

C: 「早上好，女士。希望没有打扰到您。」 「…你们是？铁卫一大早来敲我家门干嘛？」 「抱歉，女士。我们在执行筑城者的命令，挨家挨户进行搜查。」 「呃…搜查？你们要搜什么，我一点也不……」 「请您冷静，女士——这不是针对您，全城的住户都要接受盘查。」 「出…出什么大事了吗？」 「请相信我，只要您配合我的工作，一切都会非常顺利。我只有一个问题：您家里有假发吗？」 「什么…假发？不，没有，如你所见，我头发多得很…为什么要问这个？」 「您确定吗？请您再仔细想想。铁卫奉命来收取贝洛伯格城内所有假发，拒不上交可能会导致严重的后果……」 「不，我很确定，我家没有那种东西。不信的话，你们自己进来搜吧。」 「啊，那倒不必了，我相信您没有什么需要隐瞒的。再见，女——」 「…等一下，我能问问究竟发生什么了吗？」 「哦，和您说说也无妨。最近上层区流窜着一个男扮女装的贼人，四处坑蒙拐骗。此人行踪极为诡秘，而且经常变幻身份和形象，铁卫始终找不到他的踪影。据说治安大臣昨天在汇报会上怒不可遏，下令没收城里所有的假发……」 「…居然还有这种事，真是离谱。」 「不瞒您说，铁卫兄弟们和您感受略同。我们还要继续搜查，就不打扰了…祝您生活愉快，波桑女士。」
E: "Good morning, ma'am, I hope I haven't disturbed you." "...Who are you? Why are the Silvermane Guards knocking on my door first thing in the morning?" "I'm sorry, ma'am. We're just carrying out building-to-building searches as ordered by the Architects." "Uh... searches? What are you searching for? I don't have anything..." "Please calm down, ma'am — we are not targeting you. Everyone in the city is subject to questioning." "Has something... something big happened?" "Please trust us. Everything will turn out fine if you cooperate with us. I just have one question: Do you have any wigs at home?" "What... Wigs? No, I don't have any. As you can see, my hair is great... Why are you asking about that?" "Are you sure? Please think again. The Silvermane Guards have been ordered to gather up all the wigs in Belobog City. Refusal to submit may result in serious consequences..." "No, I'm sure. I don't have any of those at home — if you don't believe me, come inside and have a look." "Ah, that won't be necessary. I'm sure you have nothing to hide. Goodbye, ma'—" "...Hold on a minute, can I ask what happened?" "Oh, there's no harm in telling you. Recently, a male thief disguised as a woman has stowed away up here into the Overworld and is swindling everyone. This person is extremely slippery and changes appearance often. The Silvermane Guards have not been able to locate him. Apparently, the Minister of Security was absolutely furious at yesterday's briefing, and ordered the confiscation of all wigs in the city..." "...Is that so? How outrageous!" "I'll level with you. We all feel the same way as you do. We need to keep up our search, so I won't bother you any longer... Wishing you a good day, Madam Poisson."

C: 「您的身份是？」  「行商。」  「您的入境目的是？」  「商业活动。」  「您是否愿意承诺：不违反仙舟联盟律法、依法依规进行商业活动、不进行签证许可范围外的活动？」  「当然。我承诺。」  「您是否愿意承诺：不进行任何与『长生』有关的非法研究？」  「嗯…我承诺。」  「很好，请在这里签字。」  「罗刹先生，欢迎来到仙舟『罗浮』。」
E: "What's your occupation?" "Traveling merchant." "What is the purpose of your entry?" "Commercial business." "Do you vow not to violate the laws and regulations of the Xianzhou Alliance, to conduct business activities in accordance with the law, and not to conduct activities outside the scope of the visa permit?" "Of course. I will follow the law." "Do you vow not to conduct any illegal research related to immortality?" "I... promise." "Great, please sign here." "Mr. Luocha, welcome to the Xianzhou Luofu."

C: 狐人医士用羽扇半捂着脸，颇为痛切地看着眼前的景象…无数眼、耳、舌、齿、肢节、毛发在已死的躯体上疯狂增生又脱落，仿佛只是在徒劳地感受最后的痛苦。 久违地，他感到一丝不适，不止是因为眼前的狼藉，而是又想起了模糊的从前。 「药王慈怀…生无涯…老不至…死回生……」 药王信徒拥簇一团，其中一位似是重伤，但身旁之人却照旧叨念着那些似曾相识的言词。 「丰饶神迹护身…快…把它喝下去……」 「痛苦只是暂时的…你会重新拥有完整的生命，绝不会陨于此…刻——」 下一瞬，说话的人已然倒地。乌衣影卫现于光下，肃杀地立于他们面前。沉默也难掩此处再次涌动的杀意。 …… 「那些人早就算不上是人了，他们可没痛觉…你呢？伤成这样，你想告诉我你也没痛觉？」 狐人医士将药粉洒在他的伤口，一如既往絮絮叨叨。 「我们本来就是去侦查的，早说了后面还有大部队…怎么就先动手了？」 他没有说话，只是低头看着手里刃口弧度犀利，残留着血污的匕首。 这些年，从一次次的任务中，他早已知道当年的「家人」究竟是什么。但他不愿细细回想，也不愿承认，自己的立场早已与当年不同——不然复仇与契约，还有什么意义？ 「痛吗？」 「……」他还是没说话。 狐人医士手上却加快了速度，用纱布缠裹他的伤口，系结，又不经意地使力按了按。 「痛……」 「痛就说呗，忍着对你有什么好处？我看着都痛死了。」 他点点头。 他习惯了不说话，但也开始习惯了有人替他说话。
E: The foxian healer half covers his face as he looks at the scene before him with great empathetic concern... Countless eyes, ears, tongues, teeth, limbs, and fur are sprouting from and falling off of the bodies in front of them, as if they are experiencing this final suffering in vain. For the first time in forever, Moze feels a little uncomfortable. Not only because of the scene before him, but because it reminds him of his blurred memories of the past. "The mercy of Sanctus Medicus... life without bounds.... old age never coming... the dead revitalizing..." A crowd of Sanctus Medicus disciples huddles together. Though one of them is heavily wounded, those around them simply continue to murmur those familiar words. "The divine traces of Abundance shall heal your body... quick. Drink this..." "Suffering is temporary... you shall have a full life once more. you will not die in this mo... ment—" In a flash, the speaker collapses to the ground. The black-clad shadow guard appears in the light before them and stands solemnly. Silence can not conceal the murderous rage that once again wells up inside him. ... "These people are no longer people. They feel no pain... What about you, though? With wounds like those, are you going to tell me you feel no pain?" The foxian healer sprinkles powder on his wounds and chatters away as always. "We were originally here for reconnaissance. I told you we had a large force ready for backup. Why did you go ahead and take action?" He does not say a word, simply looking down at the sharp, blood-coated dagger in his hands. Over the years, through each and every mission he had completed, he had long since come to understand just what that former "family" of his was. However, he refuses to think about it in depth, nor would he acknowledge that his view had changed from all those years ago. If he did, what meaning would his vengeance and their vow have? "Does that hurt?" "..." He still refuses to speak. The foxian healer decides to speed up his movements, wrapping his wounds in gauze and casually pressing down a little too hard. "Ow..." "If it hurts, then say it out loud. What good does enduring your pain do? Just seeing you like this is agony for me." He nods. He has become accustomed to not speaking, but also to having people speak on his behalf.

C: 再创世的终点，冰冷的试验场袒露其残酷的内核。 「记忆」的巨浪汇成海啸，将开拓的行者淹没。当他醒来，伙伴早已迷失于深不见底的忆域。 他仿佛回到踏上列车前孑然一身的日子，然而此刻的痛苦告诉他，这不仅是噩梦。 再度踏入忆潮的一瞬，那往日的碎片呼啸着向他涌来—— 「…心跳和脉搏都很微弱，三月，准备做人工呼吸。」 「啊？！我…我没什么经验，丹恒你来吧！」 他记得初遇{NICKNAME}时，命运般的相逢。 「我只是在想象，咱们仨会遇上什么有趣的事…嘿嘿！」 在贝洛伯格的街头，雪曾落满三人的肩头，同享一张热气腾腾的卷饼就能温暖整个冬夜。 「…我会以持明后裔的身份，完成我对罗浮的责任。」 在{NICKNAME}与三月七的见证下，他摆脱过去的阴影，沉重如雪的过往逐渐被二人的欢声笑语化解。 「你在太一之梦里遭遇了什么？」 「我梦见列车驶过一站又一站，有人到来，有人离去，而我们五人始终都在，这段旅程似乎永远也不会结束。」 在相似的忆域中，他们曾一同冲出匹诺康尼的梦，将最期盼的未来留给现实。 「丹恒，你又能做出多少牺牲？」 内心的声音质问他此行的决心，而他以决绝的行动回答。 濒临凋零的半神将火种交付于他，握住火种的一瞬，千万道生灵渴盼的目光仿佛要将他点燃。 在那圣树塌落的时刻，他背负起一个世界的生灵，将血脉与翁法罗斯的大地熔铸。 他走向大地根系的深处，寻索伙伴的方向。 丛林瀚海之中，他跨越风霜雨雪，穿过死海沙漠，也曾迷失于纷繁的世界。 在每一个走入黑暗的时刻，他总能感受到身后，那道亲切的目光。 「我们在重走过去的航道，有太多的内容要重新来过，我们需要一个护卫…和记录员。」 「我是『丹恒』……」 沿着那无法斩断的过往，荒龙怒吼着挣脱一切束缚，向着未竟的前路腾飞—— 「我是…护卫『开拓』前路之人！」
E: At the end of Era Nova, the cold testing ground reveals its cruel core. The tidal waves of the Remembrance merge into a tsunami, engulfing the pathstrider of Trailblaze. When he awakens, his companions are already lost in the bottomless Memory Zone. He felt as if he'd returned to those solitary days before boarding the Express, yet the pain of this moment told him this was more than just a nightmare. The moment he stepped back into the memoria tide, fragments of the past came rushing towards him... "...Their heartbeat and pulse are very weak. March, get ready to perform CPR." "Huh!? I... I don't have much experience with that. Dan Heng, you do it!" He remembered their fateful first encounter with {NICKNAME}. "I'm just imagining all the fun stuff that'll happen to us three... hehe!" On the streets of Belobog, snow once blanketed their shoulders, and sharing a steaming hot wrap was enough to warm up the entire winter night. "...As a descendant of the Vidyadhara, I will fulfill my duty to the Luofu." In the presence of {NICKNAME} and March 7th, he broke free from the shadows of his past, as their laughter and chatter gradually melted away his snow-heavy memories. "What did you encounter in Ena's Dream?" "I dreamed of the Express passing station after station, with people coming and going, yet we five remained together throughout. This journey seemed as if it would never end." In a similar Memory Zone, they had once escaped Penacony's dream together, leaving the most desired future to reality. "Dan Heng, how much more can you sacrifice?" The voice in his heart questioned his resolve, and he answered with decisive action. The fading demigod entrusted the Coreflame to him. The moment he grasped it, countless gazes of desperate souls seemed to ignite his very being. At the moment the Sacred Tree fell, he shouldered the burden of a world's creatures, fusing their bloodline with the earth of Amphoreus. He ventured into the depths of earth's root system, searching for the direction of his companions. Through vast jungles and endless seas, he traversed wind and frost, crossed the Dead Sea desert, and sometimes lost his way in this complex world. In every moment when he stepped into darkness, he could always feel that gentle gaze behind him. "We're retracing our old flight paths, with so much to redo. We need a guard... and an archiver." "I am 'Dan Heng'..." Along the inescapable path of the past, the wild dragon roars as it breaks free from all restraints, soaring towards the unfinished road ahead... "I am... the one who guards the path of Trailblaze!"

C:
很久，很久以后——

阿那克萨戈拉斯，天才俱乐部#100，听说他正在向「虚数之树」理论发起挑战…如果是他，肯定能做到吧？
……
揽镜人阿格莱雅，嘻，她的设计一定能在庇尔波因特掀起万人空巷的盛况。
……
探险家刻律德菈，成为了近距离征服黑洞的第一人，在一睹黑洞的壮美时，她宣称是一位歌者的唱片，让她得以抵抗虚无的诱惑。
……
每四个琥珀纪一届的银河运动会上，赛飞儿将代表翁法罗斯出战短跑，白厄与万敌将带领逐火梦之队出征，他们与仙舟狐人队的对决，是本次比赛的一大看点！
……
遐蝶的长篇连载近日迎来完结，我们等待了整整十个琥珀纪的结局，究竟会是什么样子？
……
缇里西庇俄丝女士发布了她的宇宙穿梭载具，搭乘着飞船，由风堇女士研发的「伊卡」疫苗将飞往许多被病毒侵蚀的世界……
……
为了银河的明天，星穹列车再度启程，无名客留下的事迹，仍在星空中传唱。
……

当落叶停在枝头，雨水落回天空，呀，人家还是忍不住写下这些美好的幻想。

翁法罗斯是一颗沉睡的种子，如果它在未来能够长成一棵大树，那么树梢上垂挂的果实，一定会远远超过我的想象。

如果没有空白，这些故事又该如何生长？
所以，{NICKNAME}，不要悲伤，好吗？
当种子落回土壤，我的故事会被风吹散，但它将为银河荡起美丽的涟漪，就像破碎的水晶花，为人们带来更多的光——那就是「爱」，对吧？

未来会从这里绽放，就像这个故事的开篇，我讲，你听——

我，和你。
……
涟漪，世界。
……
小妖精，毛绒绒。
……
希望。
……
花。
……
天空。
……
光。
……
<align="right">——留待未来的空白诗篇</align>
E:
A long, long time from now...

Anaxagoras, Genius Society #100. I heard he's challenging the "Imaginary Tree" theory... If it's him, he can definitely do it, right?
...
Mirror Holder Aglaea. Heh, her designs will surely draw massive crowds to Pier Point.
...
Explorer Cerydra became the first person to conquer a black hole up close. While witnessing the black hole's magnificent beauty, she claimed it was a singer's record that helped her resist the temptation of the Nihility.
...
In the Games of the Galactics held every four Amber Eras, Cipher will represent Amphoreus in the sprints, while Phainon and Mydei will lead the Flame-Chaser team. Their showdown with the Xianzhou foxian team is one of the highlights of this competition!
...
Castorice's long-running novel series is coming to an end. What will be the conclusion we've waited ten Amber Eras for?
...
Lady Tribios has unveiled her universe-traversing vessel. Aboard the ship, the "Ica" vaccine developed by Lady Hyacine will be delivered to many worlds corrupted by viruses...
...
The Astral Express departs once again for the cosmos's tomorrow, and the legacy of the Nameless continues to echo throughout the stars.
...

When fallen leaves return to branches and raindrops float back to the sky... Ah. I just can't help but write down these beautiful fantasies.

Amphoreus is but a slumbering seed, and if it grows into the Great Tree in the future, the fruits hanging from its branches will surely surpass my wildest imagination.

How can these stories grow without a blank space?
So, {NICKNAME}, don't be sad, okay?
When the seed returns to soil, my story will scatter in the wind, but it will create beautiful ripples for the cosmos, like how a shattered crystal flower will bring more light to people... That's what "love" is, right?

The future will bloom from here, like the beginning of this story. I'll speak, and you'll listen...

Me, and you.
...
Ripples, world.
...
Fairy, fluffy.
...
Hope.
...
Flower.
...
Sky.
...
Light.
...
<align="right">— Verses left blank for the future</align>

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。\n离开月台已经越来越近了，加快脚步吧。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.\nYou're getting closer to the railway platform, hurry.

C: 列车搁浅在了一颗白色星球的外空间。根据姬子的说法，是「星核」带来的影响阻塞了列车的前进路线。\n想要继续旅程的话，就必须清除「星核」造成的轨道阻塞。\n由三位「年轻人」组成的探险小队已经集结完毕，你们都已经等不及开启这次「开拓之旅」了…至少三月七是这么想的。
E: The Express runs aground in the outer space of a white planet. According to Himeko, the effects of the Stellaron are what's obstructing the Express' path forward.\nIf you wish to continue the journey, you must clear out the obstruction caused by the Stellaron.\nAn expedition team of three youngsters has been put together and none of you can wait to set off on this trailblazing expedition... At least March 7th thinks so.

C: 经过一整天的游览，你们已经完全了解了这里的文化，距离成为贝洛伯格的公民恐怕只差去政务部摇个号了。\n终于到了睡觉时间，你感到自己无法抑制与宾馆的柔软床榻深情相拥的欲望。\n早些休息，保存精力吧，这是你应得的——列车要熄灯了！
E: After an entire day of sightseeing, you've got a complete understanding of the local culture and are just an appointment at Belobog's Administrative Department away from becoming its actual citizens.\nIt's finally time for sleep and you feel an uncontrollable urge to snuggle with the soft and fluffy hotel bed.\nGet some sleep and rest well, you deserve it — Express lights off!

C: 翻看卡芙卡所留下的通讯影像，你意识到她的邀请中潜藏着致命的危险——她的同伴，名为「刃」的男子，与你之间曾有刻骨宿怨。\n你决心违犯禁令，再踏罗浮。然而当你登陆流云渡，却察觉着卡芙卡所言非虚，受星核作祟，罗浮已然陷入灾变。
E: As you review the video communication sent by Kafka, you realize there is a hidden and lethal danger in her invitation — Her companion, the man named Blade, has an ancient and indelible feud with you.\nYou decide to go against the ban and set foot on the Luofu once again. Yet, when you land on Cloudford, you feel that Kafka was not lying. The Luofu has fallen into a catastrophe due to the influences of the Stellaron.

C: 自截获的通讯中，天舶司找到了卡芙卡下落的蛛丝马迹。\n而后，你们将开始猎手与猎物间的追逐，找到行踪无定的星核猎手卡芙卡。
E: After analyzing the intercepted message, the Sky-Faring Commission has found some clues about Kafka's whereabouts.\nAs for you all, you will begin the hunt for Kafka, the Stellaron Hunter with unpredictable movements.

C: 流萤继续带领你在城中各处知名景点打卡——她建议你尝试一下「艾迪恩公园」的各类娱乐设施。你已经领取了足够多的代币，是时候大玩特玩了。\n当然，如果你玩腻了，也可以找到流萤，和她一起在附近休息会儿。
E: Firefly continues to lead you through the various tourist hotspots in the area — She suggests you try out the various amusement facilities in Aideen Park. You have collected plenty of tokens, so it's time to play to your heart's content!\nOf course, if you get bored with the games, you can find Firefly and rest with her for a while.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n打开宝箱后你才发现有数道大门环绕四周——也许你可以利用其中一扇大门离开这里。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he's a habitual crossdresser, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nOnly after you have opened the chest do you discover several great doors surrounding you... Perhaps you can use one of these doors to leave this place.

C: 黑天鹅为你答疑解惑，并承诺护送你抵达了忆域的出口——希望她这次不会再耍什么花招…还是说，你其实还挺乐意她做点小恶作剧的？
E: Black Swan answers your questions and promises to escort you to the exit of the Memory Zone. Hopefully, she isn't up to any mischief this time... Or, do you secretly enjoy the little tricks she pulls?

C: 你们发现沙盘模型上有一道明显的缺口——或许这就是前往家族议事厅的关键线索。根据拉帝奥教授的回忆，能够契合这道缺口的积木就在不远处的珍品室里。\n不愧是教授，多么可靠啊！
E: There is a noticeable gap in the sandpit model, which might just be the key clue to unlocking the council chamber. As far as Dr. Ratio can remember, the block that can fit the gap is kept in the treasure room nearby.\nThe professor is as reliable as always!

C: 你借一场偷天换日的小魔术取得了礼金，还有自己的基石「砂金石」——尽管下场不是很好看。但你的计划依旧紧锣密鼓地进行，就连迫在眉睫的死亡都无法阻止你的脚步。\n向路人散发礼金，套取你需要的情报吧。
E: Through a sneaky magic trick, you get your hands on the gift money and your cornerstone, the Aventurine. Things get ugly, but your plan is still being executed at a timely pace. Not even the impending death can stop you.\nDistribute the gift money to the pedestrians to exchange for the intel you need.

C: 米沙声称流梦礁是自己的家——如果真是这样，那「白日梦」酒店的待遇可真有够糟糕的。不过，天真可爱的小米沙不以为意，反而看出你们遇到了麻烦，提出带领各位寻找走失的同伴，顺便游览这座冷寂的小镇。不仅如此，你们甚至还有机会见到一位老朋友——知更鸟。\n有关流梦礁之鬼的小插曲暂告一段落——终于可以出发寻找姬子了！你一定很想念她，不是么？
E: Misha claims Dreamflux Reef to be his home... If that is the case, you can only imagine how bad the treatment must have been at The Reverie. Although, the cute and naïve Misha has not taken that to heart. In fact, seeing that you are in trouble, he offers to lead you on a search for your lost companions and give you a tour of the desolate town along the way. Not only that, you may even have a chance to meet with an old friend... Robin.\nNow that the brief episode of the spirit of Dreamflux Reef has been put aside for now... You can finally go in search of Himeko! You must miss her, right?

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•时间的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将与钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子——一道，突破重重难关，最终……\n…帮助这位并非真正的钟表小子的钟表小子克服与生俱来的存在主义危机。游戏也可以很深刻，不是吗？
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Time Trial stage. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role ever-popular protagonist from the Clockie series — Clockie. Smash through the final obstacles together...\n...Help this inauthentic Clockie overcome an existential crisis. The game can also be rather profound, can't it?

C: 时间回退至你们尚未离开流梦礁的时间点。姬子从黄金的时刻归来，更捎来了一个强有力的推断：「钟表匠」怀中空无一物的梦泡与门童米沙或许有着千丝万缕的联系。\n为了求证，你们携米沙一道，再次进入米哈伊尔的梦泡——如无意外，一切真相就潜藏在这段稚子的长梦中。
E: Time reverses to the point before you left Dreamflux Reef. Himeko returns from Golden Hour with a powerful deduction: There may be some inextricable link between the empty dream bubble that the Watchmaker is holding and Misha the bellboy.\nIn order to prove it, you take Misha back into Mikhail's dream bubble... If everything goes as expected, the truth may be lurking here in this long dream of the child.

C:
……

管家：「欢迎再次来到这幢伟大的宅邸，外来的客人们。」
管家：「你们来得正好，我们正要举办一场晚宴，送别我们旧日的君王。」

税务官：「如若没有一位君王，又有谁能为万民负责？」
宰相：「若万民没有远视的双眼，我们便应做出他们的选择，并为之负责。」

……
E:
...

Butler: "Welcome once again to this great mansion, guests from afar."
Butler: "Your timing could not be more perfect. We are about to hold a banquet to bid a solemn farewell to our former ruler."

Tax Collector: "Without a ruler, who would take responsibility for the people?"
Chancellor: "If the people lack the vision to see the distant future, it is our duty to make choices for them and assume responsibility."

...

C:
……

新至的主人：「外来的宾客，我请求你帮助这间宅子，摆脱潜藏的教唆者的毒害。」
管家：「我希望他们都能恢复理性的镇静，不再受虚伪的掌控，不再受幻境的唆使。」

管家：「在离开大宅的四十九天后，主人便死在了无端的祸事中。」
管家：「此后三百年，忠仆们不断争抢，不断搏斗，终至看到了那早已不在的主人虚伪的幻影。」
管家：「我恳求你们，外来的客人们…以镇静换取他们的理性，令这座大宅重获新生吧。」

……
E:
...

New Master: "Guests from afar, I would ask that you help this household break free from the harm caused by this hidden instigator."
Butler: "I wish for them to regain the calmness of rationality, to no longer be controlled by falsehoods and instigated by fantasy."

Butler: "Forty nine days after he left this household, the master passed in an unforeseen accident."
Butler: "In the three hundred years since, his servants have fought and battled ceaselessly. That was until the day that they saw a false vision of their long-since deceased master."
Butler: "I beg you, guests from afar... Use calmness to restore their rationality and restore this great mansion."

...

C:
……

将军：「如若没有一位君王，谁庇护孱弱者，谁对抗横暴者？」
宰相：「我们必当为庇护孱弱者而互助，正如我们必当为对抗横暴者而互助。」

弄臣：「如若没有一位君王，谁能使星辰流转、潮汐涨落、万物生长？」
宰相：「在君王出现前，它们各行其是；在君王离开后，它们依旧各行其是。」

大臣：「可送别君王后，谁来做新的君王呢？」
宰相：「我们不再需要一位君王。我们本是超绝万物的君王。」

……
E:
...

General: "Without a ruler, who would protect the weak and fight back against the tyrants?"
Chancellor: "We must assist each other in protecting the weak, just as we must assist each other in opposing the tyrannical."

Jester: "Without a ruler, who will make the stars follow their paths, the tides rise and fall, and allow life to grow?"
Chancellor: "These things did as they will long before the ruler appeared, just as they will continue to do with rulers gone."

Minister: "However, now that we have bid farewell to our ruler. Who shall take their place?"
Chancellor: "We no longer require a ruler, for we were originally all rulers who stand above all things."

...

C: 匹诺康尼的故事已经——接近——告一段落，你终于得以和伙伴们共同度过一段清闲的时光。\n列车组在舒翁的酒吧齐聚，并准备以调饮的方式纪念逝去的伙伴、同时也合庆新生的希望。
E: The story of Penacony has (nearly) drawn to a conclusion, and you can finally spend some of your free time with your friends.\nThe Crew members gather at Siobhan's establishment and get ready to mix a few drinks in memory of those who lost their lives — while also celebrating the promise of new life.

C: 谐乐大典开幕在即，而「晖长石号」也基本被你扫荡一空……\n什么，你说没有参与感？好吧，距离开幕式其实还有一段时间，你不妨再到处转转，累了再找个座位等待典礼开幕吧。
E: The Charmony Festival is about to begin, and you've pretty much completely cleared out the Radiant Feldspar...\nWhat, you said you wanted a sense of participation? Well then, there's still a while before the opening ceremony commences. You may as well take a stroll around. Find a seat if you're tired and hold tight for the opening ceremony.

C: 名为遐蝶与万敌的黄金裔为我们扫清沿途阻碍，我们即将与白厄一同直面「天谴之矛」尼卡多利，成就英雄之名。
E: The Chrysos Heirs named Castorice and Mydei cleared the obstacles in our path. Now, alongside Phainon, we will face Nikador, Lance of Fury, and become heroes.

C: 「粉霞天女」风波差点闹出人命。我们以暴露天外来客身份为代价救下了执着的达米亚诺斯，只是，如此一来…便违背了对阿格莱雅的承诺。
E: The "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco almost caused someone their life. We rescued the persistent Damionis at the cost of exposing our identities as guests from beyond the sky. But in doing so... we broke our promise to Aglaea.

C: 「粉霞天女」风波差点闹出人命。我们以暴露天外来客身份为代价救下了执着的达米亚诺斯，只是，如此一来…便违背了对阿格莱雅的承诺。
E: The "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco almost caused someone their life. We rescued the persistent Damionis at the cost of exposing our identities as guests from beyond the sky. But in doing so... we broke our promise to Aglaea.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 昔日流思遍地的树庭，如今却陷入诡异的静默。{NICKNAME}一行人设法进入树庭，发现内部似乎情况不对……
E: The Grove, once filled with scholarly discourse, has now fallen into an eerie silence. {NICKNAME}'s group manages to enter, only to find that something seems amiss inside...

C: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
E: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 哀丽秘榭深处存在着一处「迷境」，{NICKNAME}跟随着二人一同前往，在那里见到了许多…形似迷迷的「妖精」住民？
E: Deep in the Aedes Elysiae lies a "Maze." {NICKNAME} follows the two there and encounters many... fairy-like residents that resemble Mem?

C: 哀丽秘榭深处存在着一处「迷境」，{NICKNAME}跟随着二人一同前往，在那里见到了许多…形似迷迷的「妖精」住民？
E: Deep in the Aedes Elysiae lies a "Maze." {NICKNAME} follows the two there and encounters many... fairy-like residents that resemble Mem?

C: 激动人心的全新冒险即将展开，本姑娘却在临出发前突发恶疾…不对，身体抱恙，甚至还陷入了昏迷？！\n等到恢复清醒，眼前的景象却让本姑娘大吃一惊——光怪陆离的心像世界，恶魔低语般的切切呢喃——这里莫非就是……\n…完全没头绪！话说回来，我真的清醒了吗？
E: Just when an exhilarating new adventure was about to begin, I'm suddenly hit with some mystery illness... Wait, no, I got sick, and even fell into a coma!?\nWhen I finally came to, what I saw nearly knocked me off my feet — a bizarre, psychedelic world of mind, with hissed demonic whispers. Could this be...\n...No, I have no clue at all! Come to think of it... am I even really awake?

C: 我不是烂片导演！我是匹诺康尼史上最伟大艺术家！听懂了吗？艺术家！
E: I'm not some third-grade director! I'm the greatest artist in Penacony's cinematic history! Got it? Artist!

C: 你看，「时辰」的精灵来了，她是来解放你的。但解放需要支付代价——\n关于你所离席的岁月，永远消失在时间的裂隙里，再也回不来了。\n但你要前进，用你创造的未来，偿还你欠下的债。
E: Look, the "Clockkeeper" is here with your temporal pardon. But this bail comes with interest.\nThe seconds, minutes, and years of your absence will be foreclosed upon, forever beyond withdrawal.\nThe only way out is forward, where each new moment you create becomes the currency to settle what you've borrowed from time's unforgiving bank.

C: 鱼在在藻，有颁其首。王在在镐，岂乐饮酒。\n鱼在在藻，有莘其尾。王在在镐，饮酒乐岂。\n鱼在在藻，依于其蒲。王在在镐，有那其居。
E: Where are the fish? Among green weeds, nodding heads in gentle streams. Where is the king? In capital bright, wine brings joy and pure delight.\nWhere are the fish? In waters deep, long tails sway in graceful sweep. Where is the king? In capital grand, feasting peaceful through the land.\nWhere are the fish? By cattails serene, resting calm in waters green. Where is the king? In capital's halls, dwelling where tranquility calls.

C: 如今翁法罗斯被三重命途之一的「记忆」所裹挟，三月、{NICKNAME}…{F#她们}{M#他们}俩去向不明，能将他们带回的就只有我了。\n如今翁法罗斯迷雾重重，还有一位友人能为我拨云见日。
E: Now Amphoreus is ensnared by the Remembrance, one of the Three Paths, and March and {NICKNAME}... they are nowhere to be found. I'm the only one who can bring them back.\nAmphoreus is shrouded in mystery now, but I have a friend who can help me see through the fog.

C: 探索遇到阻碍，十四行代数式屏障将空间隔离。螺丝咕姆提议骇入独立信源终端，通过逆转算力来攻击屏障，开启权杖内核层的封印。
E: Exploration hit a snag. A barrier of quatorzain algebraic expressions has isolated this space. Screwllum suggests hacking into the independent signal terminal and using reverse computation to break through the barrier, unlocking the seal on the Scepter's kernel.

C: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。
E: The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of <unbreak>30</unbreak> million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

C: 踏入熟悉的支援舱段，求救声从目力不可及的深处传来。营救受困的神秘科员，也许他会带来意想不到的「猎彗人」讯息。
E: After stepping into the familiar Supply Zone, a cry for help could be heard from somewhere out of sight. Rescue the mysterious researcher who was trapped, and maybe he'll tell you something you don't know about the Comet Hunter.

C: 前往监控室调取幕后黑手的影像， 一旦锁定目标，你将第一时间前去质问他的动机。
E: Go to the Monitoring Room and pull up videos of the hand behind it all. You will go and question his motives once a target is confirmed.

C: 嗅嗅，嗅嗅。\n只是给佩佩看了一下三月七的照片就可以精准定位，总感觉它好像并不是单纯靠气味识别……
E: Sniff sniff, sniff sniff.\nJust showing Peppy a photo of March 7th is enough for it to accurately locate her. Feels like it's using more than just smell to recognize people...

C: 记忆盲点已经收集完毕，接下来是面对质询以及做出申辩的时间
E: You have finished collecting the Cognition Chasms. Now, it's time to face the interrogation and defend yourself.

C: 真理医生似乎已经从蛛丝马迹中找到了答案，且看他到底发现了什么
E: Dr. Ratio seems to already have discovered the answer from what little evidence you have. Let's see what exactly he had discovered.

C: 辛克尔向你推荐了小阿德勒，据说他是界种科最了解奇物的人
E: Hinkel recommended little Adler to you — He apparently knows the most about Curios out of the entire Department of Ecology.

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
前情太复杂。总之：布洛妮娅&贝洛伯格，危。
先去找人收集意见。上层区开始。
帕姆注：到底发生了什么，倒是把细节说清楚啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Story leading up to this is too complicated. Basically, Bronya & Belobog = in danger.
Need to find people to get some ideas first. Starting from the Overworld.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What exactly is happening! Write down the details first, at least!

C: 鼹鼠党的虎克大人好像有什么事情在等着你，谁让你是鼹鼠党的荣誉队员呢，去问问看吧。\n虎克明明是一副小大人的得意模样，却总是让人忍不住想要去帮她一把，也许这就是惹人怜爱吧。
E: Hook of the Moles wants to see you. As an honorary member of the Moles, it's your duty to answer her call.\nAlthough Hook has the smugness of a child, you can't help but want to help her, perhaps out of pity.

C: 虎克大人的宝贝看起来好像全是破损，绝对卖不出去了…只好找玩偶的制作者——娜塔莎帮帮忙了。\n没想到在孤儿院照顾小孩还需要这样的本事。干脆找个机会让娜塔莎送你一个吧…要是她不忙的话。
E: Hook's treasure looks damaged. It's impossible to sell it... You have to ask Natasha, the doll maker, for help.\nYou had never thought that doll-making skills were necessary in order to be a helper in the orphanage. You'd love it if she could make a doll for you... when she is not busy.

C: 嫌疑人果然奔着地髓探针来拍卖会的，如果已经销赃完成，那个时候就为时已晚了。赶紧去抓住嫌疑人！\n等等，这种熟悉的既视感是怎么回事，好像前不久才发生过一次……
E: Of course, the suspect came to the auction for the Geomarrow Probe. It will be too late once they've sold it off, so hurry up and catch them!\nWait, what's this feeling of déjà vu? Like this happened not too long ago...

C: 工业展区的雕塑「齿轮与智慧」失窃了，你和佩拉来到下层区的机械聚落调查此事。\n眼看调查没有头绪，你们决定先帮克拉拉解决她遇上的麻烦。\n机械聚落里的机器人出现了离奇的故障，上去给它做个检查吧。
E: The sculpture Gears and Wisdom in the Industrial Exhibit was stolen. Pela and you arrive at the Robot Settlement in the Underworld to investigate this matter.\nSeeing how you found no clues, you decide to help Clara with her troubles first.\nA robot in the Robot Settlement is malfunctioning bizarrely. Go and give it a check-up.

C: 你终于获得了药王秘传的信任，得以见到他们在长乐天的负责人。你知道，这会是一次危险的会面。但自从走上了卧底的道路，你就已经别无选择了。
E: Finally earning the trust of Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, you are escorted to see the person in charge in their Exalting Sanctum chapter. You know that this will be a dangerous rendezvous. The moment you walk the path of a double agent, you have no other choice.

C: 真是没想到，丹枢竟然是药王秘传的一员。也许你无法轻易接受这个事实，也许你早就看穿了她的真面目…无论如何，你都要早些找到她，避免她做出更糟糕的事情。
E: Surprise, surprise. Dan Shu is a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus. You might not be able to accept that fact easily, but you have seen through her... No matter what, time is of the essence. You need to find her before she does something worse.

C: 陶德向你讲述了自己的心愿，他现在只想体验一些孩童应有的快乐。你答应了他买小吃的幼稚要求。
E: Todd tells you about his wish. He just wants to experience the happiness that children deserve. You agree to his childish request to buy a snack.

C: 遇上了一伙虚假的云骑军之后，你尝试联系黛青小姐向她问个一清二楚，就在这时，集装箱那里发出了收到信息的声音。也许神秘的黛青小姐就躲在…集装箱里？
E: After encountering a group of fake Cloud Knights, you try to contact Ms. Daiqing to sort things out. At this moment, you hear the sound of a message being received coming from the container. Maybe the mysterious Ms. Daiqing is hiding... in the container?

C: 按照镜流所说，她此番重回仙舟召聚旧友，是要重温彼此情深意笃时立下的约定。而在此前，她想去几处地方瞧瞧，缅怀故人。
E: According to Jingliu, she returned to the Xianzhou and collected her old friends this time to reminiscence about the promises they made when their hearts still beat as one. However, she wishes to visit some places before that, and to pay respect to bygone comrades.

C: 这下溜不掉了。无名客最讲信誉，接了地衡司的任务就要把它办妥当。话说回来，你也不知道自己怎么就被当成了潜入卧底专家…都怪药王秘传！
E: You can't slip away now. As a Nameless, you hold high repute and must handle things properly when receiving a task from the Realm-Keeping Commission. Having said that, you don't know why you are regarded as an expert of undercover operations... It's all because of those Disciples of Sanctus Medicus!

C: 黑天鹅解开了这个不算谜题的谜题…而游戏，却显然还未结束。黑天鹅再次依照花火的指引，赶往下一个案发现场。你似乎察觉到了又一股短暂的情绪波动——黑天鹅有些玩腻了。
E: Black Swan has solved the puzzle that isn't a puzzle... Clearly, the game is still not over. Once again, Black Swan follows Sparkle's instructions and rushes to the next crime scene. You feel as if you sense another brief burst of emotion... Black Swan is getting a little tired of these games.

C: 云璃答应你冷静下来，至少会与爷爷再聊一次，你明白她并不是喜欢向人解释自己做事缘由的人，能让她痛痛快快讲出来，也是你的本事。\n现在想来，你忙得满罗浮到处跑，而有的人却在逃课独享清闲，走！去列车抓她现行。
E: Yunli promises to calm down and speak with her grandfather about it again. You know she's not one to explain herself, so you totally deserve a pat on your back for getting her to spill everything.\nYou finally remember a certain truant's skiving off on her own while you were busy running around the entirety of the Luofu. Go to the Express and catch her in the act!

C: 抵达罗浮，迎面而来是星槎渡口人满为患的景象。
E: Arriving at the Luofu, you are greeted by an overwhelming sight of starskiffs.

C: 演武仪典召开之际，罗浮仙舟成了诸多是非与矛盾的交集处，除却各怀心思的客人，还有遭遇步离人袭击被迫停靠的公司舰船。\n为了解决与公司的纠纷，你们陪同彦卿抵达工造司。
E: At the advent of the Wardance ceremony, the Xianzhou Luofu became a crossroads of conflict among many — not just among guests of ulterior motives, but also IPC ships that were forced to dock after escaping from borisin attacks.\nTo resolve everyone's disputes, you accompanied Yanqing to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 在丹鼎司新任司鼎的斡旋下，你们顺利打发了来自公司专员的责难，随她一同前往丹鼎司小叙。但这场未期的谈话却再起波折，与彦卿交锋的少女剑客早已等候多时。
E: Under the mediation of the newly appointed Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master, you all successfully fended off the accusatory blame from the IPC Specialist, after which you had a chat with her at the Alchemy Commission. But more speed bumps threatened this doomsday talk, for the swordswoman had been waiting long for a showdown with Yanqing.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 金人巷中，你和貊泽从大战的余波中起身搜寻幸存者……以及椒丘的下落。
E: In Aurum Alley, you and Moze stand above the aftermath of war, searching for survivors... as well as the whereabouts of Jiaoqiu.

C: 联觉梦境的第三位作者名叫芙洛拉。对她来说，莱斯利•迪恩究竟代表了什么呢？这需要你去亲自发现。
E: The third creator of the Synesthesia Dreamscape is named Flora. What does Lesley Dean mean to her? It is up to you to figure out the answer.

C: 你拿到了一张破旧的唱片带，现在可以带回去交给她了。
E: You have retrieved a worn record. You can now take it back to Cocona.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 负责送餐的小机器人坏了，但服务科科员有事在身，只好拜托你代为询问维修工程师。
E: The meal-delivery robot malfunctioned, but the Service Department staff member is indisposed, so you are tasked to ask the maintenance engineer about it.

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 在记忆中摆弄过的「雅努斯迷津」实际并非单纯的门锁，在外人眼中另有他用。去附近转转，说不定能了解到一些情况……
E: That Janus' Maze you fiddled in memory wasn't merely a door lock — it served other purposes for outsiders. Search the area. You might find something noteworthy...

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯讲述起了自己的英雄事迹，究竟它是如何巧妙地化险为夷。
E: Spirithief Bartholos recounts their heroic deeds, telling how they cleverly turned danger into triumph.

C: 你为钟表小子雕像带去了足够多的「金表钞」——吸取了足够多美梦能量的钟表小子决定给你展露一手绝活。
E: You have brought enough Clock Credits to the Clockie Statue — Clockie, having absorbed enough dream energy, decides to showcase a signature trick to you.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 「爱当轻语低喃，令无人知晓，唯有天空。」你无意间撞见一对爱侣的秘密约会，但今天两人的交流似乎不太愉快……
E: "Love should be soft whispers that none but the sky can hear." You accidentally run into a secret rendezvous between two lovers, but their conversation doesn't seem happy...

C: 你们救下了克利克和刻牢刻，问问他们此处的情况吧。
E: You saved Kilik and Kelok. Now, ask them what's going on.

C: 目睹维吉妮娅告白一幕的，除了你与黄金裔，似乎还有这欢宴的主人。
E: Apart from you and the Chrysos Heirs, it seemed the master of this feast also witnessed Verginia's confession.

C: 你找到了遇难的飞行士。此时她正被困在一群孽物之间，情况万分危急。快去救人吧。
E: You find the crashed pilot. She is trapped among a group of abominations, and her situation is extremely dire. Quickly, save her!

C: 想要进一步了解驭空的过去，果然还是应该去司辰宫找找看。陪晴霓到处找找吧，她在这里见证的过去，也许会改变她的人生。
E: To know more about Yukong's past, you would have to go to the Palace of Astrum sooner or later. Look around with Qingni. The past she will witness here may change her life.

C: 温世玲将本次实验需要的材料整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给她吧！
E: Wen Shiling compiled a list of required materials for her current experiment. Collect them and hand them over to her!

C: 选定好最后一轮的实验课题之后，只需要将材料交给温世玲，就算大功告成了。
E: After settling on the final round of topics, hand over the materials to Wen Shiling, and you're done.

C: 在这段胡编乱造的故事中，初代司鼎为后来者设计了一系列的试炼。只有通过这些试炼，才能够炼制出使自己脱胎换骨的灵丹妙药。
E: In this made-up story, the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission designed a series of trials for their successors. Only by passing through these trials can one concoct the elixir that can make oneself be born anew.

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，你需要化身机巧鸟，破除禁制、收集丹药、获得初代司鼎的秘宝…你感觉怪怪的，但西衍先生说，这是象征着你如鸟儿一般自由。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, you need to become a cycrane to break the containment mechanism, collect pellets, and obtain the secret treasures of the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission — You feel odd about this, but Mr. Xiyan says this symbolizes you are as free as a bird.

C: 西衍先生朗声道：「如今材料已经备齐，是时候锻造出神兵利器，彻底斩断烬灭祸祖的痴心妄想了！」
E: Mr. Xiyan loudly declares: "Now the materials have all been gathered, it is time to forge the divine weapon and completely destroy the Ruin Author's delusional plots!"

C: 从丹鼎司逃出的白露似乎就在长乐天，跟她打个招呼吧，也许能搞清楚她为什么总是来到这里？\n敏锐的你已经发现了，她总是选择恰当时间出现，把你带向目前尚不可知的冒险之中……
E: Bailu, who ran away from the Alchemy Commission, seems to be in Exalting Sanctum. Greet her, and maybe then you can figure out why she is always coming to this place.\nSharp as you are, you've already discovered that she always appears at opportune moments to lead you into unknown dangers...

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说霍三哥与商会建立合作关系。但霍三哥此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Mr. Huo to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Mr. Huo has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「美馔阁」与商会建立合作关系。但「美馔阁」的老板矮阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Short Auntie, owner of Delicacy Pavilion, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Short Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！天才们对做项目各有各的想法，塞了不少好东西进去。接下来，他们将正式开启本次为模拟宇宙制作的三个片段的「位面」！
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update! The geniuses added a substantial influx of fun content from all their various ideas. Following that, they will officially initiate the three sections of "planes" developed for this version of Simulation Universe!

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n空间站的规则仿佛洞窟寻宝，不过看守宝藏的「巨龙」似乎并不敬业...总之，你们离最终的「魔王」又近了一步。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nThe space station's rules seem akin to hunting for treasures in a dungeon. It seems that the "dragon" tasked with guarding the treasure isn't all that professional... Regardless, you are another set closer to facing your final foe — the "Demon Lord."

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nThe trial at the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 在这一次的模拟宇宙更新中，阮•梅培育了模拟「博识尊」，并把时空锁定在了#27 帝皇鲁珀特陨落前！然而，一些不同寻常的情况发生了——公司联系到了黑塔，他们似乎对模拟宇宙项目很感兴趣……
E: In this Simulated Universe update, Ruan Mei has nurtured a simulated Nous and set the time before the demise of #27 Emperor Rubert. However, something unusual has happened. IPC has reached out to Herta, showing their interest in the Simulated Universe project...

C: 天才的到访在空间站留下了神秘的「阮•梅」造物，艾丝妲委托你前去培育这些古怪的小生命。她与螺丝咕姆甚至为你准备了「生命烘焙箱」与「保姆机器人」。\n到底要怎么培育呢？还是先咨询一下保姆机器人吧。
E: The genius' visit left behind mysterious creations from Ruan Mei on the space station. Asta has tasked you with nurturing these weird little lifeforms, and she's even prepared a Lifeform Oven and Helper Robot for you with Screwllum.\nHow exactly do you nurture creations? Let's ask the Helper Robot first.

C: 许多监狱区划都被这些古怪的迷钟占据了。你需要想办法修好它们，以免影响美梦小镇的重建工作。
E: Many prison areas have been taken over by these strange Tickers. You have to find a way to fix them, so they don't interfere with the rebuilding of Dreamville.

C: 错乱的梦境空间中散落着（在辛格勒看来）家族犯事的证据。\n再次进入错乱的迷梦空间，打开空间里的战利品宝箱，收集并拼凑所有线索。
E: According to Singler, evidence of The Family's "crimes" is scattered throughout the chaotic space.\nEnter the chaotic space once more and open the treasure chests in the area to collect and assemble all the clues.

C: 和司令约好了去寻找舒翁。司令好像找错了地方，还好黑天鹅帮忙指引了方向…继续跟着它前进吧。
E: Meet up with Mr. Bigwig to search for Siobhan. Mr. Bigwig has arrived at the wrong place, but fortunately, Black Swan pointed you on the right path... Continue following Mr. Bigwig.

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n快去找找不见踪影的演员。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nQuickly, go find the missing actor.

C: 这里的引导员消失了…和流萤聊聊发生了什么吧。
E: The guide here vanished... Speak with Firefly about what happened.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 几场叩关赛过后，卢卡终于赢得了足够多的积分。\n接下来，就要面对真正的强敌了。
E: Luka finally wins enough points after a few rounds of Knockout Matches.\nNow he'll face the truly formidable foes.

C: 接下来就是与铄金的决战了。\n卢卡坚定地相信，用自己的铁拳可以打碎一切无聊的「盘外招」。\n希望事情能像他预想的那样顺利。
E: The decisive battle against Shuojin is next.\nLuka firmly believes that his iron fist can shatter all pointless "dirty tricks."\nHopefully things will go as smoothly as he anticipates.

C: 名为奢摩的挑战者，会是怎样的一位选手？赶快开始接下来的比赛吧。
E: What kind of opponent would the challenger named Samatha be? Hurry and start the next match.

C: 善逝向你们同步了它的数据，真相又究竟如何？
E: Sugata synchronized his data with you all. What is the truth?

C: 折纸大学的校庆正在进行中，其中最为盛大的活动——「音乐派对」即将开启。\n知更鸟提出，希望你能担任音乐派对表演乐队的经理，帮忙筹办这次活动。委托的背后似乎还有隐情，随她一起去校长室了解清楚吧。
E: Paperfold University's anniversary is happening in full swing and the music party — the biggest event in this festival — is about to begin.\nRobin mentions she would like you to become the manager of the band due to perform at the music party and help organize this event. There seems to be more to this request. Head to the dean's office with her to see what is going on.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n观众们对乐队成员的缺场议论纷纷。没有办法，你只能先等这场演出结束……
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe audience is busy gossiping about how some band members are missing. There's nothing you can do except wait for this show to finish...

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到哈努兄弟的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of Brother Hanu's beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 你做到了，米粒真的有被数完的一天。现在，是时候炫耀一下，然后亲手将宝藏收获了…
E: You did it, you achieved the task that could rival counting every grain of sand in an hourglass! Now, it's time to show off your skills and take that treasure for yourself!

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯即将代替山之民达利安与你对垒，让它瞧瞧老牌小海豹战队的底蕴。
E: Spirithief Bartholos will replace the Mountain Dweller Dorian against you. Show it the true strength of a veteran baby seal squad!

C: 不愧是艾丝妲，能用这么豪爽的送车方式来保障你的安全，接下来的赛事想必闻了。不过你隐隐想起她曾经的许诺，今天送车，明天送什么…希望她没忘。
E: As expected of Asta, she gave you a car in such a luxurious manner to ensure your safety, I guess she has already heard about the upcoming competition. However, you vaguely remember her promise, she gave you a car today, and hopefully she won't forget what to give you tomorrow.

C: 黑了你终端替你报名的黑客在这里埋伏你呢，不管这人是谁，冠军你拿定了！
E: The hacker who hacked your terminal and signed you up for this competition is waiting to ambush you here. Whoever they may be, the championship will be yours!

C: 你调制了名为「人格」的配方，黑塔人偶喝下后，展现出了令人意外的一面。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者为黑塔再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: You mixed a recipe called "Persona," and after the Herta puppet drank it, she showed an unexpected side.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Herta.

C: 原以为驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大能够顺利成长下去，实现它的梦想，却没想到，在它身上出现了一种会变小的奇怪症状。据称，这代表它有欧洛尼斯相关的潜质…？那刻夏提出了一个出乎所有人意料的解决方案－让驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大修习欧洛尼斯祷言，进而稳定这一特性。好吧，神奇的第二次养成，开始啦！
E: You thought Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas would grow without a hitch and achieve its dreams, but unexpectedly, it developed a strange condition that made it shrink. Supposedly, this indicates it has potential related to Oronyx...? Anaxa proposed a solution that surprised everyone: Having Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas study Oronyx's Prayer to stabilize this trait. Well, time for a second round of magical nurturing!

C: 虽然意外错失了加入旅团的机会，但在负责人的推荐下，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大仍然接受了实习的邀约。值得开心的是，因为你的关心与照料，它已经不再感到迷惘了。那么，是时候见证驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大令人啧啧称奇的成长啦！
E: Although missing the chance to join the troupe by accident, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas still accepted the internship offer on the supervisor's recommendation. The good news is, thanks to your care and attention, it's no longer feeling lost. Now, it's time to witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's remarkable growth!

C: 「均衡」的仲裁官声称，你的力量动摇了宇宙的天平，因此你必须接受一场棋局审判——输赢无所谓。\n没办法，谁让你这么强大又{F#美丽}{M#帅气}呢。
E: The Arbitrator of Equilibrium claims that your power has tipped the scales of the universe, so you must face a trial by chess — the outcome doesn't matter.\nWell, what can they do when you're so powerful and {F#beautiful}{M#handsome}?

C: …算啦！反正雅利洛-Ⅵ上大概也没有什么稀奇的特产。再加上你是第一次执行开拓任务，这次就原谅你啦！
E: ...Don't worry about it! Jarilo-VI probably doesn't have anything worth buying anyway. Plus, it's your first time on a Trailblaze Mission, so Pom-Pom will let it slide this time!

C: 总感觉你盯着这个空柜子的眼神十分灼热。
E: Regardless, it seems like you're staring at the cabinet with a burning curiosity.

C: 但在屏幕旁边贴着一张小小的便利贴……
E: But there's a small sticky note attached to the screen...

C: 那我还是放弃回答吧。
E: In that case, I'd rather not answer.

C: 这样啊。
E: Huh, I see...

C: 空间站防护罩的第一道系统名为反重力电离网。我就是负责维护的科员，出了这种事，你指望我能心安理得呆在这里？
E: The space station shield's first line of defense is the anti-gravity ionizing grid. I'm the researcher in charge of it. Do you expect me to just sit here after something like this?

C: 如果你也有志加入我的事业，就请站在我的身边，与我一同摇旗呐喊罢！
E: If you are interested in joining the cause, please stand by my side and repeat after me!

C: 眼睛上看下看左看右看，敏锐捕捉着每一丝信息，生怕略过了什么。
E: The eye scans up, down, left, and right, keenly catching every detail, afraid to miss a thing.

C: 不打了不打了，这大家伙彻底炸毛啦！
E: I'm out, I'm out! It's gone bananas!

C: 对啊，你现在才反应过来？你们搞得天翻地覆的地方，是我的私人财产。
E: Yeah, up to speed yet? That place you all turned upside down? That's my property.

C: 根据我的研究，它是一种生命体；一种具有特殊机制，连通某条命途或某个星神力量的特殊物质。
E: According to my research, it's a type of lifeform with a special property that tethers it to a certain Path or Aeon's power.

C: 怎么了？我做什么了？
E: Oh? What did I do?

C: 我是谁，我在哪…
E: Who am I, where am I...

C: 领衔主演\n{NICKNAME}
E: Lead Actors\n{NICKNAME}

C: 可能正是因为如此，「开拓」才选择了这样的外观吧？
E: Maybe that's why the Trailblaze chose such a look.

C: 房间好玩吗？
E: Are their rooms fun?

C: （看样子真的很喜欢摄影啊……）
E: (She really does love photography...)

C: 跃迁前最后的准备工作要开始了。
E: Pom-Pom's going to start the final preparations for the jump.

C: 顺带一提，命途一旦开启，就无法关闭。即使执掌的星神陨落了，命途仍然开放。这就是我们在阿基维利陨落后仍能穿越星际的原因。
E: I should mention that once a Path is open, it cannot be closed, even with the fall of its Aeon. That is how we are still able to travel across the stars, despite Akivili's passing.

C: 虽然无法追溯到这个现象最初诞生的时候，但是当它被人类所观测——或者说是对现实世界造成影响的时候，它已经无法挽回。
E: It's impossible to trace the origin of this phenomenon. When it's observed by humans — or I should say once it begins to affect the physical world — it's already too late to reverse.

C: 列车长帕姆的玩偶，光着身子。
E: A doll in the form of Conductor Pom-Pom. It doesn't have any clothes.

C: 祂们是怎么诞生的？祂们为什么会诞生？祂们诞生是为了什么？…我问你{NICKNAME}，你有想过这些问题吗？
E: How were THEY created? Why were THEY created? What were THEY created for? {NICKNAME}, have you ever thought about these questions?

C: 等一下，能推荐些景点给我们吗？时间还早，咱还想在这儿多逛逛。
E: Wait! Can you recommend some sights? It's not that late, we wanna take a look around.

C: 嫌…嫌疑人？！不妙啊……
E: Suspects!? That's not good...

C: 不错啊，够机警的！放心吧，我跟可可利亚说不上话，当年把我赶出筑城者的就是她，我犯不着站在她那边。
E: Good! That's smart of you. But you needn't worry, Cocolia and I aren't even on speaking terms. It was her that ejected me from the Architects — I refuse to stand with her.
*sobbing*

C: 虽然听说你经常在裂界里往来，但那个地方肯定危机四伏吧……
E: Even for a seasoned traveler like you, the Fragmentum must be too perilous to go into, or so I've heard.

C: 如果我不在乎外界的干扰，只专注于手上的工作，我就能握住自己的未来。或许…或许有一天还能改变这座城市。
E: I'll be able to decide my own fate if I ignore the noise from the outside world and just focus on the work I have at hand. One day... maybe... just maybe... I'll be able to bring change to this city.

C: …丹恒，那个…杨叔的结论现在要说吗？
E: ...Dan Heng, wanna... talk about Mr. Yang's findings?

C: {NICKNAME}，恭喜呀！你的第一次「开拓之旅」，到此就顺利结束啦！
E: Congrats, {NICKNAME}! That was one heck of a first trailblazing expedition!

C: 让我睡觉……
E: Time for a nap...

C: 布洛妮娅，看！
E: Look, Bronya!

C: 他们这一路上…肯定还会遇到不少困难吧？
E: There'll be plenty of difficulties waiting for them, right?

C: 喔哦！克拉拉，你看到了嘛？刚才有一头超大——超大的铁皮怪兽跑过去啦！
E: Wow! Did you see that, Clara? A super suuuper big steel monster just ran past!

C: 那应该不是怪兽…史瓦罗先生的资料里有相关的记录，它叫…唔 ，一下子想不起来了。
E: I don't think that's a monster... Mr. Svarog's database has information about it. It's called... hmm, I can't remember.

C: 嗯…让妈妈看看价格…
E: Yes, let me check with mother about the price...

C: 有事直说呗，咱俩谁跟谁呀。
E: No need for the formalities. Let's hear it!

C: 呵…姐姐她一直是这种性格。
E: *sigh* ...Same old Serval.

C: 我们住在同一间宿舍，每天一起上学，一起吃饭，一起打发无聊的时光…偶尔也会一起聊聊音乐——虽然她在那方面是个外行。
E: We lived in the same dormitory, went to the same school together every day, ate together, whiled away the time together... and occasionally talked about music together — though it wasn't something she was overly familiar with.

C: 那就拜托你啦，{NICKNAME}。作为回报…我就给你讲讲这老古董的故事，如何？
E: So, I'll leave this one to you, {NICKNAME}. In return... how about I tell you the backstory behind it?

C: 是啊，我做了好久思想准备呢。要是这会儿再反悔，那我不是亏大了嘛～
E: Yes, I've been preparing myself mentally for a long time. If I back out now, it'll be a huge loss.

C: 这就是你们现在认识的那位可可利亚——永远走在所有人的前面，永远不回头看哪怕一眼……
E: And that's the only Cocolia you guys ever got to know, huh... Always ahead of everyone else, never looking back, even for a second...

C: 你看见菜单上写着：「贝洛伯格速食汤罐！营养好喝，各种口味！——葡萄味4元/罐。」
E: You see on the menu: "Belobog Instant Soup! Delicious and nutritious in all sorts of flavors! Grape flavor: 4 shield per tin."

C: 放任不管。
E: Leave it.

C: 这只是个垃圾桶。
E: It's just a trashcan.

C: …但是让我知道是打折、清仓、或者随便捡的处理品，那人就死定了。
E: ...If they put it like that and I catch wind that they are on ordinary discount, on clearance, or picked up off the street, then those people are toast.

C: 一直都不是很好；地下地上的生活环境各有恶劣之处，地上要面对寒潮和裂界的侵蚀，地下则要在物资匮乏的闷热环境里进行体力劳作。
E: ...It's never been good. Conditions are tough both above and below the surface. The Overworld is faced with the Eternal Freeze and Fragmentum corrosion, and the Underworld has to contend with hard labor, suffocating heat, and serious shortages.

C: 这里是鼹鼠党的地盘！…不过仅限于小孩子。大人的部分归「地火」管！
E: The Moles are in charge, that's who! ...But only of the kids. Wildfire is in charge of grown-up business.

C: 不苟言笑，实力超群的超级新人——「冷面小青龙」！由深蓝帅哥推荐！
E: On one side — recommended by Tall, Blue, and Handsome — the unsmiling pulverizing power of the new kid on the block: Cold Dragon Young!

C: 呃，咱就说句玩笑话，你别什么都听我的啊。
E: Eh, I was kidding, and get your own opinion!

C: 守护者大人有她的考量……
E: The Madam Guardian has her reasons...

C: 我身体不大舒服…
E: I'm not feeling too good...

C: 我知道二十多个{RUBY_B#「丰饶」的孽物}长生种族{RUBY_E#}，都不长你这样。
E: I'm familiar with over twenty {RUBY_B#Abominations of Abundance}long-life species{RUBY_E#} — none of them look like you.

C: 「地火」和希儿是谁？
E: Who are Wildfire and Seele?

C: 就先聊到这儿吧。
E: Good to chat.

C: 没什么。话不投机，有些事我们没法达成共识。
E: Not really, though it wasn't the friendliest conversation. We didn't see eye to eye on everything.

C: 哈哈哈，就这？这跟隔着靴子搔痒似的，不带劲。看来在你回去之前，我得好好教你几句黑话。
E: Hahaha, that's it? That's nothing. Looks like I'll have to teach you some Underworld slang before you go back.

C: 啊，我也经常这样，好像做了梦，又记不得什么内容。
E: Oh, that happens to me all the time. It feels like I had a dream, but I can't remember anything about it.

C: 我很好，真的很好。我在下层区跑了一大圈，经历了几场战斗，但总体还算应付得来。
E: I'm fine, really. I just got into a few skirmishes down in the Underworld, but nothing I couldn't handle.

C: 科鲁泽拖着受伤的身体离开了诊所……
E: Kluzer left the clinic dragging his injured body...

C: 你这是把我当成送货员了。
E: You're treating me like a delivery man.

C: 但诊所收到过这么多物资，他的经济状况也并不好，这似乎有点说不通……
E: His financials didn't seem that good, and yet he donated so much to us at the clinic, which just doesn't make sense...

C: 这真是…这真是千古难逢的场面啊——要知道，「希罗」和「尤尔」在面对新人拳手时从未落于下风，可这次竟然被{NICKNAME}一举报废了！
E: This really is... this is a once-in-a-lifetime show— Silo and Yur have never been at a disadvantage against a rookie fighter, but this time they were demolished by {NICKNAME} in one go!

C: 换句话说，分数越高的拳手实力越强，您和对手皆是如此。这也意味着随着您胜利的次数增加，战斗强度也会随之增大——不过这点我猜您早有准备，对吧？
E: In other words, the higher the points, the stronger the boxer, for both you and your opponent. It also means that the more you win, the harder it gets. But I guess you're ready for that, right?

C: 经此一役，磐岩镇搏击俱乐部迎来了进化之日！无限制格斗的新时代即将到来——而促成这一伟业的，正是本赛季的终极赢家，{NICKNAME}！
E: This battle welcomes a new era of evolution for the Boulder Town Fight Club! A new era for freestyle fighting has dawned upon us, and it's pushed by this season's ultimate winner — {NICKNAME}!

C: 关于这个…我们有个好消息想传达给你。对吧，{NICKNAME}？
E: ...Y'know, we've got some good news for you, haven't we, {NICKNAME}?

C: 不愧是贝洛伯格的戍卫官哪…想必是考虑到下层居民对铁卫会有所非议，这才想凭借开拓者的人望减轻阻力吧？
E: You're worried that Underworlders might still hold a grudge against the Silvermane Guards, so you want to show your solidarity with the Trailblazers to build some trust. Seems like a sound strategy to me.

C: 我就知道，你一定要去看《冒险鼹鼠队》，书里全是有趣的大冒险。
E: I knew it, you have to read The Adventurous Moles. It is full of fun adventures.

C: 我就知道，你一定要去看《冒险鼹鼠队》，书里全是有趣的大冒险。
E: I knew it, you have to read The Adventurous Moles. It is full of fun adventures.

C: 铁卫禁区…那是银鬃铁卫的基地吗？通往雪原的话，应该是在基地最深处吧。
E: The Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone... is that their base? If it leads to the Snow Plains, would that be right in the deepest part of the base?

C: 你依稀记得某部游戏里，这样的垃圾箱里能捡到关键的道具，用来解开附近的谜题，前往下一片区域。
E: You vaguely recall a video game in which a key item can be found in dumpsters like this to solve a puzzle and unlock the next area.

C: 世界上有两种英雄，一种在被看见前躲进垃圾箱，另一种在被看见前把别人扔进垃圾箱。
E: There are two types of heroes in this world: One of them hides in the dumpster before they were seen, and the other hides bodies in the dumpster before they were seen.

C: 「绝灭大君」焚风现身于提亚奴阿星系。据悲悼伶人的消息，该星系已遭毁灭。
E: The Lord Ravager, Zephyro, was spotted at the Tia'nua galaxy. According to the Mourning Actors, that galaxy has been completely destroyed.

C: 「厄兆先锋」于近日同星际和平公司取得联系，向公司预警了即将来临的灾变。
E: The Omen Vanguards recently reached out to the IPC and warned about the spread of a certain strain of bacteria.

C: 我若是星核猎手，这样的混乱正中下怀，虽说增加了趁乱逃脱的难度，但更不易被发现了。
E: If I were one of the Stellaron Hunters, I'd be very happy to capitalize on all the chaos. It'd be harder to escape, but easier to blend in.

C: 没什么…
E: Never mind...

C: 恩公若是闲不住，可以到处逛逛，也可以这就动身和太卜司使者碰头。
E: If you're bored, you could go and find the messenger from the Divination Commission.

C: 对了，我认识个朋友，他的星槎有通行许可证，能帮您和您的朋友速速离开，价格公道好商量，您意下如何？
E: Oh, that reminds me... I have a friend with a starskiff and a travel permit — he could help you and your friends get over quickly. The price is fair and negotiable. What do you think?

C: 咱们走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 不是说免费看诊吗？
E: That doesn't sound very "free."

C: 是。
E: I do.

C: 隔壁这位素裳姑娘是云骑军人，去问她吧。
E: Miss Sushang here is a member of the Cloud Knights. You could try asking her.

C: 亮牌吧，卡芙卡。我们来到这里，应该都在你的计划之中。
E: Admit it, Kafka. You planned for us to come here.

C: 小谛听说它嗅到了特别的东西……
E: Diting smells something...

C: 战事不利，太卜身先士卒，亲自探察敌情，令人钦佩。
E: The conflict is difficult, master diviner, but you have led your forces from the front lines and beyond in pursuit of the enemy. Admirable work.

C: 她身上冒出的那团火又是什么东西？停云小姐的身体…她的身体又去哪儿了？
E: And what was that fire that came out of her? And her body — where did it go?

C: 但没过多久，行伍里的弟兄姐妹突然不分敌我、肆意砍杀起来……
E: ...Then, after a while, our comrades suddenly started to slaughter one another...

C: 还没，得好好准备一番…
E: Not yet...

C: 小心！
E: Look out!

C: 这、这战报该如何写才能显我军威风啊…？
E: I—I need to find a way to make this report sound more... impressive.

C: 鳞渊境中正在发生可怕的事情。请不要再前进了，您的敌人…您的敌人在等您。
E: Something terrible is happening in Scalegorge Waterscape. Please don't go any further... Your enemies... Your enemies are waiting for you.

C: 多谢你们一路的照顾…
E: Thanks for all your help along the way...

C: 不知这位持明蜕生前有什么舍不下的心结？无论如何，它最终都成了磨灭不去的悲伤，被你握在掌心。
E: Perhaps this Vidyadhara once had something they couldn't bear to part with prior to their rebirth. But now it has become an eternal sadness, which is held in the palm of your hand.

C: 将军临行前交代我在府中因应。诸位既然凯旋，那提前备下的策略是一个也用不上啦，真是万幸。只一条除外……
E: Before he left, the general told me to handle things at the Seat of Divine Foresight. Fortunately, now that victory has been achieved, the plans we prepared will never see the light of day. However...

C: 差点忘了，我要为太卜收集情报，起草文书了。各位请自便。
E: I almost forgot — I need to gather data for the master diviner's draft report. Bye for now.

C: 接下来准备做什么？
E: What are we going to do next?

C: 诸位…我谨代表天舶司上下，感谢列车团在星核灾变中挽救了罗浮。
E: Ahem... On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, I would like to thank the crew of the Express for saving the Luofu from the Stellaron crisis.

C: 停云……
E: Tingyun...

C: 停云，天舶司不会忘记你的…我会查明真相，若你罹难了，我会为你复仇。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission shall never forget you, Tingyun. I will seek out the truth, and if it is discovered that you were taken from us, I swear to avenge your unjust end.

C: 不过，{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核{RUBY_E#}爆发后，它投入了{RUBY_B#同谐}希佩{RUBY_E#}的怀抱，据说被改造成无比繁荣的梦之国度。
E: However, following a {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellaron{RUBY_E#} burst, the planet fell into the arms of {RUBY_B#the Harmony}Xipe{RUBY_E#}. They say it's been transformed into a prosperous and ethereal realm.

C: 星槎中摆放着你们挑选的物品，在不久后，它将起航飞向不知名的恒星，并最终消逝在它的辉光里。
E: Soon, the starskiff will carry the items you selected to the stars unknown, vanishing in the vastness of their halo.

C: 汪~
E: Woof~

C: 小鱼，你必须接受现实…
E: That's one way of putting it...

C: 我和瓦尔特先生说过了，这次由我留守列车，祝你们在匹诺康尼玩得开心。
E: I spoke to Mr. Yang. I'll be staying on the Express this time. I wish you all a delightful time in Penacony.

C: 你也多花些时间清点行李为好。听说家族的入境手续很繁琐，等入住了再发现问题，就来不及了。
E: I'd advise double-checking your bags. Word is that The Family's customs procedure can be quite demanding. Better to sort it out now than face issues at your hotel check-in.

C: 将真相如数奉上，他们自然会赴约。
E: All we have to do is present the truth, and they will naturally reciprocate.

C: 我不会感到害怕。
E: I feel no fear.

C: 无论如何，我都不愿活在梦中。
E: I would never want to live in a dream.

C: 只是眼下正值「谐乐大典」前夕，匹诺康尼每一纪最重要的时刻。又遇上家族发出邀请，全银河的客人把这儿挤得水泄不通……
E: It's just that right now, we're on the eve of the Charmony Festival, Penacony's most important moment of every era. And with The Family's invite, all guests from all over the cosmos have thronged this place...

C: 想必是笔天文数字吧，所以现在，砂金先生，我这儿有一笔您不容错过的「投资」。
E: It must be an inordinate number, which is why, now, Mr. Aventurine, I have an investment that you absolutely cannot miss out on.

C: 不，我不是怀疑您的身份，只是……
E: No, I'm not doubting your status, it's just...

C: 这是各位的「梦境护照」——它是酒店客房的房卡，也集成了您在「白日梦酒店」需要的全部功能和信息，并提供智能协助。
E: This is your Dreamscape Pass: It serves as your hotel room key, as well as a directory of all the amenities and information you require at The Reverie. It even provides smart assistance.

C: （总觉得气氛有点诡异，而且…刚才是不是有什么奇怪的声音？）
E: (The atmosphere here creeps me out, and... what was that weird noise just now?)

C: （三月七呢？是不是已经回房间了……）
E: (Where's March 7th? Has she returned to her room already?)

C: （重申——我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Let me reiterate that I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
E: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

C: 嗨！嗨嗨嗨！
E: Hey! Hey, hey, hey!

C: 救救！救救啾！揪我出来啾！救救啾！
E: Help! Help me! Pull me out! Help me!

C: 好啦！看上去真不错，你好上相呀。
E: It's done! It came out great — you're very photogenic.

C: 「选择背叛的刹那」、「疑虑的阴云」、「至死不渝的恨」——就跟雷手大姐说是小丑准备的「材料」，她肯定明白。
E: "The Moment of Betrayal," "The Cloud of Doubt," and "Everlasting Hatred." Just mention the "Clown's items" to Miss Thunderbolt — she'll understand what I mean.

C: 你明白，是时候做出抉择了。那么，你想试着碰一下这台电视，看看究竟会发生什么*有趣*的事情吗？
E: You know it's time to make a choice. So, do you want to take a chance and touch this television, to see what *intriguing* events might unfold?

C: 「我可不会再相信你了。」——你很想对你的老朋友报以愤怒的回应，但以你现在的状况，你恐怕只能跳起来狠狠击打他的膝盖骨。
E: "I will never believe you again." You really want to reply to your old friend in rage, but with your current state, the best you can do is jumping up to strike his knees.

C: 好吧，我承认，你又一次拯救了美梦小镇——但我一定会回来的！
E: Fine, I'll admit it — you've rescued Dreamville once again. But you just wait... I'll be back!

C: 没问题——爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
E: No problem! Dr. Edward is happy to help you when you're ready!

C: 你心虚了…是吗？
E: You feel guilty, don't you?

C: 我也很喜欢这种生活。
E: I really love that kind of life.

C: 石头老板是美梦小镇里最坏的坏蛋——他是个贪心鬼，想要把美梦小镇的镇民都赶走，独占珍贵的石料……
E: Of all the lowlifes in Dreamville, {RUBY_B#Boss}Stone{RUBY_E#}'s the worst. He's a greedy man who wants to drive everyone out of Dreamville so that he can have all the precious stones to himself...

C: 哥们，别哭了，多大个人了。
E: Bruh, quit the waterworks. You're a big boy now.

C: …不行不行，等我蒙头睡一觉，醒来铁定又忘了。心动不如行动，干脆现在就把它复现出来！
E: ...No, no, no. I'm sure I'll forget all the details when I wake up from sleep. There's no better time than now to put it into action!

C: 这根球棒终于有用了。
E: At long last, this baseball bat of mine has found its purpose.

C: 快，快！要像仓鼠球骑士那样快！
E: Come on! Chop-chop! Move as fast as the Hamster Ball Knight!

C: 啊…{NICKNAME}！你果然也在这儿……
E: Ah... {NICKNAME}! So you're really here too...

C: 保护美梦小镇那样…
E: Protecting Dreamville...

C: 不可思议…真的就像梦里才能看见的风景……
E: Incredible... This is really a sight that can only be witnessed in a dream...

C: …怎么回事？！灯怎么全都亮起来了，好吓人……
E: ...What's going on!? The lights have all turned on. So creepy...

C: 莎塔娜？你和娜塔莎什么关系？
E: Shatana? Are you related to Natasha?

C: 大门打开了…传闻是真的，你是注定要击败塔塔洛夫的救世主！垃圾之神派你来将暴君的财宝散给我们！
E: The door is open... The legends are true! You are the savior destined to defeat Tatalov! The God of Trash sent you to return the tyrant's treasures to us!

C: …原来如此，这样就能解释家族言语中的违和感了。
E: ...I see. That would explain the uneasiness we've sensed from The Family.

C: 看——很符合常识，也很简单吧？
E: Look, it's common sense and easy, right?

C: 姬子小姐，你看，我如约将这孩子带回来了。
E: Look, Miss Himeko: I brought the kid back as promised.

C: {NICKNAME}，你没事吧！现实和梦里都找不到你，担心死我了……
E: {NICKNAME}, you're all right! We couldn't find you in either dream or reality, we were worried sick...

C: …姬子，你怎么看？
E: ...How do you see things, Himeko?

C: 你用力敲了敲门。她依旧没有回应。
E: You knock harder, and there's still no response.

C: 事实上，这也是我们想问你的问题。
E: We could ask you the same thing.

C: 我就能做到。
E: I can.

C: 还是算了吧…
E: I think we should forget it...

C: 情况紧急，我只能破例用些手段，带你们一同穿过忆域。
E: There's no time. I'll just have to break the rules and use some methods to help you phase through the Memory Zone.

C: 准备好了吗？小心别发出惊呼哦。
E: Are you ready? Don't be too surprised.

C: 这是什么情况…
E: What is happening...

C: 我们到了，就在这扇门后。屏住呼吸，拭目以待吧——
E: This is it, just beyond this door. Take a deep breath and get ready.

C: 各位，那边——
E: Everyone, over there—

C: 我将…点燃大海。
E: I will... set the seas ablaze.

C: 无名客不能对邪恶视而不见。
E: The Nameless cannot turn a blind eye to evil.

C: 同一时间 现实中的酒店
E: At the same time — Hotel in the real world

C: 在我看来，家族对星穹列车并无恶意——若非信任列车组的品格，他们不会轻易委托外人调查一桩堪称「丑闻」的案件。
E: As I see things, The Family harbors no ill-will towards the Astral Express — if they didn't trust the Crew, they wouldn't have casually commissioned outsiders to investigate a case that's in all likelihood "a scandal."

C: 匹诺康尼大剧院依旧静静悬浮于梦海中央。
E: Penacony Grand Theater still silently floats in the heart of the sea of dreams.

C: 真是伟大的发现——要不我把加入天才俱乐部的机会让给你吧。
E: A truly miraculous discovery — perhaps I should offer you the chance to join the Genius Society?

C: …也许吧。
E: ...Perhaps.

C: 如何，要找他对质么？
E: So? Do you wish to confront him?

C: 原来如此，这行李袋…将比性命更珍贵的基石混在一堆低贱的珠宝里，伪装成礼金等待被扣押，倒确实符合那位{RUBY_B#赌徒}砂金先生{RUBY_E#}的风格。
E: I see, this bag... Mixing a Cornerstone, more precious than life itself, with a bunch of worthless jewels, disguised as a gift of money waiting to be confiscated, is indeed in line with {RUBY_B#Gambler}Mr. Aventurine{RUBY_E#}'s style.

C: 我方才为你施行的，是「同谐」的圣洗。你本应在祂的光照下展现忠诚，却一意孤行，满口谎言，将洗礼变作了审判。我实在没有理由为你解开它。
E: What I performed on you just now was the Harmony's consecration. You were to show allegiance beneath the illumination of THEIR grace, yet you acted willfully, uttering nothing but falsehoods, transforming the consecration into a trial. I genuinely see no reason to absolve you from it.

C: 喏，我就说——穷举也能解决问题。
E: Look, like I said — brute force can also solve things.

C: 鸢尾花家系的档案中…似乎找不到这位艺者的信息，您提供的照片也无法匹配……
E: I can't seem to find any information on this artist in the Iris Family archives. The photo you provided also doesn't show any matches...

C: 星核猎手…
E: Stellaron Hunters...

C: 难怪砂金到处找人合作，原来他在梦境里得不到公司的援助。
E: No wonder Aventurine's scrambling to partner up with someone — the IPC can't back him up in the Dreamscape.

C: 那人的风格就这样，「所有，或者一无所有」是他的老口头禅了。他总是一边套近乎，一边推着客户陪他铤而走险…人各有志，我不多评价。
E: That's just his style. "All or nothing" is his mantra. He's always cozying up to his clients while egging them on to undertake some dangerous assignment with him... But everyone has their merits, so I won't comment further.

C: 家族…怎么了吗？
E: Why...? What's wrong with The Family?

C: 理由倒没那么冠冕堂皇…她只说「报道这种没来由的都市传说只会让我们看起来像三流小报」。
E: Well... She simply said, "Covering baseless urban legends like that would make us look like some third-rate tabloid."

C: 听说你被家族下了降头？哎，明明给了你那么直接的提示…「去找个哑巴做朋友」，听听，就这么简单一句话……
E: I heard you got caught by The Family? I gave you a clear clue... "Befriend a mute." Simple and straightforward, you know...?

C: （啊…脑袋里像是有什么东西，是「同谐」开始产生影响了么？）
E: (Ehhh... I can feel something inside my head... Is the "Harmony" starting to kick in?)

C: 先说结论吧：根据家族手上的线索，这位流萤确实不是本地人，也不是受邀前来的宾客。换言之…她是个货真价实的偷渡犯。
E: Alright, let's start with what we know based on the clues The Family has. It seems that Firefly isn't a local or an invited guest. In other words... she's a stowaway.

C: 这位巡海游侠暂且不提…就我所知，星穹列车已经在正式场合接受了家族的委托，怕是没必要再特地大驾光临了。
E: Even without the famous Galaxy Ranger... as far as I know, the Crew has officially accepted The Family's commission, so coming here will be unnecessary for you.

C: 「在战略投资部主管『钻石』的示意下，公司基于《宪章》精神对其妥善安置，并将持续开展调查工作，进一步确认嫌疑人的犯罪动机……」
E: "As per Strategic Investment Department head Diamond's sentiments, the IPC has appropriately relocated the suspect in the spirit of the Charter, and will continue to conduct further investigations as to the motive of the suspect..."

C: 哈哈，当然，我太了解你了…不过，真奇怪，为什么你拒绝了那份邀请？明明你有过拥抱「欢愉」的机会，那不是你最想要的吗？可你还是选择了公司的牌桌……
E: Haha, of course, I know you all too well... But, it's strange — why did you decline that invitation? You had the chance to embrace Elation. Was that not what you most wanted? But you chose the IPC instead...

C: 行了，要么现在闭上嘴，要么赶紧从我眼前消失。
