E: We're done. Either stop talking, or disappear from my sight.

C: 也许他根本没有在演呢？
E: Or maybe he wasn't acting at all?

C: …是啊，又见面了。你找到爸爸妈妈了么？
E: ...Yes, we meet again. Did you find your mother and father?

C: 如果一切从头来过…你还想当被母神赐福的孩子么？
E: If you could start over... would you still want to be the child who received Gaiathra's blessing?

C: 那他们在哪里？
E: Where are they then?

C: 马上就是登台的时间了，你做好准备了吗？祝你的演出圆满成功。
E: It's almost time to go on stage. Are you ready? Good luck with your show.

C: 这是个诡计，一场复仇。记得吗？今天是「卡卡瓦」之日，也是你的生日。
E: This is a trick, an act of revenge. Remember? Today is the day of the Kakava, and also your birthday.

C: 假设——只是个假设——假设我每次掷骰子都有概率掷出这个结果……
E: Let's assume — just assuming, now — that every time I roll the dice, there is a possibility of achieving this particular outcome...

C: 巨大的黑洞，和海……
E: A gigantic black hole, and... sea...

C: 不会有人想到，你如此大费周章，甚至不惜押注自己的生命，只是为了再度确认一个看似早已被否定的事实……
E: No one would have ever thought that you would have gone to such lengths, even staking your life, just to prove a fact that had seemingly been disproved long ago...

C: 「我为甘露赐下鸩毒，春种秋收，静待枯果满枝头。」
E: "I grant poison for nectar. Sow in spring to reap in fall. Await wizened fruit to fill livened boughs."

C: 同一时间 忆域深处
E: Meanwhile — Memory Zone Depths

C: 你觉得自己能做到。
E: If you think you can.

C: 我的线人是个忆者。她就和所有的模因生物一样，突然出现，又突然消失。真他宝贝的吓人。但她提供了重要线索。
E: My informant is a Memokeeper. She's the same as all memetic organisms — appearing one moment, and gone the next. She scares the fudge outta me. Still, she gave me some vital info.

C: 我就有幸见识过一位「欢愉」令使，只看外表和那帮小丑根本没区别。要不是老子运气好把它灌醉了，还真不知道对面的身份这么「显赫」！
E: I had the good fortune of running into an Elation Emanator — its appearance was no different than that of those clowns. If it weren't through sheer luck that I got it drunk, I would have never known of its eminent status!

C: 这是鸢尾花家系为客人们准备的小礼物，也给你们一份。在谐乐大典上打开，会有意想不到的惊喜哦。
E: This is a small gift prepared by the Iris Family for the guests — there's one for you too. Please open it at the Charmony Festival for an unexpected surprise!

C: 知更鸟…小姐？
E: Miss Robin...?

C: 我可未必，还是开慢点吧。
E: I'm not so sure about that. Slow down a bit.

C: 接下来，让我们离开这里吧…请闭上眼。
E: Now, let's leave this place... Please close your eyes.

C: 呃，请不要担心，这种事发生过很多次了…科玫小姐人不坏，就是有些…沉浸在另一个世界里。她应该很快就会发现自己算错了。
E: Uhh, please don't worry, this sort of thing has happened many times before... Miss Kaimee isn't a bad person, she's just a bit... lost in her own world. She'll probably realize she's wrong soon enough.

C: 在我离开匹诺康尼的这段时间，十二梦境的边界不断向外扩张。可每当我谈及梦中的异象，却总能感受到家主们三缄其口，只有兄长愿意解答……
E: While I was away from Penacony, the boundaries of the Twelve Dreamscapes kept expanding outward. But whenever I mentioned the anomalies in the dream... all the family heads refused to talk about it. Only my brother was willing to respond...

C: 听说钟表匠的遗产就在这里！你们愿意一起寻宝吗？
E: I hear the Watchmaker's Legacy is right here! Let's say we go treasure hunting?

C: 我会…嗯，先将它放在笼子里，至少在它能独自活下去前先这样。因为……
E: For now... I'll keep it in a cage until it can take care of itself because...

C: 我没死？
E: I'm still alive?

C: 盛会之星…就是星核之灾？
E: The Planet of Festivities itself... is a Stellaron disaster?

C: 请你安心，我已恳请祂与我等同在。只要您心地诚实善良，就一定能得到宽恕。
E: Rest assured. I have implored THEIR presence to be with us. As long as you are sincere, absolution will be granted.

C: 月亮…呵呵，你想说的是大剧院吧？
E: The moon... You mean the Grand Theater?

C: 乐意效劳，那就随便聊聊吧。您方才提到「时日无多」…恕我冒昧，您是为了这个才来到匹诺康尼的吗？
E: It's my pleasure. No need to be formal — just speak your mind. You said "with little time left"... Please forgive me for being blunt, but is that why you came to Penacony?

C: 人们总是会忘记，曾经，当第一只鸟儿飞上天际，那时整个世界对它的期许……
E: People often forget that when the first bird took flight, the entire world envisioned a future where...

C: …你们的意思是，长久以来，竟有恶徒将我等为世人赐福的谐乐大典…当做实现野心的工具？
E: ...You mean to say, that for the longest time, there have been scoundrels who would use the Charmony Festival that I have bequeathed to the masses... as a tool to realize their ambition?

C: 谨遵您的旨意。
E: I will do as you command.

C: 瓦尔特先生……
E: Mr. Yang...

C: 嚯！真不愧是盛会之星，现实里的酒吧都这么气派。
E: Wow! This bar is something else — certainly worthy of the Planet of Festivities.

C: 正是。请问有什么可以为您效劳的？
E: Yes, I am. How may I assist you?

C: 不可能，你再好好想想？
E: No way. Are you sure you're not mistaken?

C: 也不一定就是祂，但肯定有个形而上的意识在作祟。别说哥们悲观，如果人类的自由意志可信，那还要巡海游侠做什么？
E: It may not necessarily be Xipe, but there's definitely some higher entity involved. I know it may sound pessimistic, but if human free will were reliable, why would we even need Galaxy Rangers?

C: 「虚无」的意义…那同样是我的所求。
E: For the meaning of the Nihility... that's what I've been seeking.

C: 前途迢递孱颜险，旌旆蔽天争冠冕！
E: Your journey is long and fraught with peril, yet under a sky blanketed by banners, you vie for the crown!

C: 喝下这瓶苏乐达™，快乐美梦速速达！
E: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad™, and make your dreams a blast!

C: 嗯…现在，轮到我们开辟前路了。
E: Yes... And now, it's up to us to forge ahead.

C: 现在——开始您的选择！
E: Now... make your choice!

C: 你发出了一声很酷的*哼*。这可能是有史以来最酷的*哼*了。
E: You let out a cool *hmph*. It might just be the coolest hmph in history.

C: 天哪…你是说，石头老板集结了坏蛋，想要攻占美梦小镇？这可真是不幸…呵呵。
E: Oh, my, are you telling me that Boss Stone has rallied the villains to seize Dreamville? What a dreadful twist of fate...

C: 恭喜二位成为此次谐乐大典的盛会巨星，在进入大剧院前……
E: Congratulations to the both of you on becoming the Festive Superstars of this year's Charmony Festival. Before entering the Grand Theater...

C: 前进吧，朋友们——等那个时刻到来，我和所有迷钟都会为你们加油的！
E: Go forth, my friends — when the moment comes, all the Dream Tickers and I will cheer for you!

C: 我忙着拯救世界，能让一让吗？
E: I'm busy saving the world. Could you please make way?

C: 从这里开始，各位将看到我经历过的诸多抉择。我选取了其中一部分与你们分享。
E: From this point on, you will witness the numerous decisions I've faced. I've selected a portion of these to share with you.

C: 不过，这个选择究竟会酿成什么样的「苦果」？我想，星期日一定是通过这件事深刻认识到了「以强援弱」的局限性吧。
E: But, what cruel repercussion would this choice result in? I think, Sunday must have been deeply impressed by the limitations of "the strong defending the weak" through this incident.

C: 而这次的故事…属于我本人。
E: And the story this time... is my own.

C: 交给你了，{NICKNAME}，就像米哈伊尔先生嘱咐的那样，告诉他我们的选择吧——
E: We'll leave it to you, {NICKNAME}. Just as Mr. Mikhail instructed before: Tell him our choice...

C: 现在的问题是，是谁把你们带进了这里。依照目前的线索来看，可能并不是那位愚者，那么他是谁就十分关键了。
E: The question now is — Who brought you here? Based on the clues we have so far, it's unlikely to be that Masked Fool, so identifying them is crucial to us.

C: 如果没记错，沿着那条走廊向前，有一座温暖的壁炉。我和钟表小子常常在那烤火，听木柴噼啪作响。
E: If I remember correctly, there should be a fireplace down that hallway. Clockie and I used to sit by the fire, listening to the crackling of firewood.

C: 这么看来，这位「米哈伊尔」还真是一位航海士，和咱们所知的「钟表匠」没什么关系。
E: It seems this "Mikhail" is truly a seafarer and has nothing to do with the Watchmaker.

C: 是「星穹列车」。我想起来了，米哈伊尔的朋友是一群无名客。他们来到我们的世界，为了解决一颗星星引发的灾难。
E: It's the Astral Express. I remember now, Grandpa's friends are a group of Nameless who came to this world to resolve a disaster caused by a star.

C: 只是循着「生命」的气息来了。在这种地方，这气息格外分明。
E: I was just following the scent of life. It's particularly strong in a place like this.

C: 前提是…他们真的心向「同谐」。
E: No, they don't... if they truly serve the Harmony, that is.

C: 「自黄昏战争以降，天穹空虚，大地混沌。」
E: "After the Dusk Wars, darkness veiled the sky, and chaos consumed the earth."

C: 「因为主人用泥土造化了你，用烈火造化了我，我比你更高贵！」
E: "Because Master shaped you from clay but forged me from fire! I'm superior to you!"

C: 这梦境里应该也没有第二个「大剧院」了。
E: There's no other Grand Theater in the Dreamscape.

C: 「惟有<color=#dbc291ff>理性</color>才能令其免于过去的流毒。」新至的主人如是说。
E: "Only {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>calmness</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>reason</color>{RUBY_E#} can shield people from the lingering poison of the past," proclaimed the new master.

C: 「主人，您已不在，我便不再等待您的嘉奖…所有一切应属我的，我当自取。」
E: "Master, now that you have gone, I shall wait no longer for my reward... I shall seize what is rightfully mine."

C: 这人偶好像没反应诶…你是不是弄错了？
E: This puppet isn't responding at all... Did something go wrong?

C: 请容我指出，陷入永久的沉睡绝不能和幸福画等号，尤其是人们还要在睡梦中任人摆布。
E: Allow me to point out that falling into a permanent slumber is not happiness, especially when those people are driven by someone else's will in their sleep.

C: 嗯？有吗？我都不记得了。
E: Hmm? It does? Well, doesn't ring any bells to me.

C: 各位，我们快去找姬子小姐吧？{NICKNAME}身为匹诺康尼的小明星，整个酒店可都在担心{M#他}{F#她}的安危呢。
E: Everyone, let's hurry up and look for Miss Himeko, shall we? {NICKNAME}'s now a minor star on Penacony, and the entire hotel's concerned about {F#her}{M#his} well-being.

C: 好了，好了。既然各位乘客都相互认识过了，那我们就继续航线会议了帕！
E: All right. All right. Now that everyone's met everyone, we can continue our navigation meeting!

C: 啊，对了。作为对用那枚「空光锥」戏弄了你的小小补偿，我想送你一句话。它对我有着十分重要的意义……
E: Ah, that's right. As a small token of compensation for playing that little trick on you with the empty Light Cone, I will gift you with some words — they hold great significance to me...

C: 原来你刚才一直都跟在我们身边啊…无妨，总之，我和{NICKNAME}就在列车上等你和小三月了。
E: You've been with us this whole time, huh. In any case, {NICKNAME} and I will be waiting for you and March on the Express.

C: 加拉赫
E: Gallagher

C: 「梦主」
E: "Dreammaster"

C: <size=40>拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔</size>
E: <size=40>Mikhail Char Legwork</size>

C: 遗憾的是，真相不仅如此。早在进入阿斯德纳之初，我们就已经受到了星核的影响。回想起来，你我相遇的那片陌生梦境，或许就是思绪开始游离的预兆。
E: Unfortunately, it didn't stop there. From the early days of our journey into Asdana, we were already affected by the Stellaron. That strange Dreamscape where we met... Maybe it was a sign that your thoughts were beginning to drift away.

C: 播下的种子已然生根发芽，而后…便是「收获」的时刻。
E: The seeds we planted have taken root. Soon... it'll be time to "reap" the rewards.

C: 怎么了，突然问这个？
E: Where did that come all of a sudden?

C: 这动静，有什么不得了的要来了！
E: Uh oh, I have a bad feeling about this!

C: 我这是在做梦吗？
E: Am I dreaming?

C: 谢谢啦。
E: Thank you.

C: 您来啦，托帕总监！家族代表还在里面做准备，「大老板」也还没到——离会谈开始恐怕还得再过一阵。
E: Welcome, Director Topaz! The Family ambassadors are still inside making preparations, but the Big Boss hasn't arrived yet. It'll be a while before the conference starts, I'm afraid.

C: 这位大人物，要么是有自己的野心，想提前跟我们达成某种共识；要么就是打算来个下马威，让我们知难而退。
E: This influential figure either has their own ambitions and wants to reach a preliminary agreement, or they plan to put pressure on us to make us back off.

C: 把「薯条圣代」抛给账账。
E: Toss a Potato Fries Sundae to Numby.

C: 唉，真担心匹诺康尼的未来啊……
E: I'm really worried about the future of Penacony...

C: 要出发了么？那把它也带上吧。
E: Are you leaving? Then take this with you.

C: 嚯哈哈哈哈哈！有趣，真是太有趣了！
E: Ohohohohoho! Interesting! Indeed!

C: 都听你的。接下来的谈判和交接工作交给你就行，我不参与了。
E: It's all up to you. I'll step back and let you handle the negotiations and takeover. I won't be involved.

C: 就这样吧，典当行没有老板娘在可没法开张。回头见，托帕。
E: Well, I'll take my leave. A pawnshop can't run without a boss. See you around, Topaz.

C: 赢…赢了？我…我真的赢了？！
E: I... I won? I actually... won!?

C: 嗜赌成性的史黛西，她希望从我这里获得绝世的好运。但她没有任何可供抵押的财物，所以我收走了另一样东西：她所有的亲密关系。
E: Then there's Stacy, a lady with a gambling addiction. She wanted some serious luck, but she had nothing to offer, so I took something else instead. I took away all her close relationships.

C: 一二三四五……
E: One, two, three, four, five...

C: 我说的！
E: I did!

C: 折纸鸟…小啾啾……
E: Origami bird... Hey, little birdie...

C: 「纯美」的审美者若在追求力量之路上迷失，就会堕为「恶兆」非人非兽的模样。
E: If an admirer of the Beauty gets lost in the pursuit of power, they risk descending into "the Omen of Evil," a form which is neither human nor beast.

C: 你看到我了？
E: You saw me?

C: 想再四处转转。
E: I feel like walking around.

C: 现在，我提议，大家共同举杯——
E: And now, I propose a toast...
Five...

C: 嗐，怪我，上了假面愚者的当！这剧本出自一位名为「花火大人」的编剧之手。她说她是第一花火大学电影编导系出身，我便与她一拍即合……
E: *sigh* It's all my fault for being duped by the Masked Fools! This screenplay was written by someone named "Miss Sparkle." She said she graduated from Sparkle University's Film Directing and Screenwriting program, so we instantly hit it off...

C: 看来她也给你们发消息了……
E: Looks like she also sent you a message...

C: （这艘空艇上的宝贝也不少，收获颇丰……）
E: (This airship has quite a few treasures, a bountiful harvest...)

C: 拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔，向你致意，梦想之地的「钟表匠」，星穹列车的无名客——
E: Mikhail Char Legwork, we raise a toast to you, Watchmaker of the Land of the Dreams, Nameless of the Astral Express...

C: 然后就做好准备，出发前往「开拓」的下一站吧。
E: Then prepare ourselves for our next Trailblazing destination.

C: 就像这个故事中的所有人一样，为了寄托他们生命意义的事物，热烈而勇敢地奔赴在命运的道路上。
E: Just like everyone in this story, hurtling onwards along the path of destiny with passion and courage, for the things that breathe meaning into their lives.

C: 落叶总要归根。
E: Falling leaves must return to their roots.

C: 不会有人在船上安了炸弹吧…
E: No way someone could have planted a bomb on this ship, right...?

C: *蕉粉*谈不上，刚入坑的*新蕉*而已！你身边这是…玩偶吗？
E: You could say I'm more of a Fresh Banana than a Ripe Banana. Is that a plush next to you?

C: 吓到你们了？抱歉！我是负责迎新的「助蕉<unbreak>416</unbreak>」！
E: Did I scare you? Sorry. I'm Assistanana <unbreak>416</unbreak> from the welcoming committee!

C: 赵相机？
E: Say~Cheese~?

C: 天呐，我认得你！你不是这一届的盛会巨星吗？大明星啊！
E: Oh gosh, I recognize you! You're this season's Festive Superstar! You're famous!

C: 我是「普利蒙教授」。当然，大家也可以用更流行的方式称呼我为——*蕉授*！
E: I'm Professor Primon. You may also call me by my more fashionable moniker — Profnana.

C: 大多数回答都很聪明，像一位机敏的制片人，还有和「星际和平公司」打交道的经历，最适合你的学院是——财富学院！
E: Most of your answers were clever, like an astute producer. Combined with your experience in dealing with the Interastral Peace Corporation, the best academy for you is... Fortune Academy!

C: 谐乐学院。
E: Charmony Academy.

C: 大佬，这可是爆款商品，过了这村就没店了。
E: This is a top-selling product, buddy. If you snooze, you lose.

C: 呃…你说的是前面那人吗？
E: Um, is that the person up ahead?

C: 来吧同学，一定要让<color=#dbc291ff>所有模特与睡蕉小猴</color>都同时入镜哦！
E: Alright, make sure you get <color=#dbc291ff>all the models and the Slumbernana Monkey</color> in the shot.

C: 哦，没有的事，这些小甜水味道不错。点这么多只是一种习惯。
E: Oh, it ain't like that. These little sweet drinks taste pretty good. Ordering a bunch is just a habit of mine.

C: 没有不会落幕的风潮，在流梦礁，这也不算什么前所未见的事，所以犯不着干涉，更何况……
E: Fads come and go. It's not all that unusual even in Dreamflux Reef, so I didn't see a reason to intervene. Besides...

C: 抱歉啦…至少现在，我还不能放你进去。
E: Sorry, but I can't let you in for now.

C: 天哪，我刚才还在听您的新专辑呢！您怎么到流梦礁来啦？
E: Oh, my! I was just listening to your newest album! What brings you to Dreamflux Reef?

C: 他宝贝的，贼心不死啊！可算找到你们几个小可爱了。
E: Well, well. Finally found these lil' fudgeheads! And would you look at that? They just don't know when to quit.

C: 呦——哥几个，怎么颤颤巍巍的？今儿没喝够？
E: Howdy, pardner! What's wrong, pals? Ooh, that's one distressed look you have there! Haven't been swiggin' enough, eh?

C: 怕什么！我每隔一段时间就得做件够疯狂的事，不然我就会疯了。
E: What's so scary about that!? I have to do something crazy every once in a while. THAT keeps me from really going nuts.

C: 但在舞池中央，当人们站在恰到好处的灯光下时。即使每个人有所不同，也不妨碍他们看上去毫无区别。
E: But on the dance floor, there's no need to conform or impose a certain standard for everyone to follow. Even if everyone is different, they will still appear the same.

C: 我、我也想来。
E: Me... me too.

C: 这是在干嘛？
E: What do you think you are doing?

C: 气死我了蕉！哪来的校外野猴，不仅扰乱课堂秩序，还用歪理煽动我的猴生们。
E: Grah, you've really banannoyed me, unruly monkey! You barged in here disrupting my class, and now you're even corrupting my students with ruinous ideas!

C: 不全对。*蕉声*和*蕉语*确实促进了传播，但最重要的还是它切中了匹诺康尼用户的「痛点」！
E: Not quite. While Banagibberish and Bananese helped propagate the banana craze, the key lies in how Slumbernana Monkey addresses the pain point of Penaconian consumers!

C: 看来你完全没有听讲啊，还是那些旁听生又给了你不切实际的幻想？
E: I take it you haven't been paying attention in class, huh? Or did those guest students plant unrealistic ideas in your head again?

C: 比如你，过往精彩的大腕儿！以及你，万众瞩目的巨星！还有这位…个性十足的演员！请一定要赏光参演！
E: Like you, a big shot with a brilliant past! And you, a superstar that everyone will have their eyes on! And this... actress with personality! Please join us in the performance!

C: 发出挑衅
E: Provoke Brave Monkey

C: 可你现在不还是在往陷阱里跳嘛。
E: But aren't you doing that right now? Falling for the trap.

C: 他们是怎么说的？
E: What did they say about it?

C: 对这种毫无来由的冒犯，对方袒露出笑意，然后不再言语。
E: In response to this unprovoked offense, she revealed a smile and then fell silent.

C: 现在都躲远点，犯傻无所谓，识相点儿。
E: Go, scurry off and hide. Ain't no harm in bein' foolish, but know when to steer clear.

C: 别担心，我会细致地为您讲解。
E: Have patience. I will explain everything in detail.

C: 如果那种对饮品的依赖从一开始就不存在，这个问题自然也不会产生，连带着因此产生的两种思绪也一并消失。
E: If the dependence on the drink was never there to begin with, this problem would naturally not exist, and the resulting thoughts would also disappear.

C: 今日的演员可谓有趣。一位生活在绿幕中的演员，一位更替过身份的演员，还有……
E: Ah, we have quite some fascinating actors today. One perpetually films before a green screen, another has been through a change of identities, and...

C: 戴上它吧，为了成为忍侠——
E: Put it on, for the sake of becoming a Ninja Hero...

C: 是琉璃•忍者才对，告辞！
E: That's Ninja Ruri to you! Farewell!

C: 而那些自私的植物，强调着「个性」与「自我」，却将种子肆意播撒，野蛮生长。只知道延续自己的基因，却不知为同类奉献。
E: As for the selfish plants that place emphasis on personality and individuality, they will willfully spread their seeds and grow uncultivated. They only care about whether their genes are passed on but do not know to contribute to the cause of their kind.

C: 快点追吧，来吧，教室就在前面了。
E: Hurry up and give chase. Come on, the classroom is just ahead.

C: 蕉…睡蕉小猴的力量被削弱了……
E: Bana ugh... The power of the Slumbernana Monkey has been weakened...

C: 演员
E: Cast

C: 哈托努斯，连你也……
E: Not you too, Chartonus...

C: 可别跟丢了，鬣…抱歉，是宪兵队的军官们。
E: Keep up with us, you hyen... oh, sorry, I meant officers.

C: 远比「生命」更加沉重。
E: Was far heavier than "Life" itself.

C: 呃…古兽？银河超巨大章鱼？
E: Uhh... a Leviathan? A cosmic mega octopus?

C: 我想…就连虚构史学家也不敢轻易采用这种设定。
E: ...Not even the History Fictionologists would dare to spin a tale like that.

C: 你的表情很凝重啊…
E: Why so solemn...

C: 这声音…是哈托努斯？
E: That voice... is Chartonus?

C: 但愿这片战场没有想象中那么辽阔……
E: We can only hope this battlefield is nowhere as extensive as I imagine it to be...

C: 「命运的弃儿，我倒要看看你有没有这个能耐——看看你能否亲手熄灭{RUBY_B#「纷争」}自己的宿命{RUBY_E#}。」
E: "O child abandoned by fate, show me what you are capable of. Show me if you have the power to put out the flames of {RUBY_B#Strife}your very own destiny{RUBY_E#}."

C: 「但记住了，迈德漠斯：{RUBY_B#悬锋建城者}歌耳戈{RUBY_E#}之子，必将浴血代冠——」
E: "But remember this, Mydeimos: The son of {RUBY_B#Kremnos Founder}Gorgo{RUBY_E#} will be crowned in blood—!"

C: 这称呼倒是让人意外。
E: I didn't expect you to call me that.

C: 听起来不错。多收集翁法罗斯不同地区的风土人情，也是「开拓」的一环。
E: Sounds good. Gaining more insight into the customs and geography of different regions of Amphoreus is also part of Trailblazing.

C: 这是因为，树庭并不单是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的根系所在，也是{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}「黄金之茧」{RUBY_E#}显迹之地——
E: This is achievable because the Grove is not only where the roots of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} are... but also where the Chrysalis of Gold manifests.

C: 现在，他们或已为我们备好绞索了。
E: They may have even prepared the gallows from which to hang us already.

C: 小缇安真有干劲…人家也不能被落下哪。
E: Little Trianne is so motivated... I mustn't fall behind!

C: （取下「金枝誓言」的一瓣。）
E: (Remove a petal from the Golden Bough of Vows.)

C: 甚好。那么，吾等就登上水车……
E: Great. Then, let's ride the water wheel...

C: 嗯！缇安不久前在一根树枝上找到的。缇安还顺着用金丝找了找，发现整个树庭到处都有类似的气息。
E: Yup! Trianne found it on a branch not long ago. Trianne even used the golden thread to search around and found that the entire Grove is giving off a similar aura.

C: 可是…瑟希斯，你不是理性之泰坦嘛？
E: But... Cerces, aren't you the Reason Titan?

C: 嗯，我们尽量为{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}争取时间。
E: That's right, let's do our best to buy time for {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: 你终于来了，想死你了！
E: You're finally here! I missed you so much!

C: 是啊。它们是唯二尚存理智，还愿意与人类共存的泰坦了。
E: Mm-hmm. They are the only two Titans who are still lucid and willing to coexist with humanity.

C: 嘿，爸爸妈妈都睡着啦，我们是偷偷溜出来的，和克拉特鲁斯爷爷玩捉迷藏！
E: Hee-hee, Mom and Dad were asleep, so we snuck out to play hide-and-seek with Mr. Krateros!

C: 哼…这下够<color=#dbc291ff>僻静</color>了。
E: Hmph... Some <color=#dbc291ff>privacy</color> at last.

C: 是每一个悬锋人的执念，无论它正确与否。
E: This is the creed of every Kremnoan, no matter whether these beliefs are justified or not.

C: 「…长夜最后的光亮，城垣坚固的奥赫玛。」
E: "In twilight's last gleam, Okhema stands bold. Her walls sturdy, tales untold."

C: 该怎么做，我仍在思考。
E: I'm still thinking about what I should do.

C: …不过，多亏了他俩，悲伤的气氛都烟消云散了。
E: ...But thanks to those two, all the gloom has vanished into thin air.

C: 好热…
E: It's so hot...

C: 喔…黑潮好坏！我不想让大家变成它的小面包，有办法赶走这个家伙吗？
E: Ooh... The black tide is a baddie! I don't want everyone to turn into its food. Can't we chase it away?

C: 不要为和*我们*道别伤怀——我们早就约定好了，对不对？
E: Don't feel sad about saying goodbye to us. We have already agreed on this, right?

C: 不会错…就是它。烧毁了哀丽秘榭…杀害所有人的凶手。
E: I was right... It is this thing. The one who torched Aedes Elysiae to the ground... and killed everyone.

C: 是预感到了*我们*会来，躲进迷雾中了吗？还是……
E: Did they foresee that we were coming and hide in the fog? Or...

C: 别吵，我自有分寸！
E: Quiet! I know what I'm doing!

C: 黑潮的走卒——朕，悬锋众军之王，前来做你的敌手。
E: Minion of the black tide, I, king of the Kremnoan legion, will be your opponent today.

C: 别了，挚友。你一定要…带领我等还乡……
E: Farewell, my dear friend. You must... lead us back home...

C: 这不重要。同为半神，她们早已有所觉悟。
E: That is irrelevant. As demigods, they have long been prepared for it.

C: …万敌？
E: ...Mydei?

C: 我会的，万敌阁下。
E: I will, Lord Mydei.

C: 你永远都是我们的王。
E: You will forever be our king.

C: 向你致敬！
E: We salute you!

C: 雅努斯的印记…这就是暗门了？
E: The mark of Janus... Is this the secret door?

C: 纵使身负火种，汝亦将远离成神的光荣，「门径」总与泥尘作伴，哪怕凡人的锋刃亦能将汝胁迫……
E: Though thou bearest the Coreflame, thou shalt be far from the glory of divinity. "Passages" are forever associated with dirt, and even a mere mortal's blade can imperil thy very existence...

C: 去引渡众神灵魂吧—— / 去用神灵滋养乐土吧——
E: Ferry the spirits of the gods — / Nourish the land with divine essence —

C: 我们也跟上。
E: Let's keep up.

C: 是死去的泰坦显灵？
E: Is the fallen Titan manifesting?

C: 这…就是你们的答案。
E: So this... is your answer.

C: 为新世界带来明天的，或许只是几位英雄。但引领大家迈向明天的预言，却属于翁法罗斯的每一个人。
E: It may be that only a few heroes will bring tomorrow to the new world, but the prophecy of leading everyone to tomorrow belongs to all in Amphoreus.

C: 非人非神的怪物，别忘了，你不敢杀我。倘若掐灭了「理性」的火种——
E: O monster neither human nor divine, don't forget that you won't dare kill me. If you snuff out the Coreflame of "Reason" —

C: 你也对差分宇宙感兴趣？
E: You're interested in the Divergent Universe too?

C: 没错！「令咒」！作为被选中参与「圣杯战争」的资格证明，听说凭它的力量，能号令匹诺康尼历史上的名人为你而战！
E: Right! Command Spells! Proof of your selection to join the Holy Grail War. They say its power lets you command legendary figures from Penacony's history to fight for you!

C: 鄙人斯科特，想登上{RUBY_B#总部干事}公司职级P<unbreak>45</unbreak>{RUBY_E#}的高位！
E: Me, Skott? I'm just a lowly grunt trying to climb to a {RUBY_B#Headquarters Officer}P<unbreak>45</unbreak> corporate rank{RUBY_E#}!

C: 更重要的是，如果圣杯是真的，奥帝先生您为什么要把它分享出来，办这种…节目？我是说，要换做是我，早就闷声发大财，自己偷偷许愿了。
E: But here's the bigger question: If the Grail is real, why are you sharing it? Why turn this into a... show? Let's face it. If I were in your shoes, I'd keep it to myself, make my wish quietly, and get filthy rich.

C: 斯科特先生，公司不过是广阔银河中的一个选择罢了。有时候我们需要为自己争取一飞冲天的机会。我看好你喔！
E: Mr. Skott, the IPC is just one of many choices in this vast cosmos. Sometimes, you need to fight for your own shot at greatness. I've got high hopes for you.

C: 血浆横飞的星间砍杀喜剧，Action！
E: A blood-splattered, interstellar slasher comedy. Action!

C: 哦？看来不同的世界之间，总会有一些微妙的共通点。你们这里的「卡美洛」还好吗？
E: Oh? Seems like different worlds have their share of strange parallels. Tell me, does your Camelot still stand?

C: 很不幸，已经灭亡了。倒是还有一些遗民。我有个叫{RUBY_B#桂乃芬}格妮薇儿{RUBY_E#}的朋友就是从那儿来的，她还有个哥哥名叫{RUBY_B#郎世乐}兰斯洛特{RUBY_E#}。
E: Unfortunately... no. It was completely destroyed. But there are still survivors. I have a friend from there, {RUBY_B#Guinaifen}Guinevere{RUBY_E#}. She's got an older brother named {RUBY_B#Langshile}Lancelot{RUBY_E#}.

C: 你这家伙不是对我下达指令，要我逮着最欠揍的那些人收拾吗？
E: You're the one who told me to go after the most annoying targets!

C: …受不了，虽然很烦人，但也没办法。我应该是这里唯一受过正统魔术知识修炼的人。由我先试着去解析对方的布置，方便弄清他的目的。
E: Ugh, it's annoying but unavoidable. I believe I'm the only one here with formal training in magecraft. I'll try and analyze our enemy's setup, see if I can figure out their real goal.

C: 确定。
E: I'm positive.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！凭一点商人本能的敏锐，就会知道该在哪儿布局落子。而我需要知道的，圣杯都告诉了我。
E: Ohohoho! The sharp instincts of a businessman are enough for me to know where and when to make my moves, and the Holy Grail has told me everything I need to know.

C: 你向Saber讲述了发生在匹诺康尼谐乐大典上的一场迷梦：一个男人，妄想以一己之身维系地上天国。
E: You recount the fantastical dream you had during Penacony's Charmony Festival to Saber, how a man dreamed of creating a paradise kingdom with his own power.

C: 虽然违和感仍然在你的心中徘徊，但在解决它之前，还是先休息一会儿吧。
E: Although an uncanny feeling lingers in your chest, before it's resolved, you should take a break.

C: 举剑挑战自己绝对无法战胜的龙，剑折弓断，身首异处，他身为人类的一切注定是失败的……
E: He raised his sword to challenge a dragon he knew he could never defeat. The sword shattered, the bow snapped, and he was beheaded. As a human, everything about him was destined to fail...

C: 我是来上班的。
E: I'm here to work.

C: …你是从哪儿打听到了列车长的名字？是丹恒告诉你的吗？
E: ...Where did you hear the conductor's name? Did Dan Heng tell you?

C: 手头的工作耽误了你太多时间，<color=#dbc291ff>一天，两天，十天……</color>
E: The work you had piled up took far too much of your time, <color=#dbc291ff>one day, two days, ten days...</color>

C: 你们一定会后悔的。
E: You'll regret this.

C: 难不成是为了消灭自己的对手？听说，你和我的御主之间可是有些芥蒂。
E: Then are you trying to crush your business rivals? I heard there's some bad blood between you and my Master.

C: …属于往昔「英灵」的记忆，也是一桩令我满意的报酬。
E: ...The memories of former Heroic Spirits are also worthy compensation.

C: 以令咒下令，荡除一切邪恶之物吧，Saber！
E: By the Command Spell, I order you, Saber! Destroy all that is evil!

C: 但这恰恰会成为你们失败的理由。我会把你们这些逃亡者一个个地收下，变成听话的群演。
E: But that's also why you're going to lose. I'll take each of you runaways, one by one, and turn you into obedient extras for my film.

C: 无能就是无能，不需要为她找借口。
E: Call it what you want — she's still too weak. No need to sugarcoat it.

C: 饶了我吧，这里的人就没一个正经的吗？
E: Give me a break! Are there no functioning adults around here?

C: 关于正义斯科特…
E: About Skott of Justice...

C: 把你们闷死在这噩梦默剧的故事里未免无趣了。说起来，你有兴趣站在老奥帝这边吗？
E: Strangling you all in this nightmare pantomime feels a bit dull now. Tell me, would you be interested in siding with Old Oti?

C: 我有七种方法置你们于死地，七种！
E: I've got seven ways to end your lives. Seven!

C: 等等……
E: Wait, don't—

C: 是我心怀侥幸了。能允许我解释几句吗？
E: Seems I let my wishful thinking get the best of me. Will you at least give me a chance to explain?

C: 这期间，列车也经她引荐结识了阮•梅女士，并为后者从「金伦加深域」带回了一具古兽遗骸。不过嘛……
E: It's also thanks to her that we got to make Miss Ruan Mei's acquaintance a while back. We even went into the Calenga Abyss to bring a Leviathan's carcass back for our new friend. Speaking of her...

C: 只是出于保险，否则这一路上，我们已经被猎犬拦下好几次了。
E: I was only being careful, or we would've been stopped by the Bloodhounds more than once on our way here.

C: 正是仙舟「罗浮」。
E: Yes, more specifically the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 你感应到了什么？
E: What do you sense?

C: 又是苏乐达，我可是本地人啊……
E: SoulGlad again... I'm a local, you know.

C: 要不咱们再去梦境贩售店看看？虽然外头也有忆泡，但匹诺康尼的梦泡可不一般，就算不送人，拿来留作纪念也很合适。
E: Why don't we pay another visit to the Dreamscape Sales Store? You can find memory bubbles pretty much anywhere, but Penacony's dream bubbles are extraordinary. Even if we don't get them as gifts, we can keep them as souvenirs for ourselves.

C: 这怕是狐人天性，谁都知道神秘是吸引人的窍门喔。
E: That's just the nature of the foxians. It's widely known that mystery is the key to our allure.

C: 毁灭令使潜力股。
E: A potential Emanator of the Destruction.

C: 这不重要。
E: That's not important.

C: 驭空大人，天上煌煌众神以人为弈，博戏群星，留下一地冤魂孤冢、白骨累累…您可曾想过，要让祂们付出代价？
E: Madam Yukong, the gods use humans as pawns in their cosmic game, sacrificing countless innocent souls... Have you ever thought about making THEM pay?

C: 哼，你都擅作主张多少次了，我就不行？
E: Hmph, so you can do whatever you want as many times as you want, but I can't?

C: 为什么要这么做？
E: Why?

C: 但我不会成为你。我做不到。
E: But I won't become like you. I simply can't.

C: 不过是个只会让妹妹失望的人。
E: The person who always disappoints his sister...

C: 到人间去，为了看那尘世。
E: Step into the mortal world to see how it truly is.

C: 你的梦想不切实际。
E: You have an unrealistic ideal.

C: 总之，在我并不漫长的「开拓」中，你称得上是一位令人难忘的对手……
E: Anyhow, you've been an unforgettable adversary to me, even though I haven't been trailblazing for long...

C: 那里是米哈伊尔先生的故乡。露莎卡曾受星核影响，全球海平面上升，不知现在变成什么样了。
E: Mr. Mikhail's homeworld. Lushaka was hit by rising sea levels after the Stellaron Disaster, though I'm not sure how things are on the planet now.

C: 忆庭为何需要星穹列车的帮助？
E: Why is the Garden turning to us for help?

C: 不用担心，我的命比较硬！
E: Have no fear, resilient little me will volunteer!

C: 看来有人已经准备好下车，跃跃欲试了。
E: Looks like someone is all set and itching to get off the train.

C: 你晕车了？
E: Is it motion sickness?

C: 三二一，茄子——
E: Three, two, one... Cheeeese—!

C: 还记得这一幕吗？多么让人精神振奋的画面！尊贵的天才俱乐部#83，黑塔女士，正在向伟大的博识尊发问，想要从祂身上求得「神性」的奥秘！
E: Remember this scene? Gah, it evoked so much emotion in me! The esteemed Madam Herta, Genius Society #83, asking the great Nous a question! An attempt to gain a peek into the divinities' mysteries through THEM!

C: 你今天的俏皮话好像格外多啊？
E: What's with your witty remarks today?

C: 没什么大不了的，只需要一点小小的技术性调整。
E: No sweat. They'll be up and running again after some simple technical tweaking.

C: 这里也有个忆泡……
E: There's a Memory Bubble here too...

C: …您到底是出于什么心理设计的这些玩意？
E: ...What were you really trying to achieve with these creations?

C: 黑塔女士…我们在狭间内捕捉到了一些「声音」。
E: Madam Herta... We picked up some voices from the space.

C: <unbreak>0002</unbreak>……
E: <unbreak>0002</unbreak>...

C: 你冷静点，第二面镜。它又说了什么，再放给我听听。
E: Keep your cool, Second Mirror. What did they say this time? Play it again for me.

C: 所以，我猜两位大驾光临，肯定不是为了观光吧？
E: In any case, I don't suppose you came all the way here just to check on how the space station is doing?

C: 咯咯咯…不愧是黑塔女士，这些家伙根本不是对手！
E: Brrr... Aaaaand Madam Herta never fails to impress! Those things are no match for you!

C: 得先找个安全的地方当根据地。从四周的建筑，还有这尊雕像来看，翁法罗斯肯定存在文明……
E: Let's find someplace safe to set up a base of operations first. This statue and the buildings we've seen so far point to a civilization here on Amphoreus...

C: 似乎来者不善…
E: I'm sensing hostility...

C: 但在其他疑团面前，语言互通反倒是最不重要的一点了。先上路吧，希望问题能迎刃——咳…水到渠成。
E: But compared with our other suspicions, sharing a common language is the least of our concerns right now. As the saying goes, let's get moving like a blade through... You get the point.

C: 「自此，创生已毕。谁来背负灵魂的重，换取世人步伐之轻？」
E: "Thus, creation was complete, who then will bear the weight of humanity's souls, to lighten the steps of the living as a whole?"

C: 呜嗡——
E: Urrhh... uuuhhhh—

C: 谢谢，谢谢…二位的同袍正在城中战斗，命运会指引你们相聚。
E: Thank you, thank you... Your comrades are fighting inside the city. Fate will guide you to them.

C: {F#她}{M#他}的意思是，我们可以帮忙。
E: What {F#she}{M#he} meant to say is: We can help.

C: 这种火烧眉毛的时刻挑衅盟友，你把自己当什么了？
E: Provoking your allies at such a critical juncture. Whose side are you on?

C: 白厄阁下。还有…两位客人。
E: Lord Phainon. And... the two guests.

C: 无需惊惶…无需恐惧……
E: No need to fear... No need to cower...

C: 听她的话，往左靠一靠。
E: (Follow her suggestion and move a little to your left.)

C: 现在，请把左手放到桌台上，抬起小臂，手掌向前，五指微微张开……
E: Now place your left hand onto the bench. Lift your arm up with your palm facing forward, and part your fingers slightly...

C: 白厄的意思是他会搞定。要是遇见了，就问问他吧。
E: Phainon promised to fix it. We can ask him about it when we see him.

C: ——奥赫玛欢迎你们。
E: Okhema welcomes you.

C: …不过，一直讨论这么苦大仇深的话题也属实扫兴。好像还是我起的头，真难为情。
E: ...But discussing such a bitter topic is a bummer. I'm embarrassed since I think I'm the one who brought it up.

C: 那位遐蝶小姐，该说是寡言少语吗？也不对，只是有些捉摸不透。
E: You could say Miss Castorice is not very talkative? No, that's not it, she's just a little elusive.

C: 不，不行！不许烧我的传家宝贝！
E: N—No way! You can't burn my family heirloom!

C: 这样就好。上网…不是什么好习惯。
E: That's good. Surfing the web... isn't a good habit to have.

C: 迫不及待想看看了…
E: I can't wait to see it...

C: 你花费了些功夫，将砝码放回了原位。
E: It takes you some effort to put the weights back in place.

C: 缇宝再次开启「百界门」，与白厄、丹恒一同驰援悬锋城。
E: Tribbie opens the Century Gate once more, rushing to the rescue of Castrum Kremnos with Phainon and Dan Heng.

C: 要不回家保平安吧…
E: Maybe we should go home to stay safe...

C: 这份礼物可以解决你们的困扰。
E: This gift will address your troubles.

C: 不加修饰的回答，你没有顾忌它可能招致的对立或猜疑。此步不记。
E: A response that lacks embellishment. You have no misgivings about the friction or suspicion that your answer might cause. A step will not be recorded.

C: 我绝对不会！
E: Not a chance!

C: 我不擅长繁文缛节，但一定尽力而为。
E: While I'm not good at formalities, I'll do my best.

C: 这里…大概没人能听到我们的呼救。
E: I don't think anybody will be able to hear our cries... given where we are right now.

C: 但保卫奥赫玛一役，我们并肩经历了许多场战斗。决死时刻的眼神不会骗人，我能从他们的眼中找到信念，也愿意将后背交给他们。
E: However, during the battle to defend Okhema, we fought side by side numerous times. The look in someone's eyes in moments of life-and-death never lies, and I was able to detect the conviction in their eyes back then. That's why I was willing to put my life in their hands.

C: 不妨先从天谴之矛，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的声音开始吧？
E: How about you start with the Lance of Fury, the voice of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?

C: 听着好危险，能反悔吗？
E: That sounds really dangerous. Is it too late to back out?

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C: 等等，我又想了想——这赌注还是太大了些。靠一场比试决定荣耀的归属，不是敬神的表现。
E: Wait... On second thought, the stakes seem a bit too high. Deciding who gets the glory with just one competition might be disrespectful to the gods.

C: 时时刻刻都准备着。背负「纷争」的火种…那是我的夙愿。
E: Always. Bearing the Coreflame of Strife... has been my deep-seated desire.

C: 纹丝不动……
E: It didn't even move an inch...

C: 「跟我来吧…跟着我。和我一起…远瞻你的过去……」
E: "Come with me... Follow me and join me... as we look far into your past..."

C: 为什么我忘记了你…
E: Why did I forget about you?

C: 我该和谁告别…？
E: Who should I bid farewell to...?

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 阿格莱雅伸出手臂，示意女孩也做出相同的动作。
E: Aglaea extends her arm, signaling the girl to do the same.

C: 我俩之间的关系，应该算作「竞争对手」才对——冤家之间可不想狭路相逢呀，桀桀桀！
E: On the contrary, we're more like competitors! No competitor would want to cross paths with one another, teehee!

C: 如我所言，元老院并非我们的敌人…至少现在不是。还是回归迫在眉睫的议题吧。
E: Like I mentioned before, the Council is not our adversary... at least not now. We should be focusing on the more pressing matter at hand.

C: 三人组队……
E: Teams of three...

C: 是出口吗？好像被锁上了。
E: Is this the exit? Oh, it's locked.

C: 你是怎么……
E: How did you...?

C: …等等。
E: ...Wait.

C: 我们的目标并不冲突，女孩。找到泰坦，我们便能各取所需。
E: Our goals are not in conflict, girl. Find the Titan and we can both get what we came for.

C: 或许在我耳边低语的，正是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}本尊。
E: The whispers I'm hearing may very well be from {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} themself.

C: 「我们会继续寻找。我们一定会找到……」
E: "We will keep searching for it. We must find it..."

C: 彼岸在呼唤…安心睡去吧，亡魂……
E: The other side is beckoning to you... Go on, lost soul, rest in peace...

C: 重新拼合它的灵魂，让它的神性核心再度合而为一。如此一来，它便能找回身为泰坦的尊严，你们也能获得一个正面战胜它的机会。
E: As long as we reassemble their soul and unite their divine core, they will recover their dignity as a Titan. You will then have a chance to triumph over them in battle.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，此处有它神性的一瓣……
E: Here lies another fragment of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity...

C: 碎裂吧，弱者。
E: Crumble, weakling.

C: 你身上…有那罕见的光环……
E: I sense... a rare aura around you...

C: 走吧，回奥赫玛去。把胜利的消息带给两位半神。
E: In any case, let's return to Okhema and share news of our victory with the two demigods.

C: 哈哈……
E: Haha...

C: 有B计划么？
E: Is there a plan B?

C: 这是夸张的修辞手法，表达了人家怦怦跳的心情！
E: This is just an exaggerated figure of speech to express how nervous I'm feeling right now!

C: 你是说…
E: Do you mean that...

C: 复活我，快！
E: Revive me, quickly!

C: …失礼了。
E: ...Please pardon me.

C: 依我看，已死的泰坦给不了你如此底气吧？那是谁，凯妮斯？
E: As I see it, a dead Titan can't provide you with this level of confidence, right? Then who is it, exactly? Could it be Caenis?

C: 用不了多久…到五岁那年，你就知道答案了。
E: It won't take long... You'll discover the answer when you reach the memories of when I was five.

C: 如今…依旧不在人世啊。
E: She's still not in the mortal realm... even to this day.

C: 呵，大言不惭。方才退下的、你忠心耿耿的「清洗者」们听到的说辞，恐怕和这番话截然不同吧。
E: Hah, what brazen arrogance. What you're saying right now is worlds apart from what you were saying before you retired your "cleaners."

C: 这是你希望看到的吗，凯妮斯阁下？
E: Is this the outcome that you wish to see, Lady Caenis?

C: （还是说，人在濒死之时，连灵魂也能看见了呢……）
E: (Or do we even get to see souls when we're close to dying...?)

C: 卡厄斯？这名字也十足陌生……
E: Khaos? This name sounds just as strange to me...

C: 啊呀…倘若那当真是死魂灵，那吾又是什么东西？
E: Wha... But if those are the souls of the dead, then what am I?

C: 别杀我…求求你，我不想死……
E: Please... Don't kill me... I don't want to die....

C: 呃…这些需要我当没听到吗？
E: ...Should I pretend I didn't hear any of that?

C: 右边的短矛上刻着字——相信我灰子，这两根短矛都刻着真话。
E: The right spear is engraved with the words: "Trust me, Gray Mystery, both spears are engraved with the truth."

C: 这儿！看哪儿呢，在这边～
E: Over here, over here! ...No, not that way. This way!

C: 好家伙…早知道我就撬你家大门去了，哪儿还犯得着流窜作案哪。
E: Wow... I should have busted down your door instead of going around like a thief.

C: 可你知道我为什么从来没去过吗？因为就算我高低是个半神，都怕自己回不来。
E: Yet I've never been there and I never plan to! Because even a demigod can't be sure they can walk out of that place alive.

C: 我度过了比大部分人更漫长的时光，就算不像阿格莱雅大人那样善于营生，也还算有些积蓄。
E: I have lived a longer life than most people. Though I'm not as good at doing business as Lady Aglaea, I still have some savings.

C: …还可以靠人家哦！
E: Don't worry. Mem's here to help!

C: 谢…谢…你……
E: Th—Thank... you...

C: 可现在，却被她拿走了……
E: But now she's taken it away...

C: 所以…要买鱼吗？
E: So... do you want to buy any fish?

C: 那么，我该如何对您托以信任呢？
E: Well, then. Why should I place my trust in you...

C: 我无法否认。是那些人为我提供了这间小屋，他们的要求只有一个：希望「死亡」的诅咒能完全为您所用……
E: I cannot deny your claim. It was the Council that offered this room to me, and they had only one request... They want the curse of "Death" to be completely subjugated to your will.

C: …或许吧。但无需它再做提醒，这段记忆我永生难忘。
E: ...Perhaps, but I do not need a reminder from them. This memory is one that I will never forget.

C: 您的见闻十分宝贵，感激不尽。
E: You have my thanks for the invaluable insight that you've given us.

C: 同行吧，遐蝶……
E: Let's go together, Castorice...

C: 再用你强有力的意志…反抗它的摆弄。
E: Resist it with the strength of your mighty will.

C: 没问题！人家最擅长的就是关心照顾别人了。
E: Alright! I'm the best at taking care of others.

C: 取出我的心脏，点燃「死亡」的火苗——
E: It's time to extract my heart and light the flame of Death...

C: 你这一生，想必也很辛苦吧……
E: You, too, must have had a difficult life...

C: 住口…住口！
E: Shut up... Just shut up!

C: 她从未辜负奥赫玛的期待，却只因虫豸的围攻撕咬、就该蒙受莫大的羞辱吗？除却那后至的「神性」…她的本心，难道不是始终与「人」同在吗？
E: Not once has she ever failed Okhema, yet these vermin attempt to tear her apart, tarnishing her name with unfounded allegations! She may have been blessed by divinity, but hasn't her heart always stayed true to humanity?

C: 在一片哗然中，奥赫玛不同城邦代表领袖将手中的陶片扔进陶罐中……
E: In an uproar, representative leaders from different cities in Okhema throw pieces of pottery into the dolium...

C: 我会准备好与你相称的酷刑…而你得用那颗聪明脑袋好好记住，什么是背叛的代价…！
E: I hope you are prepared for the harsh punishment awaiting you! Mark my words, I will make sure that clever head of yours never forgets the price of betrayal!

C: 诸君！就在刚才，你们亲手决定了翁法罗斯的命运。作为逐火之旅的支持者，我也十分乐见诸位的抉择——
E: Just moments ago, all of you made a decision on the fate of Amphoreus. As a supporter of the Flame-Chase Journey, it pleases me to see the choice you have made.

C: …也为了此生，我唯一能拯救的生命。
E: ...And for your life, the only life I can save.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>不要回头，向前看。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Don't turn around. Keep looking forward.</color>

C: 我早有预料，但没想到你已失却到这个地步……
E: I've long predicted this was the case, but I didn't think you'd already lost so much.

C: 但抛开我们之间所有的理念差异，在这件事上，我始终与你想法一致——
E: But casting aside our ideological differences, there is one thing you and I agree on.

C: 什么表情，你不是也在场么？
E: What's with that look? You were present.

C: 好了，尽快完成处决吧——以免奥赫玛的神圣律法蒙羞，还耽误我创造新世界。
E: So, let's get this execution over with. We wouldn't want to bring shame to Okhema's divine laws or keep me from creating a new world.

C: 我对三月七的遭遇深表遗憾，但我提供的交易依旧公平。翁法罗斯仍是一处绝佳的目的地，继续调查，或许也能探明意外的真相。
E: I am deeply sorry about what has happened to March 7th, but the deal that I proposed still remains a fair one. Amphoreus is still an excellent destination, and investigating further might allow us to uncover the truth behind the accident.

C: 第一面镜，把坐标输进去，你来负责空间折跃。
E: First Mirror, input the coordinates. You'll be in charge of the spatial warp.

C: 倒是你，没问题么？
E: What about you? Will you be alright on your own?

C: 还是想点别的…
E: Think of something else...

C: 这份手记，有不少值得细究的地方——
E: This journal contains several intriguing points...

C: 坦率地说，我不知道。但我可以确认：这不是对命运的接纳、淡漠，或是绝望……
E: To be honest, I don't know either. But I am certain of one thing: This is not an acceptance of death nor apathy toward it. It's not even a feeling of despair...

C: 到那时，再让我们把酒言欢吧。
E: When that moment finally comes, let us drink and be merry then.

C: 动手吧，利落些。赏她的脖颈一个平整漂亮的切口。
E: Do it. Make it clean. A single, sharp cut across the neck.

C: 可塞涅俄丝，她在哪里…那时的她，究竟是以怎样的复杂心情看待这一切发生呢？
E: But Seliose... where was she in all of this? What thoughts weighed on her mind as she watched everything unfold?

C: 如果这是她选择的道路，那我和先祖们…我们究竟在守望谁的夙愿？！
E: If this was the path she chose, then whose wish have my ancestors and I been guarding all this time!?

C: 塞涅俄丝已经做出宣判——
E: Seliose has made her judgment —

C: 那是……
E: Is that...

C: 请告诉我，你们在晨昏之眼守候了千年，只是为了见证那位黄金裔的后裔回到这里接受惩罚吗？
E: Tell me... did you wait for a thousand years at the Eye of Twilight... Just to witness that Chrysos Heir's child coming back to receive punishment?

C: …岁月会改变许多事，孩子。
E: ...Time alters everything, child.

C: 如果那两位阁下还在…就能借用他们的翅膀逃离这里了！
E: We could use their wings to escape if they were still here!

C: 也都想见证奥赫玛的第二次黎明——
E: And we all want to see Okhema's second dawn —

C: 你，也将接受黄金的洗濯！
E: You, too, will be cleansed with gold!

C: 哎我…！
哈？！那是——
E: Huh!? What was that —

C: *它说：「神谕已然降世，吾之使命将终，从此归于沉寂——」*
E: They said: "The prophecy has arrived. My mission is complete, and now I shall fall into eternal silence..."

C: 原来如此…经历了漫长的岁月，你的意志与泰坦的神性已经融合，难分彼此了呀。
E: I see... after all these long years, your will has merged with the Titan's divinity.

C: 集体深处的坚韧…我没能发觉……
E: I failed to recognize... the resilience buried deep within...

C: 必须承认：即便你我二人联手，穿透它的防护仍不是一件简单的事。
E: I must admit, even if both of us worked together, it wouldn't be a simple task piercing through its defenses.

C: …一块黑色的布？
E: It's... a piece of black cloth?

C: 数日后，在命运重渊的车厢坠毁点……
E: A few days later, at the crash site in the Abyss of Fate...

C: 但还差得远。我必须继续磨练…直到自己能和它势均力敌。
E: I'm far from finished. I must continue sharpening my skills... until I can match their strength.

C: 为什么不把好看的拿回去？
E: Why not take the interesting ones home?

C: 这就是从小生长在大城邦的优势吧？像我这种偏远乡镇出身的穷孩子就没那么好运了。三分靠打拼，七分天注定……
E: That's the perk of growing up in a big city, isn't it? For those of us in the sticks? Luck doesn't come as easily. It's thirty percent grind, seventy percent fate...

C: 迷信迷信，迷迷瞎信。
E: Superstitions, superstitions, don't buy into them.

C: 阿雅……
E: Agy...

C: 你不是好奇我是怎么跟那个裁缝女扯上关系的吗？现在你知道了。满意了？
E: Weren't you curious how I got tangled up with that seamstress? Well, now you know. Satisfied?

C: 闲扯就到这儿为止，还是抬头看看眼前这座斯缇科西亚城吧——瞧瞧，它多漂亮呀！
E: Enough chit-chat. Let's take a look at this place. The city of Styxia — look how beautiful she is!

C: 想起来了？看来用不着我来帮你回忆了哪。她肯定是趁你大意，偷偷把若虫塞进了你的「口袋」里。
E: Do you remember now? Looks like you don't need me to jog your memory. She must've slipped that nymph into your "pocket" while you were distracted.

C: 据我所知，此乃事实。我们所认识的那位凯妮斯议员，严格来说——其实是历史上第二十七位「凯妮斯」。
E: From what I know, these stories are true. The Caenis we know today — strictly speaking — is the <unbreak>27</unbreak>th Caenis.

C: 那他们为什么没对我们下手？
E: Why didn't they go after us?

C: 她们两个状态如何？
E: How are the two of them holding up?

C: 接下来…该去找缇宝老师了。
E: Next... we should visit Lady Tribbie.

C: 其次，更正一下：最后一课代表的是「由我执教的最后一堂课」。从今天起，我要开始闭关研习古代炼金术，一切教学活动都要为之让路。
E: Secondly, to clarify — The "last lesson" means "the last lesson I will teach you." I will be entering seclusion from today onwards to research ancient alchemy, and all my teaching activities will be put on hold.

C: …请等一下，教授！
E: ...Please wait, Professor!

C: 接下我的赐福吧，年轻的雅辛忒丝。愿你能获得羽翼，搭乘彩虹之桥重返天空。
E: Receive my blessings, young Hyacinthia. May you gain wings to return to the sky via the bridge of rainbows.

C: 祖母…谢谢您。但我还剩最后一个请求。
E: Grandmother... thank you, but I have one last request.

C: 泰坦受伤的血液…在世间坠下沸腾的血雨，汇成滚烫的洪流。
E: The wounded Titan's blood... poured down like boiling rain upon the world and converged into scalding torrents.

C: 晨昏之眼……
E: The Eye of Twilight...

C: 真是民智未开啊。
E: People are truly ignorant.

C: 无论身处什么时代，人与人的争端注定难以消解。见识了凯妮斯和「清洗者」的作为…也不难理解这段历史了。
E: No matter the era, conflict among humans is destined to persist. Having witnessed the actions of Caenis and the "Cleaners"... it isn't so hard to understand this piece of history.

C: …不赖，但比起她还相去甚远。
E: ...It's not bad, but still lacking compared to her.

C: {NICKNAME}，你要去哪？
E: {NICKNAME}, where are you going?

C: 但在继续追击前…{NICKNAME}、迷迷，为风堇揭开历史的面纱吧。传说的真相，还未完全明朗。
E: Before we press on... {NICKNAME}, Mem, let's unveil the history for Hyacine. The true story behind the legend is yet to be fully revealed.

C: 为阿格莱雅报仇吧。
E: Time to avenge Aglaea.

C: 我一直在等着，能有一个机会和它正面对决……
E: I've been waiting for a chance to face them head-on...

C: 你在寻找的终点…也是「创世奇迹」么？
E: The end you seek... is also the Miracle of Genesis?

C: 如此有压迫感的复读……
E: They keep repeating themself like that...

C: 我们走…去黄金裔浴场！
E: Let us depart... to the Chrysos Heirs' baths!

C: 敢拦路的家伙…都来会会「侵晨」的剑锋吧。
E: Anyone who dares stand in our way... will get a taste of Dawnmaker's edge.

C: 它的目标一定是火种——我们必须抢先一步！
E: Their objective must be the Coreflame — we have to beat them to the punch!

C: 正是。若现实如测算的那样，一路向着最恶劣的可能性发展，后果不堪设想。因为这位大君的目标……
E: Affirmative. If everything unfolds toward the worst possible outcome as predicted, the consequences will be unimaginable. Because the Lord Ravager's goal is...

C: 是啊，真是一段好长好长的路呢……
E: Yeah... we've come such a long way...

C: 如果没有你，我们根本无法迎来预言中的明天……
E: Without you, we could never have reached our prophesied tomorrow...

C: 好奇怪的梦啊……
E: Such an odd dream...

C: 哀丽秘榭的小校舍只有您一位老师，是太辛苦了。
E: With you being our only teacher in Aedes Elysiae, you must be working so hard.

C: 可是，牌不见了…是被谁拿走了吗？
E: But the cards are gone... Who could have taken them?

C: 它象征着新生和希望，却也容易让人联想到挫折、悲伤和空虚。
E: It symbolizes new life and hope, yet often brings to mind struggles, sadness, and loss.

C: 而且，这一次…竟然就连{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}永夜之帷{RUBY_E#}都无法抵御了哪。
E: This time... not even the {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Veil of Evernight{RUBY_E#} can shield us.

C: 我只是一介士兵，如果战死沙场就是我的命运，我毫无怨言，只会挥剑至最后一刻。我相信，你也一样……
E: I'm a soldier, and if it's my fate to bleed my last on the battlefield, then so be it. I'll fight to my last breath. And on this, I know that we're the same...

C: 只是暂且退居幕后，以免打扰您的沉浸。
E: I merely stepped backstage, so as not to disrupt your immersion.

C: 翁法罗斯的愿望，如此不讲道理呢？
E: ...Why must Amphoreus's wishes be so... cruel?

C: （这究竟是……）
E: (Just what is this...?)

C: 「轮回」？
E: What cycle?

C: 让我将那刽子手的心脏从无形中取出，告慰你苦痛的命运吧。
E: Let me answer your cruel fate by tearing that executioner's heart from the void.

C: 是这么走的吗？应该没错……
E: Pretty sure this is it... Should be this way...

C: 迷！原来是小涟、小白呀！
E: Look who it is! Reney and Snowy!

C: ——区区阶下囚，有何资格直视我的怒火？！
E: What right does a mere prisoner have — to look upon my fury!?

C: 你…也能看见吗？
E: You see it, too?

C: 白厄，你还记得吗？小时候，我做过一个梦：梦里是个昏暗、冰冷的小房间，只有欧洛尼斯的帷幕在闪闪发光，就像晶莹的水晶……
E: Phainon, do you still remember when I was little, I had a dream: A dark, cold room, with nothing but Oronyx's curtain glowing like crystal...

C: 我相信，未来的每一个她都会做出和我同样的选择：无数次抹除「岁月」，无数次重置时间——毕竟她们都是我呀，而人家的魅力就是始终如一。
E: I believe every Cyrene will make the same choice - erasing "Time" again and again, resetting time over and over. After all, they're all me, and I will always have my charm.

C: 你若陪在我身边，我会踟蹰…但这个世界已容不下一个优柔寡断的士兵。
E: If you stay by my side, I'll hesitate... but this world can't afford a soldier who wavers.

C: *我们*不想看见黄金裔伤害彼此。只需一些时间，让*我们*问你几个问题。
E: We don't want to see Chrysos Heirs hurt each other. Just give us some time to ask you a few questions.

C: …慢着。
E: ...Hold up.

C: …呵，我在说什么呢。<color=#dbc291ff>我就是你</color>——哪怕你早就把我遗留在心底，走上了另一条路…这一点也未曾改变。
E: ...What am I saying? <color=#dbc291ff>I am you</color>. Even if you buried me deep and chose another path, that fact never changed.

C: 以我的千万道伤疤和性命——为救世的烈阳添光！
E: I'll give ten thousand scars and ten thousand lives of mine to fuel the blazing sun of deliverance!

C: 就用你对命运不公的怒火，为此身刻下焦痕！
E: Use the flames of your fury to scorch your own flesh!

C: 并以全盛之姿，向你致敬！——
E: And in my full glory, I salute you!

C: 第三幕：「归返」
E: Act III: Return

C: 忆庭的盟友…是黑天鹅小姐吗？
E: The Garden's allies... you mean Miss Black Swan?

C: 咦，仔细一看才发现，你和我…是不是有点相似？
E: Wait a minute... we actually look quite alike, don't we?

C: 放心，我没有怀疑你啦。只是对我来说，唯一能被称作「家」的地方……
E: Don't worry, I believe you. It's just that for me, the only place I can call "home"...

C: 跟我来吧，三月，穿过记忆之门，找回你的过去。
E: This way, March. Your past awaits beyond the Gate of Memory.

C: 丹恒现在安全吗？
E: Is Dan Heng safe?

C: …算啦。时间紧迫，还是关注更重要的目标吧？就当我是个普普通通的神秘女孩。
E: ...Never mind. Let's focus on something more important with what little time we have. Just treat me as an ordinary girl with secrets, okay?

C: 但我相信你，{NICKNAME}。「开拓」背负的使命，就是沉甸甸的呀。
E: But I believe in you, {NICKNAME}. The Trailblaze's duty has always been a heavy one.

C: 独一和独尊有着微妙的不同，不过……
E: "Ruling over" is not exactly the same as "unparalleled." That being said...

C: 难道你认识的「阿格莱雅」，同我相比十分不同吗？
E: Does your "Aglaea" differ so much from me?

C: 天外之海的鱼儿们，在湖中歇息得如何？
E: Little fish from beyond the sky, did you rest well?

C: 应该说是「未来」吧。尚未掌管圣城的「金织」女士…也别具一番魅力呢。
E: You mean "future." The future ruler of the holy city, Lady Goldweaver, is quite captivating in her own way.

C: …果然，灵水盆和涡心的连通失效了呀。
E: ...Sure enough, the connection between the spirit basin and the Vortex of Genesis is gone.

C: 凯撒大人太威武了！
E: The Great Imperator is so dignified!

C: 嘿嘿，浪漫的结局…喝几罐蜜酿庆祝一下。
E: Hehe, what a romantic conclusion... Let me have a few jars of honey brew as a treat.

C: 敬缇宝和阿格莱雅！
E: To Tribbie and Aglaea!

C: 很遗憾，安提基色拉人不善饮酒。离席前，我愿以精神替代酒杯，敬您那无垠的野心。
E: It's a pity that Antikytherans are lightweights when it comes to drinking. Before I leave, I would like to make a toast to your boundless ambition using my spirit instead of a goblet.

C: 我会为你们争取献言的时机，也会做好准备以防不测…接下来，就看二位表现了。
E: I will try to get you a chance to speak, and I'll also prepare for any contingencies... The rest is up to you.

C: 我们感知到…另一条…命途…的影响……
E: We detected... another... Path's... influence...

C: 你在清醒与癫狂的边界试探着，小心翼翼地调度神志的走向，轻轻叩击「毁灭」的门扉……
E: You're walking the line between sanity and madness, carefully steering the course of your consciousness, gently knocking on the door of Destruction...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>——住口人醒了第一张合照就归我啦不有我们在那种结局绝对不会发生——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...Stop it! They're awake! I'm gonna keep our first photo, alright? No! That end won't come to pass while we're around!</color>

C: 可、可是…那会很痛的！
E: B—But... it's gonna hurt! A lot!

C: 但现在，你仍被困在此处。
E: And yet, here you are, bound to this place.

C: 你孤身将战事平息，令「纷争」退行。这柄号令千军的剑旗，是为何人效命？
E: You quelled the wars alone and forced Strife into retreat. This swordfish that commands thousands of legions... whom does she serve?

C: 「而她喜爱光荣的名字，甚于恐惧与死亡——」
E: "And yet, she cherishes the name of glory more than fear and death..."

C: 然后，她陷入了无尽的迷茫和恐惧，并坚信：投影和回声才是真正的世界。
E: And so she fell into infinite confusion and fear... and came to firmly believe that the shadows and echoes were the real world.

C: 而在那同样以徒劳为题的三千万世回归中，他们亦忠实履行了自己对实验的义务，始终如一。
E: And in that same thirty million cycles, also marked by futility, they remained steadfast in fulfilling their duty to the experiment... unchanging, unwavering.

C: 玩失踪的救世主，你还有脸回来啊！
E: Playing dead, huh? Deliverer, you've got some nerve coming back!

C: 不知它为谁人而立？
E: But whose name does it bear?

C: 能在徒劳的海渊中捕捉到一丝微光，已是最大的慰藉。比起那些被遗忘的人，我无权诉说煎熬。
E: To see a single trace of light in the abyss of futility was already my greatest consolation. When compared to those who have been forgotten... I have no right to complain about my torment.

C: 以及昔涟小姐。
E: And Miss Cyrene.

C: 翁法罗斯每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
E: And everyone in Amphoreus was waiting for the Deliverer's return.

C: 我意已决，翁法罗斯必须自立于群星。
E: I am determined for Amphoreus to stand on her own two feet among the stars.

C: 「不破不立」——这就是你口中所谓的暴行。讽刺的是，它同样也是翁法罗斯变革的铁律。
E: "There's no new without destroying the old." That's what you consider an atrocity? Ironic, for that is also the unchanging law of Amphoreus's revolutions.

C: 但现在看来，你的征途也不出前人：血腥、暴虐，满是压迫……
E: But your rule doesn't seem to be any different from your predecessors'. Bloodshed, tyranny, oppression...

C: 这…这是何意？
E: Wh—What are you doing?

C: 翁法罗斯并非三重命途「纠缠」之地，而是三重命途「死斗」之地。
E: Amphoreus is not a place where three Paths "entangle," but where three Paths "fight to the death."

C: 或者，是他看清了你我的本质。
E: Or maybe, he's seen through our true essence.

C: 轻轻推开房门。
E: Gently push open the door.

C: 「或者，他已经回到了列车。」
E: "Or he's already returned to the Express."

C: 别自责。你们平安无事，这就足够了。
E: Don't blame yourself. You're all safe and sound, and that's good enough for me.

C: 不得不说，你选择「守护」的方式别具一格，长夜月小姐……
E: I have to say, Miss Evernight... you've certainly got a unique way of "protecting" people.

C: 昔涟？你怎么在这里？
E: Cyrene? What are you doing here?

C: 好啦，别让气氛这么沉重嘛。
E: Alright, alright, let's not make things so gloomy.

C: 一同为残酷的「真相」哀悼？
E: And take a moment together to mourn for the cruel "truth"?

C: 果然，骗不过你呢……
E: So... That wasn't enough to fool you.

C: 它在以这种方式，收录书本中的「记忆」。
E: It's absorbing the "memories" in the book in this manner.

C: 巨大的风扇，用边上的时象仪让它停下。
E: It's a huge fan. Use the Chrono Vessel over there to stop it.

C: 但别忘了，我们只是一群「无名客」——
E: But the truth is... We're just a bunch of Nameless.

C: 长夜月小姐，你的目光一直紧盯着自己的目标，恐怕都没有意识到……
E: Miss Evernight, you've been so fixated on your target that you probably haven't even realized...
Hah...

C: 嘿嘿，就知道你会给我打电话，想我了吧？
E: Hehe, I knew you'd call. Missed me, didn't you?

C: 任由自己沉沦。
E: Completely give in.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，抓住人家的手！」
E: "{NICKNAME}, take my hand!"

C: 「我们应她的愿望创造出的海洋，这段永不终结的旅行……」
E: "This ocean we created according to her wish... this journey that flows on without end..."

C: 「任何人都休想干扰。」
E: "Don't any of you think about interfering with it."

C: 压力涌了上来，都出现脑雾了…先调整下心情，回去找昔涟……
E: The pressure's really starting to build... I can barely think straight. I need to clear my head and go find Cyrene.

C: 「同谐」，很危险…
E: The Harmony is dangerous.

C: 「请安静，我好像找到{F#她}{M#他}了。」
E: "Keep it down... I think I've found {M#him."}{F#her."}

C: 而你，天外来客…你甚至无意聆听「大地」的悲鸣。
E: And you, visitor from beyond the sky... You have no intention of listening to the cries of the "Earth."

C: 万幸，这样也能免去自我介绍，直接表明来意了。
E: That's fortunate. It means I won't have to introduce myself. I can get straight to the point.

C: 所以，{F#她们}{M#他们}也会成为我迷失时的路标，通向未来，直到下一个「轮回」。
E: So they will also be beacons for when I am lost, leading me to the future, until my next "reincarnation."

C: 怎会是你……
E: It's you...?

C: 「开山者」？他…不是荒笛？
E: "Mountainbreaker"? He's... not Terravox?

C: 呵，是我错估了你的决心。我明白…何为唯一的选择。
E: Hah, I misjudged your resolve. I understand... This is the only choice.

C: 这下面你们过不去的。
E: You can't get past this.

C: 总之嘛，事情就是这么个事情……
E: So yeah, that's pretty much the whole story...

C: 挽住这道水流吧，它残留着灰鱼儿的温度。
E: Hold onto this current, for it still carries the warmth of Gray Fry.

C: 结果她自己倒是没来。
E: But she herself didn't come.

C: 但恐怕，你能从那「忘却」的力量中幸免……
E: But I fear your escape from that power they call "Oblivion"...

C: 此举或有失礼节，还请阁下见谅。
E: I apologize if that seemed improper. I hope you'll forgive me.

C: 「翻开这本书吧，我会在过去等你。」
E: "Now, open this book. I'll be waiting for you in the past."

C: 可你从未提起过她。难道「智识」的天才也会被人入侵大脑么？
E: But you never mentioned her before. Could even a genius of the Erudition get his brains hacked?

C: 矛盾往往是真相的钥匙，「三月七」阁下的过去…是一片深不见底的黑暗呐。
E: Contradictions are often the keys to the truth. Lady "March 7th's" past... is a bottomless darkness.

C: 他迎来了一场惨败，也成就了一件壮举……
E: He suffered a tragic defeat, but also achieved a legendary deed...

C: 这下子，我的好奇心也上来了。
E: Now, I'm getting very... curious.

C: 以神礼观众之名，我见到——
E: As the Theoros, I have observed...

C: 逐火是不断失却的旅途，可就算一切随风逝去，也有一种感情会被留下来……
E: Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, but even if everything fades away with the wind, there's one feeling that will remain...

C: 别怪我说话难听：这一战，绝不能让罗浮领衔。
E: Like it or not, there's no way we're letting the Luofu take the lead in this battle.

C: 我看「神策将军」改名叫「乐观将军」得了。
E: Maybe the Divine Foresight should change his name to the "Optimistic General" instead.

C: 请从万古的长眠中苏醒，降下全世的神谕吧！
E: Awaken from your eternal slumber and bestow upon the world your divine prophecy!

C: 歌颂「天谴之矛，迈德漠斯」，您是刺破仇恨与暴戾的纷争，是永恒「巡猎」的荣光。
E: Praise be to "Mydeimos, Lance of Fury," for you are the strife that pierces through hatred and cruelty, and the eternal glory of The Hunt.

C: 换言之，大墓的「门」是吧？那我偏要看看，门把手在哪里。
E: So basically, the "door" to the tomb, right? Great, let's find the handle.

C: 你能做到，对么？
E: You can do it, right?

C: 明白了。那么……
E: Understood. Then...

C: 我的第一尊作品，已经离我而去。而这第二尊作品，它本应是完美的。
E: My first creation left me long ago. This second one... it was meant to be perfect.

C: 小白…已经提前出发了。
E: Snowy... has already gone ahead.

C: 「以『世界』为师者…方能背负它的命运。」
E: "Only one who treats the world as their teacher... can bear its eventual destiny."

C: 「火焰尚有缺欠。必须…助长火焰。」
E: "The blaze was still not enough. It had to be fed..."

C: 载我一程吧，省下徒步的工夫，我好专心思考。
E: Then give me a lift, would you? I'd rather save my energy and use the time to think.

C: 嗯，是我……
E: Yes. It's me...

C: 以此烈火。祝你。无往不利。
E: With this fire. I wish you. Eternal victory.

C: 十三声心跳过后——
E: After thirteen heartbeats...

C: 史诗的尾声，我们一同书写结局！
E: We'll write the saga's ending together!

C: （黑潮的气息，彻底平静了。）
E: (The scent of the black tide is now completely calm.)

C: 「看来，就算银河步入终结，我们也还是被一颗{RUBY_B#星核}心{RUBY_E#}相连呀。」
E: "Looks like we're still connected by one {RUBY_B#Stellaron}heart{RUBY_E#}, even as the cosmos reaches its end."

C: 终于，你也踏上了这条路帕。
E: At long last, you've embarked on this road as well.

C: 「我总算明白了，机器头计算的『时刻』不是『毁灭』……」
E: "I finally get it now. The 'Instants' Droidhead calculated aren't about the Destruction..."

C: 在「爱」的充盈下，挥洒光吧。
E: With an abundance of "love," let there be light.

C: 别担心。我们一起战胜了铁墓，对吧？
E: Don't worry. We beat Irontomb together, right?

C: 我没到喜欢聊这种话题的年纪。
E: I'm not old enough to enjoy talking about this kind of stuff.

C: 坚持住，我这就来！
E: Hang in there. I'm coming!

C: 渎神只是现象，不是目的。放眼这星间，想必对所谓「星神」或「命途」心存质疑者亦不在少数。
E: Blasphemy is just a phenomenon, not the end goal. I'm sure there are plenty of people across the stars who question these so-called "Aeons" or "Paths."

C: 诸位，择日再见。若能再会，我定将再度成为你们的后盾，义不容辞。
E: Farewell, everyone. If we meet again, I shall once more become your steadfast support. That's a promise I won't back down from.

C: 原本我们不用谈论此事。但事到如今，我终于明白了包裹翁法罗斯的那团混沌物质是什么……
E: We were never meant to have to speak of this. But now I finally understand what that chaotic matter around Amphoreus truly is...

C: 多么幸福的音阶呀。
E: Such a happy scale.

C: 这才合理。为什么房间空空如也？因为被关在里面的人，早就跑出去了。
E: That'd make the most sense. Why was the room empty? Because the person locked in there had run away ages ago.

C: 而它对应的躯壳，就是这台权杖。你干扰实验，将「翁法罗斯之身」变成了一具用来培养铁墓的空壳。
E: And its corresponding vessel... was this very Scepter. You interfered with the experiment and made "Amphoreus's Body" into a hollow shell, all to incubate Irontomb within.

C: 多么动人的开篇。一声啼哭，是孩子带给世界最初的礼物。
E: What a moving opening. A loud cry was the first gift the child gave to the world.

C: 接过它的时候，「我」也开始感到不安……
E: "I" have started to feel uneasy whenever "I" take it into my hands...

C: >>>桃子。不安？
E: >>> Peach... Uneasy?

C: 「『智识』的发展方向，与创造『意识』并无交集，底层原理甚至是相悖的。」
E: "The developmental trends of the Erudition have nothing to do with creating a 'consciousness.' Those underlying principles are, in fact, contradictory."

C: 「哭吧，孩子，大声地哭。将你的声音，传给欧洛尼斯。」
E: "Cry, child, cry aloud. Let your voice reach Oronyx."

C: 「我向你保证，痛苦…转瞬即逝。」
E: "I promise you, the pain... will pass in the blink of an eye."

C: 无论如何，需要有人继续前进。
E: Regardless, someone must press on.

C: 三月七
E: March 7th

C: {RUBY_B#星核猎手}艾利欧{RUBY_E#}看见的未来是不会出错的。刚刚的爆炸是怎么回事，这也在他的「剧本」里吗？
E: {RUBY_B#Stellaron Hunter}Elio{RUBY_E#} always tells the exact future. So what's with the explosion just now? Was that also part of his script?

C: 到头不了，这任务还有后续…你都不看「剧本」么？
E: ...No, it isn't. There's a sequel to this mission... You didn't read the script?

C: 比如？
E: Like what?

C: 直接把监控系统黑掉了事。
E: It's a matter of hacking the surveillance system directly.

C: 对了，亚伯拉罕呢？你没找到他？
E: By the way, where's Abraham? Did you find him?

C: …人数正确，一个不多，一个不少。还是被那水魈逃掉了，唉。
E: The numbers are right, not one more, not one less. Alas, the Xenohydro had escaped.

C: 那个我有点急事，要先走啰！
E: I am in a hurry. Bye!

C: 而这横财的来路嘛，首先要从一个人开始说起。
E: As for the origin of this fortune... well, it all started with this person.

C: 这么好的东西不早拿出来。
E: Awesome. You should have shown me earlier.

C: 既然这样，那我就给你露一手。
E: Well, in that case, let me show you something.

C: 你尽会说好听的，{NICKNAME}。
E: You're a smooth talker, {NICKNAME}.

C: 帕梅…拉？我看看，救援人员名单上确实有她的名字。
E: Pamela...? Let me check, I remember her name was on the rescuer list.

C: 收容舱段的备用电源有很多，没记错的话对面就有。
E: There are plenty of backup power sources in the storage zone — right opposite, if I remember right.

C: 被人扣住的密钥…
E: Someone's withholding her encryption key...

C: 这件事我也有所耳闻。瓜嘛，甜就好，不要当真……
E: I found out about the whole thing recently — drama for drama's sake, y'know? Don't take it too seriously...

C: （看来要想进入这个神秘的舱室，还得多费一番功夫。）
E: (Entering this mysterious cabin seems to require some extra effort.)

C: 嗯，不错，很有眼光。空间站框定了科员的着装规范，我不得已正在用细节表达我的态度。
E: Mm... not bad, you've got nice taste. The space station has a strict dress code for all researchers. I have to express myself with the smaller details.

C: 都是些酸诗罢了。
E: They are just cringy.

C: 我帮你去看看~
E: I'll help you.

C: 唉！你们这些小崽子，真是让人操碎了心！
E: Hmph! Thanks to you kids, I am worried to death!

C: 不，无论{NICKNAME}你怎么看，我都已经决定了！我会尽快跟师父打好招呼，收拾行李，出发去找莱斯莉。
E: No, no matter what you think, {NICKNAME}, I've decided! I should inform my master as soon as possible, pack my things, and set off on my journey to find Lesley.

C: 这些诗也得藏起来，可不能让他们看见。
E: I better hide these poems. I can't let anyone see them.

C: 有始有终，是个可塑之才。多余的这一份，是红色转译录…看来，你选择向他隐瞒真相。
E: You are someone who finishes what you started. This is the red log... so you chose not to tell him the truth.

C: 而当我成为奇物再收容小队一员，与它们面对面的时候，我却感到了——恐惧！
E: But when I became a member of the Curio Collection Squad and met them face to face, all I felt was fear!

C: 左「巡猎」，右「同谐」，「智识」在心间，「存护」在胸前！
E: The Hunt on the left, Harmony on the right, Erudition in the heart, and Preservation on the chest!

C: 你就直接看一眼…
E: Why don't you just take a look...

C: 温队长，打扰了…
E: Mr. Wen, excuse me...

C: 有一种名为<color=#dbc291ff>「异星水魈」</color>的奇物，可以任意幻化成他人相貌，顶着各重假身份，到处为非作歹。
E: There is a Curio called the <color=#dbc291ff>Xenohydro</color> that has the ability to replicate the appearance of other people at will. This allows it to wreak havoc and confusion wherever it goes, as it can easily assume various false identities.

C: 救命啊救命——
E: Help! Help me!

C: 屏幕上什么都没有，看来这并不是希拉口中的「监视屏」。
E: There is nothing on the screen. This doesn't seem to be the security monitor Sheila was talking about.

C: 嗯，你哪里不舒服？找个阴凉地方我帮你看看！
E: Okay, what are your symptoms? Let's find a place to rest and I'll take a look at you!

C: 接下来要发生的事情，可能会使你们大跌眼镜，但无论你们看到的或是听到的有多么耸人听闻，也请耐心等到最后。
E: What happens next may surprise you, but no matter what you see or hear, please be patient until the end.

C: 是<color=#eb4d3dff>我多么希望</color>吗，也许<color=#eb4d3dff>我也有属于自己的生日，属于自己的朋友，以及属于自己的梦想</color>吧。
E: Is it <color=#eb4d3dff>my wish?</color> Or perhaps <color=#eb4d3dff>I do have my own birthday, my own friends, and my own dream</color>.

C: （前面那位就是乔安，她好像在和什么人聊天，这附近…好像也没有能躲起来的地方……）
E: (Joanne is right in front of me. Looks like she's talking to someone. There's nowhere to hide...)

C: （再查查其他人的记录好了……）
E: (Let me check the other people's records...)

C: 虽然我的确是听说，空间站会特别褒奖品德优秀的科员…但那都是无稽之谈，即便是岁数最大的前辈，都没有亲眼见证过呢！
E: I did hear that the space station gives special benefits to morally upstanding researchers... but those are just rumors — even the oldest staff have never witnessed it!

C: 确实有这个可能…不然怎么会知道阿兰队长找过波少的事情呢？
E: I bet you do... You wouldn't have known about Captain Arlan's meeting with Master Capote unless you had an interest.

C: 哎！要想学会与强势的领导相处，你的从心修行还有很远的路要走啊！
E: You have many trials of the heart to take before you can handle an overbearing boss!

C: 我们之前一起行动，不过现在分开啦。
E: He was, but not anymore.

C: 你听说过最近不少科员都拍到了诡异的照片吗？
E: Have you heard about the mysterious entities showing up in many researchers' pictures?

C: …我看到了。
E: ...I've seen them.

C: 各退一步大家都好。
E: We can all take a step back.

C: 呜！
E: Woo!

C: 它说，那么合作愉快！它的同伴已经在现场伺机而动，希望能让你们尽快夺回「荣仓终」的所有物。
E: It says, "Happy collaborating! My comrades are already present at the scene, just waiting to strike. Hopefully, you will be able to recover Eikura Shuu's belongings as soon as possible."

C: 她真好看。
E: Aaah... She looks so pretty.

C: 一个蓝色的水滴状物体。
E: A blue, teardrop-shaped object.

C: 所以，这就是我们要找的…可疑痕迹？虽然和想象中不太一样……
E: So, this is what we're looking for... this suspicious evidence? It wasn't what I was expecting, but...

C: 嗯？有什么事吗，找前台的话，出门笔直走就是…咦，是{NICKNAME}啊！好久不见啊！
E: Huh? Do you need something? If you're looking for the front desk, just go straight... Oh! {NICKNAME}! Long time no see!

C: 好像在模拟宇宙见过…
E: I think I've seen it in the Simulated Universe...

C: 哎，别提了。还是不要沉浸在过去的失败中了，好好加油，做好眼前事吧！
E: *sigh* Doesn't help to dwell on past failures. It's more important to do your best with the things in front of you!

C: 啊，她看起来要走了，咱们快跟上。
E: Ah, she seems to be leaving. Let's keep up.

C: 感谢你的幽默，这对紧张的气氛有好处。
E: Thank you for the humor. It is good for tense moments like these.

C: 嗯，我们走吧。
E: Very well, get going we shall.

C: 但继续自责也没用。我们是为卡带来的，至少…得让这件事有个结果。
E: ...still, beating myself up all the time won't help either. We're here for the cartridge. At the very least... we must try and see this thing through.

C: 看，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，最后的结果已经摆上展台，你可以仔细端详。今天的时间还有许多，我可以回答你的任何问题。
E: The final results are on the display table, {F#young madam}{M#young sir}. Take a closer look if you wish, we have plenty of time left. I will answer any questions that you may have.

C: 哈？
E: Huh?

C: 好啊，我最近都会待在这儿。如果有需要，随时来找我！
E: Okay. I should be stationed here in the near future. Come find me if you need anything!

C: 事先说好，我就是个被银枝捎上车的公司小职员，跑龙套的——我没啥想法，也帮不上你们的忙。
E: I'm just a small-time IPC worker — that Argenti rescued me. I don't know anything... and I can't help you guys.

C: 好像是客房车厢…但又好像是列车长室帕！
E: It sounded like it came from the passenger cabins... or the conductor's cabin!

C: 三月七的房间。
E: March 7th's Room.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客——
E: You still awake...?

C: 又见面了，还记得我么——不记得也无所谓，我没有期待。
E: Ah, we cross paths again. Do you remember me? Of course, why would you? Memory is such a fickle thing, after all.

C: 不过…时机过于严丝合缝了。也许是有人走漏风声，让袭击者利用了此事。而黑塔似乎对这类挑衅见怪不怪，也让我对个中蹊跷甚是好奇。
E: However... this attack was timed a little too well. I can't help but wonder if someone leaked this information, and the attackers seized the opportunity. Herta's aloof response to these juvenile provocations? Almost as intriguing. What a delightful little puzzle.

C: 恭维就免了，你我的时间都很宝贵。况且在一位天才面前谈论凡人的翘楚，在我看来多少有些幽默。
E: Save your flattery. Time is hardly a luxury we can squander. To debate the merits of mere mortals in the company of an actual genius? Quite the paradox, if you ask me.

C: 嗯？好、好像有这么回事…又好像没有？
E: Huh? I—I do remember that happening... I think?

C: 对了，■■■提到的那件事，我也有所耳闻，会一起调查下。空间站的麻烦，我会想办法解决的。
E: By the way, I heard about the thing ■■■ mentioned, and I'll look into it, too. I'll find a way to solve the problem for the space station.

C: 我就知道你会找我追根究底……
E: I figured you'd come to me to uncover the truth...

C: （似乎还漏了什么关键信息，再仔细想想。）
E: (I think I missed something. I need to think harder.)

C: 行行行行行行行，咱们很熟吗？事儿办得怎么样了？
E: Alright, alright, alright. Cut the pleasantries and tell me how it's going.

C: 没错，为了获得更多有关奇物的信息。
E: Yes, to get more information about the Curio.

C: 臭小子！臭小子！臭小子！
E: That jerk! Jerk, jerk, jerk!

C: 这位「冥火大公」阿弗利特是诞自已灭星球「陀斐特」的生命。无时无刻不在燃烧的火魔一族视纳努克为皇帝，称其为恩主，却从未得到星神的瞥视。
E: This "Duke Inferno," Ifrit, is a lifeform that hails from Fetora — a world long since destroyed. His race, the ever-burning fire demons, regard Nanook as their emperor and savior, but the Aeon has never cast their gaze upon them.

C: 小心点——准备好冲进火海。
E: Be careful — get ready to dash into the fire.

C: 你知道对待穷途末路的猎物该怎么做么？——追逐，直至死地。
E: Do you know what to do with cornered prey? Hunt it to the death.

C: 他果然出意外了…我们上！
E: As I thought, he's in trouble... Let's go!

C: 至于我留下的点点星火……
E: As for the spark I leave behind...

C: 来路不明的自信心
E: A confidence that came out of nowhere

C: 来闹事的也都被策反了，从抗拒芝士流心到爱上芝士流心。
E: All the ones who came here to stir up trouble have been converted by us. They went from refusing Molten Cheese Tart to loving it.

C: 它好像要大干一番事业！它希望将自己的理念做到极致——邀请你的加入！
E: It seems eager to achieve great things! It wants to fully embrace its own philosophy and is inviting you to join in!

C: 这样，生命与生命之间的牵绊就会被抹去。友情、秘密、纠葛、欺骗，都会一同烟消云散。
E: That way, the connection between lifeforms will be erased. Friendships, secrets, grudges, lies, all will disappear.

C: 还记得我提过的「无人之地」吗？等研究告一段落，在间歇的休息时间，我打算再一个人去看看。
E: Do you still remember the "No Man's Land" I mentioned? I'm considering a solo trip back there during my research downtime, just to see how things are.

C: 可天才就能将其分辨吗？至少我做不到…我不理解「爱」为何物，也无从回应它们的感情。
E: That being said, can even geniuses tell the difference? I cannot, at least... I do not understand what "love" is and cannot respond to their feelings.

C: 华劳斯，别被雷金骗了。
E: Wallace, don't fall for Regin's tricks.

C: 你这是退役了？
E: Have you retired now?

C: 太好了，我们有救了，是大守护者，一定是大守护者让他们带补给来了！
E: Thank goodness, we're saved! Long live the Supreme Guardian! The Supreme Guardian must have sent them to bring us supplies!

C: 哎呀 ，这不是我的金牌试茶员么？今天的客人实在太多，我都没注意到你来了。
E: Ah, if it isn't my best tea taster! We've got so many customers today that I didn't notice you were here.

C: 来，客官，请——
E: Please enjoy!

C: （向杜老板讲述你的见闻）
E: (Tell Boss Du about your experiences)

C: 怪东西？我想想…海带贝壳之类的倒是经常捡到。哦，我还捡到过一个漂流瓶。
E: Something strange? Let me think... I often pick up kelp, seashells, and things that get washed up by the water. Oh, I picked up a drift bottle once, as well.

C: 不用再找我巡逻了吧？
E: You won't need me to go on patrols anymore?

C: 不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 绝对不是，咱视力可好了！走，咱们靠近点儿看看。
E: Of course not, my eyesight's perfect! Come on, let's take a closer look.

C: 杨叔？杨叔跟咱们在仙舟大闹了一番，最近说话还连咳带喘的，你没注意到吗？
E: Mm, maybe not. He's still wheezing from the trouble we got into on the Xianzhou. You didn't notice?

C: 好啊，又抓住一个没听讲的！
E: Seems like someone wasn't paying attention!

C: 大矿区，开拓者和希儿这边……
E: Meanwhile, in the Great Mine with Seele and the Trailblazer...

C: …嗯，既然你们之前已经打过照面，那我也不必说明她的身份了。
E: Mm... Since you've already made her acquaintance, I needn't explain who she is.

C: 她说的有些道理…
E: She sort of made sense...

C: 放心吧，大守护者姑娘可是有大智慧的人，她肯定能想明白的。
E: Don't worry yourself too much. The Supreme Guardian is a wise person. She'll understand.

C: 之前倒是有几个慌慌张张跑出来的矿民。听他们说，整个矿区已经被黑衣服的家伙控制了。
E: A few miners made it out earlier — they looked pretty panicked. They said the whole mine had been seized by the people in black.

C: 这阵仗…好像不太友善呀？
E: These guys... don't look pleased to see us.

C: 哼？哼唧，呼噜噜…哼！
E: Oink? Oink, oink... Grunt!

C: 我明白了。我会协助你的计划。
E: I understand. I will assist you with your plan.

C: 很快，我的家乡走入了末路。相对富有的人们选择了星际移民，重新开始；留下的多数人只能在污水、酸雨和尘霾的伴随下苟延残喘，等待绝望迫近。
E: My home was facing its demise. The relatively wealthy chose interstellar migration and started anew. The majority who stayed could only struggle on amidst sewage, acid rain, and dust, waiting for the end.

C: 但恐怕有一件事，她刻意未曾提及：并非所有接受了公司条件的世界都得到了拯救。
E: ...but there is one thing she intentionally left out: Not all worlds that have accepted the IPC's terms have been saved.

C: 不必费那个心了，三月。她十分钟前就决定好要怎么做了。
E: We needn't waste our time, March. She made her decision ten minutes ago.

C: 有件重要的事需要你的意见。
E: We need your opinion on an important matter.

C: 怎么办，{NICKNAME}…本来我还想说，史瓦罗肯定能提出有建设性的意见……
E: Ugh! What now, {NICKNAME}? Svarog's super logical, we should definitely get his opinion...

C: 的确，我还没从这个角度考虑过…真是个沉重的称号啊。
E: Huh, I guess I never looked at it from that angle... I wouldn't wish that title on anyone.

C: 当然，准备工作务必要做周全。
E: Take your time — preparation is key.

C: 史瓦罗先生！你还好吗？托帕和公司的人没把你怎么样吧？
E: Mr Svarog! Are you alright? I hope Topaz and her IPC henchmen didn't hurt you.

C: 穿的什么奇装异服？
E: What's with that weird get up?

C: 呃…这不是多亏了我小叔嘛，你懂的……
E: Well... it was all thanks to my uncle, you know...

C: 那就拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。等你回来以后，我再好好感谢你。
E: Good luck, {NICKNAME}. I'll be sure to thank you properly when you're back.

C: 瓦赫医生就是娜塔莎的哥哥啊，以前这俩人都在铆钉镇行医。
E: Natasha's brother? They both used to practice medicine back in Rivet Town.

C: 我也早看她不爽了——
E: I'm through seeing her too...

C: 也就是说，「互助会」找到了哥…瓦赫留下的研究成果，而且还在向一些患者出售那些所谓的「特效药」……
E: So the mutual aid society found my bro— ...Vache's research results... and now they're selling this so-called "wonder medicine" to patients...?

C: 和她搭话时要小心，她的精神状态很不稳定…我已经照顾了她很长时间，但始终没能帮她调整到正常状态。
E: Watch what you say to her, she's not in the most stable mental state... I've taken care of her for a long time, but still haven't been able to get her back to her old self.

C: 我和奥列格把他带回了上层。瓦赫最后向我们提出的要求，是将他带到城市之外，他一直想要战胜的那片雪原之中。
E: Oleg and I took Vache to the Overworld. He made his final request to us: To take him outside the city to the Snow Plains he'd always wanted to conquer.

C: 您可以任意选择其一，与不同水平的选手对垒。只要您愿意，更可以将自己在全部赛事中的排名全部提升至第一，从而将赛季全部奖励收入囊中！
E: You can choose one of them and face off with opponents of different levels. You can even place first in all of the matches and take all the rewards of the season by yourself!

C: 史考特商业，只为冠军而生——恭喜您成为本赛季的终极冠军！
E: Scott Business Alliance, made for the champions! Congratulations on becoming the ultimate champion of this season!

C: 今天，曾经的擂台霸主将在众人的欢呼中，重返这个传奇擂台！
E: On this day, the former champion will be returning to the arena, welcomed by the applause and cheers of everyone!

C: 它一定是猜到了会有人追捕自己，才在一路上设下致命的障碍。它在暗，我们在明，这样找下去指不定还有什么危险，要不然就…放弃吧？
E: It must have guessed that someone is going after it, so it sets up a trap along the way. It's hidden and we're exposed. It could be more dangerous if we go ahead. So... Should we give up?

C: 不知道他们在吵什么？
E: I don't know what they are arguing about.

C: 对不起。希莉儿不是姐姐…姐姐很聪明，一定能跟你解释清楚。
E: I'm sorry. I'm not like my sister... My sister is smart, and can explain everything to you.

C: 良心不允许我把你留在这儿。
E: I can't just leave a little kid like you here all alone.

C: （那个孩子…还有那些不断出现的军械箱…究竟是怎么回事？）
E: (That girl... and those Armory Boxes that kept showing up... What the heck is going on here?)

C: 人命关天…
E: It's a matter of life and death...

C: 嗯，我们走。虽然我们来时没有遇到任何敌人，但后面就不好说了。如果一定要开战的话，我也会从旁援护你。
E: Great, let's go. Even though we didn't encounter any enemies coming here, it's still hard to say what will happen later. If we get into a fight, I will cover you.

C: 嗯？让我看看……
E: Huh? Let me see...

C: （想想办法，试着解锁操作终端吧……）
E: (Let's try and find a way to unlock the terminal...)

C: 操作终端内传来一连串的闷响，似乎是复位了。
E: You hear a series of dull noises coming from the control terminal. It seems to have been reset.

C: 差点让你一个人留在这里了…
E: Almost left you here alone...

C: 哔嘟！哔嘟！发现近似物件，发现近似物件——请问是否要切换至搜索模式？
E: Beep! Beep! Matching object found, matching object found — do you want to switch to search mode?

C: 去长夏花店买一束花吧。
E: How about flowers from Eversummer Florist?

C: 去履行你作为医生的职责吧，娜塔。至于我们家人之间的事，来日方长……
E: Be the doctor you always were, Nat. We have all the time in the world to catch up later...

C: 他…瓦赫，即使在离开城市之后，他仍然没有放弃对「风雪免疫」的研究。
E: He... Vache didn't give up on his research into Blizzard Immunity... even after he left the city.

C: 好像是这样没错。让我思考一下……
E: You're right. Let me think...

C: 星核危机过后，我们得以投入更多人力、加速翻修工作，博物馆应该很快就能再次面向公众开放了。
E: Now that the Stellaron crisis is over, we've been able to allocate more manpower to the renovation works. The museum should be open to the public again soon.

C: 这东西真的很值钱吗？
E: Is it worth a lot?

C: 还原度有多高？
E: How different is it from the original?

C: 没想到居然要亲手还原…
E: I never thought we'd be rebuilding it ourselves...

C: 怎么能说是记仇呢！我只是希望身边的每一个人都能掌握基本的礼数罢了。
E: How could you say such a thing!? I just want everyone to have a proper understanding of basic manners.

C: 留在你眼前的选择有，且只有一个……
E: There is only one choice left in front of you...

C: ——之前我教你把「齿轮与智慧」拆散以后再藏起来，记得吧？你最后把它拆成了多少个部件来着？
E: That Gears and Wisdom sculpture I told you to take apart and hide away... Can you remind me how many pieces it had?

C: 有时候，仔细一想…也会觉得自己和逃兵没什么区别呢。
E: Sometimes, when I think things over carefully... I feel like I'm no different from a soldier deserting the army.

C: 呜…志愿导览员的职责…让克拉拉想想……
E: Um... The duties of a volunteer guide... Let me think...

C: 哼哼，不愧是我漆黑的虎克！不过克拉拉队员也很厉害啦！
E: Hee-hee, I know I'm good! Clara's done a pretty good job too!

C: 咳咳！这个名字…不是，是这个称号……
E: Ahem! This name... no, this title...

C: 这可是大功一件啊！能请您详细描述一下来龙去脉吗？
E: That's a remarkable achievement! Do you mind describing this story in detail?

C: 很抱歉，希露瓦——虽然我在刚才的提问里确实带有欺负你的心态…但，我想，我在刚才的面试里并没有看到你真实的样子。
E: Serval, I'm sorry for bullying you with those questions just now... However, I think you were not being yourself during the interview.

C: 算了，谁派你来的都无所谓，我就和你直说了吧。
E: Forget it. It doesn't matter who has sent you here. I'll cut to the chase.

C: 最后一问——您的技能特长？
E: The last question: What are your skills and expertise?

C: 这是希儿逼着我写的！
E: Seele forced me to write that!

C: 哎呀，你还真的以为我在开玩笑啊？我看你在统计矿工名单，我才过来问你的。
E: *sigh* You think I'm joking? I saw you taking down the names of the miners — that's why I came over.

C: 你误会了。
E: You misunderstand.

C: 里面有人受伤了吗？这里有医生，你们把伤员放出来吧！
E: Is anyone with you injured? We have a doctor. She can care for your wounded!

C: 哔嘟…无所谓啦，无所谓啦。外星人，你们知道星际和平公司？那太好了。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Whatever, whatever. So you aliens know about the Interastral Peace Corporation? That's great.

C: 销子不见了？流浪者连这玩意都要偷吗……
E: Ugh, where's the pin? Is there anything those vagrants won't steal?

C: 准备发车咯！
E: The cart is about to depart!

C: 不疼不痒。
E: I barely felt a thing.
...*sigh*

C: 也是因为信得过他，我才跟着他跑来这片矿区。没成想他居然会独吞那笔横财……
E: And it's because I trusted him that I came to this mine with him. I mean, I didn't expect he would take that money for himself...

C: 呣…也许小偷真的不是他，虎克觉得不像……
E: Hmm... Maybe he really isn't the thief. Hook doesn't think he's lying...

C: 为啥要跟我道歉？谢谢你为老爹费这么多心，虎克。
E: What are you apologizing for? Thank you so much for looking out for me, Hook.

C: 的确是一件很可爱的宝贝。
E: It is an adorable treasure indeed.

C: 这怎么行！你是不知道在这地底，想整一套合规的矿具有多麻烦，哎，我这回可是破了不少财啊……
E: Come on! You don't know how much trouble one has to go through just to get a set of legit mining tools here underground. Heck! I've already invested so much money in this...

C: 要不这样吧，一口价，你帮我找回两件矿具，然后我就给你藏宝图，怎么样？
E: How about this? Help me find two pieces of mining equipment, and I'll give you the treasure map. How's that sound to you?

C: …总而言之，你不上工…啊不对，你「灵活出工」的时候，这身边的矿具闲着也是闲着，何不跟我合作赚一笔呢？
E: So anyway... When you are not working at a job... Um, or should I say, when you are in between jobs, your mining tools are just sitting there. So, the idea came to me. Why don't you just collaborate with me to rent out those tools so that we can make some good money together?

C: …杨叔说得还挺客气的，总结起来就是——即使我们封印了星核，也没法一举改变这里的困境……
E: ...Mr. Yang put it nicely, but the reality is this: We sealed the Stellaron, but that's not gonna solve the problems on this planet...

C: 你们两个——这里太危险了，快去矿区大桥！那里会有铁卫和「地火」的人保护你们。
E: You two! It's too dangerous here. Find the Silvermane Guards and Wildfire at the bridge — they'll protect you.

C: 冷静些，{NICKNAME}。情况特殊，我们小心为上……
E: Careful, {NICKNAME}. Special circumstances require a special approach.

C: 它说「你怎么总这么碍事」。
E: It said, "Why do you always have to stand in my way?"

C: 拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 咦？…啊，好！
E: Huh? ...Okay!

C: 那你就更不应该出现在这里了啊……
E: Then why did you still come here...

C: 又把你老爹搬出来当挡箭牌…要是让他知道你总这么干，准没你好果子吃。
E: Pretending to use your dad again as an excuse... If he knew about this, you'd be in big trouble.
