C: 你小时候来过这镇子？
E: You came to this town as a child?

C: 先说坏消息吧。
E: The bad news.

C: 你看，就在这个盒子里！这台小钻机是老爹矿队里的叔叔送给我的，也是虎克的生日礼物哦！
E: Look, it's in this box! This miniature drill rig was given to me by a guy from daddy's mining team as a birthday present!

C: （沉默真的有用吗？）
E: (Does silence actually help?)

C: 呣…大姐姐说的也有道理。我知道啦，那我先去找尤利安咯。
E: Mm... I guess so. Anyway, I'm gonna go find Julian.

C: 难道…帕斯卡是在等待撤离铆钉镇的居民回到这里吗？
E: Has Pascal been waiting for Rivet Town's evacuated residents to return?

C: 唔…不知道这里会不会有线索呢？
E: Hmm... I wonder if we can find any clues here?

C: 经过精心保养的显像管显示器。虽然有些许灰尘覆盖其上，但似乎还能正常工作。
E: A well maintained CRT display device. Though covered by some dust, it still functions.

C: 帕斯卡，到底为什么你会被同伴嫌弃……
E: Pascal, why do your peers keep rejecting you...

C: （流浪者说唱中…）
E: (The vagrant is spitting fire rhymes...)

C: 协议…启动。开始…啊！每次都要重复，真烦啊。
E: Protocol... initiating. Scanning... Ugh. I'm so sick of repeating this.

C: 恭喜你——回答错误！
E: Wrong! Congratulations.

C: 这么简单都答不上来，垃圾。多上几年学再来吧！
E: Simple question, terrible answer. It's back to school for you!

C: 欢迎回来。克拉拉小姐。
E: Welcome back, Miss Clara.

C: 和谈破裂——三月，准备应战！
E: Peace talks are over — March, prepare for combat!

C: 守护者大人，这个大家伙——我们拿他怎么办？
E: Madam Guardian, what should we do with the robot?

C: 现在只剩下最后一个问题——那个可可利亚为什么会突然性情大变。
E: Now only one question remains... Why would Cocolia exhibit such a sudden change in her attitude towards us?

C: 对你来说信息量过大了。
E: This must be a lot to take in for you.

C: 别总露出丧气样子，你的心情又不是不能跟别人分享，自己闷着头烦恼有意思吗？
E: Don't let it get you down — you can share your feelings with others y'know? Do you think keeping it all to yourself is doing you any good?

C: 好贵！
E: That's a lot of money!

C: 哎呀，你紧张什么？我又不是来探口风的。算了，我就当没这么回事吧……
E: Hey, why so tense? I'm not here to elicit information from you. Forget it, pretend I didn't say anything...

C: 现在的小孩就喜欢硬核的…
E: Kids today like things that are a little more "extreme"...

C: 四百五十冬城盾一次，还有要加价的买家吗？
E: <unbreak>450</unbreak> going once, any buyers going higher?

C: 赌上我们的全部吧！
E: Let's go all in!

C: 啊！这…这不是拍卖会上的地髓探针吗？怎么会在娜塔莎姐姐手上？
E: Ah! It's... the Geomarrow Probe from the auction! How did you get it?

C: 我们说服了很多人去买玩偶。
E: We persuaded lots of people to bid on him.

C: 矿镐和安全帽
E: Mechanical Mining Pick and safety helmet

C: ——啊，对了，对了！那家伙逃跑的时候慌不择路，撞倒了一些东西…好、好像还留下了一些痕迹之类的线索。
E: Ah, yes, I remember something! While the culprit was hurrying to escape, he knocked something over... He may have left some clues or something.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}可以去门口找托比——虽然看上去有些简陋，但它其实是最熟悉机械墓场的机器人了。就让托比给{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}带路吧。
E: Look for Toby at the front entrance. His appearance is... crude, but he's the robot most familiar with the machine graveyard. Just follow Toby.

C: 托比，你能为我带路吗？
E: Toby, can you show me the way?

C: 放着我来，你先休息吧。
E: Leave it to me. You should take a break.

C: 在无限的循环中，有限的数据空间迟早会被无穷复制的信息噪音彻底覆写。
E: His limited storage capacity will eventually become completely overwritten by infinite copies of muddled information in an everlasting cycle.

C: 「情感」是很宝贵的事物。
E: Emotions are priceless.

C: 在常规的人类族群中，与克拉拉年龄贴近的个体，通常不会承担过于重大的社会「责任」。
E: People Clara's age do not usually take on overwhelming social responsibilities.

C: 中间这个大家伙，难道是……
E: That big one in the middle — is that...

C: 那该怎么办？
E: So what's the plan?

C: 把你们带入贝洛伯格…是我犯下的过错。
E: Bringing you to Belobog... was a grave error.

C: 希露瓦说的对，{NICKNAME}。我们走吧。
E: Serval's right, {NICKNAME}. Let's go.

C: 一言为定！放心吧，我们可是很厉害的！
E: Say no more! We're good at this. Don't worry!

C: 花点时间好好想想——这次外包项目的验收流程具体都有谁参与？把你知道的名字都告诉我。
E: We should take a moment to think this through — who is involved in the quality control process for this outsourcing project? Tell me all the names you can think of.

C: 惹到那些权势滔天的家伙…现在军队里恐怕已经没有我的位置了吧？唉……
E: I've messed with the wrong people. I'm afraid I don't have a place in the military anymore... *sigh*...

C: ——而我们的先祖犯下的过错，就是没能尽早拥抱毁灭。
E: ...And yet, the crime of our ancestors was their inability to embrace that destruction sooner...

C: 唉，咱就知道事情没那么简单……
E: *sigh* I knew this wouldn't be simple...

C: 讽刺吗？星核只是实现了人类的诉愿，我们却在接下来的几百年里对它的存在讳莫如深。
E: Ironic, no? All the Stellaron did was answer humanity's call, and yet we kept its existence a closely guarded secret for centuries.

C: 入侵者…止步于此！
E: Intruders... You go no further!

C: 喂喂！听得见吗？信号真差……
E: Hello? Can you hear me? This signal is terrible...

C: 我的故事…也许并没有多么有趣。但或许你想听，对吗？希望你会想听……
E: My story... may not be that interesting, but perhaps you'd like to hear it, right? I hope you do...

C: 这是什么霸王条例？！
E: What? This is robbery in plain sight!

C: （看看关于寒潮前后的部分吧……）
E: (Let me read about the years just before and after the Eternal Freeze...)

C: 比如我会问你<color=#dbc291ff>「蓝色的客运型星槎有多少艘？」</color>，这样一来，「测速」体验应该有些挑战性了，你看怎么样？
E: For example, I might ask <color=#dbc291ff>"How many blue passenger starskiffs went past?"</color> That should add some challenge to the experience. What do you think?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你需要在规定时间内，记下往来这里的所有星槎的型号和颜色。等到结束之后，我会向你提问。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You will need to remember the models and colors of all starskiffs that pass by within the specified time period, and I will ask you a few questions at the end.</color>

C: 没错，就是3艘。
E: That's right, the answer is 3.

C: 这个「谛听」你可能用得上，我先交给你了。
E: You might be able to use this Diting, so hold onto this for now.

C: 俺…带的笔记很重要，刚才掉…出去了。
E: My notes... are really important. They fell out.

C: 我印象里好像没有听到这么多…
E: I don't remember hearing that much.

C: 现在去追还来得及哟。
E: It's still not too late to chase her back.

C: 不告而取，你要我去偷？
E: There was no approval. Did you want me to STEAL the book?

C: 短生种服长生种的猛药？老头子我还想活久一些呢。
E: You want a short-life species to take a long-life species' powerful medicine? I want to live for a few more years still!

C: （询问陶德所要的药材一事）
E: (Ask about the ingredient Todd wants)

C: 虽然手头的工具不多，但学会耽搁许久的研究也算有了些进展了。谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: I don't have a lot of tools available to me here, but the Guild's research finally has some progress after a long delay. Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 不行啊，我对你没什么感情呱，当然也写不出诗来呱！
E: No. I don't have any emotions for you, croak. That's not enough material for a poem, croak!

C: 呵，奋斗是吧？好借口。你以前怎么不说要出去奋斗来着？
E: Oh, now you're trying to focus on your career? Nice excuse. Why haven't you tried to focus on your career sooner?

C: 人类，别以为我不知道你在变着法骂我，你以为我愿意这么五个字五个字说话吗？沟通效率太低了。
E: Human, I know you're criticizing me indirectly. Do you think I'm happy speaking in that rhythm all the time? It's so inefficient.

C: 若月老板，你这句话什么意思啊，我只想问问静斋到底喜欢的是谁……
E: Ruoyue, what do you mean by that? I just want to know who Jingzhai likes...

C: 想要订做个「天才卜者」的匾。
E: I'd like to order a plaque that reads "Genius Diviner."

C: 我以为你会一个人来呢，不过要说的话都是一样的——请忘记我吧，小聪。
E: I thought you would come alone, but it doesn't matter. Please forget about me, Cong.

C: 至于现在，对不起，我没有任何感觉，一丁一点波澜也没有。
E: But now, I'm sorry to say that I have no feelings for him at all.

C: 罗浮怎么还有这么没素质的人？
E: How can there still be such uncivilized people in Luofu?

C: 你是小聪的朋友吧，还是先去追上小聪吧。
E: You must be Cong's friend. Let's catch up with Cong first.

C: 前一段时间空间站里流传起了情诗，很多科员也受此影响春心萌动，事实上有不少人也借此机会认识了另一半。
E: A while ago, romantic poems gained popularity in the space station. Many staff members were affected by the romantic mood, and so many of them have started using the opportunity to get to know their other half.

C: …怎么可能！唔，也不是没有这个可能……
E: ...Impossible! Well, I guess it isn't entirely impossible...

C: 你害羞啦。我就当你答应了！
E: You're getting shy, I'll take it as you've accepted it!

C: 干啥？
E: What?

C: 仙舟上到处都有着这样小巧可爱的机巧鸟，对一部分热爱宅家的仙舟人来说，它们才是最常造访的朋友。
E: Cycranes like this exist everywhere on the Xianzhou. Because of their cute and small appearance, more homebound people consider these constructs as their most-visited friends.

C: 请输入物流信息。
E: Please enter delivery information.

C: 她可能怀疑我才是骗子。
E: She might be suspecting I'm the scammer.

C: 啊，还有这样的展开？
E: Ah, the plot thickens.

C: 我就直说吧，你会愿意和一个陌生的、相貌平平的男子交心吗？
E: I'll be upfront. Would you want to befriend a stranger, and an average-looking man at that?

C: 有点难度。
E: Not really, no.

C: 我们不是仙舟法律，这些事情交给地衡司来判断吧。
E: We are not the law of the Xianzhou, so let's leave the judgment to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 牌友们心急如焚、火急火燎，因为我之前见过经纪人，就押着我过来找人讨说法了。
E: My game mates are so anxious and fired up that they sent me to come and get an explanation.

C: 那么，言归正传，能不能跟我讲讲鳞渊境里发生的事情？
E: Back to the topic, could you tell me what happened in Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 剩下的拓片都在这儿了。
E: All the remaining rubbings are here.

C: （陶德想看的是历史壁画，好像就在这附近……）
E: (The historical murals Todd is interested in seem to be nearby...)

C: 魔阴身不是一种疾病？
E: It's not a disease?

C: 你快去帮我们把那个人支开，拜托了！有话我们一会儿慢慢说。
E: Help us get rid of him, please! We'll have plenty of time to talk later.

C: 魁首说过很多次，把「慈怀」说成「怀慈」的，定斩不赦。
E: The master said many times that anyone using "clemency" instead of "mercy" should be killed without exception.

C: （脱下他的鞋子…）
E: (Let's take his shoes off...)

C: 稍、稍等一下！我再找找。
E: W—Wait a minute! I'll keep looking.

C: 在下是地衡司勤务广大。有急事的话，请到公廨内部…啊，这不是衔药龙女大人吗？
E: I'm Guangda, an orderly from the Realm-Keeping Commission. If you have an urgent issue, please go to the chancery... Huh? Aren't you the Healer Lady?

C: 怎么是你？
E: It's you!?

C: 咱们走吧！
E: Let's go!

C: …怎么会，他去哪儿了？我们说好了就在这里……
E: How can that be? Where is he? We agreed to meet here...

C: 梁沐…让我睁开了眼睛。我的眼里，他闪闪发光。
E: Liangmu... he opened my eyes. He was like a shining star.

C: 半夏这女人…怎么会变成这副丑陋的样子？
E: ...This is Banxia? This hideous creature?

C: …怎么了，觉得我做得不合适吗？
E: ...What? He deserved it!

C: 幸会幸会，我是{NICKNAME}。
E: A pleasure to make your acquaintance. The name's {NICKNAME}.

C: 久留此地只是徒增风险，我们立刻起行吧？不知丹恒大人谒见完毕后，是否有意随妾身会见长老？
E: It's risky to remain here — we should leave. Master Dan Heng, after your meeting, will you go with me to see the elders?

C: 我想借这个机会，同白露小姐聊一聊当年的旧事。我听过您的处境，虽然眼下无法承诺解决的办法，但我会试试做些什么。
E: I should take this opportunity to talk with you about the past, Miss Bailu. I've heard about your situation, and while I can't guarantee a solution, I will do my best to improve things for you.

C: 既然本小姐毫无资质，为什么丹枫当年选择了我？
E: Which begs the question... why did Dan Feng choose me all those years ago?

C: 你…做到了！无需外人认可，光只是这一点，便足以证明你是货真价实的龙尊。
E: ...Th—That's it — you did it! This alone should prove to everyone that you are the true High Elder.

C: 你擅用「化龙妙法」，造出的那头孽龙，几乎毁了鳞渊境！
E: You availed yourself of the Transmutation Arcanum to summon that draconic abomination... and almost laid waste to Scalegorge Waterscape in the process!

C: 刺客？我们三人并未提过「凶险」是刺客，浣溪小姐又是如何得知的？
E: Assassins? None of us mentioned that the danger involved assassins... How did you know that?

C: 现在就去调查一下！
E: Let's look into it now!

C: 我们会在行医市集里放置「特制饵食」吸引次元扑满。
E: We will place the special bait in the Healer's Market to attract the Warp Trotter.

C: 要不是有您出手相救，我们哥俩恐怕就要交代在这里了。
E: Without your bravery, we'd never have gotten out of that ditch alive!

C: 我觉得关键不是我们相不相信…
E: It isn't our trust you need...

C: 听着像在诓我，但这两个人确实不像善茬儿……
E: Sounds like a pack of lies... Still, they don't seem like pushovers...

C: 我要是懂坏家伙怎么想的，岂不跟他一样坏了吗。
E: If I knew the answer to that, wouldn't that make me as evil as him?

C: 两位英雄真是厉害。我之后也会找他算账的。哎…让这家伙来看店，是我的失职，真是太对不起了。
E: You two are incredible. I'll have to have a word with him later... Ugh, asking him to help was my mistake — I apologize.

C: （你让他说话文明点…）
E: (Can you tell him to be less aggressive...?)

C: 「破财消灾」
E: Bribing

C: 看在我这么求你的份上，就通融一下吧，求求你了！
E: Have a heart, good sir! I'm begging you!

C: 就是这位罗刹先生救了我们。
E: Mr. Luocha! He rescued both of us.

C: 那是我们俩掉沟里了。
E: We... fell into a ditch.

C: 恐怕要让瓦尔特先生失望了。天空，已经不再适合我了。
E: On my flying ability, I'm afraid I'll have to disappoint you, Mr. Yang. The sky no longer suits me.

C: 这我就插不上话了…
E: Don't think I have the qualifications to advise here...

C: 这话本不该由我说出口，但对晴霓来说，她有权知道过去的事情，因为这些过去开始左右她的未来了。
E: Perhaps it is not my place to say, but I believe Qingni has the right to know about the past... as the past is starting to affect her future.

C: 你永远不会知道身边的朋友能否返航，当然，也不会知道你自己能否返航。
E: You never knew if the friend next to you would make it back alive. Of course, the same could be said of yourself.

C: 您认为我该怎么做？
E: What do you think I should do?

C: （不能打草惊蛇，先确认下卡芙卡的位置吧……）
E: (Let's not give ourselves away and make sure where Kafka is first...)

C: 是吗……
E: Is that so...

C: 以前的我？…曾经是个「纯美骑士」。
E: The old me? I used to be a Knight of Beauty.

C: 你这身子还能怎么轻。
E: Do you even have weight to lose?

C: 是错觉，一定是错觉。
E: I think you're imagining things.

C: 这里的天空，应该是人为制造的边界。或许是为了避免住在里面的人始终望向漆黑的外层空间，产生忧郁和恐惧之类的负面情绪…真有意思。
E: The sky here is an artificial boundary. I imagine it was created to shield residents from the pitch dark of outer space, and the negative emotions that it can generate... fascinating.

C: 好了好了，不说了。
E: Right, okay, let's get back to work.

C: 云骑铠甲的碎片……
E: Shattered Cloud Knight armor...

C: 姑娘不问问我的名字吗？
E: Aren't you going to take my name too, miss?

C: （将信笺给帕姆看）
E: (Hand the letter over to Pom-Pom)

C: 她到底要待到什么时候…
E: How long does she plan on staying?

C: 若是为了彦卿在追捕时贸然动手一事，前来检定伤情、索要赔偿…彦卿认罚。我未来百年的薪饷尽可拿来作赔偿。
E: Hmph, looking for compensation for the injuries I gave you? I accept full responsibility — they can deduct my next hundred years' salary if they like...

C: 白珩…
E: Baiheng...

C: 我明白，这些纠葛对现在的我来说，还是太复杂了。比剑术要难得多。
E: I understand... These disputes are far too complicated for me right now. Swordplay's a lot simpler.

C: 安全起见…看来不是为我的安全啊。
E: For security purposes... I suppose it's not my security you're talking about.

C: 连将军的侍卫都出动了…
E: Even the general's retainer is getting in on the action...

C: 让一个孩子去缉拿要犯…？
E: They sent a child to apprehend a major criminal...?

C: 嗯？怎么才一走神，你就跑出去了？快回来，试炼还没结束，你可不能走啊。
E: Hm? Your mind might've wandered, but that doesn't mean you can. Come back and finish the trial!

C: 先说好了，我帮你抄完经，你可要帮我打掩护，我得去神策府通风报信……
E: Listen carefully — I help you copy the text, you cover for me, and I get word out to the Seat of Divine Foresight...

C: 灰牡丹，为避人耳目，我们分散离开，稍后在别处汇合吧。再会。
E: Well, Gray Peony, let's depart separately to avoid attracting attention — we'll rendezvous at a different location later. Until then.

C: 可囿于凡人脆弱的躯壳，我永远无法突破自己与那些「武学天才」之间的最后一丝障壁。
E: But I was trapped in a weak, mortal shell. I was never able to surpass the final barrier that separated me from the martial arts geniuses.

C: 这几个月我一直都很担心，不知道接下来会发生什么。
E: It's troubled me deeply over recent few months... it's hard to tell what all of this is building towards.

C: 她休息时都会在若木亭吹风，您还是直接去问她吧……
E: When she's not working, she's usually enjoying the breeze over in Synwood Pavilion. Why don't you go and ask her about it?

C: 这个药方我理解不了。我想其他丹士也理解不了吧。我建议你直接去问问我们的丹士长，丹枢大人。
E: I can't understand this prescription, and I imagine that other alchemists won't be able to make sense of it either. I recommend you go directly to the chief alchemist, Lady Dan Shu.

C: 唉…这么大的事，我也帮不上什么大忙。实在是辛苦你了，一定要注意安全啊。
E: *sigh* Such a serious matter — I'm sorry I can't be of much help to you. The assistance is appreciated — stay safe.

C: 就在这儿分道扬镳吧？
E: So is this where we go our separate ways?

C: 等一下！怎么突然就打起来了啊！我都没做好心理准备！
E: Whoa, whoa! What's with the sudden aggression!? I'm not ready!

C: 她曾是位巡海游侠。
E: She used to be a Galaxy Ranger.

C: 片刻之后，阵基开合，符箓生光，穷观阵已准备完毕。
E: Moments later, the apparatuses of the Matrix come to life with clicks and whirrs. It is time.

C: 看来是一段经历中混进了另一段经历的某个组成部分。就像是侵入的「异物」？
E: Looks like part of one experience has infiltrated another. A foreign object, so to speak.

C: 敲打敲打它，看看咱们能不能跳进那段经历。
E: Make contact with the object — let's see if we can jump over into that experience.

C: 罗浮那段过去，本座和你一同亲历，也许能帮上忙。但到了贝洛伯格，就只能靠你自己来分辨出「干扰源头」，让「异物」现身了。
E: On the Luofu, you and I have shared experiences, and so I was able to provide more active assistance... but in Belobog, you'll have to rely on your own judgment to ascertain the source of distortion and get the foreign object to appear.

C: …怎么你记忆中的每个人都在阻止你回忆…事情变得越来越奇怪了……
E: ...These warnings are ongoing... The situation is becoming stranger by the minute.

C: 不过像{NICKNAME}这样早已为仙舟立下赫赫功劳的老朋友，怕是没必要在演武台上出风头。
E: But for people like {NICKNAME} who have already made significant contributions to the Xianzhou, they maybe don't need to prove themselves on the Wardance stage.

C: 听两位兴致勃勃地聊着演武仪典，不知道你们有没有兴趣一同顺道去司辰宫看看热闹？
E: Since you two were talking so enthusiastically about the Wardance, maybe you'd be interested in joining us at Palace of Astrum?

C: 感谢将军，卡勒瓦拉不胜荣幸。
E: Thank you, General. It is an honor for Kalevala.

C: 现在是说这个的时候吗？
E: Is this really the time to talk about that?

C: 你好归好，能不能阻止我就得看你的本事了。
E: But if you want to stop me, you'll have to prove yourself.

C: 那些被我回收毁去的魔剑，其中也有不少有着光鲜响亮的名头。宝剑与屠刀往往是对同一种东西的不同称呼罢了。
E: Many of the cursed swords I've destroyed had honorable and grand names too. A legendary sword and a butcher's knife are often just different ways of describing the same thing.

C: 要是三月七在就好了…
E: Wish we had March 7th here...

C: 不太可能是临时起意的偷盗。
E: The theft was planned in advance.

C: 十足的把握？好啊，那我将我的推理过程再说一遍，要是有什么不对劲的地方，你可以随时打断。
E: A hundred percent sure? Fine, let me go through my reasoning again, and you can interrupt if anything feels off.

C: 过不了多久，会有身披金色枝条，只知杀戮的妖魔在此徘徊。但是你们不必害怕。
E: Soon, a demon will appear, donning golden branches and knowing only bloodshed. However, fear not, my children.

C: 抱歉，那位英雄战斗的日子已经离我们太远太远了，他没留下过任何可供旁人称呼的名字。但在我们的神话里，他从天上来到大地，我们称他为云骑士。
E: I apologize, but the hero's epic battles happened long ago, and he did not leave any name for us to call him. But in our mythology, he came from the heavens, and so we call him the Cloud Knight.

C: ……我叫云璃。
E: ...My name is Yunli.

C: 我只是朋友一场，帮她送个信而已——谁知这不是送信，是下战书来了啊！都说两军交战不斩来使，您放我走吧，你们玩得太大了，我实在陪不起……
E: I am just a friend, helping her deliver a letter, that's all — I never knew this was actually a declaration of warfare! They say you shouldn't kill the messenger — so maybe you can just, you know, let me go. You all are the big shots here. I'm really not on your level...

C: 桑博先生，仔细看看…这是一条上好的「烟熏红鲱鱼」。
E: Mr. Sampo, take a closer look... this is a wonderful smoked red herring.

C: 你怎么作弊！
E: No cheating!

C: 杨先生问的好问题，我一时半会儿也答不上来。容我想想……
E: Eh-he, that's a good question, Mr. Yang — it might take me a minute to give you an answer. Let me think...

C: 仙舟的星核之乱，与我们并无直接关联。但如果你站在艾利欧的视角，那么，也不能说星核猎手是无辜的。我们早已预见了这一切，但我们无动于衷，直到合适的时机才投身其中。
E: Xianzhou's Stellaron problem is not directly linked to us. But if you look at it from Elio's perspective, you can't say the Stellaron Hunters are completely innocent. We foresaw all this long ago, but chose to remain indifferent until the time was right for us to get involved.

C: 听上去很荒诞对吗？怪不得符太卜也不信，但穷观阵不会骗人。所以答案就是这么有趣：星核猎手出现在此，阿刃被捕，我被引入这座穷观阵，都是为了将你们——星穹列车带来仙舟。
E: Sounds ridiculous, doesn't it? It's no wonder Fu Xuan doesn't believe it either. But the Matrix of Prescience doesn't lie. The answer is just that bizarre: The Stellaron Hunters appearing here, Bladie getting arrested, me being lured to the Matrix of Prescience... it was all to bring you, the Astral Express crew, to the Xianzhou.

C: 杨叔你这过来人的语气……
E: Sounds like you're speaking from experience...

C: 工造司这儿出了大事，严肃着呢，可不兴开玩笑啊姑娘。
E: There's been a serious incident in the Artisanship Commission — nobody's in the mood for jokes, miss.

C: 咱们是正儿八经搞研究的，没有这种东西。
E: That's not how it works — the research comes first here.

C: 你是公输师傅吧？
E: Are you Master Gongshu?

C: 小娃儿居然知道老夫名字？
E: How do you know my name, child?

C: 仙舟悔愧于曾受「丰饶」蛊惑，才最终决定踏上「巡猎」征途。也许这一切还有挽回的余地。
E: The Xianzhou regrets being led astray by the Abundance... That's why they have decided to embark on the Path of The Hunt. Maybe it's not too late for redemption.

C: （听听评书）
E: (Listen to his book analysis)

C: 两个小孩拔腿就跑，留下嚣张的小孩不知所措。
E: The two children run away immediately, leaving the arrogant kid alone.

C: 在下很欣赏你的谨慎…可惜了。多少求药使抵达仙舟，渴望求取不死仙方，却无功而返。
E: I admire your vigilance... What a shame. So many Elixir Seekers arrive on the Xianzhou in the hope of obtaining the formula to immortality, but none have succeeded.

C: 他们猜的没错，仙舟确实保留着转变为长生种的秘密。我很欣赏你，想把这样的机会留给你。
E: Their aspirations are well-founded. The Xianzhou does indeed harbor the secret to becoming immortal. I admire you, so I thought I'd give you the chance to obtain it.

C: 上来就谈钱？也太功利了吧？我重金放生那些小羊时可没想着问它们收费啊。
E: That's so mercenary of you. When I released the sheep, I never thought of asking them for my money back.

C: 大自然确实没有规定谁生来就是猎物。不过，阁下下手未免太重了吧？人类的聪慧之处就在于，可以根据情况使用有限度的暴力。
E: Indeed, nature doesn't dictate who is born to be the prey, but you could have spared their lives. Humans are intelligent because we can decide how much violence to use based on the situation.

C: 「四大善人」…我是说「三大善人」，现在应该在丹鼎司那边，咱们一起过去吧。
E: The Four Benevolent Ones... Sorry, the Three Benevolent Ones should be at the Alchemy Commission right now. Let's head over there.

C: 接着这位是希斯曼，他呢，是「草叶派」的代表，主要致力于放生植物。
E: Next is Heathmann. He leads the Plant Faction that is dedicated to releasing plants.

C: 找到我们三人都能满意的解决方案，就是本次试炼的核心。
E: Finding the solution that meets the needs of all three of us is the core of this trial.

C: 那大家只放生同一种生命呢？
E: How about we let them release the same species of creature?

C: 唉？需要咱们把废弃品翻修一新吗？
E: Oh? Do we have to refurbish discarded products?

C: 听好了，这可是让冬妮娅小姐见识一下这些强而有力的机械生命的好机会。
E: Listen, now is the perfect time to show Miss Tonya how powerful these mechanical lifeforms are.

C: 植物，皆是寡言……
E: Plants can't speak...

C: 没说什么要紧事吗？唉…我还以为她至少会告诉你到底发生了什么呢。
E: She didn't say anything important? Alas... I thought she would at least explain the whole thing to you.

C: 该见的都见了，判官还有要事处理。藿藿，送客。
E: I believe we're done here. We have important matters to attend to. Huohuo, please see them off.

C: 家人，到时候你配合我一下呗？
E: ...Can you give me a hand?

C: 是藿藿留下了纸人，谢谢你。
E: You're the one who left the paper dolls for me. Thank you.

C: 怎么回事…镜子、镜子里好像有声音？
E: What's going on...? Th—There's a voice in the mirror?

C: 我被附身了，这也是我的优势？
E: I'm possessed too — do I also get an advantage?

C: 听听，别人夸你呢。现在又该怎么办？
E: See? People say good things about you. What are you gonna do about it?

C: 被封印的岁阳，奉行十王旨意的工具罢了。
E: It is merely a sealed heliobus, a tool carrying out the will of the Ten Lords.

C: 谢谢你告诉我这么多，我也没想到事情会发展到这一步……
E: Thanks for telling me everything. I didn't think things would get so out of hand...

C: （柯柯娜的语气…有些不大对劲……）
E: (Cocona's tone... is a little strange...)

C: 柯柯娜——最近你是怎么回事？这样下去，我怀疑还有没有必要和你续劳务合同。
E: Cocona... What's wrong with you recently? If you keep this up, I'm going to start wondering whether I should renew your work contract.

C: 我也不知道我是谁。
E: I don't know who I am either.

C: 在离开匹诺康尼之前，还需要收集一些东西……
E: Before leaving Penacony, there are still some things to collect...

C: 柯柯娜转过头，向你投来最后一瞥。她的眸中饱含悲伤，孤寂，还有…感激。
E: Cocona turns her head, giving you one last glance. Her eyes are brimming with sorrow, loneliness, and... gratitude.

C: 我找不到柯柯娜了。
E: I can't find Cocona.

C: 这是爱。这是爱。
E: This is love. This is love.

C: 他好会说话…他好谦逊！啊…为什么我眼前发黑……
E: He's so eloquent... He's so modest! Ah... Why is everything going dark...

C: {NICKNAME}，真是个好名字。
E: {NICKNAME}, a delightful name.

C: 房门背后可能就藏着那位「银河之星」的真相，他也许就是在这里陷入了无法苏醒的沉眠。
E: It is possible that the truth behind the Cosmic Star lies behind this door. Perhaps, he has fallen into a deep sleep from which he cannot wake.

C: 电视上正在播放一部电影，快速的交叉剪辑和炫目的特效迅速侵占了你的视觉神经。
E: There is a movie playing on the television. Quick cuts and dazzling special effects quickly overwhelm your senses.

C: 还有更要紧的事。
E: There are more important things to do.

C: …我、我知道了，恳请您不要把这件事说出去！不然的话，家族的人肯定会断定我工作失职、禁止我再入梦的！
E: ...Okay. I beg that you please do not tell anyone about this! Or else I know that The Family will deem me negligent of my duties and forbid me from ever dreaming again!

C: 谢谢您，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，真相对我来说非常重要。
E: Thank you, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. The truth was extremely important to me.

C: 我需要再考虑一下……
E: I need some time to think...

C: 但当这个可供他藏身片刻的泡泡也突然炸裂后——他再也不知道自己该去向何处了。
E: However, when this bubble that gave him a place to hide suddenly burst... He no longer knew where to go.

C: 一定小心！「它」很有攻击性——
E: Be careful! "It" is extremely aggressive!

C: 除此之外，还有一件更重要的事。假如我没有折返回来，假如这场对话没有发生——她的人生会坠入谷底，我会亲手制造出她的不幸。
E: But there is something more important than all this. If I had not turned back, if I had never had this conversation... Her life would fall to the depths and I would personally have caused her unhappiness.

C: 最后还有一件事，也请您跟我稍挪步，以便视察——
E: There's one last thing. If you follow me, you can see for yourself...

C: 快端上来吧！
E: Bring it up!

C: 别给佩叔丢脸！
E: Don't embarrass Uncle Pedro!

C: 佩德罗捧着你的画像，将它稳稳当当地挂在墙壁上。
E: Pedro holds your painting and steadily hangs it on the wall.

C: 船长，您站着别动，让我瞧瞧……
E: Captain, don't move, let me see...

C: 可惜纸面上的东西未能百分百还原出您的气势，不过这样也不错……
E: A pity that your aura can't be duplicated wholly on paper, but this is fine too...

C: 那个，要是您没有什么急事的话，我还有些事务要处理……
E: Um, if you have nothing else urgent for me, I have to get back to work...

C: 您真是个大善人，我的无名客朋友！工作了这么久，自愿替人上班的我还是头一回见！
E: You're a magnanimous person, my Nameless friend! In all my years of work, this is the first time I've seen someone voluntarily wanting to work more!

C: （自动化服务终端？这可不行…得想办法处理掉。）
E: (Automated service terminal? That won't do... Gotta find a way to get rid of it.)

C: 但光是这样还不够…你还需要更多的准备，保证你未来十个系统时的工作体验完美无缺。
E: But that's not enough... You still require more preparation that will guarantee a perfect work experience for the next ten system hours.

C: （这会儿好像没什么人…那我先离开一会儿应该也没关系吧？）
E: (There doesn't seem to be anyone around here just now... So it shouldn't be a problem if I slip off for a while, right?)

C: 一团胀气开始在你的下腹部聚集，随后化作汹涌的热浪扶摇直上。
E: You feel belching and flatulence in your abdomen, transforming into an intense surge of heat that rises rapidly.

C: 请给我一间最舒适的客房！我已经等不及要去参加组…咳，我已经等不及去见识下传闻中的「黄金的时刻」了！
E: Please, can I take the most comfortable room? I can't wait to join up with the group... *ahem* I mean, I can't wait to see the legendary Golden Hour for myself!
Umm...

C: …犹豫？你难道没发现吗？这个大堂经理长得和那个灰毛也太像了！
E: ...Hesitating? Haven't you noticed? This lobby manager looks just like that other guy with the gray hair!

C: 哎唷，不得了！名利双收，你这趟匹诺康尼之旅收获还真他宝贝的丰厚啊！
E: Ah, no way! Fame and fortune — you've really gotten a lot out of this muddle-forkin' trip to Penacony!

C: 为工作繁忙的员工揽下工作，让他们得以获得娱乐喘息的时间。如此大义，你果然是无私的「纯美」使者。
E: Taking on work for busy staff just so they can have some space to relax... you really are a selfless messenger of the Beauty.

C: （他还是那么在乎插队…）
E: (He still really cares about cutting in the queue...)

C: 看来你是真的完全恢复好了啊？真遗憾~
E: Looks like you've really made a full recovery then? That's a pity~

C: 没道理啊，这…这根本就说不通，矲主大人明明应该是「四尺神王」的令使，世间所有袖珍族的英明领袖……
E: This... doesn't make sense. The master is the Emanator of the Four-Foot Aeon and a capable leader of all diminutive races in the world.

C: 幸会，青雀女士。
E: It's my pleasure to meet you, Miss Qingque.

C: 就是就是，赶紧过来坐下吧！那个丹什么的，你可以闪了！
E: Yeah, just come over and take a seat! That "Dandy" guy can leave now!

C: 拜别怀炎将军。
E: I bid you farewell, General Huaiyan.

C: 我对将军的实力十分好奇。
E: I am very curious about your true strength, General.

C: 本座也不是一个喜欢兴师动众的人，不过是工作出差回来，用不着这么多人夹道迎接。
E: I do not like fusses. This was simply a work trip, and there was no need for a welcome party.

C: 这黑灯瞎火的，为了图省事，我把所有像是设计稿的文件全部拿出来了。要不我们在这里挑一下，看看到底是哪一份是莱恩的手稿吧？
E: It was pitch black in there, so to save trouble, I pulled out everything that looked like a design manuscript. Why don't we sift through these here and see which one of them is Mr. Ryan's?

C: 你也得一起找。
E: You have to help me look for it.

C: 多谢青雀小姐的好意，我…我什么都不想吃。
E: Thanks, Miss Qingque. That's very generous. I... I don't want to eat anything.

C: 回过神来，师傅头发已经花白了。在一个平平无奇的午后，他说自己有些累了，想要休息一下，却突然就倒在了设计桌前，再也没能醒来。
E: Before I realized what was happening, his hair was already gray. One ordinary afternoon, he said he was a little tired and wanted to rest — but he fell down at his worktable, and never woke up again.

C: 帮人就要帮到底，对吧？
E: If you're gonna help someone, you gotta see it through, right?

C: 另一方面是在外部最坚固的生物材料会逐渐闭合，星槎在遭遇剧烈冲击的情况下，内部也能维持核心的运作。
E: For another thing, the toughest biological materials on the exterior will gradually close up, so that the starskiff can continue its core internal operations even when it encounters severe impacts.

C: 这个金人怎么一直在抖动啊？
E: Why does this aurumaton keep shaking?

C: 「莱恩•玛斯特隆佐，逝于工造司格物院」…我这边将信息输入进去了，阵枢那边就交给你了。
E: "Ryan Masteronzo passed away at the Sapientia Academe of the Artisanship Commission." I've entered the info on my side, and I'll leave you to do your part at the base terminals.

C: 我还有事儿，在这里待一会儿就回去了。
E: I'll take my leave soon to attend to something.

C: 那一场的对手跟纸糊的似的，才挨了两拳就趴下了。卢卡那小子不知道吃错了什么药，当场指名要希儿上台跟他过两招……
E: The opponent for that fight was too weak. They went down with just a few punches. I don't know what got into Luka after that, but he said out loud that he wanted Seele to come up and fight him right there and then...

C: 唷！希儿，还有…呃，这位是……
E: Hey! Seele! And, um, you are...?

C: 计划？
E: Plan?

C: 噢，那不如让我来给你讲讲吧。
E: Well, let me tell you about it.

C: 三步，一共就三步。放心，保证不会占用你们太多时间！
E: Three. Just three steps. Trust me, it won't take too much of your time!

C: 反正我安排的试炼就只剩最后一步了。两位，辛苦你们陪我再走一段！
E: Anyway, there's only one more step in my training plan. Come on guys, help me wrap it up!

C: 「地火」的卢卡，你来找我有什么目的？
E: Luka of Wildfire, what is the purpose of your visit?

C: 对！我也没什么想法，就是想跟这下层区公认的最强过上几招，看看自己到底有几斤几两。怎么样，有兴趣吗？
E: Yep! It's not that complicated. I just wanna go a few rounds with the one everyone agrees is the most powerful in the Underworld, and see where I stand. What do you say? Are you interested?

C: 倒也不必杯弓蛇影。演武仪典不似「谐乐大典」那样隐藏了诸多秘密。它只是为纪念帝弓与云骑对抗丰饶孽物，拯救仙舟的壮举而设的节庆罢了。
E: No need to worry. The Wardance is not like the Charmony Festival with all its hidden secrets. It's just a festival to honor the Reignbow Arbiter and the Cloud Knights who fought against the Abominations of Abundance and protected the Xianzhou ships.

C: 比「晖长石号」还大？
E: So, it's even bigger than the Radiant Feldspar?

C: 曜青仙舟？
E: The Xianzhou Yaoqing?

C: 啊，你瞧我光杵在这儿拉拉杂杂说了一大堆。将军唤我接各位去司辰宫小坐，他也很久没见各位了，想听你们聊聊列车的近况呢。
E: Ah, I'm sorry for talking your ear off. The General wants to catch up with you at the Palace of Astrum. He's been eager to hear about how the Express has been doing.

C: 拘谨？有吗？
E: Reserved? Really?

C: 谁乱吹牛了！几个公司职员，难道比砂金还厉害？不能够吧～
E: Hey, who's bragging? Anyway, this time it's just a few ordinary IPC workers. Surely you don't think they'll be even trickier than Aventurine, do you?

C: 都说了很多次了，只要开箱完成安全检查，我们自然会放行。你是耳朵出了问题，还是脑袋不利索。
E: Just as I've said it many times already. Once we've inspected the cargo and completed the security check, you can be on your way. Is there something wrong with your ears, or is it just your brain?

C: 既然你们搬出安全规章，那咱们就来谈谈法律。按照《仙舟联盟-星际和平公司贸易共识宣言》第四款之规定，联盟和公司绝不能侵犯对方的知识产权。
E: Speaking of regulations, we have our own laws and regulations too. According to Article 4 of the Xianzhou Alliance-IPC Trade Consensus, the Alliance and IPC shall never infringe on each other's intellectual property rights.

C: 那么，到时候会有无数博识学会、公司「市场开拓部」的抗诉接踵而来。你还年轻，你根本不明白自己一个草率的决定会引起如何狼狈的轩然大波。
E: Oh, really? Then you'll receive a ton of complaints from the Intelligentsia Guild and the IPC's Marketing Development Department. You're too young, I don't think you understand the chaos your rash decision will cause.

C: 话不可以乱说啊，灵砂小姐。
E: We can't just make wild speculations about these things, Miss Lingsha.

C: 做好准备把他们俩分开吧。
E: Get ready to separate them.

C: 三月小姐仍是块未开凿的璞玉，老朽也好奇，想借罗浮演武仪典的良机。
E: Miss March is like a piece of jade in the rough, just waiting to be shaped. The Wardance is the perfect opportunity to see what heights she can reach.

C: 这名步离人似乎尚未来得及反应便被人从后方刺穿。你不清楚这究竟是曜青使者做的，还是判官的手笔。
E: Whoever impaled this borisin from behind probably caught them off guard. It could be a judge or a Yaoqing messenger.

C: 我们来维持此处秩序…
E: Let's maintain the order here...

C: 三月小姐的身手灵活，腰肢柔软，真是练习罗浮剑术的绝好苗子。
E: Miss March has quick hands and a flexible body. She's a perfect fit for practicing Luofu swordplay.

C: 都给我说饿了。
E: I'm getting hungry.

C: （前往迴星港）
E: (Head to Stargazer Navalia)

C: 武器、补给…我们必须做好充足的准备。不然咱们的头颅就只能交代在这儿了。
E: Weapons, supplies... we've got to be well-prepared. Otherwise, we're screwed.

C: 八成不是什么好事。他们不见了？咱们跟上去！
E: They're definitely up to something bad. Wait, they disappeared? Let's catch up to them!

C: 有言在先，我所问的未必是我认为的。提问若有冒犯，还请不要见怪。
E: Let me be clear, the questions I'll ask might not reflect my actual thoughts. So, please don't take offense if any of my questions seem a bit harsh.

C: 报告宣称，绝灭大君幻胧是阴谋的策动者。
E: According to the report, Lord Ravager Phantylia is the mastermind behind the entire conspiracy.

C: 我们准备好了，有劳。
E: We're ready to go in.

C: 请再等等。
E: Just one moment, please.

C: 此处不是阳世凡人久待之地。丹恒先生，{NICKNAME}，随我来。
E: This is not a place for ordinary mortals. {NICKNAME} and Mr. Dan Heng, please come with me.

C: 怎么回事？这些东西为何动起来了？
E: What's happening here? Why are these things moving on their own?

C: 不对劲，守卫们毫无回应…
E: Something is wrong. The guards aren't responding...

C: 说不定正是这些机甲干的好事。
E: It's probably these mechs causing the trouble.

C: 我必须活着离开此处，我的伙伴还在等我。
E: I have to make it out alive. My companions are waiting for me.

C: 其二是罗浮仙舟的六司职员。筹办演武仪典所耗的人力、物力本就不可计数，眼下突然中止，又要无限期推迟，一系列变化只怕内部也难以承受。
E: The second party is the staff of the Xianzhou Luofu's Six Commissions. They've invested a lot of resources and manpower into organizing the Wardance. Suddenly suspending it indefinitely would create numerous challenges for them.

C: …真、真的吗？
E: ...R—Really?

C: 小傻瓜，星穹列车的无名客蜚声星海，能请来是何等光荣！何况三月小姐是以「云骑骁卫弟子」之名出战，又怎么能算是「罗浮仙舟无人」？
E: Dear child, the Nameless of the Astral Express are renowned throughout the cosmos! It's an honor to have them participate in the ceremony! Plus, Miss March is a disciple of the little Cloud Knight Lieutenant. How can she be regarded as an "outsider"?

C: 椒丘总说我是云骑里最耐不住性子的人，他的劝诫向来是对的，所以你没理由比我更着急。
E: Jiaoqiu always said I'm the most impatient person among the Cloud Knights, and I can't argue with that. So there's no reason for you to be more anxious than me.

C: 步离人代谢很快，药效不持久…
E: Borisin have fast metabolisms, so the effects of medicines don't last long...

C: 刚才将军说了，令师武艺超群，将呼雷击败，立下大功。因此元帅下令将这头凶兽交由罗浮处置，也算是一份荣耀？
E: As you mentioned, your mentor was an exceptional warrior and was the one who defeated Hoolay, an extraordinary achievement. Therefore, the marshal placed this feral beast under the jurisdiction of the Xianzhou Luofu as an honor, I assume?

C: 还能动，就说明坏得还不够彻底。
E: If it can still move, it means it wasn't damaged enough.

C: 来吧，让它再也动弹不得。
E: Let's make sure it never moves again.

C: 云骑没有封锁港口吗？
E: Have the Cloud Knights closed the ports?

C: 好，我这就找人。
E: Alright, I'll call for reinforcements.

C: 我依旧还记得，在我被关押之初的那些岁月里，狐人们来了又去…他们从我身上抽取血髓，想破解「月狂」的成因，摆脱对步离人的恐惧，从血脉的根柢上翻身做主。
E: I still remember, in the early years of my captivity, the foxians came and went... They extracted my blood and marrow, trying to unravel the mystery of Moon Rage. They wanted to conquer their fear of the borisin and free themselves from their bloodline.

C: 受刑七百年，我曾以为一切毫无希望了，但如今，这轮心脏再度跳动起来了。
E: I thought all hope was lost after seven centuries of torment, but now, this heart is beating once again.

C: 将军莫非是在和彦卿说笑？一头被关押了七百年的恶狼，就算有党羽协助，相较于罗浮云骑的数量也微不足道，怎么可能把我们当成猎物？
E: Are you joking, General? He's just a wolf who's been imprisoned for seven centuries. Even with his accomplices, they're no match for us numerous Luofu Cloud Knights. How could he consider us his prey?

C: 迴星港就是他们最可能来的地方？
E: Is Stargazer Navalia the most likely place for them to come to?

C: …只是在这里看着舰船的飞行轨迹确实没什么意思，要是能上船，我最想看的还是彦卿大人的守擂比赛……
E: ...Honestly, just watching the ship from here isn't too thrilling. I wish I could go on board and witness Lieutenant Yanqing's contests...

C: 狼群不在这里？不，我所行之处，皆为狼群！
E: Our packs are not here? Wherever I go, everyone is the pack!

C: 看着这些选手，我不知为何突然心不慌了。
E: Looking at these contestants, I suddenly feel a lot calmer for some reason...

C: 将军…我失手了。那条疯狗把我留在了这儿，是要向你……
E: General... I failed you. That mad dog left me here as...

C: 省省力气，给我收声！
E: Save your breath!

C: 「围三阙一」…这就是你所说的，能确保演武仪典如常进行的计划吗？
E: Surround your enemy, but leave one side open... This is your strategy for ensuring that the Wardance will be able to be held as usual?

C: 引擎舱就在前边，走吧。
E: The engine room is just up ahead. Let's go.

C: 你确实很难杀死，但绝不代表你无法被制服！
E: You may be hard to kill, but that does not mean you cannot be overpowered!

C: 随着战首败亡，狼卒们无力抵抗，被云骑军尽数镇压。{NICKNAME}与貊泽找到了奄奄一息的椒丘。
E: As the Warhead is defeated and slain, the Wolftroopers can no longer resist and are completely overwhelmed by the Cloud Knights. {NICKNAME} and Moze then find Jiaoqiu, who is at death's door.

C: 现在，你最大的恐惧就要成真了：成为仙舟的敌人。
E: Now, your greatest fear is about to come true: You have become an enemy of the Xianzhou.

C: 抵死鏖杀，万世长存！
E: Fight to the death and you shall live forever!

C: 猎物，尝尝刀剑穿身的滋味！
E: Prey, taste my blade as it pierces your skin!

C: 你不可能动摇我，呼雷。
E: You cannot weaken my resolve, Hoolay.

C: 没错没错，二位师父目前还好吧？
E: Exactly. How are my masters doing at the moment?

C: 蒂索克二世叹了口气，旋即又深吸了一口气，对着酒吧正门大喝一声——
E: Tizocic II sighs, then immediately draws a deep breath, faces the bar entrance and yells out...

C: 还不是你们怂恿的！你还好意思笑！他人现在在哪儿？
E: It's because of you lot who egged him on anyway! Yet you treat it like a joke! Where is he now?

C: 哪里的话，多谢。我们再去问问别人。
E: Oh stop it, and thank you. Let's go ask someone else.

C: 哎呀，这不是皇上吗？今天也出来巡逻啊？
E: Ooh, if it's not Your Majesty! Come out for a patrol again?

C: 这有什么麻烦的，你不是「皇帝」嘛？想捞人，让猎犬卖你个面子不就行了？
E: How much trouble could there be? Aren't you the Emperor? You just have to show your face and the Bloodhounds'll release him, no?

C: 无妨，你快去快回。
E: That's fine. Make it quick.

C: 让开，殿下还有事要忙。
E: Step aside. Her Highness has business to attend to.

C: 朕有事拜托你，尽快过来。
E: I have a matter to entrust to you. Come right now.

C: 替朕去拦下他们吧。普普沙帝国的事情，还轮不到公司插手。
E: Intercept them for me. The IPC has no jurisdiction in the Pupsha Empire's affairs.

C: 亲爱的逐梦客啊！先皇已经离开了匹诺康尼，现在由朕——蒂索克三世践祚，继续完成先皇未竟的事业！
E: Dear Dreamchaser! The late Emperor has left Penacony. I, Tizocic III will inherit the throne and carry on the duties of the late Emperor.

C: 只是平心静气地聊天而已。
E: We were just having a chat.

C: 我同意，孩子。我在这片无意义的梦境中滞留太久了。
E: I concur. I've been stuck in this meaningless dreamscape for too long.

C: 我身边的黑塔女士是其中之一——卡尔德隆•查德威克亦是。
E: Madam Herta is one of them, and so is Calderon Chadwick.

C: 您身边的这位是……
E: I see you've brought a friend today...

C: 但匹诺康尼的家族对「忆质」和其相关技术有着深入了解。即使无法令查德威克的肉身存续，他们仍然可以提取出他大脑底层的质料，令他的思想继续「存活」。
E: On the other hand, The Family in Penacony has a deep understanding of memoria and its related technologies. Even though they can't sustain Chadwick's body, they could still extract the substance from the depths of his brain, allowing his consciousness to "survive."

C: 倒是不必给我科普这些，我读过《星空简史》…不过真没想到，你居然也是「灾难说」的支持者。
E: No explanation needed. I've read The Brief History of the Universe to know enough... By the way, I'm surprised you're a supporter of the catastrophe theory.

C: 当我还是一个孩童，第一次接触虚数理论时，在我脑海中浮现的画面不是一棵参天大树；而是一片茂密的树海。
E: When I was little and first discovered the Imaginary theories, what came to my mind was the image of a dense forest, not of a huge tree.

C: …光是这样还不够。以那种方式被保存下来的忆质，说到底只是一滩「死水」罢了；要是在很长的时间里不被「搅动」，水里的东西迟早都会死光。
E: ...That step alone wasn't enough, as the memoria preserved that way was, in essence, a stagnant pool. If it remained inactive for too long a time, what was in the water would eventually die out.

C: 查德威克博士…查德威克博士在哪？只有他、只有他能阻止这一切！
E: Professor Chadwick... Where is he? Only he can put a stop to all this!

C: 滴答…要想寻找湛蓝爵士的过去，就得从它提供的信息入手——能够建造出流梦礁的家伙，肯定不是无名之鸟！
E: Tick-tock... If we're to search for Dr. Blues' past, we'll just have to start with the information it provided. A bird capable of building Dreamflux Reef must not be an ordinary bird!

C: 刚好，我来帮帮你吧！
E: Well, then, you should let me help you!

C: 小筑梦师，你来评评——是不是这个道理！
E: Little Dreamweaver, you be the judge. Is that fair or not?

C: 为我担保？笑话！把我从监狱中捞出来的是格拉克斯老头子——窃取机密，威胁和平？更是放屁！「隐夜鸫」的筑梦技术什么时候变成你们家族的东西了？
E: Vouch for me? What a joke! It was old man Glaux who bailed me out of prison. Stealing secrets, threatening peace? More wild accusations! When did the Nightingales' dreamweaving methods belong to you?

C: 那些家伙看不惯「隐夜鸫」不是一天两天了，但没想到他们会直接在这里动手。
E: The Nightingales have always been an eyesore to them, but I never thought they'd actually try anything here.

C: 奥尔拉就是这里的创造者。
E: Orla is the creator of this place.

C: …嗯，我知道。
E: ...Yes, I know.

C: （仍放任奥尔拉离开）
E: (Let Orla go)

C: 霸道？照你这么说，要求犯人赔偿也是霸道？
E: Overboard? I'm in the wrong for seeking compensation from a criminal?

C: 虽然没有付诸实践，但有行善的念头终究是好的——倘若其他公民都能学习你的品质，局势会比现在好上许多。
E: Even if not put into practice, the intent to do good is nonetheless commendable — if other citizens could learn from your virtue, we wouldn't be in such harrowing circumstances.

C: 不介意的话，我去开个浴池，你可以先在这周围逛逛。公民们还沉浸在刚才发生的事里，说不定能听到些有趣的看法。
E: If you don't mind, I'll go run a bath first. You can take a look around. The citizens are still mulling over what just happened, you might hear something of interest.

C: 的确，而且看样子，他们此前也没吃过像样的饭——这里的话事人在哪？
E: Indeed. And from the looks of them, they haven't had a proper meal for a while. Who's in charge here?

C: 可是安东尼叔叔，还有爱莎姐姐…他们好像真的快要死了。
E: But Uncle Anthony, and Sister Aisha... They really look like they're going to die.

C: 包在我身上吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 啊对了，冒昧问一句，你买这么多食物是要做什么？
E: Ah yes, if you don't mind me asking: Why are you buying so much food?

C: 你猜？
E: Take a guess.

C: 你没被发现吧？
E: You weren't discovered?

C: 我来看看被你们关押的犯人。
E: I'm here to see the prisoner you detained.

C: 因为我也希望在陷入困境时，能有人来拉我一把。
E: Because I, too, hope that in my time of need, someone will lend me a hand.

C: （在大地兽工坊的那场骚乱中，我选择了<color=#dbc291ff>声讨那个外邦人</color>，但他还是被苏克提瑞斯解了围。）
E: (During the turmoil that occurred in the dromas workshop, I chose to <color=#dbc291ff>go against the outlander</color>, but Soctires still managed to sort everything out for him.)

C: 我们不是在惩罚他的动机，只是在惩罚他的行为——不这么做才是对社会风气的破坏。
E: We are not punishing his motives, but his actions. Failing to hold him accountable will undermine societal values.

C: 请等一下！阿格莱雅大人，我还有一个疑问——您打算如何处置那些外邦人？
E: Please hold! Lady Aglaea, I still have a question — how do you intend to deal with that bunch of outlanders?

C: 打不过就骂街？
E: Can't beat me, so you resort to foul language?

C: 有话直说嘛。
E: Just say that next time.

C: 真是难办，不认识的人，不认识的地方。
E: Well now we're stuck! We don't know this person, or this place!

C: 呼——无论是诗歌、神话、戏剧还是冒险故事里都没有这个人。看来我帮不上你的忙了。
E: Phew... I checked poems, mythology, plays, and adventures, but no mention of this person. Looks like I won't be able to help you.

C: 我是来打架的。
E: I'm here for a fight.

C: 等等，是谁的声音？
E: Wait, who said that?

C: 你没听他们说要把我们变成祭品，切成丁抛到铸魂的金血里，平息尼卡多利的愤怒吗？
E: Have you not heard that they plan to make us sacrifices? To dice our bodies and cast them into the soul-melting golden blood to quell the rage of Nikador?

C: 让我想想办法…大工匠，这东西是？
E: Let me think of a way... Grand Craftsman, what is this?

C: 放心吧，婆婆，她是咱们奥赫玛的客人。
E: Fear not, granny. She is a guest of Okhema.

C: 方才你提到这蝴蝶也是泰坦的眷属，是哪一尊泰坦呢？
E: You said that these butterflies are Titankin. Which Titan are they descended from?

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 纷争的子嗣，你想上阵作战吗？
E: Child of strife, do you wish you go to battle?

C: 我们可以逃去奥赫玛。
E: You all can escape to Okhema.

C: 雅努萨波利斯，竟然还留着这些记忆——真没想到，我会以这样的方式「回顾」自己的过去。
E: To think these memories are still held in Janusopolis — never did I imagine I would "recollect" my past in such a way.

C: 很健康。
E: Healthy.

C: 总感觉疑点重重…
E: Something feels really fishy here...

C: 我差不多该走了。你看着点虎克，省得她又整出什么幺蛾子……
E: I should get going. Keep an eye on Hook. Make sure she doesn't pull any weird stunts...

C: 大梦一场终有醒时，好戏一台总要落幕。屏风一闭，醒木一拍，且做闲人袖手看。故事就此告一段落。
E: Every great dream must end in waking, every grand play must have its curtain drawn. When the screen is drawn and the gavel struck, let us fold our arms and watch as idle spectators. Thus, the story comes to its close.

C: 重要的是，这是一个约定，你和许多人的约定。
E: What matters is that this is a promise, shared between you and many others.

C: （先从翁法罗斯这个世界开始吧。）
E: (Let's start with the world of Amphoreus.)

C: 古恩先生…好的，老师好，请多指教。
E: Mr. Gunn... Okay, {M#mister}{F#miss}, please teach me.

C: （劝她寻找自我，自由发展）
E: (Tell her she should be herself.)

C: 态度感觉有点差，像是不耐烦了？不行不行！
E: Seems a little ill-mannered, like... a little impatient? It won't work!

C: 「不能保修」？
E: "Void their warranty"?

C: 「自行拆卸后，产品将不能再享受星际和平家电服务中心的保修服务。」
E: "Should the product be tampered with, it will no longer be under warranty from the Interastral Peace Appliances' Service Center."

C: 难道…真的是我听错了？哈——欠！
E: Did I... really hear it wrong? *big yawn*

C: 再这样下去，我的人生是不是就完蛋了啊……
E: If my life keeps going like this, it's gonna be all over...

C: 请问你要找谁？
E: Who are you looking for?

C: 最近很流行的「复古鎏金古铜色」和「夏日冷萃丛林绿」两种颜色，{NICKNAME}，你有什么头绪吗？
E: Two colors are really popular right now. Retro Glazed Bronze and Summer Blooming Forest... {NICKNAME}, do you know what they actually are?

C: 没有野生动物的世界实在无趣。
E: A world without wild animals would be so boring.

C: 将和曼娅的谈话内容转述给了华劳斯……
E: You convey what Manya said to Wallace...

C: 我相信，只要继续把持莱姆士汀家真诚的待人之道，本人有朝一日必定能友遍天下。
E: I believe that I will one day make friends all over the world as long as I continue to treat people with sincerity like all the Limesteins.

C: 你就不能盼人点好？
E: Can't you think of something less dreary?

C: 他说…
E: He said...

C: 不过莱姆士汀家的人是不会轻易气馁的。我迟早会交到「真心」的朋友，让拒我于门外的人后悔。
E: But we Limesteins are not quitters. Sooner or later, I will find a "true" friend, and those who rejected me will regret it.

C: 我的心中没有任何杂念，只想交一个真心朋友。反倒是我接触的那些人顾忌太多，或是对我的家世怀有疑问，或是对我抱持着无中生有的偏见。
E: I have no other intentions. I just want to make true friends. It was the people I came into contact with... They were too cautious. Some of them had suspicions about my family background, and some held prejudices against me for no reason.

C: …啊，原来是这位！我经常在剧院的前排瞥见他，大概也能推测出他身世显赫……
E: Oh, it's him! I remember seeing him sitting in the front row of the theater a lot. He seems to be born into a noble family.

C: 这是怎么回事？
E: What's going on?

C: 「振兴计划」已经进行到最关键的攻坚阶段了！我们必须发扬虎克老大提倡的鼹鼠党精神，一鼓作气，埋头苦干，坚定不移！
E: The Moles' Reinvigoration Plan has reached a critical stage! We must carry forward the spirit of the Moles advocated by Boss Hook! Now's no time to waver! March onward!

C: 无所谓，不去理会，信念的破碎又或是懒惰的罪，
E: Whatever the pain, however they complain. With shattered faith led astray from the lane, sinful indolence is the ultimate drain.
...Yeah.

C: 等、等等！那个…我看你虽然年纪不大，倒是摆出了一副饱经世事的神态嘛？能不能帮我这老兵一个忙？
E: W—Wait! Hmm... You look young, but your face seems to suggest you are quite experienced. Can you do this old soldier a favor?

C: 这不是什么新的诈骗技巧吧？他工作的地方应该是军事重地才对，你们是怎么……
E: You better not be trying to scam me. He's working in a top secret military area. How did you manage to...

C: 这是…初雪八落？是老爸拜托你给我买的吗？
E: These are... First Snows? Did my dad ask you to buy these for me?

C: 我真是吃饱了撑的…
E: I really put my foot in it...

C: 选项2是错误的。
E: Option 2 is incorrect.

C: 事先提醒您，这些题目的难度可不低…答不上来也不丢人哦。不多说了，看题面吧。
E: I would like to remind you in advance that these questions are far from simple... and it's no shame to get them wrong. Onto the quiz, then.

C: 当然没问题！您尽管看，慢慢来。
E: No problem at all! Just take your time and think things over.

C: 咦？您的意思是……
E: Hmm? Do you mean...

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 转达希露瓦的话…
E: Relay Serval's reply...

C: 塔米拉小姐的灵魂是指？
E: What do you mean by Tamila's soul?

C: 不，没关系，我到也不是非要看那样的小说…最近我也想突破一下舒适圈，看看以前没读过的类型，也许就会打开新世界的大门呢。
E: No, that's okay. I don't really have to read that kind of novel... I've decided to break out of my comfort zone recently and delve into some genres that I haven't read before. Perhaps it'll open up a pathway to a whole new world for me.

C: 嘿嘿，多谢！
E: Hehe, thank you!

C: 哈哈，那可真是太好了！那么，你就是我们「会社」的一份子了。
E: Hahaha, good! You're now a member of the Society.

C: 这…因在矿井长时间劳作造成腰间盘突出…？这个真的有用吗……
E: L—Lumbar disc herniation due to prolonged manual labor in the mines...? Is this excuse going to work?

C: 行了行了，我的休闲时间是有限的——你先去歌德宾馆大堂等我一下，我收拾收拾就来！
E: Alright alright, I only have so much time to relax — Go wait for me in the Goethe Hotel lobby and I'll be there soon!

C: 你在告示板的角落里发现了这样一张纸条——
E: You found a note in a corner of the notice board that says:

C: 「正当权益会社——会员 拉雯妮 发布了一则委托。有意向提供协助的社友请前往面洽！」
E: "Lavonne, a member of the Rightful Rights Society, has issued an assignment. Please contact Lavonne if you are interested in offering your help!"

C: 老人家，裂界里危险啊！
E: It's dangerous to be in the Fragmentum!

C: …你说话啊。难道这是真的？
E: ...Please say something. Is that true?

C: 我、我啥也没说！不敢了，我下次真不敢了！我保证！我一定找份正经工作，绝不再做这种坑蒙拐骗的事了……
E: I—I didn't say anything! I won't... I won't do it again! I promise! I'll go get a proper job, I'll never steal or rob or lie ever again...

C: 哦？这难道是你的设计图纸？介意让我观摩观摩吗，大兵？
E: Oh, are these your design blueprints? Mind if I have a look, soldier?

C: （看来海滩也没有其他情况了。总之，先把求救信交给跃渊处理吧。）
E: (It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening on the beach. I should hand this letter over to Yueyuan.)

C: （总之先打开看看，再考虑怎么办吧。）
E: (Let's take a look for now and decide what to do from there.)

C: （落难者好像已经度过了最初的危机，这个漂流瓶应该怎么办呢？）
E: (The castaway seems to have overcome their initial hardships. What should I do with this drift bottle?)

C: （看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
E: (It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)

C: （跃渊说护珠人已经认可了我的能力，我可以独立处理巡逻中产生的情况。）
E: (Yueyuan said that the Pearlkeepers have already recognized my talents and that I can deal with anything I encounter on patrol alone.)

C: 我只是想试试不同选项的结果。
E: I just want to see what happens when I try something different.

C: 你端起茶杯，揭开盖子，望着杯中漆黑一片又夹杂着某种可疑的蓝紫色液体，你犹豫了片刻。
E: You pick up the teacup, remove the lid, and gaze at the questionable blue-purple liquid in the cup. You can't help but hesitate for a moment.

C: 「烈焰浓茶」新品的颜色让你想起了在星穹列车中凝望银河的时候，车窗外那片陌生又瑰丽的星空，静谧而壮丽，静谧得让你发自内心地恐惧。但话又说回来，星空不再静谧，这听起来反而更令人害怕……
E: The color of the new Flaming Potent Tea reminds you of the magnificent yet eerie starry sky outside the Astral Express. It is so quiet and magnificent that it inspires a sense of awe, even fear. But then again, if the starry sky were no longer quiet, it would be even more frightening...

C: 哎哟，本来我瞧着你喝下去的表情估摸着这次肯定稳了。没想到这道新品竟有令人昏睡的副作用。
E: Alas, I thought this tea would work when I saw how serene your face looked, but I didn't expect it to cause drowsiness.

C: 火焰在炉中劈啪作响，燥热滚烫。多亏山之民那结实的皮肉与强韧的体魄，否则一般人怕是很难长时间忍受如此高热的环境。
E: The blazing furnace crackles with flames, scorching intensely. It is fortunate that Mountain Dwellers have hardy skin and tenacious constitution — the average person would be unable to withstand such a blistering environment for a long time.

C: 在漫漫银河之中，究竟有多少上位存在每天接收着这样的顶礼膜拜？有形的你已经无法数清，更何况还有像信用点这样于无形之中令人屈膝的存在。唉，生活不易啊。
E: Amid the vast cosmic expanse, exactly how many superior beings receive such obeisance every day? You've already lost count of the tangible ones, let alone the people prostrating before intangible forces like credits. *sigh* Life is tough.

C: 奥赫玛…真是座神奇的城市。
E: Okhema... certainly is an interesting city.

C: 博识学会的维里塔斯•拉帝奥教授表示，根据「赞达尔回归原理」，翁法罗斯必将衍生出文明，其忆质内容会成为文明演化的重要依据。
E: Dr. Veritas Ratio of the Intelligentsia Guild stated that, according to the "Zandar Recurrence Theorem," Amphoreus will inevitably give rise to civilization, and its memoria content will serve as a key foundation for the evolution of that civilization.

C: 早已融入城镇生活的大地兽们，告别了风餐露宿的野外生活。
E: The dromas said farewell to life in the wilderness, and grew accustomed to city life.

C: 哈哈…朋友，要是真的打仗了，恐怕跑到哪里都安全不了吧。
E: Haha... My friend. If it really came to war, I fear there would be no safe place to run to.

C: 我没有忘。寄人篱下，做那金发僭主挥之即来的剑锋，这日子总会有个头的。
E: I have not forgotten. We serve as the mercenary blade of the blonde tyrant, dependent on her for our existence. However, these days shall come to an end.

C: 沉重的门扉无法推动，门上涟漪般的纹路中心镶嵌着一个神秘符号，或许这和什么预言有关。真麻烦，早知道在贝洛伯格的时候，就该找老桑博学个开锁速成术。
E: A heavy door resists your push. At its center, rippling patterns surround a mysterious symbol, possibly tied to some prophecy. What a hassle — if only you'd learned lock-picking from old Sampo back in Belobog.

C: 岩壁上的壁画在长久侵蚀下已经有些斑驳，画中的每一笔都在述说着树庭的荣光：第一本传世典籍在此诞生，七位贤者在此现世……
E: The mural on the rock face has been weathered over time, its every stroke recounting the glory of the Grove: the creation of the first sacred text, the emergence of the seven sages...

C: 后续呢？
E: What happens next?

C: 布利萨城不日便沦陷了。可怜布利萨王，也算是个忧国忧民的城主，如今却落得如此境地……
E: The city of Bulsa fell in days. The poor king of Bulsa... To see a man that cared for his city and people fall so far...

C: 啊，到我了，到我了！
E: Ah, it's my turn, it's my turn!

C: 一个曾经听过的数学难题。
E: Here's a math problem I once heard.

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>门扉两边的壁画上</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>on the murals flanking the doors</color>...

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I have gathered all the nymphs here.

C: 等等…所以你选了什么？
E: Hold on... What were your bets again?

C: 随着光芒的消逝，你注意到壁画上的场景似乎也开始褪色、变换——
E: As the glow dims, you notice the scenes in the mural also begin to fade and shift —

C: 嗯，没错，而且不止一个人呢。那位{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}也送了很多东西给需要的人，不过他们之后可能会有些忙…我先送你回家，路上我们可以聊聊……
E: Yes, that's right, and it's not just one person. That {F#big sister}{M#big brother} has sent a lot of things to people in need too, though they might be a bit busy afterward... I'll take you home, and we can chat on the way...

C: 现在情况紧急，没时间慢悠悠地剥离天空的神权了。
E: Time is of the essence — there's no time to slowly extract Sky's authority.

C: 这边马上就不安全了，大家收拾收拾东西，赶紧和圣城卫士一起去避难处吧！
E: This place is no longer safe. Everyone, pack up and go to the shelter with the Holy City Guards!

C: 去吧，完成使命，你们的。
E: Go. Fulfill the duty, your duty.

C: 难道这就是所谓的再创世，而你脚下的奥赫玛也会变成一片虚空？
E: Is this what Era Nova truly means? Will the Okhema beneath your feet also fade into nothingness?

C: 不再聆听「雨中」。
E: Stop listening to "In the Rain."

C: 这就是无名客的使命，不是吗？
E: That is the mission of the Nameless, isn't it?

C: 装有成袋面粉的板车，似乎在等待船只将它们运走。
E: A cart stacked with sacks of flour, ready to be shipped out by boat.

C: 晕乎乎——坛子晕乎乎——飞来又飞去——飞去又飞来——晕…停停停，别看了，再看你也要晕了。
E: Whoa, dizzy... those amphorae are flying... spinning... looping... Okay, okay, stop looking, or you'll start spinning too.

C: 「理性之半神」阿那克萨戈拉斯，生于光历<unbreak>4065</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年。
E: Anaxagoras, the Demigod of Reason. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>4065</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>.

C: 泰坦打星神，你站谁？
E: Titan versus Aeon, whose side would you take?

C: 我~喜~欢~吃~说~话~特~别~慢~的~鱼~
E: I~ like~ to~ eat~ fish~ that~ talk~ slow~

C: 挺起胸…血脉…指引你还乡……
E: Stand tall... bloodline... guiding you home...

C: 愿我们都能在鲜花芬芳的西风彼岸重聚！
E: May we reunite on the fragrant shores of the western wind!

C: 独守深海千年的歌者曾在此奏唱…奏唱她巡游过的支离岁月。
E: The singer who kept to the deep sea for a thousand years once sang here... of the fragmented years through which she wandered.

C: 这只游龙臂鞲在你眼中，它是战友的信任与默契；在我看来，它只是支工巧的臂鞲，趁手，好用…陪伴我至今，又何必刻意摘下。
E: To you, this Roaming Dragon Bracer represents trust and camaraderie between comrades. To me, it's just a well-crafted bracer: practical and convenient... It's been with me all this time, so why bother taking it off?

C: 旅者，欢迎来到大墓！
E: Greetings, traveler! Welcome to the Great Tomb!

C: 闪…电…虫…了…吧！
E: To become... the lightning nymph... at last!

C: 我是不会放弃这些电路板的喀！我之所以会登上这里，就是因为爱它们喀！
E: I will never abandon these circuit boards, crrk! The only reason I came up here was because I love them, crrk!

C: 如果拔出来，详细看看年份出处，肯定能成为名满宇宙的至宝……
E: If we pull it out and examine its year and origin, it could become a treasure renowned throughout the universe...

C: 我发誓，我绝不是故意在这条路上狂奔且肇事逃逸的，当时真有只虫在背后追杀我啊……
E: I swear, I was not deliberately running wild on this road or fleeing the scene. There truly was a nymph chasing me and trying to kill me...

C: 祝你好运。
E: Good luck.

C: …感激不尽！我们这就出发，目标：残响回廊！
E: ...I'm so grateful! Let's go now. Our target: The Corridor of Fading Echoes!

C: 希望我们很快还能再见，{NICKNAME}！
E: Hope to see you soon, {NICKNAME}!

C: 舱段已封锁，是否进入。
E: The zone has been sealed off. Do we enter?

C: （别发呆了！）
E: (Stop gawking!)

C: （刚刚是你在叫吗？）
E: (Were you the one calling out just now?)

C: 算了，还是不碰了。
E: Forget it. Better not touch it.

C: 对未知时刻报以无穷的好奇，这就是推动科技发展的源动力。如果说好奇也有罪，那我认罪。
E: The thirst towards the unknown is what advances technology. If curiosity is a sin, then I plead guilty.

C: 呀！这么说，人家忘了一个很重要的问题！{NICKNAME}现在多大啦？
E: Oh! That reminds me! I forgot to ask an important question! {NICKNAME}, how old are you?

C: 不过…嘻嘻，人家会很开心，刚刚踏入这个世界，就遇到了{NICKNAME}。
E: But... hehe, I'm so happy that the moment I stepped into this world, I met you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 星核的体质不能一概而论。
E: Not all Stellarons have the same constitution.

C: …能想出这个字，{NICKNAME}真的是个天才呢。
E: ...Only someone like you, {NICKNAME}, could come up something with that.

C: 不对吧…如果是这样，为什么还有那么多奇奇怪怪的神呢？ 如果有一位「让迷迷永不掉毛之神」，它也算是无所不能吗？
E: Wait, that can't be right... if that's true, then why are there so many strange gods? If there was a "god who ensures Mem never loses her fur," would that be considered omnipotent too?

C: 神和我们应该还是有区别的吧？不然大家为什么会想成为神呢？
E: There must be a difference between gods and us, right? Otherwise, why would anyone ever want to become a god?

C: 嗯！人家也这么觉得！也许，这就是我刚才说不出的感受……
E: Hmm! I feel the same! Maybe that's the feeling I couldn't quite put into words earlier...

C: 不过，人家有时也会这样想啦——在寒冷的日子里，就算只能回忆起「有件事曾经让我温暖」，是不是也已经足够啦？
E: But sometimes, I think — even if all you can recall on cold days is that "there was something that once brought me warmth," wouldn't that be enough?

C: 这…可能是人家太小，还从来没有失眠过，也不知道什么小技巧…只能之后再打听一下了。
E: Hmm... Maybe I'm too young. I've never had insomnia before, so I don't know any tricks... I'll have to ask around later.

C: 你下次再来罢，老夫的测试内容可不会一直这么简单。
E: Come back next time. My test won't always be so easy.

C: 行，那等你有空再来。
E: That's fine. Come back when you have time.

C: 要是我那些蠢货徒弟能有你这样的干劲儿就好了。
E: If only my blockheaded apprentices have your drive.

C: 没事，等你方便了之后再来找我吧。
E: All good. Just come find me when it's convenient for you.

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 当然大有不同啦。毕竟这是由景元将军请来的尊贵客人游览时顺手操作留下的记录……
E: Of course it's different. After all, this is building up a record of operational work by General Jing Yuan's esteemed guest.

C: 好吧，我就不过问了。
E: Alright, I won't ask.

C: 不对不对不对！你是在说我不够聪明？
E: Wait, no, no, no! Are you saying I'm not smart enough?

C: 我再准备下。
E: I need a moment to get ready.

C: 其实你的棋局设计的不错。
E: Those were some clever puzzles.

C: 你有所不知，像我这样的还有四个。只有把我们四位都召集起来，「老大」才会出来。平时没什么事，它老人家不会轻易露面的。
E: You might not be aware, but there are four of us who look alike. Only when all four of us come together does the Boss deign to grace us with their presence. Otherwise, normally nobody gets to see them.

C: 为了让不熟悉「枘凿六合」的玩家了解到本系列之原点，作为系列一周年重要作品之一，我们选择了对「枘凿六合」进行重制。
E: To acquaint gamers unfamiliar with Hexanexus with the series' origin, we decided to remake and release the game as a cornerstone of the series' first anniversary celebrations.

C: 我猜是因为好奇心？你明明可以立刻通过，但却没有选择这么做。
E: I'm guessing because of curiosity? You could have cleared it with ease, but yet did not choose to do so.

C: 哈哈，你可真会开玩笑，坏掉什么的…说得就好像我是个迷钟一样。
E: Haha, you've got jokes. What's this about being broken... You make it sound like I'm a Ticker.

C: 奖励？校庆有这种活动吗…不好意思，交班的同学没讲，具体我也不太了解……
E: Prize? Does the school celebration have such an event... Sorry, the student who handed over to me didn't brief me, so I'm not too sure on the details...

C: 刚才怎么不说？
E: Why didn't you say this before?

C: 说起来，之前在浴场见到过一个奇怪的人台，不知道它还在不在……
E: Speaking of which, I saw a strange mannequin at the baths. I wonder if it's still there...

C: 再次感谢你的协助，贵客。
E: Thank you once again for your aid, esteemed guest.

C: 再见，期待你的好消息。
E: Goodbye, I await good news from you.

C: 嗯…有位织者通晓时间的哲理。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>覆盖靛石碎片的通路尽头</color>，等待着洞见真实的机会。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who understands the philosophy of time. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff> at the end of the pathway covered with indigo fragments</color>, patiently awaiting the moment to unveil the truth.

C: 多谢你了，贵客。但曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「人无法同时阅读两本书。」
E: Thank you, my esteemed guest. But a wise man once said, "No man can read two books at the same time."

C: 塔兰顿的法槌落下尚需时间呢，您先听我一言再做判断吧~
E: It will take some time for the gavel of Talanton to fall. Why not hear me out before you make your decision?

C: 唉！骗子不怕碰见恶棍，也不怕碰见同行。只怕遇见你这样的小鬼，天真得像只云羊，白亏了我精心设计的圈套。
E: Let me tell you! A trickster isn't scared of villains or fellow deceivers. What they're really scared of is punks like you! Naïve little sheep that waste all the effort we put into our traps!

C: 唔…头好晕……您对自己试过这招吗？
E: Ugh... I'm so dizzy... Have you tried that move on yourself before?

C: 桀桀——每回他们喝得不省人事，我就偷偷摘走一颗浪尖上的珍珠。她直到最后还没发现，还疑心浪头怎么秃顶了。
E: Crrrkk... They'd be blackout drunk every time, then I'd steal away a pearl from the crest of the wave. She never noticed, and even thought the wave was balding.

C: 太可怕了，这家伙！
E: That's so scary!

C: 扎格列斯老祖在瑟希斯神体陨灭时如此评价。
E: That was what ancestor Zagreus said when Cerces' divine body fell.

C: 把大家叫出来就为了这个啊。
E: So that's what this was all about.

C: 它到底忙什么去了？
E: What exactly is it busy doing?

C: 不许吃我的陀螺！
E: Stop eating my spinning top!

C: 桀桀桀桀！有被吓到吗？
E: Hehehehe! Did I spook ya?

C: 好一个「时间就是金钱」。
E: Taking "time is money" quite literally, huh?

C: 你打算进入「小猪」的房间。小心，别让它们溜走了。
E: You're about to enter the "piggies" room. Be careful not to let them escape.

C: 得了，把最后一段给我就行。
E: Just give me the last stanza.

C: …好吧，给你。
E: ...Alright, you can have it.

C: 其实……
E: Well...

C: …突然就玩黑暗兵法？
E: ...It got dark all of a sudden.

C: 从某种意义上说，黑潮和那位恐怖剑士，这些都是只是明面上的敌人。它们或许都只是现象。某种由世界真正的威胁所连带产生的现象。
E: In a way, the black tide and that swordmaster are just threats on the surface. They might be symptoms of a greater danger looming over the world.

C: 银卷的问题是——「一切事物的答案在何处」，让我布置一下……
E: Its question is — "Where is the answer to everything?" Let me set the ceremony up...

C: 先不打扰了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 哗啦，让人想起了过往呢，但我不可以一直呆在过去的回忆中，我们继续吧。
E: *whoosh* It brings back memories. But I can't stay in the past forever. Let's move on.

C: 刚刚有个怪物差点坐浮台上来了，已经被我用大铁球撞进冥河里去啦。
E: A monster almost got onto the floating platform just now, but I knocked it into the River of Souls with a giant iron ball.

C: 我是…伊来内。
E: I am... Alain.

C: 时间已经不多了…属于我的时间。
E: Because... my time is almost up.

C: 目前统计在册的火种匣共有三百二十个，我依据档案中的信息排除了大半…余火一定在剩下的这些火种匣里！
E: There are a total of <unbreak>320</unbreak> registered Coreflame Caskets. I've managed to eliminate most of them based on archival records... The ember must be in one of the remaining ones!

C: 这是天父的赎罪膏油…只要为泰坦断崖的篝火添加膏油，天父就会原谅一切罪过，在末日中准许你前往下一个黄金世。
E: This is the Atoning Balm of the sky father... We claim that just a single drop of this into the bonfire in Titan Cliff will atone for all your sins, and the sky father will forgive you and grant you passage to the next Era Chrysea in the apocalypse.

C: 那…还是换个话题吧。既然你连巡猎和丰饶的死仇都不清楚，很多事情解释起来太费劲了。
E: In that case... let's just change the subject. If you don't know about the feud between The Hunt and the Abundance, I'm afraid there's just too much to explain.

C: 不要紧，素裳姑娘——交给我吧。
E: Don't worry, Miss Sushang — leave it to me.

C: 奇怪的事情又出现了。寒气浮上你的背脊，朦胧水雾罩住你的眼睛——异象并不陌生，你很熟悉，又一次。
E: The strange thing happened again. A chill creeps up your spine, mist clouds your eyes, and you see the familiar vision appearing again.

C: 原来你还在看着我？
E: You are still watching me?

C: 黑塔的声音将你分散的精力拉了回来。
E: Herta's voice brings your distracted mind back.

C: 有多单调？
E: How bland will they be?

C: 所以祂和这事无关？
E: So Lan has nothing to do with this matter?

C: 「不要对星神产生不必要的依恋。」黑塔皱着眉头嫌弃你，「虽然这次见不到祂啰，不过你也不会白费力气，模拟宇宙也可能推演出一些历史上不存在的命途痕迹。虽然祂不会来了…」
E: "Don't get too attached to an Aeon." Herta frowns at you with disgust. "Although you can't meet Lan this time, your effort won't go to waste, as the Simulated Universe might reveal some traces of the Path that aren't recorded in history. Still, Lan won't be coming..."

C: 你更好奇他被谋命的理由…可惜他似乎并不关心自己。
E: You are more curious about why he was murdered... But unfortunately, it seems he doesn't care about himself.

C: 你嗅了嗅鼻子…的确不是橙子味的。
E: You sniff it... and it does not smell like oranges.

C: 而你要做的，就是在贡多拉抵达目的地前，克制住摘下她*面罩*的欲望！
E: And all you have to do is to resist the urge to remove her *mask* before your gondola reaches its destination!

C: 他与弟弟二人将合唱的声音散播至天外时，还未想到自己今后将在洪流中被推至*头戴王环*的皇侯之位——他最终手弑其弟，合唱的歌声中从此永远少去一重音程。
E: When he and his younger brother spread the song of their duet beyond the skies, he never imagined that he would thereafter be thrust into the role of the crown prince *bearing the crown* in the chaos. He would slay his brother, and the duet would forever have lost half of its voice.

C: 「异乡人…一直在等你。『开拓』，我知道你。」他嗫嚅着——这位筑城者一直在等待那艘贡多拉回来，「三次…我遇见你。『开拓』能跨越寰宇，不断旅行。如果能遇见，可以帮我跟她说…别走…？」
E: "Outsider... I've been waiting for you. The Trailblaze, I know you." He mumbles. This Architect has been awaiting the return of the gondola all this time, "Three times... I've met you. The Trailblaze can traverse stars for eternity. If you happen to meet her, could I ask you to help me tell her... not to go...?"

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了泯灭帮火焰般的嘶吼。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into the crackling howls rising from the throats of the Annihilation Gang.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: {NICKNAME}，不多废话。我叫你来玩个有趣的「交换隐藏情报」游戏。我这儿有些重磅发现，绝对让你吓一跳。不过，你得拿点东西跟我换。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'll keep it snappy. I called you here to play an interesting game of "trading secret intel." I've made some major discoveries that'll definitely blow your mind. But, you've got to get something for me in exchange.

C: 「你这样等，他是不会出现的，我了解那个小鬼。」黑塔叹了口气，「得恐吓他！斯蒂芬•劳艾德，听得见吗？出来见{NICKNAME}，为了模拟宇宙——别害怕，阮•梅和螺丝咕姆都不在。」
E: "If you wait, he won't appear. I know this little brat." Herta sighs, "We need to scare him! Stephen Lloyd, can you hear me? Come out and meet {NICKNAME} — for the Simulated Universe, don't be afraid. Ruan Mei and Screwllum are not here."

C: 「万机之王，「博识尊」。哪怕是模拟的，也让我想起第一次被祂瞥视的『时刻』。」阮•梅闭目，她的句尾带有一丝微小的颤抖，「我也看到了。」
E: "Monarch of Myriad Machines, Nous. Even if it's just a simulation, I was reminded of the first moment I was glimpsed by THEM." Ruan Mei's eyes are closed, the end of her sentence marked with a sliver of tremor. "I can see it too."

C: 「活跃？」黑塔问，「什么样的活跃？好的还是坏的？！」
E: "Activity?" Herta asks. "What kind of activity? Is it good or bad?"

C: 祂不再言语，这便是答案的所有。或许你问出了口；或许没有。一切已然发生了。
E: THEY utter a word no more, and that is all there is to answer. You might have asked THEM something, or you might not. Everything has already happened.

C: 判定「自我认知」- 我不可以知道。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I can't know.

C: 你坐在机械帝国的飞艇上，认真思考接下来的任务：与有机生命进行一场战争——这是你的使命。
E: In an aircraft of the Machine Empire, you ponder about your upcoming task — waging a war against the organic lives. It is your mission.

C: 这是在遥远的未来，由虚构史学家留下的故事：那人在帝皇的墓前推导了伍仟三佰陆拾捌次，没有一次例外。但彼时无人相信他破解了反有机方程，他也未曾将其启用。归来后，他依旧一穷二白。
E: This is a story taking place in the distant future written by a History Fictionologist: The person derived the answer from the equation <unbreak>5368</unbreak> times, and every attempt of his succeeded. Yet, no one believed he had solved the Anti-Organic Equation at that time, and he had never activated it. When he returned, he remained just as poor as before.

C: 宇宙会记得，在那已成过去的十数纪，帝皇的庄严不可违背——可惜于祂而言，帝国的一生只是两个「时刻」。
E: The past dozen eras when the emperor's dominance reigned supreme will be remembered by the universe. Yet, the entire duration of the empire is reduced to merely two "Instants" in the eye of Nous.

C: 那是<color=#dbc291ff>路易斯•弗莱明</color>最后一次对外露面，也是在那场盛典上，公司捕捉到了<color=#dbc291ff>浮黎</color>的身影。
E: That was <color=#dbc291ff>Louis Fleming</color>'s last public appearance. It was also at that event the IPC caught sight of <color=#dbc291ff>Fuli</color>.

C: 重建世界。
E: Rebuild the world.

C: 你看到有人在向你招手，你未来的朋友，他们穿着邋遢，疲惫里却带着笑意。
E: You see someone waving to you, a future friend. They look a little rough around the edges, exhausted, but still smiling.

C: 你把枪尖拔出，啜饮自己的鲜血。它那样甘甜，带着长生主的赐福，与你共同见证了诸多国度与族群的覆灭…或许今天你也会见证自己的覆灭。
E: Pulling the speartip out, you imbibe of your own blood. It tastes sweet, imbued with the blessing of the Master of Immortality, and has witnessed alongside you the annihilation of many a nation or people... Perhaps today you'll come to witness your own annihilation.

C: 他们说，你简直是世界上最酷的科学家！
E: They say you're simply the coolest scientist in the whole world!

C: 你无兴趣找到问题的答案，溃烂的自我已濒临瓦解，你呆滞地观察着，像是婴孩见证蚁穴被大雨淹没，蚂蚁浮在水面，待到天晴，它们便会在泥土里腐朽。
E: You have no interest in finding the answer to the problem. You dully observe your festering self to be verging on collapse, like a baby watching an anthill being flooded by the rains. The ants float on the water until the weather clears, and they start to rot into the soil.

C: 保安强行夺走了那枚铜制指环。
E: Security takes the copper ring from your hand by force.

C: 沉默不语，起身离开。
E: Stay silent and leave.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>斯坦德•卡德尔</color>走上演讲台，星空生态学派的首席学士。锐利的复眼把争论包裹，他轻咳一声，旋即将噪音溺毙。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Stander Dahl</color>, chief scholar of the Astral Ecology School, walks onto the podium. Sharp compound eyes take in the debate — he clears his throat, silencing the noise.

C: 这是一场伟大的胜利！
E: This is an honorable victory!

C: 不过这和你没有关系，你只是个刚刚失业的科研助理。
E: But this has nothing to do with you. You are merely a recently-unemployed research assistant.

C: 于是，你们终于看清信号的本质——<color=#dbc291ff>渗透进虚数背景的涟漪。</color>它从未知的点诞生，又在遥不可及的范围外消失。只要仍在涟漪的范围内，神秘的误差就会进入实验数据当中。
E: And so, you all finally ascertain the signal's true nature — <color=#dbc291ff>a rippling wave that permeated into the Imaginary background.</color> It's born from an unknown point and disappears beyond an unfathomable range. As long as it is within the ripple's range, the mysterious error will be captured in the experimental data.

C: 继续回溯！
E: Continue backtracking!

C: 身份验证完成，天才俱乐部#4……
E: Identity verification complete. Genius Society #4...

C: 「我已经再三强调，我不是虚构出来的！」他的身旁，一名虚构史学家怒吼。
E: "I've already told you umpteenth times! I'm not fictional!" A History Fictionologist yells out angrily beside him.

C: 「走吧，{NICKNAME}，演算结束。」
E: "Let's go, {NICKNAME}. The extrapolation has ended."

C: 窗外的哭喊声，不过是鸟儿们的啸叫，它们在迎接一场盛大的婚礼。冰冷的液体滴落到你的腿上，你感到一阵心惊。
E: The screams you hear out the window are simply the calls of birds celebrating a lavish wedding ceremony. A freezing liquid drips onto your leg as you feel a shock.

C: 「我们可以解决你的匮乏——给你一个*机会*，得到你想要的东西。」疤眼夫人说。
E: "We can solve your deprivation by offering you a 'chance' to get what you want," Madam Scarred Eye adds.

C: 你记得星际和平指南上的描述：它们的名字叫「序列扑满」，跨维度生物，一生中大部分时间，花在进食和逃跑。
E: You remember the description written in the Interastral Peace Guide. The creatures are called Sequence Trotters, and they are trans-latitudinal organisms. They spend most time of their lives eating and escaping.

C: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。此刻，一位骑士认为你非常喜欢咕咕钟…
E: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. One of the knights thinks you are a fan of cuckoo clocks...

C: 你已完全跟不上了…瞎蒙一个吧！
E: You can't keep up at all... Just choose a random one!

C: 这是你获得升职的第三天！不知为何，你已经成为整座高楼空地的拥有者！
E: This is your third day after being promoted! For some reason, you have become the owner of all the space in the entire high-rise!

C: 「吾被囚禁在此片碎镜中已久。」镜中的揽镜人说，「信仰『纯美』…吾会回应你的祈愿。」
E: "I've been imprisoned in this mirror fragment for a long time. Believe in the Beauty, and I will grant all your wishes," says the Mirror Holder in the mirror.

C: 吉巴欧萝卜先生！又是你。恭喜你，你发现了像素世界的隐藏关卡！
E: Mr. Jibaou the radish! Glad to see you again. Congratulations on discovering the hidden stage of the Pixel World!

C: 走到控制室的尽头，三台故障严重的同化单元瘫倒在一起，你将大脑连接进另一个位面，以完成复杂的三进制演算。
E: Walking to the end of the control room, you find three severely broken assimilation units all bricked together. You hook up your brain to another plane and complete complex trinary extrapolations.

C: 「窥视命运，就像从积木底部抽走部件，倘若过于贪婪，预示便会轰然倒塌，」占卜师将手放在牌堆上，「而你，又希望从中看到什么？」
E: "Glimpsing into your destiny is akin to pulling blocks from the bottom of a tower. If one is too greedy, the entire prophecy will tumble." The soothsayer places her hands on the card stacks. "So, what do you wish to see?"

C: 「亚共晶糖果，金属纯度<unbreak>29</unbreak>％，不仅复刻了合金的口感，甚至连咀嚼时的铁锈味也能完美复现。」
E: "Hypoeutectic candy, <unbreak>29</unbreak> percent pure metal. Not only does it replicate that classic alloy flavor, that authentic rust taste really comes through when you chew, too."

C: 你奄奄一息地走进阿莉达星的宾馆，不知道为什么，这里的居民在做事时，个个都显得慢条斯理又心不在焉。
E: You enter a hotel on the Alda Star System on the brink of death. You have no idea why, but it seems that all of the residents here seem extremely slow and absent-minded with everything they do.

C: 「在制作出本应用前，裘斯博士曾长年投身于选择困难症的治疗研究。但任何试图通过大数据分析、个性化推荐以及药物对选择困难症患者的治疗，都以失败告终。」
E: "Before developing this app, Doctor Joss dedicated many years to the treatment of decision paralysis. However, all his attempts to treat decision paralysis in patients via big data analysis, personalized recommendations, or medication ended in failure."

C: 「两个盒子，吃下菠萝，拿走奖金，吃下面包，滚蛋走人。」主持人的复眼倒映出狂热的观众，比起胜利，他们更想看失败。
E: "There are two boxes left. Eat the pineapple and take the prize or eat the bread and get lost." The manic faces of the audience are reflected in the host's compound eyes — They don't want to see you win. They want to see you fail.

C: 你现在是一缕意识，一缕完美学者的意识。耳畔博识学会的学者们争论不休，未来，混沌，进化，语言，你听到他们的呢喃，但毫无意义。
E: You are now but a thread of consciousness. A thread of consciousness belonging to a perfect scholar. The members of the Intelligentsia Guild clamor ceaselessly next to your ears, arguing about the future, chaos, evolution, and languages. You listen to them murmur on and find their words meaningless.

C: 在朋克洛德的暗网中，光这串0和1的数字组合，就能换来你一个月的设备维修费用。你望向幽深的海底，试图在可能性和见好就收里做出抉择。
E: In the dark web of Punklorde, this mere number combination of 0s and 1s is equivalent to an entire month's worth of equipment maintenance fees. You gaze into the unfathomable ocean, torn between the allure of vast opportunities and the peril of tempting fate.

C: 你瞪大眼珠子，试图用目光刺痛对手的眸子。两双眼睛如同上等的观赏金鱼，在空气中凸起，就差从眼眶里蹦出来，像陨石般相互碰撞。
E: You widen your eyes, trying to hurt your opponent's pupils with your gaze. Two pairs of eyes protrude in the air like the finest ornamental goldfish, almost popping out of their eye sockets to collide with each other like meteorites.

C: 你将将从酸甜的迷梦中醒来，第二道菜便被端上了餐桌。在开胃后，辅以另一段人生。你望向包厢对侧的眼睛，它将你包裹在七千秒的记忆里，令意识向着蘸碟里沉没。
E: As you wake up from the sweet yet sour unrealizable dream, the second course has been served to your table. After whetting your appetite, you're supplemented with another life. You look at the eyes across the room, and it bundles you up in <unbreak>7,000</unbreak> seconds of memory, sinking your consciousness into the plate of sauce.

C: 「天哪！您就是我的再生父母…」你拒绝了售货机的赞美，你可不想莫名多出来个售货机亲戚。
E: "Oh, you're like a second parent to me!" You decline the vending machine's praise, not wanting to add a strange vending machine to your family tree.

C: 但赞美声并未满足他的虚荣心，人群中传来了诸多质疑。他的眼神四下飘忽，急于寻找一位对手，来当面证明他的实力。于是，你们四目相对。
E: Yet the chorus of praise fails to sate his vanity, and a murmur of doubts arises from the crowd. His eyes dart about restlessly, anxiously seeking a challenger to prove his strength. And then, your eyes meet.

C: 你把画框精心包裹起来，就近卖给了一位口碑不错的妖怪收藏家。
E: You carefully wrap up the painting frame and sell it to a nearby monster collector with a decent reputation.

C: 不知走了多久，坚实的触感终于抵达你的脚尖。劫后余生，你长吁一口气，瘫倒在地上。
E: You can't tell how long you've walked, but a sturdy sensation finally meets your toes. Having survived the calamity, you let out a long sigh of relief and collapse to the ground.

C: 好一位勇士！就连悬锋城的本地观众，都不由得为你喝彩。
E: What a warrior! Even the local spectators at Castrum Kremnos can't help but cheer you on.

C: 当黄金世被灾厄的降临终结，狮子咬断云羊的脖子，强者的匕首刺进弱者的胸膛，无数的尸骸坠入冥河，河水为之截断，死亡也无暇引渡。
E: When the Era Chrysea came to an end in calamity, the strong devoured the weak. A lion's jaws crushed the throat of a lamb, a dagger struck deep into the helpless, and countless corpses flooded the River of Souls, bringing its flow to a halt. Even death faltered, overwhelmed and unable to ferry the fallen.

C: 其二为剑，在见证歌耳戈的勇武后，用神血精炼，被城邦累土拱卫，成为指向全能者的锋刃。
E: Next came a sword, tempered with divine blood after witnessing the heroics of Gorgo, guarded by the braves of the citadel, it became a blade that pointed defiantly at the omnipotent.

C: 当然，那奇妙的多洛斯是个例外。他们沉浸在欺诈翻飞之币的壮举中无法自拔，世代都在尝试再现伟大的骗局。
E: Of course, the remarkable Dolos is an exception. Enthralled by the exploits of the Coin of Whimsy, they have been engrossed for generations in attempting to recreate grand deceptions.

C: 用友亲之爱悬置心脏。
E: They hang the heart with the love of friends.

C: 每条丝线都是一种选择。
E: Each thread is a choice.

C: 可如此的选择，自然也带来代价。无限生长的生命，终于招致死亡的垂怜。
E: However, such choices naturally come with costs. Infinite growth of life ultimately invites the compassion of death.

C: 你如饥似渴地摄取书本里的每一个字，就像干旱过后的小麦在痛饮从天而降的甘霖。
E: You consume the text with a hunger so ravenous, it's as if your mind itself has been starved. Each word, is like rainfall upon a drought-stricken field, quenching your insatiable thirst for knowledge.

C: 因为人类所有的需求都能得到满足，没有饥饿寒冷和痛苦，未来的每一天都会如今天一般幸福，又有谁会需要预言？
E: Because all of humanity's needs were met, there was no hunger, cold, or pain, and every day in the future would be as happy as today. Who would need prophecies then?

C: 从此，空间如高山，岿然不动，让万物有依附之地；时间如长河，滚滚向前，令众生有变化之机。
E: From then on, space became a mountain — unmovable, allowing all things to reside within. Time became a river — tumbling forward, granting all things capable of change.

C: 艾格勒见大地上生机勃勃，自己的天上王国却冷冷落落，于是便想学着吉奥里亚的样子打造自己的作品。
E: Aquila saw the land filled with vitality, and noticed their own kingdom of sky was empty and cold, and thus decided to learn from Georios and forge creations of their own.

C: 但瑟希斯并未回应如此的赤忱。毕竟，理性也无法完全将爱拆解成道理和哲思。
E: But Cerces did not respond to such devotion. After all, even reason cannot fully deconstruct love into logic and philosophical thought.

C: 当艾格勒看清这个世界，世界便也在它的眼中。它的眼中发出炽热而绝对的光亮，盖过了「永夜之帷」和嵌于其上的群星。
E: When Aquila saw the world clearly, the world was also within their eyes. From their eyes came a blazing and absolute light, outshining the Veil of Evernight and the stars embedded upon it.

C: 但如果他们失败了，这片海岸就要永远被大海淹没。说罢，巨鲸便消失在海里。
E: But if they failed, the coastline would be swallowed by the ocean forever. With that, the great whale vanished into the depths.

C: 如此，巨人总算是除去了死敌的一件利器，但也仅此而已。
E: Thus, the giant had finally stripped its foe of one deadly weapon — But that was all.

C: 「啊，事先说好，我可没偷懒哦，只是来这里采采风。你看，这是我用麦穗编的头环，送给你啦。」
E: "Ah, just to be clear, I wasn't slacking off. I was just getting some creative inspiration here. Look, I made you this wreath from wheat stalks. It's yours!"

C: 父母
E: Parents

C: 路过此处时，你瞥见几本书摆放在一起，从光洁的封皮上看，像是那种填充书柜的大部头典籍，缺乏翻阅的痕迹。
E: You glimpse several books together as you pass by. Judging by the glossy covers, they seem to be the kind of thick space-fillers used to make a bookshelf look impressive. They show no signs of having actually been read.

C: 算了，不至于不至于。
E: Nah, it's not that bad.

C: …嗯？不好意思，我刚才在思考些事情！你是来要签名的吗？还是……
E: ...Hmm? Sorry, I was just thinking about something! Are you here for an autograph? Or...

C: ——可你只听星星们在云幕间如是说：「即使是新伦蒂尼恩东区最贫穷的工人，想到我们与公司共同拥有的财富，都会不由自主地挺起胸膛！」……
E: But you hear the stars in the sky saying, "Even the poorest worker in east New Londinium can't help but feel proud of the wealth we jointly own with the IPC!"

C: 你不敢继续往下想了——无论结果是好是坏。你发现自己比想象中还要胆小…体内的电子元件也在高温催化下开始产生化学反应。你感到晕眩。
E: Regardless of the outcome, you dare not continue your train of thought. You realize you are timider than you imagined yourself to be... and the electronic components in your body are also kicking off chemical reactions from the catalytic heat. You feel dizzy.

C: 你忘记了日期，又不知道哈洛-Ⅵ恰巧在那天离欧文利最近，而这导致卫星热力辐射使你的脸颊滚烫。他又向你传述星空生态学派的研究……
E: You forgot about the date and had no idea that Harlow-VI was in fact closest to Owenley on that day, and the satellite's thermal radiation made your cheeks burn red. Meanwhile, Dr. Howl continued to tell you about the research of Astral Ecology School...

C: 不过，你很快便放心下来。毕竟你有的是时间！你可是族群里最年幼的阿米巴黏菌，未来远远多于过去。你大可以想吃几天就吃几天——进食就是你的宿命！
