E: Your worries slip away before long. After all, you have plenty of time! You are the youngest in your Amoeba Slime Mold tribe. You have far more days ahead of you than behind. You realize that you can eat for as many days as you like. Eating is your destiny!

C: 好厉害的人，我不是对手……
E: You're so awesome. I definitely can't keep up...

C: 我成功了！
E: I did it!

C: 记得在那个时代，死亡曾经比现在更柔软、更温暖……
E: I remember that, back in those days, death was a lot softer and warmer than it is now...

C: 这里好漂亮喀…
E: It's beautiful here...

C: 喔，不对，用「沉默」来形容它恐怕不大合适。因为，你似乎听到了一阵若有若无的沉吟——
E: Mm, "quiet" isn't the right word to describe it, because at this moment, you seem to hear faint muttering...

C: 为什么不离开那里呢？
E: Why don't you leave the place then?

C: 支支吾吾地撂下几句让人摸不着头脑的话后，面前的男人一边连连摇头，一边颤抖地消失在剧院后的阴影下。
E: The man up ahead mutters some confusing words as his head shakes incessantly, before disappearing into the shadows of the theater.

C: 旁边两个箱子，看见没有？
E: Do you see the two chests over there?

C: 你打开了小宝箱，木板腐朽的气味扑鼻而来。
E: You open the small chest. The smell of rotten wood pervades your nostrils.

C: 真是一次…神奇的相遇。
E: This really was... an unusual encounter.

C: 这就是女人口中装着「不幸」的宝箱……
E: This is the chest that as the lady said contains bad luck...

C: 选择在你手上。
E: The choice is yours.

C: 虎克决定，这次算你赢！这是你的奖励，拿好了哦！
E: I, Hook, have decided that you win! Here is your prize. Take it!

C: （不说话装高手）
E: (Be quiet and act like a professional.)

C: 是的…你确信自己*感应*到了什么——在这宾馆的走廊尽头……
E: Yes... You are certain that you SENSE something at the end of this hotel hallway...

C: 等战争结束后，大家就能用它们盖更多更大的屋子，到时候再也不会有人挨冻了喀。
E: Once the war is over, everyone can build bigger houses out of them, and nobody will ever go cold again.

C: 已经把塑像调整到正确的状态了…回衣匠那里看看吧。
E: The statue has been adjusted to the correct state... Head back to the Garmentmaker and take a look.

C: 居然没那么臭，你想，而且意外的舒适。会是这只枕头和这床被子的原因吗？可这里为什么会有枕头和被子？
E: It's not as smelly as you assumed. It's surprisingly comfortable. Is it because of the pillow and blanket? What are these doing in a dumpster anyway?

C: 要是对不起有用，还要洞洞机做什么？
E: If sorry does anything, why would I need Diggertron?

C: 今天就先到这里——我们下次再一起玩吧！鼹鼠党，解散！各回各家睡大觉咯！
E: Time to call it a day. Let's play again next time! The Moles, dismissed! Go home and get some sleep!

C: 我跋涉千山、历经万难，终于抵达此处，只为一睹您神圣的尊容喀——
E: Through countless peaks and endless trials, I've journeyed here just to glimpse your divine presence, crrrk—

C: 噢，我也会飞。那没事了嗡~
E: Oh, I can fly too. Never mind then, buzz~

C: 就凭这份交情，我就再陪你聊几句。
E: I will talk with you for a moment out of respect for our friendship.

C: 别走过头了，爷在这儿呢，嘻嘻。
E: Don't walk too far. I'm right here. Hehe.

C: 你们的娱乐方式，还不如我「快递准时上门」快乐呢。
E: What you call entertainment is less fun than my courier's on-time performance.

C: 你该回到鹤运物流了。
E: You should get back to Heron Express.

C: 大胆！进了别人的地盘，不打声招呼，还想闹事儿。江湖上的规矩你不明白吗？
E: How dare you! Not only did you not ask for our permission to enter our territory, but now you want to make a scene. Don't you know about the unspoken rules of the land?

C: 妙啊！那就更不可能放过{F#她}{M#他}了。
E: Excellent points! All the more reason not to let {F#her}{M#him} go.

C: 总算舒服了！
E: Finally, some comfort!

C: 我们这比赛真的只是单纯的酬宾活动，而且优惠力度极大！
E: We really are just running a simple anniversary contest, and besides — everything's mega-discounted!

C: 您想啊，您只要花笔小钱，即可无限畅吃百年老字号的地道罗浮风味美食——全宇宙里还有比这性价比更高的活动吗？反正我是想不到了。
E: Think about it: For just a small price, you can eat as much of these famous Luofu snacks as you can fit inside you — is there honestly any better deal going right now in the whole universe? I don't know of any.

C: …呵呵。
E: ...Heh.

C: 仙舟有句老话说得好：「胜不骄，败不馁」！今年输了没事，明年记得也要来小店看看啊！
E: There's an old Xianzhou saying: "No arrogance in victory, no despair in defeat!" It doesn't matter that you lost this year's contest. Just remember to come back and check out next year's contest!

C: 我？我有试过啊。我比他坚持的时间还短呢。而且我一接进去，雷力这家伙就直呼心脏受不了。几次三番也只好作罢。
E: Me? I tried. I lasted even shorter than him. Also, the second I connected, Leili complained about how his heart can't take it. So after a few tries, I gave up on that idea.

C: 这肯定是你的错觉，你看看奖励就知道了。
E: You must be overthinking it. Look at the reward I gave you.

C: 好吧，给你。
E: All right. Here you are.

C: 学堂里的先生说过，「是时势造就英雄，而非英雄造就时势」，可我偏不信。
E: The abecedary in the lyceum always say that "it's the era that builds heroes, not heroes that build the era." I don't believe it.

C: 坏脾气的店长当然不会允许，这些东西可是用来卖的，他们来凑什么热闹？
E: Of course, the grumpy shopkeeper wouldn't allow this. He was trying to make a sale. What were these kids doing here causing him trouble?

C: 朋友，旅途辛劳，休息也是必不可少的一部分，要来坐坐吗？
E: My friend, you've traveled long. Rest is an imperative part of a journey. How about a seat?

C: 持明一族也会晕船吗？你无法克制自己的好奇心…或许回头可以问问丹恒。
E: Would Vidyadhara get seasick? You find it hard to contain your curiosity... Maybe you can ask Dan Heng later.

C: …之后的事之后再说吧。
E: ...That's stuff for later.

C: 今天的水果看着不够新鲜……
E: Today's fruits don't look fresh enough...

C: 两个光历年，我们终于…
E: O Kephale on high!

C: 刻法勒回应我了！
E: Kephale has responded to me!

C: 快撤到安全的地方吧！
E: We need to fall back to somewhere safe!

C: 得储备些应急药物！
E: Gotta stock up on some meds!

C: （把纽扣交给帕姆）
E: (Give Pom-Pom the button)

C: （还是再想想别的方法吧）
E: (Think of another way)

C: 你要是无所事事，可以去车窗边看看，那里的景色挺不错的。
E: If you've got nothing to do, you can go look outside the window. The view is spectacular.

C: 好哦，你要是有什么想吃的记得跟列车长说哦。
E: Great! Please don't hesitate to tell me if there's anything you want to eat.

C: 帕姆已经尽力想要回头，但还是做不到…呜呜，我是没用的列车长，屈服于痛苦了！
E: I tried my best to turn around, but I failed... Boohoo, I'm a useless conductor who succumbs to my pain!

C: 要不我蹲下来背你？
E: How about I carry you on my back?

C: 怎么可能，别想欺骗帕姆。虽然列车长没跟你一起冒险过，但在其他乘客那里，我也听说了。你明明就跟大家相处得很好嘛！
E: How's that possible? I know you must be lying. Although I've never gone on an adventure with you, I heard a lot about you from other passengers. You're getting along well with everyone!

C: 不过之前我们和空间站交情不错，姬子和艾丝妲达成了某种「资源补给协议」。
E: But before we had a good relationship with the space station, Himeko and Asta reached some kind of resource supply agreement.

C: 我去空间站问过了…
E: I asked around in the space station...

C: 还请你和威廉保持通信，如果回廊里又出了什么状况，他肯定是第一个知道消息的。
E: I hope you'll keep in touch with William. If anything happens here, William will be the first to know.

C: （这两处线索都指向了海滩更深处，到那边调查看看吧。）
E: (Both clues lead to deeper parts of the beach. I should investigate there.)

C: *电波滤音*行医市集处居民已经疏散了，现在就是你大显神威的时候了。
E: *electronic voice* The residents at the Healer's Market have been evacuated. Now it's time to show off what you're made of!

C: 「追猎行动」成功？
E: So, the "Hunting Operation" was a success?

C: 没错，还有很多……
E: Yeah, a lot more...

C: （果然不出所料。）
E: (As I suspected.)

C: 又过了一会……
E: A few moments later...

C: 看起来弱爆了……
E: Looks pathetic to me...

C: 是啊，何必和小孩子置气？这可不是你的作风。于是，你决定遵守游戏规则，同这位自大的小朋友公平对决——
E: Picking on kids is not your style at all. Therefore, you decide to follow the rules and play fair...

C: 是啊，何必和小孩子置气？这可不是你的作风。于是，你决定遵守游戏规则，同这位自大的小朋友公平对决——
E: Picking on kids is not your style at all. Therefore, you decide to follow the rules and play fair...

C: 「四大天王」之三
E: Third of the Formidable Four

C: 在你眼前的这位女性，看起来十分焦虑。
E: The girl before you appears very anxious.

C: 我告诉你——你每打碎一件补给容器，禁区的某位铁卫兄弟就得多加班三个小时，把新的容器放到原处……
E: You should know, for every supply vessel you break, that's three hours of overtime for someone in the restricted zone to replace it...

C: 天啊，太可怕了，还是别往下继续说了。呃，你懂这是什么意思吧？相信你一定懂。
E: Gosh, that's terrible. Stop right there. Uh, you know what that means, right? I'm sure you know.

C: 嗯…对于你的视觉感官来说，这地方似乎暗了点儿。不过，你会适应的…对吧？
E: Hmm... This place might seem a little too dark for you. Guess you will eventually get used to it, right?

C: 此处贴着一幅狂放不羁的画像…或者说，通缉令。画中的人物毛色灰白、雌雄莫辨，直视着你的眸子中流露出一股若即若离的生无可恋感。
E: There's an expressively unbridled portrait here... or rather, a wanted poster. The figure in the picture is predominantly grayish-white, androgynous, and looking straight at you with a sense of lukewarm lifelessness in their eyes.

C: 内陆平原的最东边零散分布着几个小城镇，它们的名字都无比拗口。除此以外，你没有发现什么有趣的东西。
E: Situated at the farthest east of the inland plain are some tiny settlements with names that are hard to pronounce. Other than this, you fail to discover anything noteworthy.

C: 内陆平原的东南方是一个被峡谷隔开的孤单国度，它的名字已经难以看清。灾难降临时，那里的人们一定绝望而无助。
E: Laying in the southeast of the inland plain is a deserted realm isolated by canyons. The name is no longer legible. When the calamity fell, its people must have been devastated.

C: 东北方有什么？
E: What is in the northeast?

C: 数数有多少钱。
E: Count how much money there is.

C: 菲多拉最近心情很好，她邀请我去搏击俱乐部观看比赛。
E: Fidora has been in high spirits lately, and she invites me to watch a bout at the Fight Club.

C: 再描述一下对话情景吧。
E: Describe the scenario for me once more.

C: 菲多拉最近学会了一首新歌。通过音频比对，我发现她的歌声与原曲差异很大。
E: Fidora has recently learned a new song. Through comparative audio analysis, I've discovered that her vocals are very different from the original.

C: 它的说话方式还是那么生硬，完全不懂得变通，没有一点儿正常社交的意思。
E: It still speaks so bluntly, doesn't know how to adapt at all, and doesn't convey any real sense of social interaction.
Two.

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 好风骨！可惜铁骨硬，终究解骨难啊…罢了，罢了。
E: Such character! Unfortunately, those tough bones of yours could well run into trouble... Never mind. Never mind.

C: 而来信者似乎是第二次向这位「逍遥先生」写信请教了。可这位先生如今身在何处呢？没人知道。这位可怜的来信者的命运也不得而知。
E: And it seems like this is the second time the author of the letter had written to Mr. Carefree. But where could this gentleman be now? Nobody knows. The fate of the poor author of the letter also remains unknown.

C: 我想再看看信的内容。
E: I want to take another look at the letter.

C: 这得加钱！
E: I need extra pay for this!

C: 信号监测系统提示，药王秘传潜伏在观颐台附近，根据相关犯罪记录，此人可能正在<color=#dbc291ff>沿海长廊附近</color>进行破坏。
E: The signal monitoring system indicates that the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are hiding near the Elixir Research Terrace. Based on relevant criminal records, they might be engaging in destructive behavior <color=#dbc291ff>near the Seaside Promenade</color>.

C: 不好意思，我这就还给你。
E: I'm sorry. Let me give that back to you.

C: 不过你看，这个铁盒里藏着你不知道的秘密，或许它还有潜在的价值。
E: But look here — this box contains mysterious, unknown secrets. Perhaps it's potentially worth something.

C: 《厌作人间语》妙啊…
E: "Otherworldly Delights," how wonderful...

C: 我这里有一些不干净的。
E: I've got some all-natural ones right here.

C: 其实我这里有一些「鲛人泪」。
E: Actually, I've got some Draconic Tears right here.

C: 哇，终于重见天日了！差点以为要直接给老子打包发送到法珊泽尔了！
E: Finally, daylight! I thought I was going to be sent off to Farschanzel!

C: 是吧？我特意请教了几个懂搭配的朋友。
E: Really? I made a point to ask a few friends who understand fashion.

C: 嗯…姑且算是吧，我也不知道该从何说起……
E: Hmm... Let's just say that I have no idea where to begin...

C: …我…但愿我…之前的某些…言行，并没有为您带来太多麻烦……
E: I... I hope my... words before... didn't cause you any trouble...

C: 抱歉，我知道这种唐突的请求有多么失礼，但…请您考虑考虑吧，W也非常喜欢您呢。
E: My apologies. I know it is very forward to make such an abrupt request, but... please think about it. W really likes you, too.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 一个个本事没多少，脾气大得不得了；鼻子翘上天，不懂得尊师重道。那些人能拍出什么好片子才怪！
E: None of them have any talent, and they're all extremely short-tempered. Yet they look down on everyone and don't know how to respect their teachers. What kind of film is someone like that going to shoot, I ask you!

C: 制片人？嗬，额头下长的眼是钱眼，脑子里灌的浆是泥浆！
E: A producer? Wow — someone who's got cash for eyes, and sludge for brains!

C: 我太累了…真的…太累了，她什么时候才能放过自己、放过「我」呢……
E: I'm tired... Really, I'm tired. When is she going to let go of herself? When is she going to let go of "me"...

C: 那真是十分壮观的场面，每颗小行星上都如纹身般镌刻着密集的块状痕迹。这些痕迹有深有浅、形状各异，无疑是经由人力开凿出来的，仿佛…某种文字。
E: It really was a magnificent sight, with these blocks of dense scratches etched onto each asteroid like a tattoo. There were both deep and shallow markings, in all kinds of different shapes, which undoubtedly were carved out by someone as if... they were glyphs from some civilization.

C: 刺激一点的…我想想……
E: Thrilling, eh... Let me see...

C: 我仔细一看，发现那家伙身上的皮肤干瘪不堪，似乎已经死了…看它的样子，在宇宙中生存应该没什么问题才对。
E: Upon closer look, I realized that this guy's skin was all dried up as though dead... Judging by its appearance, it should have no problem whatsoever surviving in the universe.

C: 后来你成功逃掉了吗？
E: So did you manage to escape?

C: 有教育意义的。
E: One that's educational.

C: …愚蠢又可恨的家伙，还不等找到宇宙秘宝就急着把自己弄死…这下是我输了。
E: ...Foolish, hateful scoundrel. He rushed off to kill himself before he could find the secrets of the universe... This time, I lost.

C: 先不听了。
E: Not right now.

C: 得知有这号人物存在时，我心底的某些火焰重新燃了起来。这才是无名客该有的样子！我非得和他碰一碰不可。
E: When I learned that this kind of person existed, some kind of fire was rekindled in my heart. This is what the Nameless should be like! I had to meet him in person.

C: 这对我有什么好处？
E: What's in it for me?

C: 现在没空纠结那个了！
E: No time to dwell on that right now!

C: 那你有更好的方案吗？拿出来！
E: Well, do you have a better idea? Show us!

C: 公司为什么要纠缠你？
E: Why was the IPC bugging you?

C: 毕竟，我是一个海盗。
E: After all, I am a pirate.

C: 的确，但满足功利心也是很重要的。
E: Sure, but it's vital to feel rewarded materially.

C: 当天晚上，每个人都分到了一块多汁的肉排。大家对它的味道赞叹不已，但我一口也没吃。
E: Later that night, everyone enjoyed their own juicy cutlet. Everyone raved about how delicious it tasted, but I didn't take a single bite.

C: 这镜头是怎么回事？
E: What's the matter with the camera?

C: 但如今看来，这人根本就是想通过打压、污蔑我，好将我的成果据为己有嘛！
E: It's now clear to me that he was taking credit for my work by oppressing and throwing mud at me!

C: 你要是还不信，不如就自己瞧瞧，他到底写了个什么破玩意吧。
E: If you still don't believe me, you can read that crappy proposal yourself.

C: 反倒是那些专精偷奸耍滑的市侩，和擅长冥顽不化的古董…哈哈！
E: The joke is on those mercenaries who cut corners and are too set in their ways to change! Haha!

C: …嗯？别打岔！我正在认真思考商业化战略，你连这点眼力见都没有嘛？
E: ...Hmm? Don't distract me! I'm in the middle of a serious commercialization strategy!

C: 交给我的事已经办妥了。
E: I've done what you asked me to do.

C: 这正是我需要的…这样一来，至少在这个梦境里，我可以和她成双成对……
E: This is exactly what I need... With this, I can finally be in her league, even if it's just in this dreamscape...

C: 芙尔拉有话跟你说。
E: Forla has something to say to you

C: {M#先生}{F#小姐}，请先自报家门吧，让我看看你的名头值不值得浪费我的时间。
E: {M#Sir}{F#Madam}, please tell me more about you. I'll see whether your title is worth my time.

C: 那么多艺者里，我对同为皮皮西人的他最用心，给了他最丰厚的薪酬，最优越的资源，最高的期望……
E: Of all the talents, I invested the most effort in him because he's a fellow Pepeshi. I gave him the most generous pay and the best resources, and I had the highest expectations for him...

C: 路演的地点就放在艾迪恩公园吧，那里都是逐新求异的宾客，肯定能接受与众不同的音乐风格。
E: I can organize the roadshow at Aideen Park, as it attracts visitors who seek novelty and individuality. They'll undoubtedly be more receptive to a different style of music.

C: 纵览世界之大，却无我等一方容身之处；当我们在匹诺康尼的灯火中蓦然回首，却惊觉自己终究不过是个无根过客……
E: There's no place for people like us, even though the world is vast. When we look back on our journey in Penacony, it will dawn upon us that we are nothing but some travelers without a place to belong...

C: …不会明白一直以来，我究竟承受了多大的压力、多大的痛苦……
E: ...You won't understand the amount of pressure and pain I've had to bear all this while...

C: 他矮小的身躯中竟爆发出惊人的力量，将你的手臂勒出一圈红痕。
E: He summons an astonishing amount of strength from his petite figure, leaving a circular red mark on your arm.

C: 他们见到我，第一反应就是——这东西能带来胜利。
E: The moment they saw me, they immediately got the impression that I could bring them victory.

C: …只有罗斯玛丽，一直以来是她教导我如何克服恐惧，让我成长为如今的样子。
E: ...Not Rosemary though. She's the one who taught me how to face my fears, allowing me to grow into the person I am today.

C: 避免长篇大论地说，当一位家族成员在「同谐」的路上走得足够远…他们便能获得心灵相通的力量，不必通过面会口传亦能获知彼此的见闻。
E: To keep things brief: When a member of The Family walks far enough on the Path of Harmony... they gain the power of tacit understanding, allowing information to be exchanged without the need for face-to-face communication.
Ah...

C: …原来你好奇的是把梦中的人转化成迷因的方法吗？
E: ...So you want to know more about how people are turned into memes in their dreams?

C: 好啊，孩子，但愿我的话语能让你获得些许平静。
E: Sure thing, kid. Hope my words can bring you a little peace.

C: 为此感到自豪吧，孩子。
E: You can be proud of that, kid.

C: 你骗了我。
E: You lied to me.

C: 你大概不认识我，但你这张脸，就算化成灰我都能认出来！
E: You probably don't, but that face of yours, I'd recognize it anywhere!

C: 那校规还改吗？
E: Then are you still going to change the school rules?

C: 倘若某天，折纸大学能诞生一位贤才，或许整个匹诺康尼都会迎来转机吧。
E: Perhaps someday in the future, if Paperfold University can produce a true talented genius, the situation in Penacony might take a turn for the better.

C: 保重。
E: Take care.

C: 就此作罢。
E: Leave.

C: 哈哈哈，怎么可能？相比人为编排的剧目，我更喜欢看到事件自然发展出的「欢愉」结局。
E: Hahaha, how could it be? I much prefer the "Elation" of an ending that has come about naturally over a choreographed drama.

C: 嘿，朋友，你没看到我在这儿吗？为什么要把我的坐骑打破？你这样会影响到我的督导工作的！
E: Hey, friend! Didn't you see me? Why did you break my mount? That's gonna get in the way of my overseeing duties!

C: 你好奇黑塔究竟是如何敷衍公司的。
E: You are curious about how on earth Herta manages to phone it in to the IPC.

C: 是吗？可能是我看错了吧。
E: Is that so? Perhaps I'm mistaken, then.

C: 那是...什么？
E: What... is that?

C: 这...我们星球全是陆地啊，您为什么提出这个方案？
E: That's... Our entire planet is land, why would you suggest that?

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}，你让我找回了造物之柱工程的初心。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}, you've made me regain my initial hopes for the Pillars of Creation project.

C: 这些工地上的废料，过不了多久就要被统一销毁。真是浪费！
E: Scrap like this from construction sites will just end up being destroyed. It's such a waste!

C: 这是你的报酬，拿好，我们可能一段时间内都不会再见面了——厂子刚办起来的时候最忙了。
E: Here is your payment. Take it. We may not see each other again for a while. The factories are busiest when they are first built.

C: 难道说…哎呀，这样一点都不浪漫啾！
E: Unless... *sigh* That's not in the slightest bit romantic, tweet!

C: 我要飞回大树了，得让妃色夫人重新设计一下这里的动线啾！
E: I'll have to fly back to the tree. Got to get Lady Vermilion to redesign this route, tweet!

C: 你说的是八分音符…
E: What you're referring to is an eighth note...

C: 那是我的尾巴！我是一只鱼啾！
E: That's my tail! I'm a fish, tweet!

C: 啾噜噜噜噜噜…没想到居然会突然喷出水来，都快变成落汤鸟了啾。
E: Tweetgurglggll... Where'd that water squirt from? I'm all drenched, tweet.

C: 那你钻排气管干嘛？
E: What're you doing tunneling into the exhaust pipe?

C: 偷偷藏在叶子里，它看不见我们啾…
E: We hid in some leaves, and it couldn't see us, tweet...

C: 啾啾，看来这些小家伙们还欠磨练…帮我个忙，把它们都叫回来吧，要召开反省大会了啾！
E: Tweet tweet, looks like these little friends lack training... Help me out and recall them. We're organizing a retrospective, tweet!

C: 都在寻找形状适合的枝条和树叶，很忙碌，但很充实的啾——
E: They've all been looking for twigs and leaves that are suitable in shape. It's really busy but very fulfilling, tweet!

C: 啾…啾啾……啾啾啾啾……对了！有个喜欢登高的孩子总爱躲到最高处吹风，说不定它就藏在<color=#dbc291ff>某处「高塔」上</color>偷懒呢？
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Tweet tweet tweet tweet... That's right! There's a kid who loves heights, and is always finding the highest spots to enjoy the breeze. It could be hiding <color=#dbc291ff>in some tall tower</color> to slack off?

C: 台子上面有什么呢？
E: What's on it?

C: 「有个新的人想加入折纸小鸟的队伍！」我要先去把这个好消息带回大树了，咱们等会儿再见啾~
E: We have a new member who wishes to join the origami birds! I have to go and bring back this wonderful news to the Great Tree! I will see you again soon, tweet~!

C: 你也喜欢小镇吗？那也祝你每天开心啾~
E: Do you like Dreamville, too? Then I wish you happiness every single day, tweet~

C: 每天都在为大明星们打光，其实，我也想走到光里啾…
E: Though I spend every day working the lights for big-name celebrities, I'd really like to be in the light one day too, tweet...

C: 咚~咚咚咚~
E: Dong~ Dong dong dong~

C: 又要跑腿了…
E: You want me running around for you again...

C: 谢谢，钟表小子的朋友！请务必收下这份谢礼啾！
E: Thank you, Clockie's friend! Please accept my token of gratitude, tweet!

C: 唔呣…那些孩子捉迷藏时都有固定的躲藏地点，但在下怎么也想不起来了啾…
E: Hmm... When these children play hide-and-seek, they always have specific hiding spots, but I can't seem to remember them, tweet...

C: 这是本公子说定的报酬啾~
E: Here's the reward that I promised, tweet!

C: 啾！那边的，你又在偷懒了，不要跑啾！
E: Tweet! You over there, you're slacking off again! Stop running away, tweet!

C: 就看到三根毛在动。
E: All I see are three feather pinions moving.

C: 还是算了。
E: I'll pass.

C: 不用谢！鼹鼠党的队员就是要互相帮助！
E: You're welcome! We Moles members must always help each other!

C: 睹物思人吧。
E: She's probably thinking of someone.

C: 看着我身后的灯光，感受它闪烁的韵律，跟着节拍跳起来啾。
E: Look at the light behind me, immerse yourself in its pulsing tempo, and follow the beat and boogie, tweet.

C: 不要吃我！我的身体是纸做的，吃了要拉肚子啾。
E: Don't eat me! I'm made of paper. You'll get a tummyache if you eat me, tweet.

C: 我是不是隐形了啾？
E: I'm not invisible, am I? Tweet?

C: 我一口都还没吃，应该我先！
E: I haven't had a bite at all, so I'm going first!

C: 摸摸雕像就能考满分啾~
E: I'll get full marks if I rub the statue, tweet!

C: 另外，倘若你真想为本地建设做贡献的话，不如去造物之柱看看——记得戴上安全帽。
E: Also, if you really want to make a contribution to the local construction effort, why don't you go and check out the Pillars of Creation? Make sure you wear a safety helmet!

C: 你正在擦手，准备转身离开这里。一阵窸窣声惊动了你，但对方消失得极快，就连你也抓不住它的踪迹。
E: Just as you wipe down your hands and prepare to go, a rustling noise startles you — but they are disappearing so fast that not even you are able to tell where they went.

C: 我再考虑一下…
E: I need to think about it...

C: 这不可能，诚哥他手上的——
E: But I do. Brother Cheng has my documents...

C: 听着——我说过了，以前我没得选，是他们用家人威胁我，我不得已才加入云骑军当什么「卧底」。
E: Listen, I told you: I didn't have a choice. The Disciples threatened my family, so I had to join the Cloud Knights as their "mole."

C: 既然你也这么说，我也相信咪咪确实是变聪明了。
E: If even you say so, then I'll believe that Mimi has indeed become smarter.

C: 又或者，你压根没听到过他的脚步声，想到这里，冷汗从你额间滑落，此地不宜久留，你毅然决定离开。
E: Or maybe you've never even heard any footsteps of his at all. Thinking this causes a bead of cold sweat to roll down your forehead. Lingering here is not a good idea. You decide to leave.

C: 要拉开了架势认真学，那确实挺难的，光是唱念做打的基本功就要学个五十年。
E: It's difficult to seriously learn the posture. Just the basics of singing, reciting, acting, and fighting take a good fifty years to learn.

C: 快跑吧，不怕最强法务找到你？
E: You should run. Aren't you afraid of the strongest legal department catching you?

C: 请放下棒子说话好吗？咱们岁阳是不可能被物理手段击飞的唷。
E: Could you please put down the bat and talk? It's impossible for us heliobi to be harmed by physical means.

C: 我的第六感很强。
E: I have a strong sixth sense.

C: 看来你脑子挺够用的。能在匹诺康尼开这种车的都非富即贵，钱对他们来说就是数字而已。
E: Looks like you've got a good head on your shoulders. If you can afford to drive that kind of car in Penacony, then money is just a number to you.

C: 也可能是他们私下达成和解了。毕竟这种事情，闹再久也没什么钱拿。
E: Or maybe they reached a private settlement. After all, if you keep pushing for too long, there's not going to be any money left to get.

C: 刚才那位「筑梦师」说，匹诺康尼最优秀的艺术家一般会定期在梦境中的「白日梦酒店」聚会，对吧？
E: That "Dreamweaver" just now said that Penacony's most outstanding artists gather periodically at "The Reverie" hotel in the Dreamscape, didn't he?

C: 后来，我学会了接受，学会了逼着自己平静下来。因为我还有小佩——她已经失去了母亲；她再承受不起一个行尸走肉般的父亲了。
E: Then, I learned to accept what had happened; I learned to force myself to be calm, because I still had Pennie — She had already lost her mother, so she could not handle it were her father to become a shell of a man.

C: …别担心，小佩。他大概只是惊醒了。
E: ...Don't worry, Pennie. I think he must have just woken up.

C: 咳…抱歉，请原谅我的失礼…总之，有关此事的流言我近来已经调查了三十几个版本，没想到您竟然真的……
E: Ahem... Please forgive my impoliteness... Anyway, I've gathered more than <unbreak>30</unbreak> versions regarding this rumor through my investigation. I'm surprised that you actually...

C: 开拓者老爷！
E: Boss Trailblazer!

C: 你按照标准流程按动按钮。取款机疯狂颤动，但它似乎被什么东西卡住了*嗓子眼*，吐不出任何东西。
E: You hit the buttons following the standard procedure. The ATM trembles vigorously, but something seems to be *stuck* in its throat, stopping it from spewing anything out.

C: 不、绝对不无趣！我向你保证，我一定从下一秒就开始改正……
E: No, I'm not dull at all! I promise I'll get better starting from the next second...

C: 醉了？哈！我——我没醉，我怎么可能醉呢。
E: Drunk!? Hah! I—I'm not drunk, why would I— how could I be drunk?

C: 很可惜，此一名杀三酒的计策被识破了。今我们三瓶酒，虽不是同年同月同日生，但也要同年同月同日死。
E: Unfortunately for you, we have seen through your triple alcohocide plot! We three bottles, though we may not have been born on the same day, month, or year, we shall die on the same day, month, and year!

C: 你在想，要不把它们三瓶都交给小鸟算了，但一股强烈的好奇突然涌上心头。
E: You begin to think, why not just take all three of them back to the bird when suddenly, an irresistible curiosity surges through you.

C: 离间绿酒瓶。
E: Set Green against the others.

C: 凶手残忍地将它开膛破肚，大量的梦泡在尸体周边悬浮，昭示其短暂的死亡时间。
E: The murderer brutally disemboweled them... You can tell from the large number of dream bubbles floating around the body that the time of death was not long ago.

C: 剪掉磁带，也是为了销毁死者掌握的把柄。
E: Cutting the tape is also to destroy the dirt the deceased held on him.

C: 真理医生…
E: Dr. Ratio...

C: 一幅仓鼠球主题的挖洞合影立牌。你可以呼朋唤友，让他们把自己美貌的脸庞摆在合适的位置，与卡通立牌产生奇妙的化学反应，然后用相机记录下来。
E: A group photo board with face slots, featuring a Hamster Ball theme. You can call your friends and get them to place their beautiful faces in the appropriate slots to facilitate wondrous chemical reactions with the cartoon board. Then use your camera to record it!

C: 黑天鹅…
E: Black Swan...

C: 多谢惠顾。
E: Thank you for your custom.

C: 也不知道该不该说恭喜，现在你也是流梦帮的一员了。有什么需要的，都可以来找我们，咱们帮派得互帮互助才行。
E: I'm not sure if I should say congratulations, but yer now a member of the Dreamflux Gang. If ya need anythin', come find us. We gang members gotta help each other out!

C: 老大好，我是新加入的流浪者，以前在这片地界搞点小偷小摸的营生。
E: Hey, boss! I'm a new member. I used to get up to some petty theft 'round these parts.

C: 那当然，这可是全苏乐达界最潮的一款瓶盖。
E: Of course, this is the most fashionable bottle cap style in all of the SoulGlad world.

C: 哎。
E: Ah...

C: 哎。
E: Ah...

C: 作为唱片公司的合作仓库经理，利用职务便利囤积居奇，扰乱市场，非法销售，总算逮到现行了——逮捕！
E: Misusing your position as the collaborating warehouse manager of the record company to stockpile albums, manipulate markets, and conduct illegal sales... You've been caught red-handed, and you're under arrest!

C: 哎！你——对对对、就是你！你就是我们的新老板吧，没错吧没错吧！
E: Hey! You... Yeah, you! You must be our new boss! Am I right? I'm right, aren't I?

C: 啊，船长！揽收处那边收到一个您的包裹，我这就给您送来了。
E: Ah, Captain! A package arrived for you at the collection point. I've brought it over.

C: 收下包裹。
E: Accept the package.

C: 电影？抱歉，这台放映机是放不了电影的……
E: Movies? I'm sorry, but this projector doesn't play movies.

C: 自行联络宾客也不是件坏事，起码你不会担心被侍从听到冰冷的忙音。
E: Contacting your guests yourself isn't so bad. At least you don't have to worry about the attendants having to deal with busy signals.

C: 帕姆一口气发了六个带有问号的表情包来答复你，丹恒以留下来看守列车为由拒绝了你，并解释说帕姆因为情绪太过激动才会手抖。
E: Pom-Pom replies with a flurry of six stickers with question marks. Dan Heng declines, citing that someone needs to stay behind and watch over the Express. He also explains that Pom-Pom's sticker spam was just a result of being overexcited.

C: 两张小圆桌。真正的星穹列车的成员肯定是知道的。
E: 2 small round tables. The real crew member of the Astral Express will certainly know this.

C: 说了半天还是要打啊。
E: So I still need to fight after all it's said and done.

C: 你对这个书名好像有点印象。这本书似乎早在你刚登上仙舟之时，就被列为「列车智库」推荐登记书目了，银河中有一些人正在苦苦寻找这部著作的下落，却没有结果。
E: You have a faint recollection of the book's title. It appears to have been listed as a recommended title in the Express data bank when you first embarked on the Xianzhou. Several people in the Cosmos have been desperately searching for its whereabouts to no avail.

C: …没有罪名就不会被收监。你说的有道理，我打算现在快速查询一下。
E: ...Anyone without a charge will not be in prison. You're right. Let me do a quick check now.

C: 那么{NICKNAME}大人，闭上眼睛，专注于你的思考之上。
E: So, {NICKNAME}, close your eyes and focus on what's on your mind.

C: 雪衣大人，{NICKNAME}大人被你们麻烦过很多次吗？
E: Madam Xueyi, has {NICKNAME} been imposed upon by you many times?

C: 多亏了那位热心人推荐…
E: It's all thanks to the kind-hearted person's recommendation...

C: 啊，大海，你全是水…
E: Ahh, the ocean. You're made up of water...

C: 去往那里必须做好完全的准备，结交有实力的伙伴，以及最重要的——找到一位「认路的」，只有他们有能力将从迷宫般的集装箱里引导出来。
E: Anyone planning to venture within must ensure that they're as well-prepared as possible and enlist the aid of strong, dependable allies in advance. Most importantly, they must also engage a "pathfinder," someone who can guide them out of those maze-like containers.

C: 密文和密钥随时可以查，别担心！那…「认路的」，我出发了？
E: Don't worry, you can check the cipher and encryption key again anytime you want. Well, it's time for me to set off, my "pathfinding" friend.

C: 确实。虽然说你捡到了很多宝贝，但是它们不太占地方，随取随用。
E: That's true. Although you've come to own many trinkets, they don't take up much space and are always within easy reach.

C: 这能出什么事呢？
E: What trouble could it cause?

C: 不会是让我用炮把它打下来吧？
E: You're not asking me to shoot them all down with the cannons, are you?

C: （这里应该就是老白提到的控制室了吧。）
E: (This must be the control room that Old Bai mentioned.)

C: 我…好像什么也看不见呢？
E: I... I don't see anything?

C: 门外的高手，请你自信一点。
E: A little more confidence, please, master!

C: 正是如此。你有难了。
E: That's right. You're in for it now.

C: 你们不多带点兄弟吗？
E: Why don't you take a few more brothers?

C: 别这么谦虚嘛，相聚是缘，为了纪念我们的相遇，还是合个影吧！
E: Don't be so modest. It's fate that brought us together, so, to commemorate our meeting, let's take a photo together!

C: 扮演成钟表小子。
E: Roleplay as Clockie.

C: 对不起，我很忙的。
E: Sorry, I'm super busy.

C: 这个由我说了算？
E: Oh, I can call the shots?

C: {F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，方才工坊传来一阵响动，我还以为是兽群生变，特意前来查看…没想到竟是你重新点燃了吉奥里亚的圣烛。
E: {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, I thought the commotion I felt in the workshop just now was something happening with the beasts down there, so I came rushing over... and I didn't realize you actually reignited Georios' holy candle.

C: 你们是…？
E: And you all are...

C: 喂喂喂，{NICKNAME}乘客，能听到吗？
E: Hey hey hey, passenger {NICKNAME}, can you hear me?

C: 万敌甩了甩手，不悦地离开了……
E: Mydei shakes off the pain on his hand and leaves with an expression of displeasure...

C: 某月的月初，你去购买一只标价<unbreak>20</unbreak>万利衡币的大地兽，却忘了带钱，你找大地兽商人借了<unbreak>20</unbreak>万利衡币，买走了大地兽，并约定好月末当天来还钱。
E: At the beginning of a certain month, you buy a dromas priced at <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> Balance Coins, but you forget your wallet. You borrow <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> Balance Coins from the dromas merchant and purchase one, promising to pay him back at the end of the month.

C: 虽然不知道你为什么想看…但我也很好奇这种感觉是什么。
E: I don't know why you'd want to see that... but I'm also curious how it feels.

C: 从字面意义上说，我猜是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}。
E: Literally speaking, I'm guessing it is {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}.

C: 你有点担心阿格莱雅不喜欢无意义的玩笑，不过，通讯里她的声音听起来并不反感，甚至…饶有兴味。
E: You're a little worried that Aglaea might dislike meaningless jokes, but her voice over the comms doesn't sound too perturbed. She even sounds... amused.

C: 对债务人而言，哪怕借来的利衡币足够买下一整个城邦，法理上也不属于自己，岂不是「一无所有」？
E: To a debtor, even if his borrowed Balance Coins can purchase an entire city, the money does not legally belong to them. Isn't that being left with nothing?

C: 吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
E: Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!

C: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
E: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

C: 我记得城里的人们在辩论时，提到过类似的话题——答案是「机遇」。据说，这是奥赫玛每个商人都必须铭记的格言。
E: I remember a debate in the city mentioning something like that — the answer is "opportunity." It's apparently an aphorism that all Okheman merchants must remember.

C: 噢！真遗憾，你一定熟读文物保护法规，或者受过吉奥里亚的赐福，竟然能无视这只石狮子的存在。但仔细想想，过分谨慎是不是会错过什么？
E: Oh! How unfortunate. You must be versed in cultural artifact preservation rules, or once blessed by Georios — to think that you would ignore this stone lion's presence. But if you think about it, isn't being overly careful causing you to miss out on something?

C: 说来听听。
E: I'm all ears.

C: 查杀进度条走到了最后。桌面上一直聒噪的图标突然卡住，在一闪屏后彻底消失。原本的位置上，空留十份文档。
E: As the progress bar comes to an end, the noisy icon on the desktop suddenly gets stuck and completely disappears after a flash screen, leaving ten documents in its spot.

C: …饿，呼呼，我好饿啊！你究竟给了小火苗什么，让我感觉如此地空虚……
E: *crackle* ...Hungry. I'm starving! What did you give the poor little dim flame that made it feel so empty inside?

C: 然而，这世间依旧有许多纷扰的疑问在纠缠着桶们。我离开学院前，桶之智者曾说：扭盖还是不扭，这是一个问题。
E: However, many doubts are still troubling us trashcans in this realm. Before I left my academy, the Wise trashcan once posed the question, "To twist the lid or not, that is the question."

C: 总之，你的建议令我不能更加赞同，他们真该聘用你去设计梦境！
E: I couldn't agree more with your suggestions. They should have engaged you to design the Dreamscape!

C: 感化敌人。
E: He would convince the enemies to mend their ways.

C: 为了苏乐达！
E: SoulGlad above all!

C: 咕，我这是效仿古代的贤者垃圾桶，享受着无拘无束的生活，你这小家伙懂什么！
E: I am walking in the footsteps of sage trashcans of old, enjoying a life free of burden! What do you know, brat!

C: 说话间，它忽然浑身颤抖，你目瞪口呆地看着它在不断变化，直到它再次起身……
E: As the trashcan continues to speak, it suddenly begins to tremble violently. You can only stare with your mouth agape as it continues to transform, until it finally rises again...

C: 你可能是个哲学家。
E: You sound like a philosopher.

C: 和小桶一起踢恶霸桶。
E: Kick the bullying can together with the little can.

C: 一不做，二不休。
E: No turning back now.

C: 回忆之前的信件…
E: Recall the previous letter...

C: （我曾游历一个古老国度，那里的人对木工有独特的见解……）
E: (I once traveled to an ancient kingdom where their carpentry defied all I knew...)

C: 那就简单关心一下吧。
E: Then, just a gentle check-in.

C: （就此搁笔，祝好。）
E: (I'll end it here. All is well.)

C: (:３っ「真的？快带我去！一池不容二豹，我要证明自己才是最强！」)∋
E: (:３っ "Really!? Take me there! There's only room for one top seal in this pond, and I'm gonna prove it myself!" )∋

C: o((╬◣'ω´◢ )o「还不快去？小心哥一尾巴跟你豹了！」)∋
E: o((╬◣'ω´◢ )o "Why are you still loafing around? Don't make me tail-slap you in the face!" )∋

C: 好可爱的奇美拉！得给它起个甜甜的名字才行，你有什么主意吗？
E: What an adorable chimera! It deserves a really sweet name. Any ideas?

C: 拜拜。
E: Bye-bye.

C: 嗷呜嗷！
E: Rrrrr!

C: 抱抱。
E: Hug time.

C: 怎么样，要试试看吗？就当是一次魅力检定？
E: So? Wanna give it a try? Consider it a charm check.

C: 没什么别的了。
E: That's really all there is to it.

C: 哎呀，太沉重的话题可不适合哀丽秘榭。还是聊回捉迷藏吧，作为交换，接下来轮到我来找你咯？
E: Ah, but that's too heavy a thought for a place like Aedes Elysiae. Let's go back to Hide-and-Seek. Now it's my turn to find you, okay?

C: 在树庭被水淹没的无措？
E: The helplessness of drowning in the Grove?

C: 我有许多问题想问你…
E: I have so many questions for you...

C: 左左左…还是左！我明白了，您是希望我先迈左脚是吧。感谢您的教诲！
E: Left, left, left... And another left! I understand. You wish for me to step out on my left foot, correct? Thank you for your guidance!

C: 莫名地，你突然开始怀念起在木马肚子里度过的时光，安静、幽暗，带着些微的温暖，你意识到那就是你始终在追寻的家的感觉。
E: Suddenly, you are overcome with a mysterious nostalgia for the time that you spent inside the wooden horse's stomach. The quiet, the darkness, the subtle warmth... Subconsciously, you realize that it was the feeling of home that you had been searching for.

C: 我是受{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}赐福的神驹，能自由前往任何地方。滞留在这里，是因为遭到黑潮气息的污染，迷失了方向，不久便能恢复。
E: I am a divine foal that has received the blessing of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}. I can travel freely between any lands. I am stranded here because I was infected by the black tide's essence and lost my sense of direction. I will recover soon.

C: 想起来了…偏远的城邦，埃普斯，我是从那回来的。「门」的最深处，泰坦话语都难以听清的地方。我试图传递雅努斯的神谕，可他们不理解我在说什么。
E: Now I remember... the distant city-state of Epos... I've returned from there. From the deepest part of the "Passage," where even Titans' voices grow faint... I tried to deliver Janus' prophecy, but they couldn't understand my words.

C: 可是实际上，你冷吗？
E: But actually, are you cold?

C: 汪汪~汪！
E: Woof woof~ Woof!

C: 能不能说点我听得懂的…
E: Can you explain it to me like I'm five...

C: 如果您需要什么帮助，也可以向我咨询。
E: If you need any help, please feel free to consult me.

C: 无妨，小友遇到任何困难，再来找明德便是。
E: Good. For any questions you may encounter in the future, my young friend, please do not hesitate to come to me.

C: 我跟你很熟么？
E: Do we know each other?

C: 竟然要绕这么远的路吗？
E: Go all the way around?

C: 哦，不，不，我可以做到，一个人也可以。
E: Oh, no, it's fine. I can do it on my own.

C: 我其实很多天没有睡过一次好觉了。
E: In fact, I haven't had a good sleep for many days.

C: 希望以后我们可以为了非人生物的权益，做出更多的努力！
E: I hope we can make more efforts in protecting the rights and interests of non-human creatures in the future!

C: 真不知道她在那边过得怎么样……
E: I wonder how she's doing over there...

C: 我人老了，最看不得那种悲欢离别。真要是想长久在一起，洛奇这小子，打铁还需自身硬！
E: I'm old. I can't bear to see people break up. If they want to be together in the long run, Rocky will have to toughen up himself!

C: 哎，这次的确是我草率了。我会吸取教训，下次查阅典籍一定翻找出处明晰的那种，不会再相信这种路边小纸条了。
E: Yeah, I should've known better. I'll definitely use more reputable resources next time. I won't fall for roadside leaflets again.

C: 嗯哼，那就请回吧，我需要一些独处时间。
E: Well, you'd better take your leave. I need some time alone.

C: 你的名字是有什么故事吗？
E: Is there a story behind your name?

C: 阮•梅…呜呜…她抛弃了我们…呜呜……
E: Ruan Mei... *sobs* She's abandoned us... *sobs*

C: 「特别联络员」的职责是？
E: What are the duties of the special liaison officer?

C: 那是大家给我取的名字，因为我总是很忙，一忙就很烦躁，它们就这么喊我。
E: That's the name everyone calls me by, because I'm always busy, and I'm easily annoyed when I'm busy. That's how my name came about.

C: 好吧！
E: Alright!

C: 对不起，怪我下手没轻重。
E: I'm sorry for being too rough on you guys.

C: 你可不要不懂装懂哦，有什么不懂的及时问我！
E: Just ask me if you're unsure of something. Don't be a know-it-all.

C: 正在查询，{NICKNAME}科员是否具备权限。
E: Checking permissions for researcher {NICKNAME}.

C: 通讯似乎没有接通。
E: The call doesn't go through.

C: 有眼光！算是叫您淘到宝贝了。
E: Good eye! You've spotted a treasure for sure.

C: 给我留一把！
E: Leave one for me!

C: 这种玩弄文辞的论辩还是少听些为好。渎神的罪名暂且不论，要是因为沉迷驳倒对方，反而损害了思考的能力，就得不偿失了。
E: These debates of rhetorical wordplay are best avoided. Putting aside the matter of blasphemy for now, if you end up damaging your brain trying to refute your opposition's argument, the victory is still not worth the loss.

C: 我们真的拥有关于「阿卡索斯」的知识吗？从未接受过数学训练的孩童也能轻松辨认出圆形，并准确地描述出「黎明机器」更大，车盖更小。
E: Do we truly have knowledge of "Icatus"? A child that has never been educated in mathematics can easily identify a circle, and accurately explain that the "Dawn Device" is larger than a vehicle cover.

C: 无法被感官认知的事物就必定不存在吗？盲人看不见你的样貌，耳聋的人听不见你的话语，难道就能因此推断出你并不存在？
E: If we cannot detect something through our senses, does that absolutely deny its existence? If a blind person cannot see your face and a deaf person cannot hear your words, can we then infer that you do not actually exist?

C: （论证：是通过思考得到的。）
E: (Theory: We learn through thinking.)

C: 为了不打扰你的仪式，我没有提前翻找。那么现在开始吧。
E: I didn't rummage around out of respect for your ceremony. So let's get started on that right now.

C: 算了，我不想和你吵架，都先各自冷静一下吧。
E: Forget about it. I don't want to argue with you. Let's both just calm down for a second.

C: 你们的血脉将与悬锋城相融，你们的后代将流着纷争的血——
E: Your bloodline will merge with that of Castrum Kremnos, and your progeny will carry the blood of Strife...

C: 呸呸呸！
E: Bah!

C: 听说你一直在城门前站岗，认识许许多多的人。你一定知道他们去哪了，对吧？
E: I heard you've been standing sentry at the city gates and know pretty much everyone. You must know where they went then, right?

C: 去找卫兵自首吧。
E: Go turn yourself in to the guards.

C: 啊，没错没错！这么说您同意了？
E: Ah, exactly! Does that mean you'll help?

C: 我想再看看。
E: Yes, please.

C: 这玩意怎么这么贵啊？我把经费全砸进去了。
E: Why is this so expensive! I've thrown all my funding at it.

C: …谢…轻人，谢…呜…谢……
E: Th... thank... you... *sob*... thank...

C: 万一我出了什么意外……
E: If something should happen to me...

C: 别急，等机组换新吧。
E: Don't worry. I'm waiting on a new part.

C: 还差<unbreak>10</unbreak>个论点我就可以完成这篇报告了……
E: I'm still <unbreak>10</unbreak> talking points away from finishing this paper...

C: 而且，你现在急也没用啊，超净台都没有你拿什么做实验？等新设备运到再想吧。
E: Besides, there's no point in being anxious. You still need a clean bench to complete the experiments, right? Just wait until the new equipment arrives.

C: 悬锋人生来便与征战相伴，兵器是我们的手足，盔甲是我们的华服。可现在，让我们放下所有荣耀，拿起锄头与算盘…我没法轻易做到。
E: Born into a life of war, weapons are like our limbs, and armor is our finest attire. But now, we Kremnoans are told to put down our glory, pick up hoes and abacuses... It's not something I can easily accept.

C: 你呢，你说为什么？
E: And you, what do you say?

C: 闭嘴！满口谎言的伪神，我早已受够了命运的摆弄！
E: Shut up! You deceitful false god, I'm done with fate's manipulation!

C: …我受不了蠢货了。
E: ...I've had enough of fools.

C: 对不起，贵宾，就算是异邦的黄金裔，也得经元老院认可方能进入。
E: I'm sorry, honored guest. Even if she's a foreign Chrysos Heir, she needs the Council of Elders' approval to enter.

C: 我明白了…但是贵宾，你要知道，刻法勒已经陷入长眠，许久不曾给出回应了。
E: I see... But, honored guest, you should know that Kephale has long been in a deep slumber, and hasn't responded in ages.

C: 啊，是你啊，{NICKNAME}贵宾。有什么能帮到你？
E: Oh, it's you, {NICKNAME}. Anything I can help you with?

C: 嚯，这刻法勒可真年轻。
E: Huh, who knew Kephale was this young?

C: 黎明云崖，有什么值得一看的景色呢……
E: Is there anything worth seeing at Dawncloud...

C: 我们必须把这里守住。
E: We must hold this place.

C: {NICKNAME}，没时间为他们悲伤了，反正再创世之后又会相见的。我拦住它们，你用他们带来的货物加固壁垒！
E: {NICKNAME}, no time to grieve for them now. We'll meet them again in the Era Nova. I'll hold them off while you reinforce the barricade with the goods they brought.

C: 你看了信，都没情感波动吗？
E: Did you read the letter and feel nothing at all?

C: 应该是恭喜你们两位…唉，真叫人欣慰啊，*天空粗口*！
E: I should congratulate you two... *sigh* How heartwarming, *Skyfolk swear word*!

C: 行，我去问问。
E: Alright, I'll go speak with her.

C: 哎，还…还怪亲切的——找我有事吗，海里的小精灵？要不要来点蜜酿啊——
E: Well, aren't you... *hic* a cute one! Do you need something, little ocean sprite? Care for a sip of my honey brew?

C: 大家都很开心，这就够了。
E: As long as everyone's happy, that's all that matters.

C: 今天就好好享受列车时光吧。
E: Why not just soak in the Express for now.

C: 虽然之前也来过列车，不过有{NICKNAME}在的列车，我还是第一次来呢。
E: I've been on the Express before, but this is my first visit with {NICKNAME} on board.

C: 我觉得，自从你加入列车组之后，星穹列车上的气氛好像更「生机勃勃」了。
E: It's almost as if you joining the crew has given everyone an extra boost of energy...

C: 喔，原来荣誉队员平时就住在游乐园里，羡慕死虎克啦！
E: Which means... you live inside a warp-jumping candy theme park! Not fair!

C: 帕姆…走起来一扭一扭的，好可爱喔……
E: Pom-Pom looks really cute when they walk...

C: {NICKNAME}就是{NICKNAME}，答应得真爽快！
E: I should've known you'd be cool with it, {NICKNAME}!

C: 啧…实在想不到啊……
E: Tsk... Think, Serval, think...

C: 好，那就听{NICKNAME}你的了。
E: Alright, lead the way, {NICKNAME}.

C: …看来，是时候让银鬃铁卫做好准备了。
E: ...I need to make sure the Silvermane Guards are always at the ready.

C: 想不到那样小的身躯里，竟然潜藏着如此巨大的能量！
E: I didn't know so much power could fit into such a small body!

C: 不知道艾丝妲小姐会不会喜欢这样的气味呢？她偶尔也会喝咖啡，不过一定要加糖加奶，她不爱喝苦涩的东西……
E: I wonder if Lady Asta would like it? She drinks a cup or two occasionally, but she has it with milk and sugar. She can't stand bitter flavors...

C: 刚刚三月七给我看了一些玩偶，都是按照列车组成员的长相做的吧？非常可爱。
E: March 7th just showed me some dolls that were made to look like the members of the Express crew. They're adorable.

C: 我来抓你了。
E: Caught you!

C: 有姬子的咖啡。
E: We've got Himeko's coffee.

C: 突然想到了一个问题，你们的列车长还会长高吗？
E: I just thought of something. Does your conductor ever grow taller?

C: …可惜我还没有睡够，就被人给叫醒了。
E: ...Needless to say, someone woke me up, as always.

C: 我没有问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 我辜负了粉丝的期待，这件事我应该付出代价。可是一旦我在这件事上表达歉意，大家反而更加愤怒，觉得我只是继续在编造谎言而已……
E: I betrayed the fans' expectations and I agree I need to pay for that. However, once I showed any remorse on this matter, they got more angry and felt I was just making up lies again...

C: 啊？你问我之后怎么着了？年轻人，这听八卦可不兴一口气听完。想要知道，就请听下回分解吧！
E: What's that? You want to know what happened then? Kiddo, I can't spill all the beans in one go. Stay tuned!

C: 话说回来，我还意识到一件事——你们智库的加密手段实在是有些薄弱……
E: Actually, I realized something else — the encryption for your data bank is pretty weak...

C: 嗯，目前看来这是可能性最大的结论——不过我的笔记里好像没有类似的记录……
E: Yeah, probably. But I don't have anything like that in my records.

C: 列车的氛围，好奇妙……
E: The feeling on the Express is really unique.

C: 无妨，纯粹理性的乐趣所在，注定不为所有人理解。
E: No matter. It is the joy of pure logic, destined not to be comprehended by all.

C: 对哦，一般的乘客也不会特别关注身边的绿植是什么品种的…算啦~
E: Hmm, I suppose most passengers don't pay much attention to the plant life around them... Never mind⁓

C: 可能的话，我希望有朝一日，贝洛伯格的孩子们也能像我一样，近距离地感受星空。
E: I hope that one day the children of Belobog will have the same opportunity to witness the stars up close.

C: 这宇宙，还真是大得吓人啊。
E: The universe is so vast — it's scary...

C: 是我们多靠他照顾了！
E: He's the one that usually takes care of us!

C: 踏上列车旅行，是我的必然。
E: Boarding the Express was my destiny.

C: 所以，你就来到列车上了吗？
E: Is that why you decided to visit the Express?

C: 目前，我还是认为列车长更加可爱一些。
E: Right now... I'd say Pom-Pom's a smidge cuter.

C: 我正研究一种培育技术，将鲜花永久留存下来。不用制成干花，而是让水与生命永远在枝干中流动。
E: I'm researching a cultivation technique to preserve flowers forever... not by turning them into dried flowers, but by allowing water and life to perpetually flow within their stems...

C: 你是哪一种人？
E: What kind of person are you?

C: 如果不是为了教学与诊疗，我更愿意少说多想。
E: Outside of teaching and healing, I lean towards keeping my words few and my thoughts deep.

C: 免费人生对谈
E: Free life coaching.

C: 你相信直觉吗？
E: Do you believe in intuition?

C: 有些人天生贫苦，不懂得什么叫希望；也有些人天生残缺，不懂得什么叫完整……
E: There are people born impoverished who don't know what hope is. There are also people born broken who do not know what it's like to be whole...

C: 我可能会被吓醒。
E: Dreams like that would scare me awake.

C: 我也很神秘。
E: I'm mysterious too.

C: 早就问过啦。爷爷说他不知道。
E: I already asked him. He said he doesn't know.

C: 你也很可爱哇！
E: You're very cute too!

C: 你往那边挪点，我没地方睡了。
E: Move over. I have nowhere to sleep.

C: 你本以为凭你的身高，想看清屏幕上的所有数据与理论都不在话下。但等你站定，你惊觉自己的渺小。
E: You thought you could easily read all the data and theories on the screen with your height. However, when you get to your feet, you find to your utter consternation how small you are.

C: 跟他比起来，是很多啦……
E: Well yeah, compared to him...

C: 你回来啦？宜居城郊板块，新的商机新的风口，要不要？
E: You're back? We have all kinds of new suburban commercial prospects. Interested?

C: 大守护者阁下正在优化市政厅的官员结构。但在最终结果公示出来之前，请不要相信任何小道消息，一切以克里珀堡张贴的公告为准。
E: Her Excellency, the Supreme Guardian, is optimizing the structure for officials in the Town Hall. But I advise you not to give credence to any gossip before the final results are announced. Everything will be subject to notices posted in Qlipoth Fort.

C: 我有些疑问…
E: I have some questions...

C: ——还有，你说话小点声，别打扰到我构建时空隧道的模型！
E: — Also, keep your voice down. Don't disrupt me from constructing the time tunnel model!

C: 总之，我坚信这个方向一定是正确的——只要我能到下层区的矿道实地勘察一番，就一定能找到佐证我伟大理论的有力论据！
E: In short, I firmly believe that this is the correct direction for my work. All I have to do is get down into the Underworld mines and inspect the site. That will absolutely lead me to solid evidence that supports my magnificent theory!

C: 演完之前那几部音乐剧，我就没接新剧了。正好，贝洛伯格最近出了不少事，很多同事都暂时息影了…我干脆就也给自己放了个长假。
E: After I wrapped up the couple of musicals I was in, I stopped auditioning for new roles. Belobog coincidentally started having a lot of things happen recently. Many of my colleagues went on hiatus... I decided to just give myself an extended vacation.

C: 你是嗓子不舒服吗？
E: Do you have a problem with your throat?

C: 我没惹你吧，有话好好说，干嘛突然骂人？
E: Excuse me? I don't remember offending you before. Why are you so mean?

C: 谢谢，我了解得够多了。
E: Thank you. I learned a lot today.

C: 谢谢，我了解得够多了。
E: Thank you. I learned a lot today.

C: 你的歌声很好听。
E: You have a great voice.

C: 咦，你又来听小女子唱歌啊，这可不行啊，你得去歌剧院里正儿八经地听…难道说你还有什么事情要找小女子吗？
E: Huh. Are you here for my singing again? That won't do. You need to enjoy the performance in the theater... Or are you here for something else?

C: 我是银鬃铁卫技术部的执行顾问，茉莉。你是哪位？
E: I'm Molly, the executive consultant of Silvermane Guards' Technology Division. Who are you?

C: 唉，我算是看透了……
E: *sigh* It's all tricks...

C: 哼，你又没亲自去维修供暖系统，当然站着说话不腰疼！
E: Hmph. You've never fixed the heating system yourself. It's easy to be an armchair professional!

C: 唉，世风日下、道德沦丧，这贝洛伯格真是一秒也待不下去了！
E: Geez. The moral decay of this place grows more severe by the day. Mark my words. Belobog is on the brink of collapse!

C: 我本来应该直接叫银鬃铁卫去抓人的。但是我当时怒上心头，非要去跟他讨个说法……
E: I should have had the Silvermane Guards arrest him, but I was so angry and I needed an explanation...

C: 悄悄告诉您，我从报社的人那儿听说，前任大守护者出事的时候，在场的只有布洛妮娅大人一个人…怎么样，可疑吧？
E: On the down-low... I heard from my contacts at the newspapers that when the old Supreme Guardian had her accident, the only one at the scene was Lady Bronya... doesn't that seem suspicious?
*sigh*

C: 是你啊，又见面了！上次走得匆忙，还没来得及向你道谢呢。
E: ...Ah, it's you again! The last time we met, I left in a hurry. I never got a chance to thank you.

C: 又见面了，外来者。怎么说，要谈生意，还是说你找我有事？
E: Hello again, outsider. What brings you here, business or something personal?

C: 这怎么就坏心眼了…
E: Why am I a jerk all of a sudden...?

C: 干嘛用那种眼神看着我？我、我又没做什么坏事。
E: Why are you looking at me like that? I—I didn't do anything wrong.

C: 真的有什么大事吗…
E: Did something big really happen?

C: 完了完了……
E: It's over... it's all over...

C: 啊…就、就是……
E: Well... um...

C: 你不知道吗？上下层解除封锁了！
E: Haven't you heard? The Overworld and the Underworld are being reunited!

C: 当然认识啊！虽然我刚说分了家，但我们两支还是经常来往的。像什么煦日节啊之类的节日，我们都会举办家族聚会呢。
E: Of course! Although our family was divided, we do keep in touch. We hold family gatherings during festivals such as the Solwarm Festival.

C: 这暴风雪可不是偶尔刮两阵就算完事…从七百年前到现在，这大雪就一分一秒也没停过。
E: This snowstorm isn't just temporary... Since seven hundred years ago, this heavy snow hasn't stopped for a minute.

C: 这古代遗物里的门道不少吧？今天就算是让你们这些外行开开眼了，哈哈！
E: There is a lot of knowledge about relics, right? It must be eye-opening for laymen like you, haha!

C: ——当然，这只是振兴计划的第一环。希望这能成为一个好的开始。
E: — Of course, this is only the first step in a great revitalization plan. I hope it will be a strong start.

C: 你要是问这个，那我可就不困了啊，哈哈～
E: Now that's a question that's perked me up, haha~

C: 说来惭愧，暂时还没有…
E: Not yet...

C: 我还有事，回头再聊。
E: I have other things to do. Talk to you later.

C: 听起来很辛苦。
E: It sounds challenging.

C: 你说得有道理…
E: You have a point...

C: 我会多加注意。
E: Duly noted.

C: 希露瓦最近有什么动向吗？
E: What's Serval up to these days?

C: 不过，自从去过永冬岭之后…我好像再没看过她脸上阴郁的表情了。想必她已经解开了自己的心结吧。
E: But, after that trip to Everwinter Hill, I don't think I've noticed her looking all glum anymore. I reckon she's sorted her troubles out.

C: 我…这……
E: I... This...

C: 不过虎克今天心情好，就放你一马吧！找我有什么事吗，荣誉队员？
E: But I'm in a good mood today, so you're off the hook! (No pun intended.) How can I help you, honorary member?

C: 奥列格，来聊聊吧。
E: Let's talk, Oleg.

C: 布洛妮娅现在是大守护者了。
E: Bronya is the Supreme Guardian now.

C: 四千个家，四千双眼
E: Four thousand homes, eight thousand eyes

C: 贝洛伯格的夜，谎言藏不住恨怨
E: Another Belobog night, the hate the lies just can't hide, yeah

C: 那女人冷着眼，旁观发生的一切
E: Her gaze cold as ice, while the world passes by, yeah

C: 从上面的喧嚣世界，传来了银色的信戳
E: From chaos up above there comes a silver muse

C: 造物之柱的工程进展...
E: How is the Pillars of Creation Project going...?

C: 之前在下层区闹事的小队可被托帕总监罚的不轻…何况我只是个修手机的，没做什么伤害居民的坏事啊。
E: Director Topaz threw the book at those troublemakers in the Underworld... I'm just a phone tinkerer who hasn't done anything to put the residents in harm's way.

C: （玩的差不多了）
E: (That's enough playing)

C: 扑满期待地看着你，但人不能总是对着动物朋友说话。
E: The Trotter is looking at you expectantly, but people can't spend all their time talking to their animal friends.

C: 小熊发出了开心的叫声——它压着的东西，或许是原本打算送给你的礼物？
E: The cub let out a joyous call... maybe the item underneath it was a present it was planning to give you?

C: 讲个冷笑话。
E: Tell a dad joke.
...Groo?

C: 咳…咳！
E: Ahem... Ahem!

C: 多种香型，卓效修护！
E: A variety of scents and effective healing!

C: 请保佑我的私房钱别被人发现…尤其是那位……
E: Please let no one find my secret bank account... Especially my wife...

C: 好像是去年的啊？
E: Is this from last year?

C: 我吃剩的油炸岩居蟹呢……
E: Where is my leftover deep-fried rock crab...

C: 暂时还没有…但我相信大家一定会响应我们的号召！
E: Not yet... But I'm sure everyone will answer our call!

C: 不太好吧，我听说那积木里寄宿着旧世界皇室的怨灵……
E: Nah, I heard that the old world royals live inside and haunt that building block...

C: 臭小子，别起哄！
E: Quit heckling, brat!

C: 臭小子，别起哄！
E: Quit heckling, brat!

C: 冷静……
E: Stay cool...

C: 克拉拉姐姐……
E: Big sis Clara...

C: 外面有怪物，注意安全。
E: There are monsters outside. Be careful.

C: 有点困了…
E: I'm kinda sleepy...

C: 这项工程意义重大…
E: This project holds great significance...

C: ——我是贝洛伯格艺术学院前任校长，现在的博物馆馆长于尔丹。请多指教了。
E: ...I am Uldan, former dean of the Belobog College of Art, and now the curator of this museum. Pleased to meet you.

C: 在后来，我的人生便没什么起伏了。我一直做到了退休，后来又接到大守护者布洛妮娅的邀请，才来了如今的博物馆担任馆长。
E: My life has been pretty smooth sailing ever since. After my retirement, I accepted Supreme Guardian Bronya's invitation and became the curator of this museum.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆是克里珀堡文化部辖下的、全贝洛伯格最大的综合性博物馆，内容涵盖了历史文化与艺术等不同范畴！
E: Belobog History and Culture Museum is the largest comprehensive museum in Belobog under the Ministry of Culture in Qlipoth, covering a wide range of history, culture and art!

C: 他和身边的展品一起睡着了。
E: He fell asleep together with the exhibit beside him.

C: 你说自己以前是太卜司卜者？
E: You said you were once a Divination Commission diviner?

C: 一会儿是受了什么异变啊，一会儿又什么建木的落叶啊，我跟你说都是骗人的，你在外面要是见着了也别上当。
E: Just so you know, they were claiming that their curios were influenced by the anomaly or even came from the Ambrosial Arbor itself. But don't fall for their tricks, okay?

C: 这几句诗不挺好…？「起」、「你」…你看，我都押上韵脚了。七言绝句了属于是。
E: You don't like it...? Look, "knots" and "lots"... it all rhymes... four lines of heptameter.

C: 有点受打击，但是完全能接受。谢谢你的坦诚。
E: I feel attacked, but totally acceptable. Thank you for your honesty.

C: ……我、我当然知道！但，朋克洛德没有可验证的盈利模式！
E: ...I, I... of course I know! But, Punklorde hasn't validated a profitable business model yet!

C: 像吃剩的饭、掉下来的牙、甚至是身上搓下来的泥...这些外面人眼里的垃圾，在我这可都是珍贵的原材料。
E: Things like leftover food, teeth that fell out, or dirt scraped off someone's body... They may look like trash to an outsider, but they're all precious raw materials to us.

C: 我不需要，请留给别人吧。
E: No thanks, please keep it for someone else.

C: 谁看不起你了？别激动。
E: Who's picking on you? Calm down.

C: 只要不聊工作，我都欢迎。
E: As long as we don't talk about work, I'll chat about anything.

C: 那你们背地里是做什么的？
E: So what do you actually get up to on the sly, then?

C: 哎，这怎么能叫「搭讪」呢——这叫「交游」，叫「邀为同道」！
E: Oh, I'm not "flirting." This is just making friends between like-minded people!

C: 你态度好差。
E: You've got an attitude issue.

C: 哦哟～我不能答的问题可太多了——要犯的关押位置、武弁的换岗时间、食堂的供货渠道、寒鸦大人的实际年龄…这些都是幽囚狱的最高机密。
E: Oh, way too many. I can't tell you where major criminals are held, when the guards get relieved, the supply channels to the cafeteria, Madam Hanya's actual age... All these are the Shackling Prison's most highly classified secrets.

C: 老夫的爱徒们啊，一个个都积累了数百年的学养与经验，却没有半个人有成才的迹象！你说说，这么枯活千年，如野马过荒原，又有何益呢？
E: As for my darling apprentices, they've all racked up centuries of education and experience, but not a single one of them have shown any signs of success whatsoever! They're as useless as a chocolate teapot.

C: 整个公廨好像只有你最靠谱。
E: It seems to me that you're the most reliable person in the whole Chancery.

C: 这份见面礼你收下吧，以后要是有机会，咱们还得做生意呐。对了，你现在有空吗，要不咱们再聊一会？
E: Take this gift for meeting up with me. If we get a chance to work together in the future, then let's do some business. Do you want to chat more?

C: 我没什么要问的了。
E: I've got no questions to ask.

C: 不过，我看那只小麻雀最近总是被太卜呼来喝去的，我已经不打算埋怨她了。
E: Anyway, it looks like that little sparrow has been getting chewed out recently by the master diviner, so I don't intend on blaming her any further.

C: 再说了，我都能察觉，太卜能不察觉吗？
E: Besides, if someone like me can already see through her, could it possibly have escaped the master diviner's eyes?

C: 现在主要在忙些什么呢？
E: What are you keeping yourself busy with these days?

C: 嗯好…哦对了，差点忘了，你要是来参观穷观阵的，你远远地看一眼就好，未经太卜大人许可，外人可是不准靠近的。
E: Fine... Oh yes, I almost forget. If you come and visit the Matrix of Prescience, please view it from a distance. Outsiders are forbidden from approaching it without permission from the master diviner.

C: 噢，我一直佩服景元将军，还有云骑军的诸位。我见他们工作要时常通宵执勤，真不容易啊……
E: Oh, I'm a big fan of General Jing Yuan, and everyone in the Cloud Knights actually. I see they're always on-duty, working through the night. That's not easy...

C: 咱们罗浮的居民，还是得和云骑通力合作，这样才能保持现有的安宁嘛。这点自觉我还是有的。
E: Here on the Luofu, we still have to cooperate fully with the Cloud Knights to keep the peace around here. I'm self-aware enough to get that.

C: 当我赶到时，我目击三个药王秘传的妖人正在围攻一名落单的云骑，那三个叛匪竟然都是我的同族，只是外形生就了令人憎恶的变异……
E: When I got back, I witnessed three Sanctus Medicus devils surrounding a lone Cloud Knight. The three disciples were fellows of my own race, but had somehow been mutated into horrific forms...

C: 唉…借您吉言吧。您也多保重……
E: *Sigh*... I appreciate your encouragement. Take care...

C: 不过这不重要，我感觉现在的状态蛮好的，让我回归本体我还不乐意呢。
E: But that's not important. I am happy with how I am at the moment. Going back to my real body now wouldn't bring me any joy.

C: 正所谓「越狱一时爽，一直越狱一直爽」，越着越着还搞出了一些名声。有人称我是越狱大师，还抢着要我当我徒弟。
E: I have a saying: "Break out of jail once and you get a moment of joy, spend your life jailbreaking and you'll be happy forever!" I've actually become quite renowned for all my escapes. Some call me the "jailbreak master," and some are even begging to be my disciples.

C: 这你就不懂了，越狱是个危险活，我总得给自己找个替身嘛。而且在空中飞得高看得远，更容易发现一些安全破绽。
E: You wouldn't understand. Breaking out of prison is a dangerous game. It's best to find myself a substitute body. Plus, being able to fly allows me to see much further, which makes it easier to see gaps in security.

C: 我是觉得你好看。
E: Cos you look pretty.

C: 你是说雾生老～弟？哈哈哈哈，他是我最好的朋友，好到想要置之死地的程度。
E: You mean my man Kiryu? Hahahaha, he's my best friend! We're so tight that I want to give him a little squeeze... around the neck.

C: 我有一个习惯，就是我每天都会放生一本日记，有时候还会额外放生些别的东西，我怕我忘了，所以就会小声提醒自己。
E: I have a habit of releasing a diary book every day, and sometimes I also release other things. I was just reminding myself of that in case I forget.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'd better leave you to it.

C: 咱们这醒园菜，追求调味，不同食材定要搭配不同的调味、香料。而口味以辛辣椒麻为主、酸陈怪味皆有。
E: Xingyuan-style dishes are characterized by their delicate usage of seasonings, as each ingredient requires its unique blend of seasonings and spices to fully exploit its flavor. Most Xingyuan-style dishes have a hot and peppery taste, sometimes with a sour or slightly bitter touch.

C: 我可没说擅长，聊天固然是有技巧的，但是这技巧并不高明，人人都能掌握。
E: Well, that's not what I said. Conversational skills are far from esoteric and can be easily mastered by anyone.

C: 传统的烈焰浓茶再加上一些果汁、蛋清、或者奶制品…甚至是苏打豆汁儿，就能将烈焰浓茶做成混合饮品，满足不同人的喜好了。
E: Add some juice, egg whites, or milk... or even mung bean soda to the traditional Flaming Potent Tea, and you'll create different mixed drinks for different preferences.

C: 等等，你明明是个化外民，怎么还关心起罗浮的事来了？真是莫名其妙……
E: Wait, you're an Outworlder, so why would you care so much about the Luofu? I don't get you...

C: 过去的金人巷到底是有多繁华呢？
E: How prosperous was this alley before?

C: 不管公司想做什么，金人巷都应该做出积极改变。请问今天是有什么工作计划吗？
E: Regardless of the IPC's wishes, positive changes need to be made to Aurum Alley. Do you have any work plans for today?

C: 感觉内心很平静。
E: Yes, I've found my inner peace.

C: 想问你点事。
E: I'd like to ask you something.

C: 幽囚狱里素材虽多，但设备有限。很多东西在外面稀松平常，但在这里可是稀罕玩意儿。以我的大才做这些日用化学品绰绰有余～
E: We have an abundance of raw materials in the Shackling Prison, but there's also an appalling lack of equipment and facilities here. Many things you wouldn't even take a second look at outside are rarities in here, and making these simple household chemical products is but child's play to me!

C: 我给集团开发了很多热门商品～比如说仙人快乐茶口味的牙膏、燃茶口味的辣椒酱、可冲泡的苏打豆汁……
E: Since then, I have developed many bestsellers for the Correctional Group, such as Immortal's Delight-flavored toothpaste, Flaming Tea-flavored hot sauce, instant mung bean soda...

C: {NICKNAME}，你要是愿意，咱们俩随兴聊聊。于我而言，这就如同公务之余饮茶解乏了。
E: {NICKNAME}, if you're up for it, we can talk about anything you want. To me, it's a welcome tea break from my tedious work.

C: 随兴聊聊就好。
E: Just a casual chat.

C: 末了加些感情戏当佐料，少不得反目成仇、化敌为友。这样的故事多看几遍就乏了。不过，我还是觉得这样的「云上五骁」更有趣。
E: And of course, there's always some emotional drama thrown in for good measure, with the inevitable friends-turned-enemies or enemies-turned-friends trope. Reading these stories over and over again gets boring pretty quickly. But still, I think the "High-Cloud Quintet" portrayed in these stories are far more interesting than their real life counterparts.

C: 找彦卿聊天？眼下没有公务，倒是无妨。老师想聊些什么呢？
E: Have a chat with me? Sure, I can do that, since I'm not working on anything at the moment. What would you like to talk about?

C: 不过，这些日子代行将军职务，确实有不一样的体会——
E: Still, I must say it's quite a unique experience for me...

C: 来点儿「快乐工作」的建议。
E: Please give me some advice to achieve happiness at work.

C: 停云还活着，我自然是开心的。但一想到她经历过的痛苦，和她身入局中的决意，我便感到痛心和难过。
E: I am naturally delighted to know that Tingyun is still alive, but thinking about the suffering she endured and her determination to be involved in this situation fills me with pain and sadness.

C: 我其实是很自私的。联盟的使命固然重要，可我更希望自己爱着的人们可以安然度过平静的一生，而不必立下什么壮绝的悲愿……
E: I am quite a selfish person. The Alliance's mission is important, of course, but I do wish my loved ones could live out their lives in peace and not have to take some great and tragic vows...

C: 那就等哪天我手头积压的病号看完，或者等我再长高些，我就请个没有头的长假，离开仙舟到外边的世界逛逛吧。
E: Wait till I finally settle the backlog of patients or when I grow taller. That's when I'll take a long vacation and travel beyond the Xianzhou.

C: 你尾巴上那玩意儿是什么？
E: What's that thing on your tail?

C: 这样吗？那下次再让寒鸦教教吾吧。
E: I see. It seems I must ask Hanya for more advice.

C: 比如那个藿藿家的岁阳、比如素裳、比如桂乃芬，还比如汝。也许是吾的错觉，但她似乎稍比以前开朗了些许。
E: Like that heliobus Huohuo has, Sushang, Guinaifen, and you. I could just be imagining it, but I find her more cheerful compared to before.

C: 据我所知，雪衣大人已经去执行别的任务了。
E: As far as I know, Madam Xueyi is already back on another mission.

C: 很恐怖！不、不过并不是以人类以为的那种恐怖……
E: It's terrifying! B—But not the kind of terrifying that humans would fear...

C: 感谢{NICKNAME}大人理解。
E: Thank you for understanding, {NICKNAME}.

C: 十王司都做什么？
E: What does the Ten-Lords Commission do?

C: 你这说书人还管茶楼生意？
E: You are a storyteller, but also involved with running the tea house here?

C: 瞬间，茶杯中茶水便活了过来，化作一团小小的水球浮在半空之中。铁皮囚犯瞬间反应过来，丁零当啷，小小走廊里所有铁器就兀自飞起，冲向饮茶青年。
E: The tea in the cup came alive in an instant, forming a small watery orb floating in midair. The prisoner reacted in kind, and in a clattering cacophony, all the iron objects in the narrow corridor hurtled towards the tea-drinking youth.

C: 可是这靶人已经变成了碎块，怎么才能看出这一剑的威力呢？白发剑士，取出好友相赠的宝剑，朝着校场上空挥了一击。
E: But this dummy has been shredded into pieces. How would one be able to judge the strength of a blade? The ivory-haired soldier unsheathed the prized sword gifted by a friend and swung it at the air.

C: 只此一剑落下，擂台上的胜负已经无关紧要了。
E: With this decisive strike, the result in the ring had become inconsequential.

C: 什么啊！这都是我旭霞一个人！你去全银河打听打听，「仙舟万事通」说的就是我旭霞。
E: Wha-! It's all just one person! Xuxia! Me! Go ask around the cosmos! Everyone knows that "The Multifaceted" is me!

C: 对仙舟大部分人来说，这张资格证就决定了至少四百年的生活。可万一我不喜欢这工作了呢，你能想象吗？不喜欢的工作做个四百年。
E: To most Xianzhou natives, this certification grants you at least four centuries of livelihood. But what if I didn't like the job? Can you imagine? Slogging away at a gig you hated for four hundred years?

C: 话不用说得这么难听吧？
E: That's a bit harsh, isn't it?

C: 不愿意告诉我你叫什么名字？明白了，反正我也记不住。
E: You don't wish to tell me your name? I see. Not like that I'll remember it anyway.

C: 所以呢，我就找了个星图上都无人问津的世界，找机会私自溜了上去了……
E: And that's why I found a world so desolate that nobody even visited it on the astral charts, and took the chance to steal away...

C: 哦…确实，你快走吧，别到时候连你也被抓走扭送十王司了，哈哈。
E: Oh... so they are. You should hurry up and go, or you'll end up in the Ten-Lords Commission too, haha.

C: 我心说，人嘛，也就是一种动物。我就拿了几丸解语丹给他的傻儿子。结果那孩子突然开窍叫他爸爸，把老周可高兴坏了。他三请五请，非要供养我。
E: Well, humans are also a type of animal. So, I took a few pills to his son, then that child suddenly came to his senses and called out the word "father." Old Zhou was overjoyed. He offered so many times to have me live in his house, all expenses paid.

C: 我怎么没感觉有风？
E: How come I didn't feel any wind?

C: 中小包裹，当日可达。大的包裹，也就需要两到三天。您有什么需求，敬请吩咐。
E: We can do same-day delivery for small and medium packages. Big ones take two to three days, though. If you have any other requirements, please let us know.

C: 嗯，那就随便聊聊吧，反正一时半会儿我也不会很忙。
E: Sure, a casual chat it is then. It's not like I've got anywhere else to be.

C: 现在都在靠什么赚钱？
E: What do you do to make money now?

C: 停云所在的天外行商团？
E: The intergalactic merchant guild that Tingyun is in?

C: …我敢说那姑娘将来肯定能接下驭空大人的职务。
E: ...I dare say that girl is the next in line to succeed Madam Yukong.

C: 停云小妮子所在的「鸣火」商会先后连接起了十六个世界的贸易使团，还把海市办成了星海盛典。
E: The Whistling Flames guild that Tingyun works for got in bed with the trade delegations from sixteen worlds and turned the Grand Fair into an intergalactic festival.

C: 你在这里做什么工作？
E: What do you do here?

C: 嘴上说说而已，报名了吗？
E: Talk is cheap. Did you even sign up for the competition?

C: 再见，希望有朝一日，你也能成为被我认同的强者。
E: Goodbye. I hope that one day you can become formidable enough to earn my approval.

C: 为仙舟的狐人感到担心。
E: I feel sorry for the foxians in Xianzhou now.

C: 所以说，我才需要你的帮助嘛，等我准备好了，我就去找你。
E: That's why I need your help. I'll see you when I'm ready.

C: 欢迎客官，要不要来点好吃不贵的罗浮小吃？
E: Greetings. Would you like some cheap but delicious Luofu snacks?

C: 从天上往下瞧，这星槎海…？
E: Looking down from here, is this the Starskiff Haven...?

C: 不怎么好卖，仙舟饮料市场的水太深了。
E: Not exactly. It's not that easy to penetrate the beverage market here.

C: 到底要选哪个呢…
E: Which one should I get...

C: 那这样吧…「飞霄将军在一系列事件中被云骑军追杀，她一边防备一边追查，原来步离人早就渗透了云骑军高层，而竞锋舰其实是步离人运作几十年的邪恶计划结果。」
E: How about this: "Even as the Cloud Knights relentlessly hunted her down in a series of incidents, General Feixiao remained steadfast, leaving no stone unturned in her search for the truth as she stayed on her guard. It turns out the borisin had long since infiltrated the top-level Cloud Knights. The Skysplitter was, in fact, the culmination of the diabolical plans that the borisin had been scheming over the last few decades."

C: 我负责左引擎，你负责右引擎是吧？
E: I'm in charge of the left engine, so that means you're responsible for the right one, right?

C: 有吗？我也不知道您是在将我与谁作比较。
E: Really? Then again, I don't know who it is you're comparing me against.

C: 直到我感受到主人的悲伤，却久久没有回到绥园，我才决定出发去找她……
E: It wasn't until I felt the owner's sorrow, and yet did not see her returned to Fyxestroll Garden for quite some time, that I decided to set out in search of her...

C: 像话吗！给他当开船苦力？老子是来享受你们人类纵情极欲的快乐的，是来给你打工的吗？
E: Seriously? Work as a driver for him? I'm here to gorge myself in the ultimate pleasures you humans feel when you give in to your desires, not to be a salary worker for you!

C: …你不认识我，我也不认识你，我是被浮烟派去附身于十王司判官的…岁阳，呜呜……
E: ...You don't know me and I don't know you. I'm a... heliobus sent by Cirrus to take possession of a Ten-Lords Judge... Wooo *sob*...

C: 我本以为那会是某个浪漫约定的开始，谁能想到他竟然让这颗小行星的轨道偏转了几度，让它在六个月后坠落在了自己的故乡……
E: I thought it would be the beginning of some romantic promise, but who knew that he would make the asteroid's orbit shift by a few degrees, so it would plummet into his home world six months later...

C: 吼吼…居然主动靠近了吗，不选择逃跑，而是主动向我宵炽靠近吗？
E: Ohoho... You're actually taking the initiative to get close to me. Instead of choosing to flee, you're approaching me?

C: 是吗？那可真是惊险呀。
E: Really? That sounds thrilling.

C: （适当地贴近一些）
E: (Scoot closer appropriately)

C: 每一枪都射中人家的玉兆模块。就像是在人家的心上凿开一个洞……
E: His every shot hit my jade abacus. Like he was boring a hole into my heart...

C: 要是能他用长枪多打打我就好了，毕竟在我心中，兵刃相接的声音的比任何的赞美声都更加悦耳。
E: It would've been perfect if he stabbed me real good with that spear of his. I mean, the sound of weaponry impacting my body is more music to my ears than any praise.

C: 不过，我这样做是有道理的。你想啊，你将新人时期放眼于整个选手的职业生涯中来看，是不是就好比人一生之中的青春期？
E: Of course, I have my reasons for doing this. Think about it: If you view the newcomer's phase as part of a contestant's entire career, isn't it like the adolescence in a person's life?

C: 那个选手断了一臂，所用的是金属义肢。上一世的「我」认为传统功夫点到为止，打算先亮个相，结果那个化外民不讲武德。
E: That fellow was one-armed, replaced by a metallic prosthetic. The previous "me" was a strict observer of traditional martial etiquette, and wanted to take a photo first, but that outworlder was dishonorable.

C: 那你会修星槎吗？
E: So can you repair starskiffs?

C: 你这样怎么能入远征部队？
E: How'd you ever manage to get onto an expedition team then?

C: 文人雅士没有闲钱。
E: All literati have no dispensable cash.

C: 怎么了呢？
E: What's wrong?

C: 我打算待会去码头…
E: I'm going to the dock later...

C: 错错错，里面是矿泉水。
E: You're wrong. There are bottles of mineral water inside.

C: 金人巷一日游！
E: Aurum Alley one-day tour!

C: 比我一年的工资都高…
E: I don't even make that much in a year...

C: 不，你没有理解我的意思。
E: No, you don't get what I mean.

C: 真的吗，我都没看出来…
E: Really? I didn't realize it at all...

C: 实在是有点匪夷所思……
E: It's quite baffling...

C: 只有我一个人在思考…
E: I was the only one who was curious about...

C: 罗浮是要举办葬礼了吗？
E: Is a funeral happening on the Luofu soon?

C: 嗯。
E: Yup.

C: 呃，刚才那句其实是我爸的原话……
E: Um, that was actually what my father said...

C: 太卜带着斥候前去探查了，希望她能找到解救的法子。
E: The master diviner took scouts over to investigate. I hope she can find a way to settle all of this.

C: 嘻，是不是特别地可爱？
E: Hehe, isn't it super adorable?

C: 啊…真好看啊，尤其是发夹中间的那颗水晶，简直像你的眼睛…谢谢你，小夏！
E: Oh... It's so beautiful, especially that crystal in the middle of the hairpin. It's just like your eyes... Thank you, Naxy!

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 对此，我很庆幸。因为只有身为人，才能够不断变化、成长。不同的人会分别记住我的不同面貌——
E: I'm grateful for that. Because only as a human can one keep changing and growing. Different people will remember different aspects of me.

C: 呵呵呵……
E: Heh heh heh...

C: 我用尽手段、留下暴君的骂名，是因为若要铲除不公，只有这一条路能走通。
E: I've used every means at my disposal and earned the name of tyrant. That was because to root out injustice, this was the only path forward.

C: 呵呵，披索，你之前不是成天念叨着白厄哥的吗？现在怎么反倒不好意思起来了？
E: Heh, Piso, weren't you always going on and on about Phainon before? Why so shy about it now?

C: 好好歇会儿吧。
E: Take a good rest.

C: 啊，久闻你的名号，还是第一次见面。
E: Ah, I've heard so much about you, but this is our first time meeting.

C: 姐妹关系很融洽嘛。
E: You sisters seem to get along well.

C: 最精妙的设计是，只要轻轻一捏，它就能用小伊卡的声音唱歌哦！你听——嘟嘟嘟嘟，嘟~嘟~嘟嘟——
E: The most ingenious part of the design is that with just a gentle squeeze, it can sing in Little Ica's voice! Listen—Doot-doot-doot-doot, doot~doot~doot-doot—

C: 哀地里亚的女孩会把花冠送给即将远行的旅人，祈祷花瓣的枯萎气息帮助旅人躲过塞纳托斯的窥探，平安回到故乡。
E: Girls in Aidonia give flower crowns to travelers who are about to embark on long journeys. They pray that the scent of the withered petals will help the traveler evade Thanatos's gaze and return home safely.

C: 协助破案有奖金么？
E: Are there any rewards for helping to solve the case?

C: 呃…这个也不行。
E: Um... No can do.

C: 请出示您的登舰凭证与观礼票据。
E: Please show your boarding pass and event ticket.

C: 悬浮的画卷里传来阵阵嬉笑，在云烟缭绕的山间，墨客们吟诵出诗谣。
E: Bursts of laughter come from the floating scroll as clouds roll over the mountains within, and scholars recite poems.
Thought

C: 一旦竞锋舰的航行速度低于某个数值就会引起爆炸…就在此时，你注意到竞锋舰引擎停止了运行，竞锋舰正在失速……
E: Once the Skysplitter's speed drops below a certain threshold, it will detonate the bomb... At this point, you notice that the Skysplitter's engine has stopped running, and it's losing speed...

C: 你把目光上移，在信息栏里看到了「机巧人偶，陪伴型」。箱子上坑坑洼洼的砸痕证明了收货人的愤怒。
E: You move your eyes up at the information column and see a phrase that reads, "Ingenium Puppet, designed for companionship" The battered condition of the package indicates that it has been smashed repeatedly by its angry recipient.

C: 你不是在飞霄将军那里？
E: Weren't you at General Feixiao's?

C: 你走开，我不想和你们这些帮凶站在一起。
E: Go away, I do not wish to be seen alongside the uncouth likes of you.

C: 请叫我「银河球棒侠」。
E: Call me the Galactic Baseballer.

C: 乡亲们，战斗还没有结束！
E: Folks, the battle isn't over yet!

C: 拳法对枪术，期待！
E: Boxing versus marksmanship, I can't wait!

C: 浥尘客栈原名「游云逆旅」，但老板觉得这名字无法体现出一间客栈应有的人文关怀，就此更名。
E: The Petrichor Inn was originally named the Cloud-Striding Hotel for Travelers Near and Far. Thinking that the name did not reflect the culture of the inn, the owner decided to change the name.

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 要不要转来财富学院？
E: Do you want to transfer to Fortune Academy?

C: 简直就是专业乐队！
E: It's exactly like a professional band!

C: 想办法处理刀片。
E: Find a way to handle the razors.

C: 「阿辰，展信佳！你不在我身边时，我也时时感受到你！」
E: "Chen, I hope everything goes well on your side. Although you aren't around, I can always feel your presence by my side!"

C: 在某位无聊人士将「一天一个果，医士远离我」的招徕改成「一天十个果，医士来找我」后，仙舟的水果摊里再也看不到任何广告了。
E: Ever since some person with too much time to spend changed the slogan "a fruit a day keeps the doctor away" to "ten fruits a day makes the doctor come your way," no one has seen any advertisements around the fruit stand on Xianzhou again.

C: 那是某个持明前世的记忆，很快它就将随逝水流去。
E: That is the memory of a Vidyadhara's past life, soon to flow away as does water down a river.

C: 也许她早就应该离开这枚持明卵，但是显然还没有准备好——她伤痕累累地回到了古海，并非是为了再次出发，她应当休憩。
E: Perhaps, she had already left the egg earlier, but she was obviously not ready for the departure yet. She dragged her battered self back to the ancient sea not to set off to a new destination, but to take a break.

C: 啊，真是普通而又平凡的一天。你不禁如是想。
E: "Oh, this is just like any other day," you muse.

C: 「一只手机罢了…」快递盒细声解释，向后微微退却。但你能感觉到它似乎在掩饰什么。
E: "It's just a phone..." The package explains in a feeble voice while backing away slightly. You can feel that it is hiding something.

C: 你将手伸进包裹之中，开始翻弄了起来。很快，蓝色的鲜花就变成了残枝败叶。
E: You reach into the packaging and begin to tear through the content. Quickly, the blue flowers transform into dead petals.

C: 汪！它对你叫。可惜你不是三月七，听不懂它想对你说什么。随着它张嘴叫，一张纸条掉了下来。
E: Woof! It calls out to you. Unfortunately, you are not March 7th and you can't understand what it is trying to tell you. As it opens its mouth to bark again, you see a note fall.

C: 你掏了掏箱子，难以置信！难以置信！箱子的角落中竟然还有一张被揉成一团的字条？
E: You rummage through the box again and... unbelievable! Inconceivable! There's another note that's been crumpled into a ball in the corner?

C: 墙角堆着三个快递箱。依照你的良好习惯，你决定看看它们都是来自何处、去向何方的。
E: There are three delivery boxes piled up in the corner. As you are a good person, you decide to take a look at where they are from and where they are going.

C: 这世上根本没有幽灵鬼怪…
E: There's no such thing as ghosts...

C: 「十恶等罪，狱成之后」…
E: "After serving the full term, those who committed any of the Ten Unpardonable Sins..."

C: 在生命消失以后，爱并不会消失，只是换一种方式存在，你对此深信不疑。
E: Love doesn't disappear after a life is gone. It just exists in a different way, and you strongly believe in it.

C: 人生最美妙的享受是什么？当然是一边听音乐，一边喝苏乐达。而这台设备可以让你同时做到两者。
E: What is the most precious moment in life? Listening to music while enjoying SoulGlad, of course! This device right here lets you enjoy both.

C: 直行：奥帝购物中心；后退：钟表小子广场。
E: Go straight: Oti Mall; Go back: Clockie Plaza.

C: 茶几上的茶具们开始微微颤动…它们仿佛有话要说。
E: The tea utensils on the tea set start to tremble... as if they have something to say.

C: 但愿你的所作所为能惊艳整个梦境，逐梦客。
E: May your achievements blow everyone in the Dreamscape away, Dreamchaser.

C: 你是做什么的？
E: What do you do for a living?

C: 那些家族的野狗，到现在都不肯放过我！
E: Those rabid dogs of The Family are always on my tail!

C: 有机生命的身体结构趋于稳定，往往在成百上千个琥珀纪的时间周期内都不会发生变化；即使面对病痛，多数情况下也只要服用药物就能解决问题。
E: Organic life structure is stable — it will not change over the thousands of Amber Eras. Even if struck by sickness, many of their conditions can be resolved with medicine.

C: 为保障所有会员的正当权益…根据规定，只要梦境护照登记的资料能证明是位皮皮西客人，就允许进入俱乐部……
E: To protect the rights of all club members... based on regulations, if Dreamscape Pass credentials are able to prove that you are a Pepeshi visitor, then entry into the club will be permitted...

C: …皮皮西人是全宇宙最伟大的种族。
E: ...The Pepeshi people are the greatest species in the universe.

C: 汪…汪汪。汪！
E: Woof... ruff ruff. Woof!

C: 汪，汪汪！
E: Woof, ruff ruff!

C: 你很出名吗？
E: Are you a celebrity?

C: 对吧对吧？以前我还觉得，新闻不还原真相怎么行。可现在我有了更深的理解。
E: Right? Right? I used to think the news had to restore the truth. But I've since come to a deeper understanding.

C: 我不认识你——不过既然你有那个财力来到匹诺康尼，就起码该懂点基本的礼节。
E: I don't know about you — but seeing as you have the financial means to visit Penacony, you ought to understand the basics of etiquette.

C: 呼，真累人呐…瞧，这就是我每天的工作。
E: Whew, that's tiring... Look, that's my job every day.

C: 客人好眼光！垃圾桶怪客是我们这里人气最高、表演效果也最好的道具！我这就把它给您带来。
E: Good choice! The Trashcan Monster is our most popular item with the best performance! Let me bring it out now.

C: 名誉、金钱、快乐…那些吸引我视线的东西，似乎哪样都没能握在手中。
E: Fame, wealth, happiness... all these things attract me, yet I can't seem to get hold of any of them.

C: 又是你啊……
E: Oh, it's you again...

C: 不行，再这么下去，我就要在这鬼地方看一辈子店了！
E: No way. If this goes on, I'll have to take care of this shop forever!

C: 你在乎名利多过家庭。
E: You care more about fame than family.

C: 毕竟除了等待，我也没有别的事可做了。
E: There's nothing for me to do but wait, after all.

C: 您对此有什么了解吗？
E: Do you know why this might be?

C: 像我这种只是没了尾巴的，尚不影响日常生活，却也百年来都未曾在他人面前抬得起头……
E: For those who don't have tails like me, it doesn't affect our daily lives, yet we've never been able to raise our heads high and proud for the last century...

C: 自己都没有，还天天问我！就说烦不烦人、讨不讨厌！
E: They don't even have one, yet incessantly ask me about it! So annoying! So sickening!

C: 但现在，我终于能放下责任，用「普通人」的方式来对待钱了。
E: But now, I can finally lay down my duty, and treat money in the way that an ordinary person can.

C: 为了游戏币…
E: Just for some tokens...?

C: 我都记不清自己已经连续加班多久了…早该想个办法加入苜蓿草了，唉……
E: I can't even think how much overtime I've worked back-to-back now... I should have figured out a way to join The Alfalfa Family...

C: 薄浪时断时续、如诉如泣；于是你看见铅灰色音符沉入水底，寂寥又美丽。
E: The waves carry intermittent whispers, and you observe the gray notes submerging into the water, lonesomely yet elegantly.

C: 哦？倒是我小瞧您了…那么这个呢——卡利白、柠檬青，金松子、橙水晶，再辅以少许苦艾与茴香，我叫它「重生者」。
E: Oh, my apologies... How about this? Blended with Kapo-Kali, Lemon Lazuli, golden pine nut, and orange crystal, with a subtle touch of absinthe and anise? I call it "Rebirth."

C: 哎哟，我们那地方是一颗偏远星球，您没听过真是太正常了。
E: Oh, it's a remote planet, and it's understandable if you have never heard of it.

C: 您好，我是酒店的安保负责人，「猎犬」家系的科蒂。有什么需要帮忙的吗？
E: Greetings, I'm Coty of the Bloodhound Family, the head of security for this hotel. How can I assist you?

C: 先说到这吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 客人您好，请问有什么可以为您效劳的吗？
E: Greetings, esteemed guest. How may I assist you today?

C: 就好比您在星际网络上认识一位朋友，也没必要真的飞到那人的星球去看个究竟，是不是？
E: For example, when you meet someone online through the Interastral network, it doesn't necessarily mean you'll physically travel to their planet to check it out. Don't you agree?

C: 啊，伟大的钟表匠…多少人为了追逐他的步伐来到这华美的梦想之城！
E: Ah, the illustrious Watchmaker... Many people have come to this splendid City of Dreams, aspiring to follow in his footsteps!

C: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
E: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

C: 许多星际和平影视的电影里，{M#主角}{F#女主角}都会拿上这么一把枪，在最危急的关头给坏蛋致命一击——你也可以买上一把。
E: In many films produced by Interastral Peace Media, the {M#lead actors}{F#lead actresses} often use this gun to deal a fatal blow to the villain at the most critical moment. You can get one too.

C: 身体不累，但是心累嘛。谁会不喜欢开着车到处兜风呢？
E: You may not feel tired physically, but what of your spirit? Who wouldn't enjoy going on a car ride?

C: 什么嘛。果然人类都不可信，嘴上说着越快越好，心里却怕得要命。
E: What? Humans are indeed deceitful. You claim to enjoy the speed, but you're actually scared to death deep down.

C: 豪华飞车（金）
E: Luxury Speedster (Gold)

C: （还是保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 小鸟向你挥了挥翅膀，应该是让你「赶紧走」。
E: The birdie flaps its wings at you, supposedly trying to urge you to go.

C: 啾，满意了？
E: Tweet. Happy now?

C: 帕姆，你看看这个梦泡？
E: Pom-Pom, check out this dream bubble.

C: 哟，快来瞧瞧！「黄金的时刻」历史上第一位被幸运派对之神眷顾的贵宾诞生了！
E: Yo, check this out! The first-ever guest in Golden Hour to be blessed by the Lucky Party God is here!

C: 赶紧刷卡开门吧。
E: Swipe the card to open the door now.

C: （与「家族」成员预约…我该怎么回答呢……）
E: (Scheduled a meeting with a member of The Family...? How should I respond...?)

C: 偶尔来了客人也都是非富即贵的大人物，哪有人愿意和一个小小的迎宾员聊天呢……
E: When we do get the odd visitor, they're all extremely rich and important figures. Why would any of them want to talk to a lowly usher...

C: 您评评理——哪能有这种事儿呢！
E: You tell me... How could such a thing happen!?

C: 我经常刁难垃圾桶。
E: I regularly make life difficult for trashcans.

C: 暴力…是对美梦的背弃！
E: Violence... is a betrayal to dreams!

C: 我当即呼叫了猎犬的家人们将他拿下，永远逐出梦境。
E: I summoned the Bloodhounds instantly to arrest him and exiled him from the Dreamscape forever.

C: 还有很多事情要做…加油干吧。
E: There's much more to do... gotta work harder!

C: …你能不能有点追求？算了，就当我没问过吧。
E: ...Can you at least have a little ambition? Meh, forget I ever asked.
