C: 那些「当红个人梦泡艺术家」，你以为他们的作品当真有多与众不同？算了吧，不过是刚巧赶上个好时机，顺势赚了一波流量罢了。
E: Those flavor-of-the-month indie dream bubble artists... you think their works are really one-of-a-kind? Perish the thought. They simply lucked out and rode the wave of popularity.

C: 真是…令人羡慕啊……
E: I'm green with envy...

C: 我也有一位…很重要的朋友。但我们之间的关系出现了一些…裂痕。实不相瞒，我正深受此事困扰。
E: I, too, have an... important friend, but our friendship is going through... a rough patch. In fact, I'm quite upset because of this.

C: 真是大坑啊！难道人与人之间连最基本的信任都没有了？！愿神主教训这些破坏「同谐」的商人！
E: That was an outright scam! Can people nowadays still be trusted!? May the Great One punish the merchants who disrupt Harmony!

C: 更可气的是，家族还不能对他做出过分的惩罚，只能将他逐出梦境…我不甘心啊啊啊啊！
E: Much to my dismay, The Family only ousted the guy from the Dreamscape without any heavy sentences... That's unacceptable!!!

C: 你是在暗戳戳讽刺我的战甲只是做梦吗？开玩笑的~
E: Are you suggesting that the armor only exists in my dream? Don't worry. I'm just messing with you.

C: 给我讲讲呗？作为回报，关于匹诺康尼你要是有不了解的，都可以来问我。
E: Will you tell me some stories? To repay you, you can come to me any time there is something about Penacony you don't fully understand.

C: 前些日子我在影城闲逛，心血来潮去门口的快餐车转了转，然后就多了俩兄弟……
E: A few days ago, I was wandering around the theme park and went to check out the food trucks by the entrance on a whim. Then, I ended up gaining a couple of brothers...

C: 匹诺康尼是个好地方，尤其对你们这些宾客而言，热闹，好玩，无休无止，可以肆意放纵直到天亮，不用担心任何现实的烦扰。
E: Penacony is a good place, especially for you guests. It's lively, fun, and never stops. You can party until the break of dawn without having to worry about any real-life problems.

C: 信息技术越是发达，可操作的空间就越大。想完美假扮成另一个人非常困难，但合成对方的声音、仿造电子证明、盗取生物数据都极为简单。
E: As information technology grows more developed, the extent that we can manipulate the world grows. Perfectly imitating someone else is difficult, but synthesizing their voice, forging their electronic certificates, and stealing their biological data is extremely easy.

C: 我什么都不想吃…
E: I don't want to eat anything...

C: 在常人看来这是一组平平无奇的隐夜鸫雕像，但他们其实各有所指。
E: To a regular person, they seem to be nothing more than a group of unremarkable Nightingale Statues, but they each have their own meaning.

C: 哇嘎嘎嘎嘎！哪位客人要的披萨，介意我偷偷尝尝嘛，就…就一口！
E: Waaahahaha! You won't even let me try the pizza they ordered? Just a little... just... just one bite!

C: （进行搭讪）
E: (Chat)

C: …远远避开？
E: ...Keep a distance?

C: 有兴趣聊聊吗？
E: Wanna chat?

C: 有个家伙蹲了两个琥珀纪的号子，猜猜为什么？那家伙满嘴秽语，侮辱家族…警告无果，我们只好请他换个地头生活，免得扰民。
E: There was this guy who's been in jail for two Amber Eras. Can you guess why? He was constantly spouting off obscenities and insulting The Family... He paid no heed to our warnings, so our only option was to ask him to live somewhere else to avoid riling people up.

C: 哪怕是美梦剧团的广告牌，谈到它时也会骄傲地亮起灯来——能来大剧院一趟，也算是我的梦想。
E: Even the Sweet Dreams Troupe's billboard lights up when it talks about this building. Visiting the Grand Theater is basically my dream come.

C: 我们不能继续走老路了！机会只有一次，我们必须唱出风格，唱出水平，给鸢尾花家系那帮*古典名家*一点小小的现代震撼！
E: We can't keep going on like this! You only get one shot, and we have to use our style and our talent to rock that fusty old classical Iris Family a rockin' good shock!

C: 回去检查账户，要是信用点没有减少，我就自愿放弃朋克洛德的身份！别以为你可以在超级骇客的面前为所欲为！
E: Go back home and check your account. If you haven't lost any credits, I'll relinquish my Punklordian passport! Don't just think you can get away with doing whatever you want around a super hacker like me!

C: 什么时候盛典巨星沦为这种只要挤几句煽情的话，就能成功当选的垃圾赛事了？演出实力呢？作为明星的涵养呢？这是选秀，不是比谁的信念更坚定！
E: Since when was such a superstar system reduced to a trash competition where anyone who says such pathetic platitudes could win? What about the acting? Where's the celebrity training? This is a talent show, not a contest to see whose faith is stronger!

C: 比赛结束之后，我又见到了他，那时候他的状态似乎有些不对劲……
E: After the contest finished, I saw him again and something didn't seem quite right about the state he was in...

C: 只要是在节目拍摄期间，我就是说话最好使的人！哪怕是家主亲临片场，也得等这条过了再说！
E: So long as it's during a shoot, whatever I say goes! Even if any family head wanted to drop in, they still have to wait for me!

C: 加拉赫啊…这个人很神秘，总能给你种熟悉、却又看不透的感觉，但交个朋友是没啥问题——而且他的调饮技术简直绝了，塔利亚的小酒馆根本没法比！
E: Gallagher... He's real mysterious. I can never read him, but he always seems strangely familiar, too. I guess he's alright as a friend... Plus, he mixes an unbelievable drink. The taverns in Talia could never compare!

C: 哟，瞧瞧是谁来了？{M#好小子}{F#好姑娘}，没想到我们居然在这又见面了。
E: Oh, look who it is! I didn't expect to meet you again, {M#boy}{F#girl}.

C: 它有存在的价值。
E: Its existence has value.

C: 哈哈，不愧是强者的发言！不过嘛，普通人总会需要一个避风港的。
E: Haha, the words of the strong! For real though, normal people will always need a safe haven.

C: 你听说大剧院的事了吗？
E: Have you heard about what happened at the Grand Theater?

C: 不知不觉间…冒险就已经结束了啊。我花了好大力气才解开谜题，来到这里。但是现在，突然间我就无事可做了……
E: Before I even realized... my adventure had already ended. I went to great lengths to solve the puzzle and make it here. Now, I'm suddenly left with nothing to do...

C: 我也想要种田！
E: I want to farm too!

C: 《使一颗心免于哀伤》深受孩子们喜爱，我们最近正在逐字逐句地打磨与练习。希望有一天，现实中的人们也能听见他们动人的歌声。
E: If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking is very popular with the children. Recently, we have been practicing and focusing on every word and syllable, in the hopes that one day the real world will get to hear their beautiful voices.

C: 令人遗憾的是，联觉梦境变成了纸醉金迷的美梦，而我从那时便想，如果大家能够来到虚拟空间中分享知识和技能，该有多好。
E: Regrettably, the Synesthesia Dreamscape quickly transformed into a dream of indulgence and luxury. It was then that I thought how amazing it would be if everyone was able to gather in a virtual space to share their knowledge and skills.

C: 没事，您有空留意一下就行，定有酬谢。
E: It's fine. Just keep an eye out. I'll pay you for it.

C: 遇到过，我被打趴下了。
E: Yes, and it floored me.

C: 努力过就好了。
E: As long as you did your best.

C: 看到在监狱的废墟上搭建起新家园的囚犯，看到在梦境的荒漠里飞驰的逐梦客，看到黑暗中不断摸索前路的人们。
E: You can see prisoners building new homes on the ruins of their prisons, Dreamchasers who speed through the desert of their Dreamscapes, and people who keep groping their way forward in the darkness.

C: 是否是因为我疏于照顾，才没能给它足够的安全感？是不是我并没有尽到应尽的责任……
E: Did I not give it enough sense of security because I failed to care for him enough? Was it because I didn't do everything I could for him...

C: 「用音乐为大家带来欢乐」…看吧伙伴，这个约定，我最终还是好好遵守了啊。
E: "Bring joy to the world through music"... Look at me now, Asna. This promise of ours: I've kept my word until the very end.

C: 想起了已经是很久之前的事情了。从我离开美梦，来到流梦礁后，因为一直很喜欢烹饪，便想到开一家店来维持生计。
E: It's something that happened long, long ago. When I first left the Dreamville for the Dreamflux Reef, I wanted to open my own store to make a living and continue my love of cooking.

C: 嗯…这附近就有一只小鸟啊——就在我面前，<color=#dbc291ff>那边的椅子</color>上，看到了吗？
E: Hmm... There's a bird nearby somewhere... right in front of me by <color=#dbc291ff>that chair</color>. Do you see it?

C: 关于小镇居民…
E: About the townspeople...

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，比赛结束后，很多设备都需要及时维护，负责这些的那个小家伙，应该还在<color=#dbc291ff>赛场的哪个角落</color>干活啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: After a competition ends, a lot of equipment needs to be maintained promptly. That bird in charge of this equipment should still be working <color=#dbc291ff>in some corner of the racetrack</color>.

C: 哎呀～如果有小鸟飞回来找人家，不就扑空了吗？啾啾？
E: Oh dear, wouldn't they miss me if birds came back looking for me? Tweet tweet?

C: 客官，这里就我们一人一鸟，就算您装作听不见也是没用的啾！
E: Honored guest, it's just you and me here. It's pointless even if you pretend not to hear me, tweet!

C: 希望未来有一天，人家也能搭出那么好看的鸟巢啾。
E: I hope one day in the future, I can also build a nest that's just as pretty, tweet.

C: 又见面了…你也沉浸于这壮丽奇观之中了吗？
E: We meet again... Are you also immersed in the grandiosity of this sight?

C: 唉，医生告诉我，人的记忆功能退化的时候，会先忘记名词，再忘记动词，因为动词比名词重要些……
E: *sigh* The doctors tell me that when a person's memory starts fading, he will first forget nouns, then verbs, because verbs are more important than nouns...

C: 「注定无法实现」的意思是…
E: "Destined not to realize my ideals," that means...

C: 就像他以前说过的那样：「希望和理想不会消失，只是一时迷了路。挺过去！它们一定能找到回家的办法。」
E: It is just as he said before: "Hope and dreams will not vanish. They'll just be lost momentarily. Bear with it! They will surely find their way home."

C: 如果我不回到猎犬家系，而是在这里创作哈努兄弟故事，似乎也是一种不错的生活……
E: It doesn't sound like a bad way of life if I don't return to the Bloodhound Family and instead stay here to create Brother Hanu's story...

C: 对于哈努努，我也有很多不了解的地方，他的故事实在太长，「钟表匠」生前并没有跟我讲完…所以，我会和那些好奇的人一起去探寻。
E: There are many things I don't understand about Hanunue, either. His story is too long, and the Watchmaker did not finish telling me about them when he was alive... Which is why I will find it with those who are curious.

C: …您又来了。
E: You're back.

C: 我的镜头——我的眼睛——将那一刻记录了下来。从那时起，我的逻辑模块出现了无法修复的错误。
E: My lens — my eyes — recorded that moment. From then on, my logic modules have been beset with irreparable errors.

C: 男人半垂眼睑，苍白面庞在灯光与天光的辉映中显得格外落寞。
E: Basked in both natural and man-made light, the man's drooping eyelids and pale complexion make him seem especially lonely.

C: 啊，好像又有一个能参与星间旅行的机会，我得多去了解一下。
E: Ah, there seems to be another chance for me to participate in an interstellar journey. Let me learn more about it.

C: 席间，他一边对于我的创造力频频称赞，一边又提出我从未想过的组合，继续品尝。
E: While sampling dishes, he would frequently praise my creativity while suggesting combinations I never thought of before.

C: 无论疆域怎么样，这都算是在统治一个小小的王国？您说对不对？
E: You could even say I'm the ruler of my own little kingdom when I'm in the kitchen. Don't you agree?

C: 当然啦，如果你就是为此而来的，我倒是很愿意进行非常全面的教学。最近可是有半价……
E: Of course, if that's what you're here for, I'd be happy to give you a comprehensive tour. You can enjoy the experience at half-price right now, too.

C: 可能有些人会觉得我下作，但我只是在更有效地整合、利用资源。公司这么器重我，给我这么好的发展机会，我怎么能浪费呢？
E: Some might think I'm cutting corners, but I'm just efficiently utilizing resources. How could I squander the trust and opportunity the IPC has given me?

C: 看你的模样，应该不是匹诺康尼本地人吧。需要法律援助可以随时找我，只要是在法律允许的范围内——好吧，或者稍微越界一点点，我都能帮你搞定。
E: Hmm, you don't seem to be a native Penaconian. Feel free to come to me if you require legal assistance, as long as it's permissible by the law... Alright, scratch that. You can count on me, even if it's bordering on gray areas.

C: 哎呀，客官您看，所有的孩子都回来了啾~
E: Look, dear guest. All of my children have returned, tweet~

C: 让我想想…对了，有个孩子特别害怕热闹，可能现在正躲在某个需要<color=#dbc291ff>望远镜</color>才能看到的角落里呢啾~
E: Let me think... Oh right, there's a child who's especially afraid of crowds. Perhaps it is hiding in a corner that can only be seen by a <color=#dbc291ff>telescope</color>, tweet~

C: 我没什么想说的了。
E: I don't have anything else to say.

C: 你在嘀咕什么呢？
E: What are you muttering about?

C: 平平淡淡才是真呐……
E: The best life is indeed a simple and mundane one...

C: 如您所愿，方案布设成功。
E: Your design of choice has been applied.

C: 工作进展如何？还顺利吗？
E: How's work going? Everything good?

C: 初次见面，星穹列车的开拓者，侍者亚梅塞菈为您服务。结论：您有<unbreak>13%</unbreak>的概率遭遇了「迷路」问题，<unbreak>85%</unbreak>的概率遭遇了「饥饿」问题。
E: Nice to meet you, Trailblazer of the Astral Express. Attendant Amsella at your service. Conclusion: There's a <unbreak>13%</unbreak> chance that you are lost, and an <unbreak>85%</unbreak> chance that you are hungry.

C: …喔，原因在我。想必是我的记忆存储模块又出了问题，抱歉给你带来了困扰。
E: ...I see, it must be me. It seems like there is an issue with my memory storage module again. I apologize for any inconvenience caused.

C: 喔，这些话我都只和您一个人讲，可千万别告诉别人。要是让他知道我把这些放进了记忆里，一定会暴跳如雷。
E: Oh, I'm only sharing this with you, so please don't tell anyone else about it. If he finds out that I stored such information in my memory, he would fly into a rage.

C: 听朋友说，那里汇聚了宇宙中一心求学之人…不知道是不是真的。
E: My friend told me that everyone in the universe who solely seeks to learn is gathered there... I wonder if that's true.

C: 哎，我太天真了…那个听见摇滚就皱眉的父亲，怎么会诚心祝福我的音乐事业？
E: *sigh* I was too naive... How could my father, who frowned whenever he heard Rock 'n' Roll, sincerely support my music career?

C: 但…上赛季的拉力赛整整比了二十四个系统时，他从球笼出来的时候人都闷馊掉了，我受不了那味道。
E: But... last season's rallying event lasted a full <unbreak>24</unbreak> system hours! He reeked of sweat when he got off the Spheroid. There's no way I can handle that smell!

C: …不，可能只是因为我还不够有钱？
E: ...Wait, maybe I just don't have enough money yet?

C: 输多了，皮皮西人也失去了信心，开始逃避参与体育竞技项目。
E: After many losses, the Pepeshi lost their confidence and began to avoid taking part in physical competitions.

C: 现在知道我的诉求了吧——机会难得，得趁这次校庆，向学院当面讨个说法才行。
E: Now you understand my complaint, right? Opportunities like this don't come around often. I will take the school anniversary celebration as my moment to bring this matter to the university face-to-face.

C: 真是讽刺，曾经高喊着要用喜剧改变世界的人，转眼就把立场和初心统统抛诸脑后。说出来的大道理，翻脸就可以当笑话。
E: How ironic. Those who once yelled about how they would change the world with comedy have quickly cast aside their principles and ideals. The lofty ideals they once spoke of are nothing more than a joke now.

C: 经理好。音乐派对还没有结束， 外面这么热闹，您该去享受欢快的校园生活才对。
E: Hello manager. The music party isn't over yet. It's bustling out there, and you should be enjoying the carefree school life outside.

C: 但…在房间里看到那把吉他的时候，心里还是会不平静。当时那么用力地在舞台上呼喊过，这样重要的回忆…没法轻易忘记。
E: But... when I see that guitar in the room, my heart can't stay calm. That time when I yelled my lungs out on the stage, this important memory... is not so easily forgotten.

C: 就像…「旋律是对世界的记录」，经理不是也能从各种各样的奇特现象中，得到作曲灵感吗。既然你和乱破同学能做到，我也想要尝试。
E: Just like... "melodies are records of the world." Don't you obtain musical inspiration from all sorts of wondrous phenomena? If you and Rappa can do it, I'd like to give it a try too.

C: 期待你的后续演出！
E: Looking forward to your future performances!

C: 再说…要是我不做学院代表了，会有谁记得我呢？
E: Besides... if I don't become the academy representative, who would remember me?

C: 你看我这勤工俭学的也不容易，要不要来支持一下？不买的话看看也行嘛！
E: You know, this part-time work thing to pay for school isn't easy for me. How about showing me some support? Even if you're not buying anything, just come take a look!

C: 请关注嘉宝娜！关注嘉宝娜谢谢蕉！
E: Please follow Gabbana! Follow Gabbana, thank you, bana!

C: 重拍是常事，不必焦虑。
E: Reshoots are normal. Don't sweat it.

C: 这个嘛…我、我很喜欢看到美好的东西诞生在自己手中的样子，还有人们享受这件东西时的表情…就和筑梦一样，这也是为什么我会选择筑梦学院的原因。
E: Hmm... I—I've always liked creating something with my own hands, and watching people's expressions when they enjoy what I've made... It's just like dreamweaving. That's why I chose Dreamweaver Academy.

C: 唉，我以前总觉得自己不起眼，但每当想要做出重要的决定时，才会发现自己身上背负了多少人的目光……
E: *sigh* I always thought I was pretty inconspicuous, but it's when I'm thinking of making important decisions that I notice so many eyes gazing at me...

C: 可惜我没有长焦义眼，没有火控雷达，更没有电磁脉冲炮——更没预先查杀出补充包里的蠕虫病毒。好险，差点变傻。
E: But I have no tele-focus artificial eyes, nor fire control radar, much less electromagnetic pulse cannons. I didn't even detect and eliminate the worm in the pack beforehand. I was lucky I didn't turn dumber.

C: 希望您喜欢这几个笑话。我还会继续努力创作的。
E: I hope you enjoyed those jokes. I will continue to work hard on them.

C: 「存护」答曰：「因为，你的墙来了。」
E: The Preservation responded, "Because everyone is swarming around you."

C: 大多时候，仍是独自思量，等待启程。
E: Most of the time, I've been reflecting in solitude while waiting for our departure.

C: 能确信的，只有忆庭之镜映照出的星球绝非寻常之地。更何况…那是个受三重命途纠缠的世界。
E: What is certain is that the planet reflected in the mirror of the Garden of Recollection is no ordinary place. Moreover... that is a world where the Three Paths are entangled.

C: 无数演员穷尽一生，只为自己能出现在这块小小的屏幕上。
E: Countless actors spend their whole lives just to get the chance to appear on this small screen.

C: 虽然但是，在这种地方喝苏乐达，是否不太雅观。
E: It would be in poor taste to drink SoulGlad at a place like this.

C: 请放心，所有武器都附带有防火涂层，如运输中发生爆炸，支持伤者本人进行维权。
E: Please rest assured: All weapons have a layer of fireproof coating. If an explosion occurs during transportation, the injured party's legal rights will be fully enforced.

C: 瞭望镜在这里似乎有些多余，身在高空时还需要仰望星空吗？你不解，你决定——
E: The telescope over here feels a bit redundant: Is there even a need to gaze upon the sky when you are surrounded by it? You don't understand, so you decide to...

C: 看得太久，你觉得有些头晕目眩，或许该换个角度？你决定——
E: You feel somewhat dizzy after staring into the lens for too long. Perhaps you should change an angle? You decide to...

C: 你自诩在公司也有些人脉，还曾和知名主持人叽米合作过，不知把面前的雕像替换成它的模样，能否向它收取广告费。
E: You think of yourself as having some connections in the IPC, and even have worked closely with the famous host, Owlbert. You wonder if replacing the statue before you with its visage allows you to claim an advertising fee from the bird.

C: 那就…麻烦订两人份。
E: Then... Order for two, please.

C: 歌剧院好漂亮啊。
E: The theater is gorgeous.

C: 还能称作梦吗？
E: Are they still considered dreams?

C: 有会说话的甜筒吗？
E: Do you have talking ice cream cones?

C: 那岂不是我睡觉时…
E: Does that mean when I'm sleeping...

C: 新买的礼服都浪费了…
E: Bought new gowns that end up going to waste...

C: 再这样下去…我还不如去拆喷钞机呢，这个好歹实打实地来钱快。
E: At this rate... I might as well break Cash-Spewers! At least this earns cash quickly.

C: 麻雀，没了你我可怎么活啊！
E: Sparrow, how can I go on without you!

C: 都这样了，还不让退票…
E: Even in a situation like this, tickets are non-refundable...

C: 是不是你记错了？
E: Did you misplace it?

C: 这场棋差一着的比赛，绝对会成为百年内盛会海选最经典的一幕。
E: What a close competition. People will be talking about this Festivity Audition moment for a century.

C: 不可能，我看中的偶像比她强多了！
E: Impossible. My idol's much better than her!

C: 我觉得吧，做生意呢讲究和气生财。我看大家不如一人退一步……
E: I think making money amicably is the essence of doing business. How about we all compromise...

C: 没有。不过，我刚刚做了个噩梦，在梦里，一种突如其来的绝望包裹了我…给我吓醒了。
E: No. But I did just have a nightmare where I was seized by an abrupt feeling of despair... It woke me up in a sweat.

C: 是有这么回事，不过咱们这儿的按钮数量应该没那么多……
E: Is that so? But we shouldn't have that many buttons here...

C: 别急，在看了在看了…
E: Don't panic. We're already looking...

C: 嘿嘿，不好意思啦！
E: Heh-heh, sorry about that!

C: 谐乐学院公认的优秀艺术影片。你与海报中的哈努兄弟对视良久，而后发出了一声很酷的*哼*。
E: An excellent art film publicly acknowledged by Charmony Academy. You stare at Brother Hanu in the poster for a long while before you exhale a cool "hmph."

C: 谐乐学院的每个人都渴望拍出《钟表小子》那样优秀的作品，却始终没能拿出同等地位的成果…难道是因为克劳克影业的打压？
E: Everyone in Charmony Academy dreams of filming such a stellar work like Clockie, but they can never produce something that equals such greatness... Could this be because of harassment from Clock Studios?

C: 你总是在吃完一包零食前就忍不住拆封下一包，于是桌子变成了这副样子。
E: You can't help but open another snack before finishing the first one, and now the table looks like this.

C: 学生的义务是学习，难得有这样的机会，不如就让部员们研究你的冒险经历与开拓旅程好了。你召集了一批对无名客感兴趣的学生，组成了关于你的学术社团。
E: A student's duty is to study. With such a rare opportunity, why not have the members delve into your adventurous experiences and trailblazing expeditions? You gather a group of students interested in the Nameless and form an academic club about you.

C: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
E: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

C: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
E: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

C: 水温逐渐稳定，热气开始升腾……
E: The water temperature gradually stabilizes, and steam begins to rise...

C: 我是伊阿宋，目前管理着这支商队「阿尔戈」。奥赫玛的大地兽都是我的好朋友，它们也是多亏了我才有自己的名字。
E: I'm Iason, the manager of this caravan "Argo." All dromas in Okhema are my good friends, and I'm the one who gave each of them a name.

C: 哈哈哈！除了味儿有点大，审美一定经得起时间的考验。
E: Haha! My art will definitely withstand time, even if it comes with a bit of a stink.

C: 嗯，我正好去看看在烧的陶罐，下次再聊。
E: Sure, I'll go check on the dolia in the kiln. Catch you later.

C: 我可不这么觉得。来，照照镜子，好好瞧瞧你这幅气急败坏、却又死活不肯放下架子的嘴脸吧——看到了吗，我们家伏尔甘的模样可比这顺眼多了。
E: Well, I beg to differ. Take a good look in the mirror and see how worked-up you are over this. Notice that? My Vulcan looks leagues above that.

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 但在那座城邦覆灭之后，麦迪特瑞恩蜜果也跟着灭绝了。即便后来生命花园又重新培育出了那种果子的改良版，价格上却不怎么亲民。
E: Sadly, with the fall of the city, Mediterranan figs became extinct. Although the Garden of Life has bred a new version, it's not exactly budget-friendly.

C: （{F#她}{M#他}刚才走了）
E: ({F#She}{M#He} just left.)

C: （救命啊，我变成奇美拉了）
E: (Help, I've turned into a chimera!)

C: 一口吨了。
E: Down it in one gulp.

C: 你当时正准备越过悬锋城，对吧？没想到闯进了奥赫玛军队的埋伏，和我们一样。还有旁边这个{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}信徒也是。
E: You were just about to cross Castrum Kremnos, right? You didn't expect to get into an ambush by the forces of Okhema, just like us and this believer of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} over there.

C: 能！如果我说话有用，我确实想说「能」。
E: Sure! If my words are useful, I'd say "Sure."

C: 理性要是有用的话，要警察做什么！
E: If rationality really worked, what would we need the police for?

C: 我只负责，拦下来。之后黄金裔，还有元老院，会处理。就这些了，守城无聊。
E: My job is just to stop them, then the Chrysos Heirs and the Council of Elders take over. That's all. Guarding the city is boring.

C: 轻信你，那也是一种迷信吧？
E: Falling for your words... isn't that a superstition in itself?

C: 算是吧，不过和我一样做这份兼职的外地人还有很多。
E: Yeah, although many outlanders like me are working here as part-time administrators.

C: （我想问的差不多了。）
E: (That's pretty much all I wanted to ask.)

C: 「阿里斯蒂亚的岩石与海浪之间，绵延着大理石寺庙、海浪形喷泉，与宏伟的宫殿；」
E: "Aristia's shores graced by temples grand. Fountains like waves, palaces that stand."

C: 暂时不想听了。
E: I've had my fill already.

C: 让人们洗去脏污，获得安宁，是云石天宫创设的初衷，而协助守卫奥赫玛的战士们更加值得敬佩，所以提供对应的服务是我们应该做的。
E: Allowing people to wash off their taint and attain serenity — that's the original purpose of the Marmoreal Palace. The warriors who assisted in defending Okhema are even more worthy of commendation, so it is only natural that we provide the respective services.

C: 给我讲讲浴场吧。
E: Tell me about the baths.

C: 你愿意给他人做衣服吗？
E: Would you make clothes for others?

C: 悬锋人中的悬锋人…如此评价迈德漠斯倒也合理，他无疑是最英勇的悬锋人，在战场上，谁也不能将其击倒。
E: The most typical of the Kremnoans... A fair evaluation of Mydeimos. He is undoubtedly the most heroic warrior among all Kremnoans. He is unstoppable on the battlefield.

C: 与阁下的交流十分愉快，很期待再度与你畅谈。
E: It's been an absolute delight to speak with you, {F#Lady}{M#Lord} {NICKNAME}. I look forward to our next talk.

C: 不过这并不意味着哀地里亚人不珍惜生命。相反，他们认为只有在世间行走磨砺足够长久，才能有坚韧的、足以渡过冥河面见塞纳托斯的灵魂。
E: However, that does not mean that Aidonians do not treasure life. On the contrary, they believe that it is only by living a long life and tempering oneself will one gain a soul tenacious enough to cross the River of Souls and meet Thanatos.

C: 他怎么你了？
E: What did he do to you?

C: 还行吧，我在这儿住不习惯，总觉得少了点什么，可能是因为没有家人在身边吧。
E: It's fine. I'm not used to living here yet, I always feel like something is missing. I imagine it's because my family aren't by my side.

C: 你相信我吗？我们真的赢了，对吧？刻法勒会赞扬我们的勇气，对吗？
E: Do you believe me? We were victorious, weren't we? Kephale will praise us for our courage, won't they?

C: 别了吧，咱们也不熟吧。
E: Best not. I don't really know you.

C: 诶呦，看来你也认识和我一样的优质信徒啊？不错不错，有机会记得给老头子我介绍介绍！
E: Oh-ho! You know other outstanding disciples like myself? That's great! You'll have to introduce me sometime if you get the chance!

C: 你问我我问谁？刚不是说了吗，这玩意我可决定不了——你得先找到与自己命运等重的东西，把它交给我，我才能给你占卜。
E: What are you asking me for? I just told you, that's not something I can decide... You'll have to find something as valuable as your own destiny and give it to me before I can tell you what it is.

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 我包里的这宝贝就是失传已久的「西尔菲翁肥皂」，它的原材料西尔菲翁，采集自我家乡城邦郊外的山中，因为黑潮的影响，是一种现在已经无法再采集到的香料。
E: This stuff in my bag is the long-lost Silphion Soap. Its raw material, Silphion, grows in the mountains just outside the suburbs of our home. Due to the black tide, it's a spice that can never be harvested ever again.

C: 我这都在说什么蠢话啊。
E: What am I saying all this stupid stuff for?

C: 所有人的生活都是这样——醒来睁开眼睛，思考第一顿饭要吃什么；吃完了第一顿饭稍微做点自己的事，又开始为第二顿饭发愁…直到最后上床睡觉，然后开始新的循环。
E: Everyone's life is the same: Wake up, open your eyes, think about what to have for breakfast, eat that, catch up on personal affairs, then start worrying about what to have for your second meal... All the way up until bedtime, when the cycle starts again.

C: 哈哈，「小家伙」们今天只是表现有些古怪，身体还是挺健康的，也没有受伤。所以我今天还算清闲，你想聊什么都行。
E: Haha, the little guys are just acting a little weird today. They're all healthy and injury-free. So I pretty much have a bunch of free time today if you want to chat about anything.

C: 还有就是，最让我担心的一点——它们的眼神变了。大地兽的眼睛虽小，却特别有神。以前总是湿漉漉的很平静的，看着就让人感到安心。
E: And what's more, the thing that worries me most: Their eyes have changed. Dromas eyes are small, but very bright. They used to be moist and calm, giving you this feeling of contentment.

C: 嘈杂转为了寂静，随后转为了——悲鸣？你只能听见几句含糊不清的，听起来像是「悬锋的清洁工」之类的叫唤。
E: The rabble of noise turns to silence before turning into... wails? You only manage to overhear a few muddled words... Are they saying "Kremnos Cleaner"...?

C: 不过没事儿，我也是一个只知道躺着的懒人——祝你能在奥赫玛玩得开心！
E: Fear not though, I am merely a lazy person who lives only to lie down... May you enjoy your time in Okhema!

C: 终有一日，属于我的时刻会到来。我的死会让敌人心有余悸，而战友们会对我的棺材洒下热泪……
E: One fine day, my moment will arrive. My death will haunt the enemy with lingering fear, and my comrades will weep passionately over my coffin...

C: 好在这位大块头的工作已经临近收尾。呲——铁胚入水，哈托努斯终于转身看向你。
E: Good thing this burly smith is almost done. The billet sizzles when doused in water, and Chartonus finally turns around to meet you.

C: 我们没有国家，我们生活在各个城邦。能够安稳，我们就满意。
E: Kingdoms, we have not. In cities, we live. Content with stability, we are.

C: …你感受到室友的目光——他对你的所为只字不言，而根据你对他多年的了解，那目光精准包含了三分担心…五分鄙夷…十分嫌弃。
E: ...You feel your roommate's stare — he says nothing of your actions, but having known him for so many years, that stare accurately comprises three parts worry... five parts disdain... and a chock-full of loathing.

C: 你在脑中发散着可能出过的洋相，面部表情变化莫测得像所有阿哈面具的叠加体。最终你抹着泪逃离了房间……
E: Your mind maps out possible scenarios where you could've made a fool of yourself, your facial expressions contorting in ways that can only be described as all of Aha's masks stacked on top of one another. Finally, you wipe your tears and flee the room...

C: 帕西提亚将指尖搭上你的耳背，天外之音轻柔地传入你的耳中。
E: Pasithea places her fingertips against the back of your ear, and the echo from beyond the world softly flows into your ears.

C: 很遗憾，本来还想，和老朋友打个招呼。
E: Too bad, I wanted to greet, old friend.

C: 当我提起「阿卡索斯」的时候，所有人都知道说的是什么。当包裹寄往「阿卡索斯」的时候，信使绝不会弄错目的地。是我的故乡，这点永远不会改变。
E: When I mention "Icatus," everyone knows what that is. When you send a parcel to "Icatus," there is no way that the messenger would go to the wrong location. It is my hometown. That will never change.

C: 我们看到了圆形的东西，才得到「圆」的概念。「阿卡索斯」也是这样，但现在你却说，「阿卡索斯」规定着所有能找到的阿卡索斯城。
E: I have to see a circular object to obtain the concept of a "circle." "Icatus" is the same. However, you are now saying that "Icatus" itself defines the cities of Icatus that we discover for ourselves.

C: 哈，我就猜到你准会相信他那套言论。要是在奥赫玛公然质疑阿卡索斯的真实性，是要引起众怒的。但没关系，我愿意为我的论点辩护。
E: Hah, I knew that you would favor his argument. If Okhema were to publicly doubt the truth of Icatus' existence, it would be certain to incite outrage. I do not mind, however. I am willing to defend my theory.

C: 要是它在空间之内存在，那么它必然有固定形状。它是圆形的、方形的、和现在的阿卡索斯城相同的，还是奇形怪状，根本无法被度量？
E: If it exists in space, then it must have a physical form. Is it circular? Square? Is it the same shape as Icatus is in currently? Or is it another obscure shape that cannot be measured?

C: 不，不对...这里的阴影应该更深一些。啊，但如果加深，会不会影响整体的平衡？真是令人困扰...这种灰色总是让我想起雨后的天空，但它又应该更...更澄澈些。
E: No, that's off... these shadows should be deeper. Though, darkening them too much might mess up the balance. It's tricky... this gray reminds me of the sky after a storm, but it needs to be crisper.

C: 嗯，我不太能分清颜色。小时候我曾和常人无异，直到…家乡被黑潮席卷，我的眼睛就是在那里被侵蚀的。
E: I can't really distinguish colors anymore. I was just like anyone else as a child until the black tide swept through my hometown and corroded my eyes.

C: 想闲聊几句，现在方便吗？
E: I was hoping to chat for a bit. Is this a good time for you?

C: 只可惜悬锋孤军只让悬锋人加入…不过没关系，万敌哥哥说了，悬锋城有悬锋城的荣耀，奥赫玛也可以有奥赫玛的荣耀…嘿嘿。
E: It's just a pity that the Kremnoan Detachment only allows the Kremnoans to join... But it's fine. Mydei said that Castrum Kremnos has its own pride, and Okhema can have its own pride too... Hehe.

C: 不过，最近元老院的人会委托我创作一些宣传性质的东西，他们给得相当多，但……
E: However, recently, the Council of Elders has been commissioning me to create some promotional works. They pay quite generously, but...

C: 有什么烦心事吗？
E: Is there something troubling you?

C: 这台乐器是…
E: This instrument is...

C: 我们用传说中奇兽的名字为它命名，也就是「奇美拉」——由不同动物的部位组合而成的全新生物。是不是很贴切？
E: We named it after the legendary beast, the Chimera — a whole new lifeform composed of different animal parts. Isn't it quite fitting?

C: 行吧，我也累了，今天在这儿宣讲了这么久，嘴巴都干了……
E: All right, I'm getting tired. I'm all parched from a long day of talking...

C: 我才没发呆，这叫冥想研究！
E: I'm not daydreaming. This is called a meditation experiment!

C: 先说这些吧。
E: Let's talk later.

C: 我虽然心里没底，但也不能打击士气，就抱着试试看的想法四处闲逛，没想到阴差阳错地溜到了奥赫玛的营帐附近——可能他们看我不像个战士吧。
E: I wasn't too confident, but I wasn't about to demoralize them. So I wandered around to see if I could think of anything. Who'd thought, I somehow ended up nearby the Okhema camp — I probably didn't look like a soldier to them.

C: （拿出记忆残晶）
E: (Take out the Memory Crystal Shard)

C: 你将海豹玩偶抱在了怀中，充分感受着绒毛的舒适与温暖。睡意混合着幸福的错觉，渐渐从你的脑海深处蔓延开来……
E: You embrace the seal doll in your arms and lose yourself in the comfort and warmth of its fur. Drowsiness and an illusion of happiness begin to slowly sprout from the depths of your mind...

C: 哎呀呀～说起来还是托塔米拉小姐的福呢。小女子先前虽有担任过一部新剧的女主角，可惜剧评人说这种题材太俗套了……
E: Oh, I have Miss Tamila to thank for this. I once starred as the lead in a new play, but the critics brushed it off as being too cliché.

C: 您也知道波月古海是持明族的圣地，之前虽然也经常有持明族在海边巡逻，但总能被我找到空档打两桶水。
E: The Lunarescent Depths is a sacred site for the Vidyadhara. Though they used to patrol the shoreline, I was always able to sneak in and scoop up a couple of barrels of water.

C: 可是…除了那位大人，其他的祭祀也都是这样的啊？
E: But... Does that mean other priests scam as he does?

C: 万径之门，雅努斯，门径之泰坦，命运三泰坦中的长姊。它揭示城邦未来、指引万民前路，于众泰坦中堪称最为完美的一尊。
E: The Gate of Infinity, Janus, is the Passage Titan and eldest sister of the Three Titans of Fate. They show the future of each city and guide the paths of the people. They are even referred to as the most perfect among all Titans.

C: 什么？…吓唬谁呢，阁下，悬锋人野蛮无忌，怎可能穿得惯你身上这样严严实实的衣服。
E: What? ...Who are you trying to scare? My Lord, the Kremnoans are savages. There is no way they would be adorned with such elaborate finery as you are.

C: …给我听饿了。
E: ...I am hungry now.

C: 能做什么呀，我能做的无非是些家长里短的事咯。
E: What else can I do? My days are filled with simple, essential chores.

C: 啊…没问题。要聊聊奥赫玛推理协会的故事吗？我的那几位朋友…他们都是很好的人。
E: Ah, sure. Would you like to hear about the Okhema Deduction Society? My friends... they are wonderful people.

C: 尼科马库斯比我们的年龄都大一些，性格也更沉稳。他是「绳结学派」贤人的首席秘书，负责招募新人的工作。他标准很严格，听说上任以来总共也只招了两人。
E: Nicomachus is a bit older than us and is known for his calm and collected nature. He holds the position of head secretary for the Nodist Sage, in charge of recruitment. Known for his stringent standards, he's reputed to have recruited only two people since his tenure began.

C: 这工作听上去有点像所谓的「冒险者」，但其实不过每天在传信石版上跟进树庭发布的各种信息，推测黑潮的活动情况，从中规划一条相对安全的寻物路线……
E: While it might sound like the life of an "adventurer," it's mostly about checking on the teleslate information from the Grove, predicting the movements of the black tide, and mapping out a relatively safe route for retrieval missions...

C: 哦，没关系。最近是多事之秋…您也要多注意安全。
E: Oh, that's alright. These are tumultuous times... Take care and stay safe.

C: 我了解的也不多…
E: I know little about her myself...

C: 当然可以啦！*我们*在世间旅行千年，每个人都有丰富有趣的经历呢！小灰具体想听什么故事呀？
E: Of course! We've traveled the world for thousands of years — each of us has countless rich and fascinating experiences. What kind of story would you like to hear, Little Gray?

C: 那纺锤后来在战火中丢失了。*我们*的旅途也并不顺利。没有黄金裔愿意响应*我们*的号召，甚至还有坏蛋把我们丢进了牢中监禁……
E: But that spindle was lost in war. Our journey wasn't smooth either. Not a single Chrysos Heir was willing to heed our call. Worse still, there were villains who imprisoned us in a cell...

C: 直到刻律德菈找到了*我们*，是她让黄金裔们团结一心，将神谕变作律令。
E: Until Cerydra found us. It was she who united the Chrysos Heirs and turned the prophecy into law.

C: 然后，把你感受到的这股力量，像是撒网一样丢出来！
E: Then, cast out the power that you sense, like it's a net!

C: 谢谢你送我回到人间。
E: Thank you for bringing me back to the mortal world.

C: 它同样带着生命的体温。
E: They also carry with them the warmth of life.

C: 真正让我抱怨的是，我预感十年后，二十年后、甚至三十年后，我的工作内容都会一成不变，而我迟早也会变成我讨厌的老顽固。
E: What really gets to me is the thought that ten, twenty, or even thirty years down the line, I'll still be doing the exact same thing. And eventually, I'll become one of those stodgy old bureaucrats I can't stand.

C: 我会带去你的问候。
E: I will give her your regards.

C: 没问题。
E: Certainly.

C: 贵族都是像你这样吗？
E: Are all nobles like you?

C: 在这样的时刻，或许只有乐声才能掩过琐碎的杂音，将毫无意义的死亡改写为史诗般壮丽的结局吧。
E: At a time like this, perhaps only music can cover the meaningless background noise and transform pointless deaths into an epic, magnificent finale.

C: 不要，担心我。卫士一定，守好这里，不论多久。这，是山之民的誓言。
E: Don't worry about me. The guards will protect this place, no matter how long. This, is the Mountain Dwellers' oath.

C: 但愿下一世，我们还是大地兽的伙伴！
E: I hope in the next world, we'll still be partners with the dromas!

C: 守卫告诉我，他们在城外发现了一具尸体，模样看着像是马尔库斯。但我还没确认，他们说要等遗体收敛好后才能喊我过去的。
E: The guards told me they found a body outside the city that looked like Marcus. But I haven't confirmed it yet — they said I must wait until the remains are prepared before I can go see.

C: 恐怕是因为{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的陨落，理性和逻辑也变得不再稳固了。
E: Likely due to {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' fall, reason and logic has grown unstable.

C: 你自己又在做什么？
E: And what exactly are you doing here?

C: 啊？
E: What?

C: 打算？我这把老骨头还能有什么打算？我倒是想一走了之，可信徒们把我从神殿里救了出来，我总不能跟{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}一样抛弃他们。
E: Plans? What plans are left for these old bones? I wish I could simply walk away, but the faithful saved me from the temple. I can't abandon them as {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} abandoned us.

C: 信仰种种，需要生者来延续价值——直至目睹生命的消散，我方才明白。
E: Faith holds meaning when the living carry it forward — only after witnessing the loss of life did I finally understand.

C: 希望，先一步行至西风尽头的他不会孤单。
E: Having gone ahead of us to the end of west wind, I hope he won't feel alone.

C: 无数历史，无数纷争，无数消亡，都为此刻而生。现在，我坚信这一点。
E: Countless histories, endless strife, lives lost beyond measure — all were meant for us to reach this moment. Now, I believe that with all my heart.

C: 我就不知道怕字怎么写。
E: I don't even know how to write the word "fear."

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 嗯…有位织者熟悉晖之民的信仰。金丝带来消息，它正仰望着<color=#dbc291ff>坍塌的穹顶</color>，念诵着耳濡目染的祷告呢。
E: Hmm... There was a weaver well-versed in the faith of the Sunfolk. The golden threads brought news, it now gazes up at the <color=#dbc291ff>collapsed dome</color>, reciting prayers learned through lifelong devotion.

C: 干什么坏事呢你？
E: What sneaky thing are you up to?

C: 咳、当然啦，如果莉维娅那丫头非得求着我带她一起，也不是不可以考虑……
E: Ahem, well, maybe if Livia begs me to bring her along, I might consider it...

C: 没事，我懂。没想好就慢慢想，反正也不急着赶这一天两天的。
E: No worries. I get it. Take your time. No need to rush it.

C: 搜索较近的一堆。
E: Search the closer pile.

C: 谁的倒影？
E: Whose reflection do you mean?

C: 因为荡秋千很放松，我很喜欢。一摇一摆，在最高处默念烦恼，荡下来的时候就全部甩开啦。
E: Well, swinging is just so relaxing, I love it! I tell my worries to the sky at the highest point, then leave them all behind on the way down.

C: 要不，我来写一句？
E: What if, I contribute a line?

C: 我知道你心里的小秘密哦。
E: I know a little secret of yours.

C: 你们信史追查官真是死板，这叫艺术加工，世界上没有哪本史书是没有艺术加工的……
E: You History Investigators really are too rigid. This is artistic refinement! There isn't a single historical chronicle in the world that hasn't been artistically enhanced...

C: 你是哪个「海洋之神」的祭司？
E: To which sea god did you serve as priest?

C: 他，他说，是吟风爵。
E: H—He said it was Dux Carminum.

C: 本狮说，这有什么，还好吧，大家都知道，他，他就是这样的。
E: I replied, that doesn't sound bad at all, everyone knows that's the way h—he is.

C: 嗯…有位织者相当机灵。金丝带来消息，它正躲在<color=#dbc291ff>砸下的吊灯旁</color>，自叹身手敏捷呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's quite nimble. The golden thread brings tidings: They are hiding <color=#dbc291ff>by a fallen chandelier</color>, marveling at their own reflexes.

C: 别消遣我嘛，贵客——你明明已经知道一只若虫的位置了，先去把它找到吧。
E: Oh, don't tease me, honored guest. You already know where one of the nymphs is. Why not go fetch them first?

C: 是啊，必须让绿球菜们加把劲才行迷。
E: Yeah, we've got to get those greenie cabbage to give it their all, mem.

C: 自我记事以来，这片密林还未如此繁荣过。
E: In all my memory, this forest has never been so full of life.

C: 呵呵…你们在吃肉食，但却对它的无穷奥妙一无所知迷。
E: Hehe... you're eating meat, but you know nothing about the wonders it holds, mem.

C: 比如说家里有三个小朋友，每个人都想要获得一颗糖。为了不让这些孩子打起来，老奶奶你应该买几颗糖呢？只买三颗，真的够吗？
E: For example, if you have three children at home, and each of them wants a piece of candy. To keep them from fighting, how much candy should you buy for them? Will three pieces do the job?

C: 哎，莫说这些，兄弟。
E: Ack, don't say that, brother.

C: 好啦，回去吧，孩子——别再执着于让我重拾那些无谓的虚名啦。要是真的放心不下我，倒不如有空多来照顾一下老婆子的生意~
E: There, there, go now, my child — stop obsessing over having me reclaim those meaningless titles. If you're really concerned about me, just come back often and support my business.

C: …啧，七年都等了还差这两个月？慢走不送！
E: ...Tsk. You've waited seven years and you can't even hold on two more months? You know your way out!

C: 嘶——老、老师，人家讲学都是收钱…您、您是要命啊！
E: Ahh... S—Sir... They normally take their students' money for the lectures... N—Not their lives...

C: 我这天天都来的，你再便宜点呗？
E: I'm a regular customer. Can't you give me a better price?

C: 咕咕——慢慢来，不用着急，我会等到所有孩子回来再开始考试。
E: Hoot hoot... Slow does it, and there's no rush. I will wait for all the children to return before starting the exam.

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个方向感很强的孩子，或许又在<color=#dbc291ff>铺满箭头的灯箱</color>上蹲着给人指路呢。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who's great at directions. Maybe they're crouching at <color=#dbc291ff>a lightbox covered in arrows</color>, helping others with directions.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个孩子对颜色非常敏锐，它或许在<color=#dbc291ff>彩色的旗帜上</color>盘算着颜色搭配呢。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who's really sensitive to colors. Maybe they're at the <color=#dbc291ff>colorful flags</color>, calculating color combinations.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个上课爱打瞌睡的孩子，路过<color=#dbc291ff>校园的教室</color>时不要忘了看看它在不在。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who loves sleeping during classes. If you ever pass by any <color=#dbc291ff>classrooms</color>, don't forget to see if they're around.

C: 猫头鹰老师，我是你的学生湛蓝爵士啾——
E: Professor Owl, I'm your student, Dr. Blues, tweet!

C: 法政科会采取什么行动？
E: What action will the Department of Galactic Geopolitics take?

C: 真好，真好啊。
E: Good. It's really good.

C: 如果你了解到其他与星神相关的线索，请记得与我联系！
E: Please contact me if you have any other clues about the Aeons!

C: 这…这不是明摆着的嘛！莉莉就是我认定的那个女孩了……
E: Isn't it obvious? Ley is the one...

C: 所以我经常会教训教训那帮臭小子！看他们还敢不敢再来找地概科室的麻烦！
E: That's why I often teach them a good lesson! I'll see if they still dare to look for troubles at the Department of Cosmic Geography!

C: 恐慌？那是胆小鬼才会做的事情吧。我相信空间站有能力处理好这场突发情况。
E: Panic? Only cowards do that. I believe the space station is able to deal with this emergency.

C: 你说说，她会看上他吗？
E: Tell me, do you think she'll like him?

C: 不必了，我能看得出来，你经常收到各式各样的「小请求」。而且，你心地善良，有求必应，只要我开口请求，你肯定能帮到我……
E: No need. I can tell you get all sorts of "little requests" asked of you. And with your kind heart, always ready to help, I'm sure you'd lend me a hand if I just asked...

C: 其实可以穷举，但我不建议…
E: We could brute-force it, but I wouldn't recommend it...

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 贵客的来意我已知晓。虽然有些僭越，但我仍想恳求你……
E: I understand why you're here, esteemed guest. Though it may be presumptuous of me, I still wish to implore you...

C: 嗯…有位织者已明悟虫生的意义。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>仙女木的脚边边</color>，等待你去发现呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has discovered the meaning of insect life. The golden thread brings tidings: They are waiting for you to find it <color=#dbc291ff>at the foot of the White Dryad</color>.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 有幸重聚于此，此时此景真是应该创作些新的诗歌。利波听说希诺你有些新的感悟……
E: Since we're fortunate enough to reunite here, this moment calls for some new stanzas to be composed. I heard that you've had some new insights, Zeno...

C: 呵呵呵呵…是什么泥沙让你迷乱了双眼，是何种洋流…让你迷失了方向？
E: Hehehe... What grains of sand have clouded your vision, what ocean currents... have made you lose your way?

C: 虽然我与圣女大人并不…熟识，但我敬佩她的勇气与决断。而如今，人们能在和平的世界里欢聚，诸位黄金裔更是功不可没。所以我希望你能保持对她的尊重。
E: Though I may not be... well acquainted with the Holy Maiden, I admire her courage and decisiveness. Now that people can gather in peace, much of the credit goes to the Chrysos Heirs. So I hope you show her the respect she deserves.

C: 你们俩差不多得了啊，还有完没完了！
E: You two, that's enough already! When are you gonna stop!?

C: 我也是……
E: Me too...

C: 它们也未尝没有可取之处…
E: They might have some redeeming qualities...

C: 不便在于，人们心之所想、目光之所往，诸多本可凭借金丝知晓的细末之事，如今我要重新学着去阅读了。
E: The inconvenience lies in having to relearn how to read all those subtle details, like people's thoughts and where their gazes wander. Things I used to easily discern through the golden thread.

C: 嘘，我们小声点，要是你感兴趣，我带你去书铺里悄悄看。
E: Shh, let's keep our voices down. If you're interested, I'll take you to the bookstore to peek quietly.

C: 倘若有一天它能孵化，从中诞生的新生命，或许是翁法罗斯第一个真正步入银河的生命吧？
E: If it hatches one day, perhaps the new life born from within will be the first Amphorean life to truly step into the cosmos?

C: 啊，贵客…我能感觉到，上升的一切都将汇合。或许我很快就能回到家乡了。
E: Ah, honored guest... I can feel it, everything that rises must converge. Perhaps I'll be able to return home soon.

C: 「穹顶关塞」。
E: The Fortress of Dome.

C: 关于派系…
E: About the factions...

C: 银河的历史有太多空缺之处了，它的长度远超人类的认知极限。何况，还有星神「神秘」四处破坏珍贵的历史纪录。
E: There are many gaps in the history of the galaxy, which extend far beyond the limits of human cognition. Moreover, the Aeon Enigmata is going around destroying precious historical records everywhere.

C: 我在一个巨大的陨坑里看到了这辆半截埋入土里的列车。当时我就对自己说，这根本就不是我们世界能造出的东西，靠近观察也太危险了……
E: I saw a train half-buried in a huge crater. When it happened, I said to myself that this cannot possibly be a thing of this world. It's too dangerous to get close to it...

C: 听上去很有意思，但是完全不对！你一定要去看《冒险鼹鼠队》，书里全是有趣的大冒险。
E: Hmm, interesting, but you're totally wrong! You should do better and read The Adventurous Moles. It is full of fun adventures.

C: （这里就是谜题里提到的位置吧，标记一下吧。）
E: (This is the location mentioned in the riddle. Mark it.)

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}说不定还能找到剩下的书页。
E: Maybe you can find the rest of the pages.

C: 我奉命来担任你的助教。
E: I'm sent here to be your assistant instructor.

C: 呃…黄灯是啥意思来着…？
E: Err... What does the yellow light mean?

C: 滴答！难道我刚才是在梦里做梦了吗？谢谢你把我叫醒！
E: Tick-tock! Did I just dream a dream in a dream? Thank you for waking me up!

C: 滴答，谢谢您修好了我，原来宾客这么亲切…我会努力跟宾客好好交流的！
E: Tick-tock, thank you for fixing me up. So, guests are really kind... I'll work hard to chat with my guests!

C: 滴、答…又要加班…我不想再面对生活了，现实比动画残酷太多了……
E: Tick, tock... I have to work late again... I don't want to face life anymore... Life is so much more cruel than it is in the cartoons...

C: 可恶，你还是成功了…滴…滴……
E: Dang, you still succeeded in the end... Tick... Tick...

C: 办公室政治？这我擅长。
E: Office politics? That's my forte.

C: 多亏了您的测试数据，我终于能向世玲姐交差了…您可能不了解，但这对我来说真的很重要…我可不希望试用期没过就被踢出应物科啊。
E: Thanks to the test data from you, I can finally submit my report to Miss Shiling... You might not realize this, but it's really important to me... I don't want to get kicked out of the Department of Implement Arts before my probation ends.

C: 软件的安装包我已经发送到您的移动设备上了，或者您也可以用我旁边这台终端进行测试。希望您玩得开心……
E: I saved the installation package onto your mobile device — or you can just keep using this testing terminal next to me. Hope you have lots of fun playing...

C: 为什么是《太空大战争》？
E: Why's it called Cosmic Warfare?

C: 至于伦纳德啊…请相信他吧。自从空间站被入侵后，他就一直待在机房里工作，几乎没怎么休息过，卡里维尔家族的人都是这个性格。
E: As for Leonard... Just trust him. Since the breach, he's been living in his terminal room and was hardly taking breaks. The Calliwells are all like that.

C: 什么也没有发生，这只是一台平平无奇的电脑。
E: Nothing happened. It's just a normal computer terminal.

C: 多谢，贝洛伯格的英雄{NICKNAME}，你可是帮了我大忙了！
E: Thank you so much, Hero of Belobog, {NICKNAME}. You've done a real solid for me here!

C: 布洛妮娅大人安排克里珀堡为可可利亚大人作了画像，并希望能够展出在我们的博物馆里……
E: Lady Bronya commissioned Qlipoth Fort for a portrait of Madam Cocolia, and would like it to be displayed in our museum...

C: 当然可以——我们还有很多时间。
E: Of course. We have plenty of time.

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得…这样描述是否合适？
E: Do you think this description is appropriate, {NICKNAME}?

C: 看看希露瓦的简历。
E: Check out Serval's resume.

C: 辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。这是为你准备的报酬，还请你能够收下。
E: Thanks for your hard work, {NICKNAME}. Here is the reward for you.

C: 你只能从雪幕中看到雪，而那位画家却看到了希望的曙光——这大概就是后者能够成为艺术家的原因了。
E: You can only see snow from the snow curtain, but the artist saw a ray of hope beyond it — this must be why they managed to become an artist.

C: 这幅设计稿能教给你的生活小窍门：通常情况下，你只能像这组齿轮一样拼命消磨自己的智慧，直到确认需求方的真实意图。
E: Here's a life protip this concept art can teach you: Often, you'll just have to scramble and grind your wits like this set of gears until you manage to ascertain the true intent of the requester.

C: 「赞美仁慈的阿丽娜•兰德！她的仁慈使骁勇的银鬃铁卫举起长戟，拱卫宏伟的克里珀堡与那隔绝风雪的高墙；」
E: "Praise the kind Alina Rand! Her benevolence has caused the valiant Silvermane Guards to raise their halberds to defend the magnificent Qlipoth Fort and the high wall keeping storm and blizzard out."

C: 「她的慈爱广博如深空，她的仁善闪耀如黄金——赞美仁慈的阿丽娜•兰德！」
E: "Her love is as broad as the sky is deep, and her kindness shines like gold — praise be to the benevolent Alina Rand!"

C: 「她是贝洛伯格历史的记录者，贝洛伯格大事年表的修订者：她为贝洛伯格在时间的洪流中寻得自己的立足之处，从此勾勒出冬城的未来所在；」
E: "She is the record keeper of Belobog's history, the compiler of Belobog Chronicles. She has found her footing in Belobog among the tsunami of time and sketched the direction in which the Everwinter City was headed."

C: 你可以点映自己想看的内容。要看哪个主题好呢？
E: You can select and play the content you are interested in. Which topic would you like to select?

C: 主题三：「仰望星辰」。
E: Topic 3: Gaze Upon the Stars

C: 我和天舶司的同僚商量了一番，我们在狐眠冢放置星槎投影，让每一个前来悼念的人心中有所寄托。妈妈，你看看，这怎么样？
E: I had a discussion with our colleagues in the Sky-Faring Commission, and we decided to place a projection of the starskiff at Foxsomn Tomb, so everyone who comes to mourn will have something to pin their hopes on. Mother, take a look at this. What do you think?

C: 唉，我遇到了一件倒霉事……
E: Ahh, I got myself into a real pickle...

C: 快拍，操控三个人偶好麻烦。
E: Quick, take the pic. It's tricky operating three of these at once.

C: 怎么可能是只扑满啊！这应该是本姑娘吧！
E: What do you mean a Trotter! That's clearly me!

C: 唉，练习了这么多天，你的艺术素养居然还没有提升……
E: Ah, after all these days of practice, your artistic skills still haven't improved...

C: 没错。
E: Indeed I am.

C: 这旅游攻略好像还没有更新啊。
E: This travel guide needs an update.

C: 不好意思，打听一下…
E: Excuse me...

C: 那我可得好好招待您。
E: Then I'll have to make sure your first visit here is a good one.

C: …现在不行。
E: ...I'm afraid we can't pay at the moment.

C: 这不是小秘书吗，你身边这几位是？
E: Why, it's Miss Secretary. And who do we have here?

C: 我是谁，这并不重要。
E: It doesn't matter who I am.

C: 你不懂，万一搞砸了…
E: Well, if I mess things up...

C: 小秘书有些紧张，她也不知道如何是好。
E: Mingxi is a bit nervous. She's not sure how to proceed.

C: 我不记得了。
E: I don't recall.

C: 公司计划将金人巷改造为物流中转仓，你们所作所为的本质也是如此。
E: The IPC plans to turn the Alley into a logistics hub. You are practically thinking the same.

C: 会长，在我看来，金人巷不是用来缅怀过去的幻影。
E: Mr. President, the way I see it, you shouldn't regard the Alley as a souvenir from the past.

C: 小少爷霄翰离开了码头，金人巷复兴计划的下一阶段开始了。
E: Xiaohan leaves the dock, the next phase of Aurum Alley's revival has begun.

C: 我真的没有什么灵感了。
E: I'm out of ideas.

C: 太好啦，可把我给饿坏了。
E: Thanks! I'm starving!

C: 所以让你理解理解！
E: ...My point exactly.

C: 如今有更多的商铺们支持金人巷商会，并且看好金人巷复兴计划。
E: More and more shops have voiced their support for the guild and expressed their confidence in our revival project.

C: 我是支持你们金人巷商会的，你看我没有店面，走走停停，公司是不会来找我谈合作的，更别说什么赔偿了。
E: I support your Aurum Alley Merchant Guild. You see, I don't have a storefront of my own. I mosey about on my way, but the IPC won't come and negotiate any deals with me — let alone mention any money.

C: 这样吧，你帮我送一件货物，要是送到了，你回来找我，我们谈合作如何？
E: What about this? You help me deliver a package and if it gets through, you come back to me. And then we can talk about working together. How's that?

C: （霍三哥只说让我用机巧鸟将货物放于高处…这人可能有问题。该怎么做？）
E: (All Mr. Huo said was for me to use this cycrane to send the "goods" to a very high location... This guy seems suspicious, though. What to do?)

C: 住手，我点的是中杯古藤百草饮。
E: Stop. I ordered a medium cup of herbal tea.

C: 喂！我点的是中杯古藤百草饮。
E: Hey! I ordered a medium cup of herbal tea.

C: 在你的帮助下，光顾美馔阁的人越来越多。
E: Thanks to your aid, more and more people are visiting Delicacy Pavilion.

C: 什么？！丹鼎司竟然还有这么敬业的人！
E: What!? Don't tell me the Alchemy Commission turned out to be this thorough with all their work?

C: 很多人当着我的面，也不知道我能言善辩。
E: Many people I converse with are surprised I'm able to speak so eloquently.

C: 啊，你误会了，这导航是给机巧鸟准备的，不是我要钻墙根。
E: Ah, let me explain. That data's for the cycrane, not me. I'm not digging anywhere.

C: 我先前也逮到过它好几次，可惜这小家伙鬼精鬼精的，看到我的人影儿就跑，我根本抓不住它。
E: I've been on a wild goose... err, cycrane chase trying to catch it, but it's way too quick for me.

C: 你注意到眼前的箱子里接连不断地传来怪异的呼噜声，想起仙舟上的种种神异传闻，你不禁猜想这或许是某种「箱中仙」吧。
E: You hear peculiar snores emanating from the box in front of you. Recalling the urban legends you've heard on the Xianzhou, you can't help but wonder if it's a "fairy in a box."

C: 不过，也可能是你没有严格按照残卷上的记载来训练？也许可以下次再来试试看。
E: But then again, perhaps you haven't been following the training manual strictly enough? Perhaps you can try again one more time.

C: 不过，五大赛事将依次隔天开启——若您想要体验更加激烈的战斗，可千万别扑空了！
E: However, each of the five leagues will begin during the subsequent days on an alternating schedule. If you want to experience a heart-racing battle, don't miss out!

C: 喏，这个是我的报告笔记，不仅有今天的报告文本，还有之后的一些…研究规划吧。
E: Here! These are my report notes — some are today's reports and some are... future research plans.

C: 话说回来，你作为助手还是很靠谱的嘛。怎么样？有没有兴趣跟着世玲以后搞科研呀？我看你很有天赋嘛。
E: By the way, you turned out to be a pretty reliable assistant. So, are you interested in working for me in the field of science? You seem pretty gifted at this.

C: 啊？哦…哦！确有此事！没想到来的人会是你。
E: Huh? Oh... oh! Indeed! I didn't expect you'd be the one to show up.

C: （打开开关）
E: (Activate the switch)

C: 这看上去似乎是附近的某个地方。不太确定，可以再看两眼。
E: This seems to be somewhere close by. If you're not sure, look at it a few more times.

C: 玩一下没事的。
E: Just one touch should be fine.

C: 光作为粒子，它携带信息；那我接触光，本质就是在接触信息。
E: Light as a particle carries information. Building on that, if I am exposed to light, I am exposed to information.

C: …虽然只能还原部分口感，但有限的美味才更加迷人，不是吗？
E: ...Although it can only replicate some of the textures, the limited flavors are even more enchanting, wouldn't you agree?

C: 我听过一个小道消息：似乎苏乐达的创始人并不是如今人们熟知的艾迪恩老板，而是一个名为苏萨的星际囚犯！
E: I've heard an obscure gossip: The founder of SoulGlad wasn't Aideen, the owner we all know today, but rather a cosmic prisoner named Sousa!

C: 不来爱德华医生的梦境贩售店看看吗？我这里又有一批新梦泡上市了——
E: Fancy a visit to my Dreamscape Sales Store? I have a new batch of dream bubbles coming to the shelf...

C: 需要做的事情都差不多，也算不上是欺骗吧？
E: Since your job scope is more or less the same, it doesn't count as fraud, does it?

C: 好好教训它一顿！
E: Teach him a lesson!

C: 我知道…我知道的…后面会注意的，不捣乱不开玩笑不嘲笑那只傻狗。
E: I know... I know... From here on out, I'll be sure to not bother or make fun of that idiot pooch.

C: 汪汪汪——我去把舒翁拽回来！
E: Woof, woof! I'll drag Siobhan back!

C: 是的。
E: Yes.

C: 就知道你会这么说。什么时候有了兴致，可以随时过来，我们的酒吧永远欢迎你。
E: I knew you'd say that. Whenever you feel like it, feel free to drop by. You're always welcome here.

C: 有用的，它是无名客开拓过程中最重要的收获。
E: Absolutely. That experience is the most valuable thing a Nameless will gain in the trailblazing process.

C: 请放轻松，将「银河强手棋」当作是美好的体验。它会收集你迄今为止的开拓经历，而它真正想告诉你的是——你以后还会有更多这样激动人心的冒险！
E: Please relax, and treat Cosmodyssey as a wonderful experience. It will record all of your trailblaze experiences up until this point, but what it actually wants to show is that you will have even more heart-stirring adventures like these in the future!

C: 开始「银河强手棋」的冒险。
E: Start Cosmodyssey.

C: 二十年前，他还是折纸大学的教授，直到有一天他走进图书馆，借走一批只允许内部学者翻阅的历史文献，从此消失不见。
E: He was a professor at the Paperfold University twenty years ago. Then, one day he walked into the library and borrowed a collection of historical documents only available to internal staff, then vanished without a trace.

C: 您果然是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: You're indeed a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!

C: 我认为值得。
E: I think he is worthy of my support.

C: 呵，你比那些没脑子的逐梦客要聪明多了，这种家伙不值得追随！
E: Heh, you're a lot smarter than those dumb Dreamchasers. That kind of guy isn't worth following!

C: 快滚出流梦礁，滚回你的家族！
E: Get out of Dreamflux Reef and go back to your Family!

C: 你觉得这部影片怎么样？
E: What do you think of this movie?

C: 你发出了一声决绝的*哼*，哈努兄弟从不退却。
E: You let out a determined *hmph* — Brother Hanu never backs down.

C: 这广告好长啊…
E: This commercial is so long...

C: 别瞄准我呀！
E: Don't aim it at me!

C: 「今日的美梦小镇依旧和平，邪恶永远无法战胜正义。」
E: "In today's Dreamville, tranquility prevails. Evil can never triumph over good."

C: 再等一下…
E: Hang on a second...

C: 片场总是难免混乱，最后结果令人满意就好，不是吗？
E: A film set's unavoidably chaotic at times. What matters is the final result, no?

C: 去拍广告片。
E: Go shoot the Commercial.

C: 《汽水先生》外传的广告上映了。
E: The Mr. Soda extra story's commercial has aired.

C: 这个很酷的动画师发出了一声冷漠的*哼*，你可能要去找点让他不再装酷的消息。
E: This super-cool animation artist lets out an indifferent "hmph." You might have to come up with something to stop him from playing it so cool.

C: 第二个形象是我从折纸大学的一位历史教授口中听来的故事，他告诉我，哈努努是一个<color=#dbc291ff>正直无私的勇者</color>。
E: The second story I heard was from a history professor at Paperfold University who told me Hanunue was a <color=#dbc291ff>righteous and selfless hero</color>.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 听说隐夜鸫家系中曾经出现过几位「折纸筑梦师」，那一定就是他们的原型吧！
E: I heard that several of the Nightingale Family are Origami Dreamweavers. That must be their prototype!

C: 啾，折纸小鸟是美梦小镇的建造者，动画中的每个镜头几乎都能看到它们的身影。
E: Tweet, the origami birds are the creators of Dreamville, and can be seen in almost every single shot of animation.

C: 怎么了？
E: Something the matter?

C: 本期灵异直播…
E: On this episode of spooky stories stream...

C: 选择自己的球棒，成为热心好人…
E: Pick your own bat, and become a righteous person...

C: 「呱、呱、呱」——是青蛙的声音。
E: *croak* *croak* *croak* It was the sound of a frog.

C: 那只奇怪的眼睛眨了三下——你确信自己没看错，它眨了三下。
E: The strange eye blinked thrice — no doubt, you saw it right, three blinks.

C: 怎么了？
E: Something the matter?

C: 你们不得不将高价囤积的货物赔本销售…这无异于饮鸩止渴，你们被拖到了破产边缘。这个时候——不服输的你会做出怎样的决定？
E: You have no choice — the goods you stockpiled at high prices have to be sold at a loss... This is a pretty self-destructive move which drives your business to the brink of bankruptcy. At this moment, what would you — who refuses to admit defeat — decide to do?

C: 多年以后，你们在繁华的匹诺康尼再次相见，却不敢相认。也许这就是每一位逐梦客都可能留下的遗憾吧。
E: In the years that followed, you encountered each other once more on the prosperous streets of Penacony, but dared not call out to one another. Perhaps akin to the lingering regret of every Dreamchaser.

C: 不不不，当然不是。看来你还没打过瘾呀，但我这一把老骨头可不耐揍。
E: No no no. Of course not. Looks like you still got more in you, huh? But these old bones of mine won't last a second against you.

C: 我希望借此令你重温夺冠的辉煌时光…顺便将你们精彩的闯关体验录入这盘胶卷之中，未来可与诸位宾客共享这段快乐时光。
E: Through this, I hope to reignite the glorious moments of victory for you... and capture your exhilarating journey as it unfolds, etching it within this film. In the future, we can share this joyful time with all our esteemed guests.

C: 编剧
E: Screenwriter

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C: 可以这样理解。但我与爱德华医生有着不同的终点，只在{RUBY_B#时间交错之处}此刻{RUBY_E#}各取所需。
E: You can see it that way, but Dr. Edward and I have different destinations. We only complement each other's needs {RUBY_B#where time intersects}at this moment{RUBY_E#}.

C: 我亲眼见证的末日么…让我想想。
E: The apocalypse I've witnessed myself? Let me think.

C: 老板大气。
E: Thank you for your generosity, boss!

C: 毕竟观察了你前几日的练习之后，我们才能判断出你的资质嘛。
E: After all, we need to watch you practice for a few days before we can figure out how talented you are, right?

C: 客人您……
E: Dear guest...

C: 这几日，三月小姐也学了不少基本功，现在就是考核的时候了。
E: Miss March has been learning the basics of swordplay, and now it's time to put her knowledge to the test.

C: 三月小姐本身就有武学底子，也有过许多实战的经验，再加上有我和云璃指导剑艺，此时若是去挑战公司的安保机甲，想必——
E: You already have a martial arts background and plenty of real combat experience. With swordplay guidance from me and Yunli, if you were to challenge the IPC's security mechs now, I believe—

C: …谢谢彦卿师父！
E: ...Thank you, Master Yanqing!

C: 谢谢二位小师父的指点，那我是顺利通过了考试？是不是？
E: Thank you both for your guidance. So, did I pass the test?

C: 好耶！{NICKNAME}，你是不是该夸夸咱了……
E: Awesome! Hey, {NICKNAME}, isn't it about time you showered me with praise...
Understood...

C: 我记得那个斯科特不是被{NICKNAME}教训过一次了吗？怎么还敢回来？人类是学不会吸取教训嘛？
E: But seriously, didn't {NICKNAME} kick Skott's butt already? So why's he back again? Don't humans ever learn from their mistakes?

C: 怎么样才算是足够痛快呢？
E: So, what would be your ideal way of teaching him a lesson?

C: 那…有什么办法，能让他输得心服口服？
E: So... how do we get him to admit defeat?

C: 看来十王司的判官压力也很大呀。
E: Being a Ten-Lords Commission judge is pretty stressful too, I bet.

C: 不想学？…那可由不得你了！我免费授课，你不学也得学！
E: You don't want to?... I'm afraid that's not up to you! I give my lessons free of charge, you have no choice but to learn them!

C: 学猪叫环节呢？
E: What about the "pig squealing" part?

C: 银狼真的好厉害…
E: Silver Wolf is simply amazing...

C: …你、你闭嘴！
E: You... shut up, you!

C: 我听说有人十七轮面试，最后成为了P<unbreak>13</unbreak>的基层员工，你又付出了多少？
E: I heard someone went through <unbreak>17</unbreak> rounds of interviews just to become a basic P<unbreak>13</unbreak> employee. What about your own efforts?

C: 你自命不凡，蔑视他人，没有时间投入生活，缺乏共情能力，害怕没得到尊重，妄图靠着公司给的身份建立自信，你甘心吗——
E: You consider yourself superior to others, you have no time for your own life. You lack empathy, you're always worried about being looked down upon, and your self-esteem stems from the status the IPC gives you. Do you really want to live like this forever...?

C: 我们本想用剑斗的方式让你去给她道歉，但这是不够的。
E: We were intending to defeat you in a duel and make you apologize to her, but now we see that won't work.

C: 今日之事不可告诉你的二位师父。如果三月小姐同意，鄙人便收集药材去了，告辞。
E: You can't tell your masters about what transpired today. If you agree, I shall get right to collecting the ingredients. Farewell.

C: {NICKNAME}，难道你要成为超越人类的存在？
E: {NICKNAME}, do you want to surpass human limits?

C: 怎么可能呢三月小姐，请仔细回想那些你吃下的药膳——你得到了均衡的饮食，规律的作息，还有每日的锻炼！最后，你收获了健康的身体！
E: How could you say that, Miss March! Think about the herbal cuisine you ate — you received a well-balanced meal, a regular routine, and daily exercise! Finally, you achieved a healthy body!

C: 哎，公输师傅完成了「阿休」，你找到了稀有以太灵，只有我还没有找到答案……
E: Great! Master Gongshu completed his A-Xiu, and you found your rare Aether Spirit. Only my answer remains unfounded...

C: 为什么剑魔明明掌握了一身本领，却没法得到令人满足的幸福呢？
E: Why is it that the Blade Demon was able to become such a master and yet never attained the satisfaction of a happy life?

C: {NICKNAME}，好久不见。
E: {NICKNAME}, long time no see!

C: 哎！这群家伙，是一种出了名的…爱交朋友的物种！
E: Ah! These folks are a species famous for... wanting to make friends!

C: 学会了如何说粗鄙之语。
E: Like how to swear in foul language.

C: 嗯…这个问题我倒是从来都没想过。
E: Hmm... I've actually never thought about this question before.

C: 原本这次是跟着叽米先生一起来报道演武仪典的。但叽米先生日理万机，实在很忙，所以采访热门选手、制作特别节目的工作就落到我肩上咯。
E: I was supposed to follow Mr. Owlbert to cover the Wardance together, but he's got a million things to attend to, so the tasks of interviewing the popular contenders and producing the special program fell on my shoulders.

C: 谢谢你们陪我说话，排解苦闷。行啊，那我就去会会我第一场比赛的对手！
E: Thanks for talking to me and cheering me up. Sure, I'll head off to meet my first opponent!

C: 如果我输了，也有重要的人会失望。看来我们都必须全力以赴了。
E: If I lose, those people dear to me will be disappointed too. Looks like we have to give it our all.

C: 你居然主动揽活？
E: You actually accepted a job without resistance?

C: 我陪你逛逛吧。
E: I'll accompany you.

C: 素裳小姐，好巧啊！你也有病啊？
E: Miss Sushang, what a coincidence! I guess you have a problem too?

C: 师父，你都说一路了，我耳朵都听出茧子了。
E: Master, you've been telling me that the entire trip. My ears are about to fall off...

C: 等等，我到「罗浮」以后？赢了的人是你啊？
E: Hold on. When I reach the Luofu? But you won?

C: 不必拘礼。我想，对于你要去的「罗浮」，你一定还一无所知吧？趁这个机会，我们可以聊聊。
E: No need for formalities. You probably know nothing about the Luofu, the place you're heading to, correct? Let us take this opportunity to discuss it.

C: 我们才刚恢复对外联系，按公司的说法，银河早就忘了咱们。为什么仙舟在第一时间向咱们这样默默无闻的地方发来信函？
E: We've just resumed outside contact, and the way the IPC describes it, the cosmos has long forgotten us. Why would the Xianzhou so eagerly send an invitation to a city that has been buried in time?

C: 我想让全银河的新闻都登着——公司的通缉犯成为了演武仪典上最耀眼的明星，他大爱特爱，把来仙舟谈生意的公司狗们喵得灰头土脸——
E: I wanna see every news outlet in the cosmos buzzin' with the headline "The IPC's most wanted man stole the spotlight at the Wardance. He came out with the fudge blazin' and sure made them IPC shirtbags choke on the humble pie."

C: {NICKNAME}，你回来了？请问这两位是？
E: {NICKNAME}, you're back? Who are these two?

C: 肯定可以的！
E: No doubt about that!

C: 再稍等一下。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 你两句话就把我诊断为魔阴身了，太可怕了！
E: You're making me sound like I'm mara-struck. That's scary!

C: …怎么可能？你是…你是那个…「冷锋」！
E: ...How's this possible? You're... You're... Lengfeng!

C: 彦卿，我会尽全力打败你的。
E: Yanqing, I'll give it my all to defeat you.

C: 而在赛后，他有个古怪的习惯，他会拒绝所有奖金与礼物，向所有观看他比赛的人们讲述他遭难的故乡，提醒人们防范反物质军团的袭击，也希望有能之士可以帮助他。
E: He had a peculiar habit after finishing a match — while turning down all the prizes and gifts, he would talk about his homeland's plight to the spectators, warning them of the Antimatter Legion's attacks, as he sought help from those who were capable.

C: 祝你胜利，伊戈尔。
E: I wish you victory, Igor.

C: 我知道在各位观众眼中，「步离人」是只知杀戮的野兽和文明的破坏者。但善恶之辨，自来并无定数。步离人和所有智慧物种一样，拥有决定自己所为的能力。
E: I know that in the eyes of this audience, the borisin are murderous beasts who only kill and destroy civilizations. But the distinction between good and evil have always been on a gray scale and never defined. Like all intelligent species, the borisin are able to make their own decisions.

C: 是我抹杀了那<unbreak>102</unbreak>个人。请向我提问。
E: I was the one who annihilated the <unbreak>102</unbreak> individuals. Please question me.

C: 因为在杀戮之上，我们寻得了更伟大的力量。
E: For it is past the scarlet curtain of blood and beyond slaughter that we sought and found an even greater power.

C: 要是你能赢得胜利，罗浮仙舟会重新考虑丹轮寺的请愿。
E: If you can take victory, the Xianzhou Luofu will consider Claretwheel Temple's petition.

C: 我们居然有这么多粉丝了，这下真成大名人了。
E: I can't believe we have so many fans. We're a big deal now!

C: 么！么么么～么么！
E: Mehr! Mehr mehr mehr, mehr mehr!

C: 我是「三号机」。
E: I am Unit<unbreak>-03</unbreak>.

C: 呃…我们还是直接开打吧！
E: Err... Let's just start fighting!

C: 都说「人不该跟扑满一般见识」，但今天不得不破例了。上场吧！
E: They say, "one shouldn't stoop to the level of a Trotter." But today I'll have to make an exception! Let's go!

C: 哼哼，因为我比扑满还要弱！
E: Heh-heh, because I'm weaker than Trotters!

C: 打得过你吗？
E: Can they beat you?

C: 呜呜呜…你太会说了。
E: Waaa... You're too good with words.

C: 众所周知，银枝先生身为纯美骑士，对挑战复活赛的选手考核十分严格，听说他不仅要求选手具备强大的实力，还需要展现足够的「纯美」。
E: It's common knowledge that as a Knight of Beauty, Mr. Argenti's evaluation of those in the repechage is highly stringent. I heard he not only requests that his opponents possess great strength, but they also have to exhibit sufficient Beauty.

C: 确实有这回事。幸亏卢卡及时从低谷中走了出来，现在想来有点后怕。
E: That was indeed the case, but luckily Luka managed to get himself out of it. Just the thought of it gives me the shivers.

C: 谁会不喜欢大机器人呢？
E: Who doesn't like big robots?

C: 我当然乐意啊，不过…
E: I'd be delighted, but...

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 对手加强了攻势！大概是急着下班收工吧！
E: The opponent has stepped up their offense! They are probably trying to end it quickly so they can get off work early!

C: 虽然不至于借用琥珀王的伟力，但我们还是不会留情的哦。
E: We may not call upon the Amber Lord's might, but that doesn't mean we'll go easy on you.

C: 卢卡选手，邀你与我共舞一曲——
E: Mr. Luka, you're invited to perform...

C: 换个环境玩，也许会有新体验哦。
E: Change a gameplay environment, and you might just discover a new experience.

C: {NICKNAME}祖宗，您来玩摆货游戏了吗？您里面请，玩法入口在里面，祖宗。
E: Top dog {NICKNAME}, here to play the goods stacking game? Come in, the game entrance is right inside, top dog.

C: 等有产能吧！到时候一定给你做有趣又好玩的新玩法！
E: When we've got more manpower! I'll definitely create something fun, interesting, and innovative for you!

C: 你还是再给我介绍下规则吧。
E: You'd probably better tell me about the rules again.

C: 音乐就是我的全部！
E: Music is our everything!

C: 还挺讨人厌的…
E: It's pretty annoying...

C: 大家各退一步，将决定权交给我身边的这位无名客。这样如何？
E: Everyone take a step back, and leave the final decision to this Nameless beside me. How about it?

C: 各位学院代表对此还有意见吗？
E: Do the academy's representatives have any objections to this?

C: 阁下无需多虑。在下的忍•修行中，恰好有一项与乐曲有关的奥术——名曰音律•忍法。
E: My lord's mind be at ease. I fortuitously chanced upon a secret art related to melody during my ninja training — the Sound Release ninjutsu.

C: 名震寰宇！
E: Be world-famous!

C: 让我再想想…
E: Give me another minute...

C: 或许吧。
E: Perhaps.

C: 感谢！你就是我最好的{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}！我有想法了，等我的好消息吧！
E: Thank you! You're my best {F#buddy}{M#buddy}! I have an idea. Just wait for my good news!

C: 太好了，你还认得我，说明我给片场「善后」的时候没有拿错记忆。
E: Excellent. You still remember me. That means I didn't retrieve the wrong memory when I "redressed" the set.

C: 你将刚才见到的奇妙景象详细描述给了这位好奇的学生，还不忘添油加醋地宣称，自己发现了校园的第八大不可思议。
E: You vividly describe the wondrous scene you saw to this curious student, not forgetting to add your own spin on things, declaring that you discovered the eighth wonder on campus.

C: 关于<color=#dbc291ff>舞台的使用方式</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>灵感收集</color>方面有什么问题，可以随时来问我哦。
E: If you have any questions on <color=#dbc291ff>how to use the stage</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>inspiration collection</color>, don't hesitate to ask.

C: 汪！汪汪汪！
E: Woof! Woof woof woof!

C: 当然知道啊。噢？莫非…站长也沉迷打铁了？
E: Of course. Oh? Have... you've also gotten into perfect timing?

C: 你朝周围环视了圈，确定没有人注意到这边。于是，在强烈冲动的驱使下，你向桶盖伸出了手……
E: You look all around you to make sure no one's paying attention. Then, driven by some primal instinct, you reach for the trashcan lid...

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 我和原定的人选是相同款式的机体，就连出厂时间都完全一致，因此身份信息差不多。区别只有…她是第一名，我是倒数。
E: The originally selected candidate and I are the same model. Even our production times are the same, so our personal information is almost identical. The only difference is that... She is at the top of the class, and I am at the bottom.

C: 能量绝非颜料，音符激奏绝非普通的键盘技法，而我，也绝非随处可见的财富学院学生。
E: Energy is not paint or dye, note blast is no normal keyboard technique, and I... am no normal Fortune Academy student!

C: 嗯，学院代表带我去和第一名聊了聊，接触后才发现，那些担心都是多余的。
E: Yeah. The academy's representative took me to speak with the top student. When we met, I realized that all of our concerns were for nothing.

C: 为了「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」！
E: For Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party!

C: 梦土的道路曲折且长，踏上此行不知何时能复返，然无畏的忍侠决意要前往，只因过往的同伴正身陷苦难。若是在下未能归还——
E: The path of dreams is meandering. I know not when I shall return on my journey, but this ninja hero shall forge forth undaunted, unwavering — if for nothing more than the fact that my companion has been entrapped in danger. If I do not return...

C: 经理！…乱破忍首嘱咐我多跟着您到处走走，所以…收集灵感的时候，能带我一起吗？
E: Manager! Head Ninja Rappa said I should follow you around more, so... could you please take me with you when you're collecting inspiration?

C: 哼…哼哼……
E: Hmph... hmphph...

C: 键盘•忍徒
E: Ninja Initiate Keyboard

C: 这些没对准焦距，后边飞过的小鸟倒拍得很清楚。
E: They're out of focus. At least you captured the birds flying in the background in ultra-res.

C: 真拿你没办法呀，丹恒老师～{NICKNAME}，快来和丹恒一起打扫积水吧！
E: You sure are hopeless, Dan Heng. {NICKNAME}, get over here and mop up the water with Dan Heng!

C: 翡翠玲珑瓜皮切，椒盐脍炙生姜片…不是，怎么还是西瓜皮和生姜片？
E: Julienned Jade Melon Peels, Peppered and Spiced Ginger Slices... Wait, why is it watermelon skin and ginger slices again?

C: 好帅的台词，好想说一次看看！
E: What a cool line! I want to say it once too!

C: 早就逃了……
E: He fled long ago...

C: 丹恒出手。
E: Send Dan Heng.

C: 嗯？列车好像收到了一通其他舰船的通信。是找我们有什么事吗？
E: Eh? Looks like the Express received a message from another ship. What can we do for you?

C: 呜呜呜…丹恒老师太卑鄙了！
E: Waaahh... Dan Heng is so mean!

C: 按照我对{NICKNAME}的认识，{F#她}{M#他}看似不经大脑的行为之下，很可能存在着更深的目标。
E: According to what I know of {NICKNAME}, what seems like a foolhardy act from {F#her}{M#him} most possibly has a deeper intent to it.

C: 好强！怎么做到的？
E: Amazing! How did you do it?

C: 姬子一行人决定采用最短路线前往「丹轮寺」，但却不得不穿过一片无主的星域。不巧，追兵在此处设伏，袭击了星穹列车。三人与护法众通力合作，成功击退了敌人。
E: Himeko's team decided to take the shortest route to the Claretwheel Temple, but had to traverse an unclaimed star sector. Unfortunately, pursuers had set up an ambush here and attacked the Astral Express. The trio and Dharma Defenders worked together to successfully repel the enemies.

C: 这你也能分辨出来？
E: You can tell?

C: 「雏鹰起飞」。
E: "Rise of the Eyas."

C: 经过复杂的演算，真理医生摆放好了雕像。雕像的重量、高度、间距和排序，据说正与「黄金分割数列」相符。
E: After a complicated session of calculations, Dr. Ratio places the statue appropriately. Its weight, height, spaces between, and sequence, all seemingly fit the "golden ratio."

C: 实践出真知…
E: We'll find out when we try it...

C: 「超级大变」。
E: "Megabomb Change."

C: 诶诶诶——呜哇呜哇呜哇！！！
E: Heyheyheyyyyy! Wowowow!

C: 哼哼，没错，让大家看看谁才是真正的「星穹列车」！
E: You're right! We gotta show them who is the real Astral Express!

C: 请不必为这段合作关系的终结而悲伤，对于<color=#dbc291ff>差分宇宙的下一个课题</color>，你的帮助仍是不可或缺的。
E: Please do not be saddened by the end of this collaboration. Your assistance will still be essential for the <color=#dbc291ff>next Divergent Universe research project</color>.

C: 当然，我是主角。
E: Obviously not. I'm the main character.

C: 呵呵，你要是还有下次相遇，我希望你能让{RUBY_B#「晨昏之眼」}我的主人{RUBY_E#}看到更伟大的东西。
E: Heh heh, if we do meet again, I hope you will let {RUBY_B#Eye of Twilight}my master{RUBY_E#} see even greater things.

C: 没问题。那就来打个赌。我相信{F#她}{M#他}带领的队伍，绝对能击败你。
E: No problem, let's make it a bet then. I believe that {F#her}{M#his} squad will beat yours for sure.

C: …王冠？对哦，灰宝是阿格莱雅女士的贵客，这点小事当然难不倒你！
E: ...Crown? Oh right, Grayie is Lady Aglaea's esteemed guest. I'm sure such a trivial matter is nothing to you!

C: 经过一番紧张刺激的测试，你正式成为了差分宇宙的头号贵宾。
E: After a bout of intense, thrilling tests, you have officially become the most esteemed guest of the Divergent Universe.

C: 大数据真是无处不在。
E: Big data is truly everywhere.

C: 我们会等待双方选手做好准备，希望你们都能拿出全部的实力！
E: We'll wait for both parties to get ready. Give it your all!

C: 喂！不要以为轻轻松松地说出这两个字就显得很厉害啊……
E: Hey! Don't think you're the hot stuff just because you can say those words easily...

C: 我问的，提摩斯老师，帮我们把价格打下来吧！
E: I did! Mr. Timos, lower the price for us!

C: 刚才我看到了猫猫硬币…
E: I saw a Cat Coin just now...
o((•'ω´< )っ "Rescue Operation — ★" )∋

C: （这家伙不会因为预言的事，对我有所隐瞒吧？）
E: (Could it be that this buddy is hiding something from me because of the prophecy?)

C: 对于你的发言，先质疑再质疑。
E: Like I'd trust anything coming out of your mouth.

C: ——不好啦！大地兽冲进来啦！
E: Heeeelp! A dromas has broken in!

C: 为了击败泡泡。
E: To beat Bubbles.

C: 哦，那是什么呢？
E: Oh, what is that?

C: <unbreak>也许是借由阿格莱雅和缇宝的暗示，你的*预言梦*——它来了。</unbreak>
E: Perhaps influenced by the hints from Aglaea and Tribbie, your prophetic dream has arrived.

C: 与我一同，成为英雄吧！
E: Stand with me and become heroes!

C: 诶？小飞儿明明以前很喜欢的。
E: Huh? Little Ciphy used to like those.

C: 灰子，你到底听到了什么预言？说出来大家对照一下？
E: Come on, Gray Mystery, what prophecy did you hear exactly? Why don't you share it with everyone?

C: 你知道的，有时候做出决定总是很难，经过了很多轮对战后的思考，我决定把我的天赋带到风堇的小海豹战队。
E: You know, making a decision can be tough. After a lot of matches and reflection, I decided to take my talents to Hyacine's baby seal squad.

C: 小三月发消息说她很快就到，{NICKNAME}，不如就由你先开始吧。
E: March said that she'll be here soon, {NICKNAME}, why don't we start with you?

C: 我不排斥电子游戏。当然，也算不上擅长。
E: I don't dislike video games. Of course, I'm not exactly good at them either.

C: 呃…当前版本的话，<color=#dbc291ff>就是多赚钱、提升会场等级</color>，让展会变得更加热闹。对你来说小菜一碟啦~
E: Um... in this version, you just need to <color=#dbc291ff>earn money and level up the venue</color> to make the exhibition bustling. Should be easy for you~

C: 朋友，谨慎是好事儿——但也可能让你错过许多乐子！
E: My friend, caution is a good thing — but it can also make you miss out on a whole lot of fun!

C: 哈哈，借你吉言——请放心，如果后续有开发计划，我们一定会将其如期奉上。
E: Haha, I'll take that as a compliment — rest assured, if there's a development plan for the future, we'll definitely deliver it on time.

C: 要是想重温之前的《银河球棒侠传说：启程篇》，请使用这台。
E: If you want to relive the previous "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Departure," use this one.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，「极速杯」球笼竞速锦标赛已经拖了很久了，我们还在琢磨您要是不来这比赛可怎么办啊？
E: Dear esteemed {NICKNAME}, the "Speed Cup" Spheroid Racing tournament has been delayed for quite some time now. We were starting to wonder, "What would we do if you didn't show up for the race?"

C: …报名？我什么时候报的名？
E: ...Sign up? When did I sign up?

C: …没想到会在这里遇上你们俩？
E: ...Didn't expect to run into you two here!

C: …这车什么都好，就是能耗很大，不过你别担心，一切费用直接记在我的账上。
E: ...The car is great and everything. It just guzzles fuel. But don't worry — put all the expenses on my tab.

C: 电视台的人嘴角都压不住了，我听说他们在计划找您当球笼赛车的代言人——
E: The folks at the TV station were acting as if they'd just won the lottery... I heard they're planning to get you to endorse the Spheroid racers—

C: 我当然还记得，三消那个对吧？
E: Of course I do. The Match-3 game, right?

C: 虽然你们只能听到可爱的两声「啾啾」，但它实际上在说「你休想摆脱我的掌控，你还是抓紧时间打游戏吧，这样才能活下去……」
E: You hear innocent "tweet tweets" now, but it's saying: "You'll NEVER escape me, so keep playing if you value your life..."

C: 哈哈，就这？瞧你那嚣张样，还以为我得多爱爱你呢——回去好好练练吧，小可爱！
E: Ha! That all you got? With all that swagger, I thought I'd have to butter your fudge, you shirt-for-brains! Go back to bird school, cutie!

C: 啾？*愤怒的鸟语*——啾！
E: Tweet? *Angry bird speak* — Tweet!

C: 这句我听明白了，应该是波提欧兄弟豪迈的笑声。
E: I understood that — it must be Boothill's hearty laugh.

C: 呵呵，急什么，你真以为我跟个那榆木脑袋似的，傻了吧唧地想靠打游戏收拾它？
E: Heh, relax. You really thought I was some blockhead trying to beat this thing with video games?

C: 他们私底下都管我叫大哥呢…猎犬和猛犬，倒也算种缘分。
E: They all call me "Big Brother" in private. The Bloodhound Family and the Hound... seems like fate brought us together.

C: 舒翁毫不犹豫就喝下了调饮，这样的奉献精神着实令人肃然起敬。
E: Siobhan drinks without hesitation. Such professional dedication is truly commendable.

C: 呼，调饮的劲头总算过去了。与其说是放松身心，更像是处心积虑的惊吓。
E: Phew, the drink's rush is finally wearing off. More like a calculated terror rather than "Relaxation."

C: 一切准备就绪，可以开张了！
E: All set up and ready to open!

C: <size=28>完全睡着了！</size>
E: <size=28>She's fast asleep!</size>

C: 是这个原因…好像也说得过去。
E: That reason... I suppose it holds up.

C: 第一次在空间站的监控录像里，看到{F#她}{M#他}随心所欲地上蹿下跳、肆无忌惮地翻文件时，一阵奇异的感觉冲刷着我的线路板……
E: The first time I saw {F#her}{M#him} jumping freely and flipping through documents without a care on the space station's surveillance footage, something strange surged through my circuit board...

C: 一张嘴就是些不可能完成的任务，空间站的员工流失率已经连年突破新高了！
E: Every time you open your mouth, it's just impossible missions. No wonder the space station's employee turnover rate keeps hitting new records year after year!

C: 「我没有父母，没有朋友，更身无长物，只有这副该死的面具！」
E: "I have no parents, no friends, no possessions... just this darn mask!"

C: 还挺好玩的吧。小灰毛，这杯调饮是不是特别地超出想象？
E: Pretty fun, huh? So, Gray Hair, wasn't that drink just... wildly unexpected?

C: 绚烂、美妙、捉摸不透。趣味盎然的享受，作为旅程的收尾，再好不过了。
E: Brilliant, beautiful, and elusive. A delightful experience, and a perfect way to end the journey.

C: 果然是个梦吗…
E: So it really was a dream...

C: 既然应约来了，就请你替我调上一杯吧。
E: Since you called me here... mix me something special?

C: <size=28>星穹列车天下第一，舒适安全便捷无敌！</size>
E: <size=28>Astral Express rules the universe — comfortable, safe, convenient, unmatched!</size>

C: 你还在这儿干什么？委托给你的事做完了吗？
E: What are you still doing here? Have you completed your assigned tasks yet?

C: 来都来了…
E: Well, since I'm already here...

C: 排行榜一共才多少人…就算能打赢，先下去不就是给后面的人开路嘛，多亏啊！
E: There're probably only <unbreak>300</unbreak> fighters there... And even if we go down and win, we're just doing all the work for the next person coming along. That's not worth it!

C: 唉，怪不得。对着怪物吹了半天，一点威力都没有，差点把命丢了！
E: Ah, so that's why... I blew it at a monster for quite a while but it didn't do a thing, and I almost lost my life!

C: 这段时日咱们仙舟发生了不少事，又是建木生发，又是药王秘传兴风作浪…新闻上都说，能平息这些灾难，您{NICKNAME}功不可没。
E: There's been a lot going on aboard the Xianzhou recently, with the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth and those Disciples of Sanctus Medicus causing a ruckus... And all the news feeds report that you've played no small part, {NICKNAME}, in keeping the peace.

C: 「这个{M#男人}{F#女人}自号『银河球棒侠』，此刻{F#她}{M#他}正与祸乱仙舟的药王秘传魁首对峙…而这，将是一场事关生死的较量！」
E: "This {M#man}{F#woman} who called {M#him}{F#her}self "Galactic Baseballer" was locked in a heated battle against the master primus of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... And for the Xianzhou, this was a battle for life and death!"

C: 这样吧，咱们一起去一趟您战斗过的地方——丹鼎司。故地重游，一定可以激发出咱们的灵感，将这个「主角模板」充实起来。
E: How about this — you and I hit up a site of your former battles: The Alchemy Commission. Revisiting old haunts will definitely get the creative juices flowing. Let's flesh out this Protagonist Model.

C: 你管这叫「讲得通」是吧？
E: You call this "make sense"!?

C: 「{NICKNAME}化身为机巧鸟，在炉鼎中闪转腾挪，巧妙地通过了初代司鼎留下的考验。」
E: "{NICKNAME} transformed into a cycrane, weaving and darting around the elixir cauldron to clear the trial left behind by the first Cauldron Master."

C: 「随着所有禁制都被{NICKNAME}破除，初代司鼎的秘宝也终于显露了出来……」
E: "As all the containment mechanisms were gradually lifted by {NICKNAME}, the secret treasure of the first Cauldron Master was revealed..."

C: 怎么又是试炼？
E: Another trial?

C: 若没有试炼，我该怎么知道你是否值得我帮助呢？
E: Without a trial, how would I know whether you were worthy of my help?

C: 是我看走眼了，这古老的龙宫禁不起你这么折腾。
E: I made an error in judgment. This old Dragon Palace cannot withstand this kind of abuse.

C: 这一折戏也算是完成了…您抽空看看吧，有什么意见尽管提。
E: This scene is complete... Take some time to have a look at it, and feel free to share any feedback with me.

C: 看来不是这个……
E: This doesn't seem to be the one...

C: 嘿，你这吹毛求疵…这本子又不是我写的，格律押韵什么的跟作者探讨去。
E: Hey, that's pretty picky... I didn't write this part anyway, so take up any criticism about the poetry with the author.

C: 「此时，在{NICKNAME}心中只有一个念头——消灭绝灭大君，保得仙舟万代太平。」
E: "At this time, there is only one thought in {NICKNAME}'s head - The Lord Ravager must be destroyed so the Xianzhou can remain in peace."

C: 愿闻其详。
E: Please elaborate.

C: 高阿姨将录音放入播放设备中。
E: Tall Auntie puts the recording into her playback device.

C: 这怎么行呢，我不开店我就连接待同好的地儿都没有了。
E: If I were to do that, I wouldn't even have a place for my fellow curio enthusiasts.

C: 不然呢，我是真的很感兴趣！咱俩要不顺路去看看？
E: I mean... Yeah? Wanna check it out on the way?

C: 二位，请看！这里就是本届「星际决胜庆典」的舞台。
E: Take a look, this is where the Interastral Tournament Festival will be held this year.

C: 哼，哼哼……
E: Oink! Oink, oink...

C: 你想想，我也想想。
E: I'll lend you an extra brain cell.

C: 不过，你说了算～还是说，你想要再考虑考虑？
E: It's up to you... Do you wanna try something different?

C: 这里…居然还有这么大的空间吗？
E: ...Such a huge area.

C: 这附近刚好有不少落单的游离数据。不如就拿它们来练手吧？
E: There happens to be a good number of roaming data targets in the vicinity. How about using them as practice?

C: 哇，是希露瓦，还有佩拉！好久不见啦。
E: Serval, Pela! Has it really been that long!?

C: 歌德宾馆，歌德宾馆～我们又回来啦！
E: Ahhhh, Goethe Hotel~ Home sweet home!

C: 咦，次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神？你怎么了？
E: Hey, what is it, Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord?

C: 哎，别跑！我们有话要问！
E: Hey, come back! We want to ask you something!

C: 那么就拜托桂乃芬小姐了。我先告辞，各位保重！
E: Fantastic, Miss Guinaifen. I'll be on my way, now. Stay safe, everyone.

C: 哼哼！哼！
E: Oink, oink, oink!

C: 看来，这次又要我们作出选择了…可次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神的主人说到底还是艾丝妲小姐吧？
E: So it's up to us...? But, Miss Asta is Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord's owner...

C: …看来次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神也这么觉得。
E: Looks like Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord thinks so, too.

C: 那我们该从哪里了解这些？
