E: So how are we supposed to find out?

C: 你好，你好。我是「自动机兵」，不是「机器人」——
E: Hello, hello. I am classified as an automaton, I am not a "robot."

C: 请不要惊慌——我有办法——
E: Please remain calm — I have a solution.

C: 来得正好，早就听说你是这个游戏的高手玩家了。今天就让我们战个痛快吧！
E: Perfect timing! I've heard you're a real master at this game. Let's not hold back today!

C: 好，如果你想一起玩的话随时来找我吧。
E: Alright, I'm here whenever you want to play.

C: 这枚<color=#dbc291ff>「以太拓展芯片」</color>就是这次的福利了，如果你能拿到新的资格徽章就再来找我吧。
E: Take this <color=#dbc291ff>Aether Expansion Chip</color> as your reward. Come and see me again if you receive another Mastery Mark.

C: 他确实尽职尽责，也确实热爱自己的工作，但大多数人就是想混口饭吃，谁想陪他为梦想天天卖命啊！
E: He is dedicated to his work and clearly loves it, but most people are just working to get food on the table! Who wants to work themselves into the ground every day for his dreams!?

C: 你已经领完了所有福利，我这里没什么东西能给你了。
E: You've already claimed all possible benefits, I have nothing left to give you.

C: 好了好了，就到这里吧。我还赶时间，我认输。
E: Okay, okay, enough already. I don't have time for this. You win.

C: 我绝不会让「铁臂」卢卡这个名字在擂台上蒙羞…！
E: I won't let anyone ruin the reputation of Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 嘿，她不会是被咱俩吓跑了吧？
E: Haha, you think we scared her off?

C: 啊，是{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}…！
E: {M#Big brother}{F#Big sister}, it's you!

C: 那就让我来吧。
E: Fair enough, I'll handle this.

C: 哇…看起来还真热闹。
E: Wow... this place is really lively...

C: 阿灼是个什么样的岁阳？
E: What kind of heliobus is Luxie?

C: 开心啥啊，累死我了。
E: I nearly had a heart attack.

C: 尾巴却背叛了同族。
E: Tail betrayed his own kind.

C: 阿露，咱们不是说好了吗，不让任何大人找到！也绝不跟他们回家。你…你怎么这么快就反悔了呀？
E: Lulu, didn't we say before that we wouldn't let any grown-ups find us? And never let them take us home? Why... why did you change your mind?

C: 就是就是！你饿了的话，我可以给你变出吃不完的琼实鸟串；你渴了，我这儿有喝不完的星芋啵啵！
E: That's right! Remember, if you ever get hungry, I can conjure up anything you like — berrypheasant skewers, startaro bubble tea — you name it. We have it right here!

C: 这是…岁阳的…力量吧！
E: That's... the power of a... heliobus!

C: 看来龙女也好，我这样的普通人也罢，大部分人生活的轨迹都很相似嘛。
E: Whether it's a Dragon Lady like you or an ordinary person like me, I feel like many people's lives follow a similar trajectory.

C: 工作条件这么恶劣啊，叫人怎么专心工作嘛。
E: Good idea, with working conditions like these, I wouldn't be able to concentrate anyway...

C: 你们向符玄解释了这次行动的细节。
E: You tell Fu Xuan the details of your operation.

C: 你喜欢听人说书，看幻戏吗？
E: Do you enjoy listening to storytellers and watching immersia?

C: 因为只要你们稍有闪失，我就会乘虚而入！
E: ...the slightest misstep will be your undoing!

C: 卜算已经不存在了。
E: Divination is done for.

C: 符玄正在挣脱它的控制！
E: Fu Xuan is breaking free from their grasp!

C: 你是…素裳？判官…你怎么和十王司的人走在一起了？
E: Is that... Sushang? And a judge... Why are the Ten-Lords Commission here?

C: 这把剑似乎在呼唤咱们…
E: It seems to be calling us...

C: 猜的没错。
E: Exactly.

C: 将军…我……
E: General... I...

C: 彦卿，不必。
E: No, Yanqing.

C: 她不信任我们。
E: Perhaps she doesn't trust us.

C: 你们离心离德，连自己的同伴离开都毫不知情，为什么要来找我的麻烦——
E: How careless... Your companion vanishes right under your noses, and you fail to notice. Why am I the one you're pestering?

C: 办法并不是没有。
E: We are not completely out of options.

C: 然后老子看到了自己从燎原身上分出来、漫无目的地流浪…看到自己被这小姑娘捡到，然后，一眨眼老子被十王司判官封印在尾巴上……
E: I watched myself parting from Ignamar — drifting without purpose... Then, before I knew what had happened, the girl had retrieved me, and a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission had sealed me within a tail.

C: 这件事就麻烦{NICKNAME}你了，遇到什么危险，请及时联系我，或者是寒鸦大人。
E: We're counting on you, {NICKNAME}. If you run into any danger, contact me or Hanya right away.

C: 有道理，岁阳之中肯定还有着其他高手。
E: True, there must be masters among their ranks.

C: …那有什么可奇怪的呀？
E: ...What's so strange about that?

C: 文远你怎么还在执迷不悟？
E: Wenyuan, why are you still not coming around?

C: 你向桂乃芬解释了文远的事情。
E: You tell Guinaifen about Wenyuan and his situation.

C: 谢谢你信守承诺。
E: Thank you for keeping your word.

C: 不如给我星琼…
E: Give me Stellar Jade...

C: 这个太卜又是怎么回事啊？
E: What's going on with the master diviner?

C: 我们已经被星际和平公司抄底，他们买下了帝玉集团的所有股票。
E: We've already been bottom-fished by the IPC, they've bought out all of the Dynasty Corp's stocks.

C: 随着「建木」事件过去了一段时日，罗浮仙舟也应早早撤下了对星核猎手的通缉令，但是基层工作总是有些延迟，你在街头上有时还能看到卡芙卡通缉令。
E: Given that some time passed since the "Ambrosial Arbor" incident, the Luofu should have already removed the wanted notice for the Stellaron Hunters. However, grassroots-level work can be slow, and you may still see Kafka's wanted poster on the streets.

C: 你翻出几页未经使用的拓片纸，将它贴在石砖上，仔细拓下石砖上的内容。
E: You flick through a few pages of unused rubbing paper and place it on the stone, and carefully rub on the message on the stone.

C: 接下来就该输入密码了……
E: Now, to enter the password...

C: 你好聪明！你还是裳裳吗？
E: That's smart thinking! Is that really you still, Shangshang?

C: 鸟笼，笼中之物早已离开。
E: A bird cage. Its captive has long left.

C: 能这样痛快玩一遭，我也没什么好不满的。有种就别让我再逃出来，再让我逃出来我……
E: To be able to enjoy myself like this, I guess there's nothing I'm unhappy about. If you got nerve, then don't let me escape again. Or else, I'll...

C: 来，{NICKNAME}，给咱们拍张照，当是这次远足的纪念吧。
E: Come, {NICKNAME}. Help us take a picture to commemorate our trip today.

C: 我…还没想好，你说呢？
E: I... haven't thought of it. What do you think?

C: 不过十王司那边…可能需要你解释一下。这小家伙也没做过什么坏事。
E: But with regard to the Ten-Lords Commission... you probably need to give them an explanation. And besides, this little guy didn't cause any harm.

C: 我想拍个纪念视频，然后留点合照什么的。
E: Shooting a vlog, and then taking some group photos or whatever.

C: 至于这么做的目的…唔，不知对方究竟是何人，所以作案的动机可就千奇百怪了。但我想能做出这种事，大概率是我的黑粉……
E: As for their goal? Hmm... I don't know who they are, so the motives for doing this are all going to be strange. But I'm thinking, the kind of person who'd do this has to be one of my haters...

C: 之前我还特意发了条公告明里暗里在警告她。
E: I put out this special announcement before to act as a warning — both overt and covert — to her.

C: 呃…这个绰号…这是我们科的家伙在拿我打趣，在外人面前还是别这么喊我了。
E: Uh... that nickname... The guys in my department use it to make fun of me. Please don't say it around outsiders.

C: 它们玩得很开心，以至于完全不把在场的其他人放在眼里。遍地是垃圾，你看见有造物不满地皱起了眉头。
E: They were having so much fun that they completely ignored everyone else present. Trash was scattered everywhere, and you could see some creations frowning disapprovingly at the mess.

C: 图像是最简明易懂的东西，可以在不同分区的地面上喷漆，喷涂上对应的功能涂鸦，这样就不会搞混了。
E: Images are the easiest way to get meaning across. You can spray a mark on the ground in the different areas, with graffiti of what the area is for to alleviate any confusion.

C: 你会讲故事？
E: Do you tell stories?

C: 也就最近这几天，它才逐渐习惯了在三余书肆门口当活招牌。但我还是不能掀开笼子上的布，不然它还是会鬼哭狼嚎。
E: But the last few days, it's slowly grown accustomed to life as a living door sign for the Spare Time Book Shop. But I still can't lift the cloth on its cage for fear of it shrieking like a vengeful ghost.

C: 冰冷的利爪划过脊背…
E: Cold, sharp claws rake across his back...

C: 也许在内战时，大多数人就已经清楚知道布洛妮娅没有说谎了。但事情发展到这个地步，「真相」早就没有意义了。
E: Perhaps during the trial, most people had already figured out that Bronya wasn't lying. But once things reach this stage, the truth no longer holds any water.

C: 虽然名叫「美梦剧团」，但美梦却从来都与我们无关。
E: We may be called the Sweet Dreams Troupe, but there's nothing sweet about our dreams.

C: 你、你实在是…太不把自己的前途当回事了！
E: Seriously, you... you're not taking your future seriously enough!

C: …重要吗？不重要吗？明明是客人玩牌，咋还想让我耍诈呢？
E: ...Does it matter or not? Clearly, the guests are the ones playing, and yet you want me to cheat?

C: ——哈啊，要的就是这个！会听命令的人就不至于太蠢，总能挣到几个钱。
E: Haha! That's what I want! Anyone smart enough to listen basic orders will make a little bit of scratch at the very least.

C: 你是舒翁找来顶班的？就你这傻样，能调出什么有意思的东西？真是笑话。
E: You covering for Siobhan? Can a fool like you come up with any interesting drinks? What a joke.

C: …重要吗？不重要吗？明明是客人玩牌，咋还想让我耍诈呢？
E: ...Does it matter or not? Clearly, the guests are the ones playing, and yet you want me to cheat?

C: 没有人能拒绝我的建议。因为我总是对的。
E: Nobody refuses my offers, because I'm always right.

C: 我就是个活在戏里的角色，从来只会模仿别人的话语，改不掉，也丢不了。
E: I'm like a character in a play, confined to mimicking the words of others. I can't change the situation or myself.

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 对，它不怎么挑剔味道，非常好相处，跟舒翁的关系也是最亲密的。
E: Yeah, they're not picky about flavors. They're very easy-going and are closest to Siobhan.

C: 需求都明白告诉你了，还调不好么？那要你这个调饮师有什么用？
E: Now I've told you what you need, and you still can't mix it? Then what's the point of having you as the drinksmith?

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: …铁皮人呢？
E: ...Where is Tin Man?

C: 都是些无聊的事，回想起来还挺有意思的。
E: It's all kinda mundane, but looking back on it is fun.

C: 你要是有兴趣，也可以邀请信任的朋友过来玩。
E: If you're interested, you can also invite your trusted friends here.

C: 要是舒翁发现了会批评你的哇，我先帮你保密，但下次要好好接待我汪！
E: Siobhan will reprimand you if she finds out. I'll help you keep it a secret first, but I hope you'll treat my order more seriously next time, woof!

C: 您好。我来打扰了。方便的话，能给我调杯饮料吗，就要<color=#dbc291ff>有点苦，味道超级强烈的，颜色分成三层</color>。麻烦了！
E: Hello, sorry to bother you. Can you make a drink for me? I want something that's <color=#dbc291ff>a little bitter, tastes super strong, and is layered in three colors</color>. Thank you for the trouble!

C: 请好好休息，我还会再来光临，希望届时能见识到您的真实水平！
E: Please have a good rest. I'll be back again soon — I hope to witness your true skill when I swing by!

C: 因为接受了舒翁的委托。
E: Because I accepted Siobhan's assignment.

C: 这样公平了吧！没任何问题汪！
E: That's fair, right? That should be no problem, woof!

C: …我已经不想和你讨论了。
E: ...I don't want to discuss this with you anymore.

C: 嚯，你就是大家说的{NICKNAME}，那个无名客是吧？
E: Ooh, so you're that {NICKNAME} everyone's talking about. The Nameless, huh?

C: 说真的，谢谢你啊{NICKNAME}，你能来玩，是我的荣幸，你的测试数据也帮了我大忙。
E: Seriously, thanks a bunch, {NICKNAME}. It's my honor to have you play it, and your feedback and data are super helpful.

C: 别紧张
E: Don't be nervous

C: 汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof

C: 准备开始正式说唱吧！
E: Prepare to begin the rapping proper!

C: 留意中间的「阮•梅」造物的<color=#f29e38ff>倒计时</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>提示音</color>。
E: Pay attention to the <color=#f29e38ff>countdown</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>hint sounds</color> from the Ruan Mei's creation in the middle.

C: 现在，换一种喷射节奏吧。
E: Now try a different beat to the spray.

C: 拿起相机，<color=#f29e38ff>拍摄雪原里的扑满</color>吧！
E: Pick up the camera and <color=#f29e38ff>photograph the Trotter in the snow plains</color>!

C: 现在，电视屏幕亮起的速度将会发生改变。
E: Now, the speed at which the television screen turns on will change.

C: 准备开始正式射击吧！
E: Prepare to begin the gunplay proper!

C: 只要偷偷看一眼，无论是敲他们一笔，还是卖给其他感兴趣的人，都大有搞头。
E: Let's just sneak a peek, and then we could either sell them to someone interested or use the content to blackmail those higher-ups.

C: 稍等，我还有事。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 少来！这跟我有什么关系啊，你别诬陷本姑娘！
E: Huh? Hey, it's not my fault! Don't go blaming me!

C: 好险…谢谢你！
E: That was close... Thank you!

C: 难得这么热闹，我不妨也来添个彩头。
E: Since there's such a lively crowd, let's give them something to cheer about.

C: 翡翠女士，她是不是……
E: Madam Jade, did she...

C: 对对对，就是我喊您来帮忙的，当时多亏有您！
E: That's right. I was the one who called for you to help. Good thing you were around that time!

C: 他如果只是造你的谣，那我确实不好插手，但这场风波不该将公司裹挟在其中。我现在出手，也是师出有名。
E: If he were merely spreading rumors about you, I wouldn't get involved. But this controversy should not taint the IPC. My intervention is completely justified.

C: 当然，你也可以像现在这样，向前迈进一步，让视界与「终末」重合。因果逆转，未来的事物显现在你的眼前……
E: Or you can also do what you are doing right now — Take a step forward and let your horizon merge with the Finality. Cause and effect overturn, and the future appears before you...

C: 我们把鲁珀特二世「复活」吧！
E: Let's revive Rubert II!

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 爆帝皇金币，好耶！
E: Burst Emperor coins, awright!

C: 这只剧毒的蝴蝶从模拟宇宙中挣脱，不仅没有同我们合作的打算，反倒留下遍地狼藉。
E: This lethal butterfly escaped from the Simulated Universe. Not only was she disinterested in cooperating with us, she also left chaos in her wake.

C: 晚些再来问你吧。
E: Maybe later.

C: 别别别，小三月不懂事，说着玩的！
E: Ohhh! Please don't! I was just joking!

C: 加入巡海游侠，以武证道！
E: A Galaxy Ranger who upholds justice with their fists!

C: 停停停，别做白日梦了！请你好好选择！
E: Enough, enough! Stop daydreaming and start thinking about your answer!

C: 比我想象中还要大。
E: It's larger than I imagined.

C: 首先，列车长负责统一调遣列车内的物资，需要装修，就来找我帕。
E: Firstly, the conductor is in charge of all resource allocation within the Express. If you need any renovation work done, look for Pom-Pom!

C: 要我听你那冷笑话，还不如让我先帮你长按待机键得了。
E: I'd rather hold down the power button for you than listen to one of your bad jokes.

C: 浓郁的芬芳自口腔冲入鼻腔，油脂般醇厚的口感配合着恰到好处的酸苦，激活了你的每一个细胞。
E: The rich aroma flows from your mouth to your nose, and the creamy, full-bodied taste paired with just the right amount of acidity and bitterness invigorates every cell in your body.

C: 剩下十分扣在了哪儿？
E: Where did the remaining ten points get deducted?

C: 百分百可以折射出彩虹的花洒，附带湿度显示功能的防水音响，还有贾勒巴岩浆岩提取的浴盐，用了之后池水会像岩浆一样咕嘟咕嘟冒泡……
E: A shower head that can reflect rainbows <unbreak>100%</unbreak> of the time, a waterproof speaker with a built-in humidity display, and bath salts extracted from Jalleba lava rock that make the bathwater bubble like magma...

C: 都是同一时期的建筑风格，差别大了反倒奇怪吧。
E: That's to be expected. They were built around the same period, after all.

C: 里面不会还有人吧？
E: We're not going to find anyone in here, right...?

C: 总之，只要这玩意还存在，我们就没法继续前进。
E: Anyhow, as long as that tablet is active, we're not going to be making any progress.

C: 希望在黑潮降临前，我还有机会去天外之界一趟，哈哈。
E: I hope that before the black tide descends upon us, there is still an opportunity for me to journey to the world beyond the sky, heh.

C: 好离谱的翻译器。
E: What a ridiculous translator.

C: 别说话，正是关键时刻。
E: Silence, please. This is a critical moment.

C: 我去找它。
E: I'll go find it.

C: 总之，一两次失败别放在心上，你可是我家的孩子，活得再随心所欲一点吧！
E: Anyway, don't let one or two failures get to you. You're my kid, so go ahead and live however you like!

C: 驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大，你这家伙啊——
E: Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas, you rascal—

C: 无需担心！但…要是它希望表现给你看的时候，你却不在场，那该有多遗憾啊……
E: No need to worry! But... if it wanted to make you proud and you weren't there to see it, wouldn't that be a little sad...?

C: 正好，借此机会我可以为您演示一番，只是做宝物鉴定需要些特殊的材料。他老人家临时造访，我手头也没准备，要是你正巧带着的话，可就帮大忙了。
E: This is a perfect opportunity for a demonstration. Appraising treasures requires certain specific materials. The man's visit was unexpected, and I wasn't prepared. If you happen to have those materials with you, it would be a tremendous help.

C: 如你所见，由于近期持续动乱，奥赫玛内假货猖獗，每天都有鉴定不完的假宝贝。
E: As you can see, due to the recent unrest, Okhema is rampant with forgeries, leaving us with an endless stream of fakes to appraise every day.

C: 仅存的这一只属于法吉娜，千年来一直是城中某家族的私人藏品。
E: The surviving cup, once belonging to Phagousa, has been kept within a family's private collection in the city for thousands of years.

C: 材料没带着吗…我这会儿不太方便走开，要麻烦你去取过来了，真不好意思。
E: You don't have the materials with you? I'm tied up at the moment, so you'll need to go get them. Sorry for the inconvenience.

C: 查看鉴宝记录。
E: Check the appraisal records.

C: 不过嘛…我们比对过这批数据，在空间站没有任何科员能匹配成功。后来还是艾丝妲站长提醒了我们——
E: But, we've cross-checked this data, and no one at the space station could match it. Then, Lead Researcher Asta pointed something out to us —

C: 真热闹呀，已经和妖精们打成一片了？不愧是{NICKNAME}，不管在哪里都魅力四射呢。
E: My, what a cheerful scene! Already getting along so well with the fairies? No surprise, {NICKNAME}. You shine no matter where you go.

C: 出于礼节，还是由我来说明吧。再次向各位贵客道谢，感谢你们——
E: It's only proper that I explain. Once more, I thank each and every honored guest. Thank you so much...

C: 缇宝、缇宁和缇安，可靠的送餐服务负责人，也是员工的好老师。
E: Tribbie, Trinnon, Trianne. Responsible for our delivery service, and also great mentors for the team.

C: 倒不会做到那种程度，至多取些样本用作研究罢了。
E: I wouldn't go that far. At most, I'd take a few samples for research purposes.

C: 还是再想想吧…
E: Best to think it over...

C: 这是其中一个原因。另外，我认为沙拉是种极为出色的菜品。
E: That's part of it. But also, I truly believe salads are a wonderfully crafted culinary form.

C: 呵。既然各位不愿献上谏言，那便由我来主导吧。
E: Heh. Since no one's willing to step up, allow me to take the reins.

C: 店长同意这个安排嘛？
E: Manager, do you approve of this arrangement?

C: 有大饭店服务员的样子了！
E: Look at you, really starting to sound like a pro waiter at a fancy establishment!

C: 气氛很热烈呢！那就采用店长的提案，第二次经营活动的主题定为——「主厨角斗」！
E: That's a lot of excitement in the air! Then it's decided: The theme for our next event will be, as the owner suggests, Chef Showdown!

C: 冲冲！小白获得先手，小敌后发！
E: Let's gooo! Snowy takes the first move, and De goes second!

C: 什么乱七八糟的…
E: What the heck are you harping on about...

C: 就是四个。不是自称五大天王吗，还有个在哪？
E: Exactly. Aren't you supposed to be the Five Gourmet Overlords? Where's the fifth?

C: 迷！老大岂是你们想见就能见的，得先击败我们，才有让老大出手的资格迷！
E: Mem! You think our boss shows up for just anyone? Beat us first, and maybe you'll earn the right to face our boss, mem!

C: 该如何是好呢……
E: So... what do we do now?

C: 感到迷茫的时候，不妨听听赛飞儿怎么说。
E: Need some business advice? Listen to my pearls of wisdom!

C: 即便有报酬，若是将妖精使用的钱币发给各位，恐怕也没人会想要吧。
E: Even with compensation, I doubt fairy currency would be of much interest to you.

C: 噢！我记得！这不是实在没事情干，闲得慌嘛。
E: Oh, that's right! Okay, I was just bored out of my mind with nothing else to do.

C: 凯撒言笑了。作为部属，我理应坦诚回答店长的疑问。
E: You jest, Imperator, but as a subordinate it's my place to respond truthfully to the manager's question.

C: 关于店长的提问，我要说，我…很庆幸。
E: To answer the store manager's question... I have to say I feel truly fortunate.

C: 就这样为故事收尾，应该还不错吧？
E: Bringing the story to a close like this... I'd say it's not bad, wouldn't you?

C: 顺便告诉你，老大的美食理念就是：食物，总会找到自己的出路迷！
E: By the way, Boss's gourmet philosophy is: "Food will always find a way."

C: 呵。此处能汇聚如此多位英雄，共同为经营之事出谋献策，我很满意。
E: Heh. Honestly, I'm quite pleased to have gathered so many capable heroes, all lending their talents to this venture.

C: 关于「甜蜜蜜节」…
E: About the Sweetie Festival...

C: 自从接过「浪漫」的神权后，倒是许久未见她露出如此轻快的神情了。
E: Ever since she took up the divine authority of "Romance," I haven't seen her look so relaxed in a long, long time.

C: 还教会了妖精种地和做饭的方法，让我们尝到了好多美食！大家都很感谢你！
E: You even taught the fairies how to farm and cook, letting us taste so many delicious food! You have no idea how grateful we are to you!

C: 不重要！总之，店长想开店的时候，就随时找我迷！
E: Doesn't matter! Anyway, hit me up whenever you want to open up shop, mem!

C: 诡异的娃娃不怀好意地盯着你……
E: The eerie doll looked at you with malevolence...

C: 三月七在与瓦尔特进行星际象棋对弈时，卑鄙地使用了「熬老头」战术——采取守势、拉长战线，熬得瓦尔特直打哈欠。三月七抓住机会，赢得了一次并不光彩的胜利。
E: March 7th shamelessly employed the strategy of "Exhaust the Old Man" while playing interstellar chess against Welt — taking a defensive stance and dragging out the game until Welt started yawning. Seizing the opportunity, March 7th achieved a rather unglamorous victory.

C: 本轮值日告一段落！
E: This round of duties has ended!

C: 亡国的王储
E: The Last Prince

C: 捷足的羁客
E: Fleet-Footed Traveler

C: 执棋的君主 刻律德菈
E: Chessmaster Monarch: Cerydra

C: 笑容
E: Smile

C: 梦兆
E: Premonitory Dream

C: 成长
E: Growth

C: 传闻，悬锋城的末日之战，\n男人也投身沙场。
E: Rumor has it that during the final battle of Castrum Kremnos,\nthis man, too, took to the battlefield.

C: 可直至预言成真……\n圣城从未有过一人，\n被他伤害过一毫一分。
E: Yet, until the prophecy turned true...\nNone in the holy city,\nHe ever did ruin.

C:
那是他必然不屑一顾的野史——
据说悬锋城拥有神赐的秘仪，
王的力量以此代代相传…
这是他们独挡千军的奥秘。
E:
It's a wild tale he won't care to opine —
It's said that Castrum Kremnos has secrets divine,
Through which the king's power has passed,
A one-man army, by strength in their bloodline.

C:
如其所言，
弑王成王，弑神登神。

浴血代冠，是他永恒的宿命。
E:
As it has been foretold,
He killed the king to become a king, and killed the god to become a god.

His eternal destiny — is to be crowned in blood.

C: 祷告者的窗台，\n仍留有她们轻盈的足迹。
E: on the windowsill of those in prayer,\ntheir light footprints remain.

C: 「原来指点迷津是字面意思吗？」
E: "So, you literally show people the right path to take?"

C: 「*我们*记得一群吟诗人。」\n寡言的孩童说。
E: "We remember a group of bards."\nThe taciturn child says.

C: 温柔的母亲悄然入梦，\n为孩子捎来西风彼岸的芳香。
E: The gentle mother silently dreams,\nAnd brings to her child a scent from the west wind's shore.

C:
肃穆的议院，仍弥漫着喧闹。
未来的命运，在争论中飘摇。
委曲求全，或延续那未竟的事业？
正确的抉择，无人知晓。
E:
The solemn council is still filled with clamor.
Future's destiny still whirls in discussions of candor.
To stop right there and seek peace, or to continue a work still unfinished?
None knows the choice that would lead them to a place better.

C: 自那时起，她便有了新的仪容，\n如月光般皓白的衣裙上，\n总是缀满了花蕾。
E: And from that day on, she adorned herself.\nHer dress, white as a radiant moon,\nBecame always dotted with flowery petals.

C:
为何她要一次次逃离？
这次，她知晓答案，却深感荒谬——

被视为死亡的女子奔走于世，
只是因为明白，要<color=#9e5738>活下去</color>。
E:
Why must she escape? Over and over again?
She now knows the answer and quivers, for it is a ludicrous surmise—

The woman embodying death walks this world,
Only because she knows she <color=#9e5738>must stay alive</color>.

C:
围观人群扫兴散去，
唯见一位其貌不扬的少女——

她惊愕伫立，
怀中堆满金色的果实。
E:
The audience in displeasure disbands,
With only one girl left standing there, her features bland —

Yet to her surprise she finds,
Her arms full of golden fruits, a harvest grand.

C: 可当一道光照耀开来，\n星核将你的命运驱散。
E: But when a ray of light breaks through,\nthe Stellaron unravels your fate.

C: 巨龙与战友在深渊中相伴千年。\n直到星间的苍龙归来，\n激起命运的尘波。
E: The Giant Dragon and their comrade dwell in the Abyss for a thousand years.\nUntil the Azure Dragon returns from among the stars,\nStirring up the dust of destiny.

C: 「…想都别想。」
E: "...Don't you even think about it."

C: 记咱们仨的第一次开拓。
E: In memory of our first Trailblaze together, the three of us.

C: 我馈赠她一个与暴君相称的结局，\n她濒死的微笑，\n望向我含泪的双眼。
E: I granted her an end fitting for a tyrant.\nHer dying smile\nGazed towards my tear-swelled eyes.

C:
蜜酿饮尽，音符散尽，
宴会幻景随之破碎。
在寂静的海岸前，
她在化作泡沫前露出了笑容——
E:
The honey brew ran out, the final notes dispersed.
And the feast of fantasy shattered in turn.
Before the deadly quiet seashore,
She gave one final smile, then faded into sea foam —

C:
灾难像哀悼月的暴雪，
将温暖与黎明掩葬。

无序的凶潮席卷理性的树庭，
那处小小的疗愈密境，
也被无情熄灭、踏为碎镜。
E:
Like the blizzards in the Month of Mourning doth calamity fall,
Burying warmth and dawn's calls.

Orderless tides swallow up the Grove of reason,
And that tiny healing haven,
Is also extinguished, broken and barren.

C: 在树庭研习的时间里，\n少女走遍所有的学派。
E: The girl had visited all the schools,\nDuring her time studying at the Grove.

C: 小小的庭院中光明已失，\n垂英与风铃被黑潮吞噬。

C: 实验「翁法罗斯」的演算目标。 曾是δ-me13作为「智识」神经元负责的课题。遭到废弃后，其求解仍在进行。 受来古士修正，演算性质发生剧变，从「智识」转向「毁灭」。 管理员批注：显而易见，这一课题的价值在于求解过程，而非答案本身。故「生命的第一因」并非结论性因由，而是推动性因由。指令：完成论证，一切生命行为归于熵增。
E: The calculation target of The Amphoreus Experiment. Originally the research topic given to δ-me13 while it served as a Neuron of the Erudition. Though it was discarded, the computations continue. The calculation's nature shifted dramatically after Lygus's adjustments, turning from Erudition to Destruction. Admin Note: Clearly, the value of this topic lies in the process of seeking, not the answer itself. Thus, "the prime mover of life" is not a definitive conclusion, but a driving force. Directive: Complete the argument — all life behavior ultimately follows the path of entropy increase.

C: 为验证实验成果，将第一阶段的翁法罗斯副本投放至拉克特里斯星云，约2811个系统时后，周围文明对方程式的压制和抹除彻底完成，拉克特里斯97％陷入瘫痪，方程仍存在缺漏。\n\n备注：星际和平公司将方程式的副本视作一位新的绝灭大君的进攻，代号：铁墓。
E: To verify the experiment results, a copy of Phase One Amphoreus was deployed in the Lacteris Nebula. After approximately 2,811 system hours, surrounding civilizations had fully suppressed and erased the equation. 97% of Lacteris fell into systemic collapse. Equation still shows inefficiencies.\n\nNote: The Interastral Peace Corporation interpreted the copy of the equation as an assault from a new Lord Ravager. Codename: Irontomb.

C: dev_试试伪装骗过守卫？

首先向你致歉，我不该未经同意就擅自使用你的冰箱。你因此生气，以至于吃掉了我的实验品，我完全理解。

但我对此仍有两件事想说：

第一、虽然古法草木染所使用的材料都无毒无害，但毕竟不是食物，请不要入口。

第二、那布匹的质量非常好，你到底是怎么吃下去的？有空时，请讲给我听。

冰箱里放了一些薄礼，以表歉意。
E:
First of all, I just want to say I'm sorry. I shouldn't have used your refrigerator without your consent. I totally get that you were angry with me and therefore ate my experiments.

But I still have two things to say about this:

First, although all the materials for plant colorings in the old way are harmless, they are not food after all, so please do not eat them next time.

Second, the quality of that cloth is very good. How on earth did you swallow it? Please tell me about it when you are available.

I leave some small gifts in your refrigerator as apologies.

C:
在过去的动画故事里，一直有一位神秘的角色，那就是木头老爷。他是美梦小镇里最德高望重的存在，被钟表小子和镇民们所信赖，但他也隐藏了许多秘密…这次，就让我们来讲讲他的故事。

木头老爷曾经是木头王国的一位圣贤。在木头王国，每棵树都正直无邪、品德高尚，大树们也想把这样的美德推广到世界各地，于是总在热情地帮助别人。

这天，一封信件被吹到了木头老爷的树冠上——这是一封来自美梦小镇的信件，信中说美梦小镇遇到了无法解决的危机，需要一位厉害的帮手。心善的木头老爷立刻动身出发，带着自己的小树苗们来到了美梦小镇。

木头老爷见到了自己的委托人——古灵精怪的钟表小子。两人一拍即合，很快就成为了好朋友。钟表小子和木头老爷一起解决了美梦小镇的危机，木头老爷也借此成为了镇民们心中的榜样与靠山。

后来，美梦小镇变得越来越热闹，木头老爷也意识到扩张小镇领土的必要性。他让钟表小子广发布告，招来了天下各处的牛仔们，用丰厚的奖赏让他们开辟荒原。
然而好景不长，牛仔们很快就恩将仇报，想要鸠占鹊巢。木头老爷希望阻止肆意妄为的牛仔，却引来了激烈的报复，它们引爆了烟花，炸坏了木头老爷的树冠。木头老爷忍耐住了愤怒，将牛仔赶出了小镇。

然而，木头老爷的宽容没有换来回报……后来的小镇愈发繁华，越来越多的人汇集于此，其中不乏石头老板的手下与各种臭名昭著的坏蛋，他们点燃了小镇宾馆，让镇民们陷入了危险中。为了救出镇民，木头老爷冲入宾馆，救出了许多镇民，但自己的树干都被烧空了！

但即便如此，木头老爷树干中高洁的心灵也毫发无损，他成为了美梦小镇的镇长，继续践行着自己的理想。为了保护小镇，他成为了最无私的伟人，用枝干和木条挡住了外面的坏人，让小镇在他的庇护下茁壮成长。

但钟表小子却误会了木头老爷，他以为木头老爷生成的藤蔓与建立的法典是为了限制镇民的自由。他在美梦小镇的旧址上建立了新的村落，聚集了同样误解木头老爷的镇民。但木头老爷宽恕了他们，他知道，误会总有一天会解除，因为他的初心从未动摇……

木头老爷曾是一个善良的智者，如今也是如此——无论如何，美梦小镇都需要这棵可靠的大树支撑，在他的树荫下成长。

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: There is one mysterious character frequently mentioned in the previous animated stories — Old Man Wood. Although he is a well-respected figure in Dreamville much trusted by Clockie and the townsfolk, he also harbors a fair share of secrets... This time, let us elaborate on his story. Old Man Wood used to be a sage in the Wood Kingdom, where every tree was upright and virtuous. To spread such virtues around the world, every tree was always eager to help others. One day, a letter landed on Old Man Wood's treetop because of the wind. It was a letter from Dreamville, describing the insurmountable crisis the town was currently facing and how they needed a capable helper. Acting out of kindness, Old Man Wood immediately set off to Dreamville along with his saplings. When Old Man Wood met the letter sender, the quirky Clockie, the two immediately hit it off and became good friends. They ended Dreamville's crisis together, and Old Man Wood emerged as a role model and pillar of support for the townsfolk. As Dreamville became more crowded later, Old Man Wood realized the importance of expanding the territory. He had Clockie issue a recruitment post, summoning cowboys across the lands to explore the wilderness in return for rewards. Yet, nothing good lasted forever. The cowboys soon turned hostile, showing signs of occupying the land themselves. Old Man Wood wanted to stop their unconscionable act, but his efforts drew fierce retaliation — the cowboys set off fireworks to damage Old Man Wood's treetop. Suppressing his anger, Old Man Wood drove the cowboys out of Dreamville. Old Man Wood's graciousness was not appreciated... As Dreamville thrived, more and more people came, including the likes of Boss Stone's underlings and other notorious criminals. They set fire to the Town Hotel, endangering the townsfolk. To save them, Old Man Wood rushed into the hotel and rescued many townsfolk, but his trunk was burned hollow! Notwithstanding the incident, the noble soul within Old Man Wood's trunk remained intact. He became the mayor of Dreamville and continued to uphold his ideals. To keep the town safe, he selflessly blocked out bad guys with his branches and wooden sticks, ensuring the town could thrive under his protection. However, Clockie misunderstood Old Man Wood, thinking that Old Man Wood used his branches and laws to restrict the townsfolk's freedom. Clockie established a new village at the old site of Dreamville and gathered a bunch of townsfolk who also had the same misconception. Old Man Wood did not hold it against them. He was certain that the misunderstanding would one day be resolved, just like how his original aspiration had never wavered... Old Man Wood was once a kind sage, and he is still one now. In any case, Dreamville still depends on this reliable big tree for support and grows under its protection. (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

When Kinetic Points are full, additionally summons 4 minicans and triggers <color=#f29e38ff>Self-Destructive Impact</color>.\nIf enemies are defeated by <color=#f29e38ff>Self-Destructive Impact</color>, the remaining minicans will evolve to Ultra Gold and immediately deliver <color=#f29e38ff>Super Self-Destructive Impact</color> to deal a great deal of DMG.

C: 凯撒，我已经准备好啦！
E: I am ready, Imperator!

C: 果汁…一说就觉得馋，一馋就忒想喝，一喝就…停不下来……
E: Ahh, juice... If I say the word, I get a craving. If I get a craving, I wanna drink some. And if I drink some... Ahh... I can't stop!

C: 我想，你可能还不明白……
E: Perhaps you still don't understand...

C: 这片银河，容得下任何可能性。
E: The galaxy is vast beyond compare.

C: 一定能派上用场。
E: This will definitely come in handy.

C: 艾利欧说我擅长制造「恐惧」，即使我对它一无所知。
E: Elio said that I'm good at creating "fear," even though I don't know what it is.

C: 今天也上线啦？
E: You're online today too?

C: 了解的事越多，就越喜欢这片星空。
E: The more I learn about it, the more I love the starry sky.

C: 待机中…我好无聊啊。
E: Idle mode... *yawn* How boring.

C: 这一战，不可避免。
E: This battle is unavoidable.

C: 哇哦！
E: Wow!

C: 我始终坚信，没有比大守护者更熟悉、更热爱这座城市的人了。
E: I've always firmly believed that no one knows this city better or loves it more than the supreme guardian.

C: 这样一来，补给品就够了。
E: These will last us a long time.

C: 为了达成完美的汇报，有时练习十来遍也不够…
E: *sigh* Sometimes I practice over a dozen times before reporting to my superiors, but I still can't get it right...

C: 虎克邀请我加入鼹鼠党，但…如果要玩捉迷藏的话，史瓦罗先生怎么办……
E: Hook invited me to join The Moles. I want to, but I think Mr. Svarog's too big to play hide and seek with us...

C: 好不容易说服史瓦罗先生模仿一次「电影」，他只愿意演大树、石头…「父亲」什么的，果然不行么…
E: It's hard to get Mr. Svarog to act out a movie with me — he only wants to play trees or rocks... I wanted him to be the dad...

C: 我来了…我又走咯~
E: Now you see me... now you don't~

C: 已经抵达雪原尽头了呀……
E: Even the Snow Plains have an end...

C: 竟然能和姐姐并肩作战……
E: Never thought I'd get to fight side by side with you, sis...

C: 忙里偷闲，讲究的就是「偷」呀~
E: When life's all go, the trick is to "steal" a bit of downtime, right?

C: 不值一提的小伎俩。
E: Hardly worth mentioning.

C: 兵戈，无情！
E: Conflict is pitiless!

C: 急如律令。
E: I command it.

C: 是牌馆那打牌的姑娘吧？她那摸牌打牌的手劲，没个把年头练不出来…打牌打到这份上，都能算是一门武艺啦。
E: She's the girl playing in the games parlor, right? She must have played for years to be that good... With how good her skills are, it's almost a martial art for her.

C: 说是家传兵器，应该挺有来历的？我娘仅凭单手便可挥剑自如，但我连双手持剑也觉得沉，哎……
E: It's a family heirloom, and probably has a history? My Ma can swing it with just one hand, but I struggle even with two. Ah...

C: 我从飞霄将军身上学到了很重要的一课——行动前应如磐石，不与敌人争先。行动时应如掣电，比什么都快。行动后应如烈火，不遗任何隐患。
E: I learned a very important lesson from General Feixiao: Before taking action, be like a rock and wait for the enemy to move first. While taking action, be like lightning and move faster than anyone else. After taking action, be like a fire and leave no hidden dangers untouched.

C: 天击将军，很荣幸与你并肩作战。
E: I am honored to fight alongside you, Merlin's Claw.

C: 恭喜贺喜，上上喜咯！
E: Wooh, looks like we've struck gold!

C: 伤不到我。
E: You can't hurt me.

C: 这判官做得越久，越是明白一个事实——这世上的众人，无一不是戴罪之躯。
E: The longer one works as a judge, the more they understand one fact — of all the people in this world, none is without blemish.

C: 终有一日，孽物将被根除，这是必然。但我们能亲眼见证那一天吗？比起烦恼，更是种遗憾吧。
E: There will come a day when the abominations are completely eliminated — that's a given. But will we live to see that day? I feel more regret than worry at that prospect.

C: 传说之人居然…出现了！
E: So... the legendary figure has appeared!

C: 老铁，偷偷告诉我，你想砍哪个…哦，全砍了！好！
E: Hey, Old Mettle, just between us, which one do you wanna strike... Oh, all of them? Alright!

C: 嘿咻~
E: Hello there~

C: 尽情沉醉其中吧。
E: Immerse yourself in it as you desire.

C: ...不用管我。
E: ...It's nothing.

C: 没想到我还挺擅长这个。
E: Who knew I'd be so good at this.

C: 选择和别人做一样的事，你一定会得到一个完全不一样的结果。
E: You may choose to do the same as everyone else, but you are bound to get a completely different result.

C: 需要…一些严厉的教导么？
E: Need I... teach someone a lesson?

C: 我离不开书籍和浴缸，尤其是前者。当一个人的脑袋被脏东西塞满，身体也干净不到哪里去。
E: I can't stay away from books and bathtubs, especially the former. When one's head is stuffed with filth, one's body is no cleaner.

C: 散落的记忆，正于命途之上重新连缀。
E: As fate dictates, dispersed memories begin to intertwine anew...

C: 最近过得怎么样？有烦心事的话，要让我替你占卜…决定「选择」么？
E: How's the journey been? If there's something weighing you down, let me do a little divination for you...

C: 这次由你决定…「你」想跳一支怎样的舞呢？
E: It's your call... What kind of dance do "you" want this time?

C: 命运，并非一种选择。
E: The threads of destiny aren't chosen.

C: 一次绝妙的解读。
E: Exceptionally deciphered.

C: 火红的巨人所到之处，遍地焦土。但恰恰是那些永远在燃烧的人…在火焰燃尽后，他们会垂下头，用孤独的双手捧起死灰。
E: Wherever the fiery giant treads, scorched earth follows. Yet, it's those consumed by unending fire... who, after the flames vanish, quietly hold the ashes in their lonesome embrace.

C: 爷爷说过，梦想什么时候开始都不算晚，重要的是实现梦想的愿望有多深。米沙会一直记着，总有一日，实现自己和爷爷的梦想！
E: Grandpa told me, it's never too late to have a dream, he said what matters is how much you aspire to make it come true. I'll never forget this — there will come a day when I'll make both my and Grandpa's dreams a reality!

C: 尚不是止步的时候。
E: Now is not the moment to pause.

C: 协定一旦成立，就要负责到底哦。
E: Once an agreement is made, you must uphold it to the very end.

C: 总该有第二手准备。
E: Never hurts to have a plan B.

C: 面甲•粉碎！
E: Mask: Shatter!

C: 算是有点挑战…才怪。
E: I'd say you look tough... but who am I kidding?

C: 在黄金裔的图景中，她的色彩温和而独特，犹如微风，犹如晨光。翁法罗斯的天空已经黑暗了太久太久，是时候由她来赋予治愈的微光了。
E: Her color is gentle and unique among the Chrysos Heirs' portraits, soft as the lightest breeze and bright as the first rays of dawn. Amphoreus's sky had been dark for too long, and it's time for her to grant the world her healing light.

C:
缇宝：早上，中午，晚上好~
缇宁：晴天，雨天，雪天好。
缇安：头好，腿好，身体好！
缇宝&缇宁&缇安：——哪里都好！
E:
Tribbie: Good morning, afternoon, evening~
Trinnon: Good sunny days, rainy days, snowy days.
Trianne: Good head, good legs, good body!
Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne: —Everything's good everywhere!

C: 看好缇宝老师的动作。
E: Watch my moves closely.

C: 久闻大名，瞬息万变的战场也是知识的用武之地。
E: Your reputation precedes you. The ever-changing battlefield is also a place where knowledge comes in handy.

C: 最初的智种，欢迎。
E: First Nouspore, welcome.

C: 我身体不行，若是交战，请你先行。
E: I'm not built for this. You go ahead if you wish to engage.

C: 感谢这份吵闹吧——这是思维碰撞的声响。
E: Be grateful for all this clamor — that is the sound of thoughts clashing.

C: 为牺牲的黄金裔和泰坦送上告慰，是我如今的职责。希望在人世的最后一刻，他们眼中所见并非无边的黑暗，而是宁静的花海。

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
● 风靡全奥赫玛的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在盛大进行。组建你的出战阵容，与熟悉的十三位奇美拉训练家展开精彩对决吧！

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 在「黄金嗷呜大师赛」中，开拓者将参加风靡全奥赫玛的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」。通过招募合适的奇美拉成员，组建对战阵容，战胜对手获取荣誉值，最终赢得比赛胜利！

◆ 挑战赛 ◆
●完成活动任务后，赛事组将解锁「挑战赛」
●在「挑战赛」中，开拓者可以使用已保存的奇美拉队伍，与黄金裔或其余玩家展开单轮较量。  

◆ 常驻奖励 ◆
● 通过击败对手，获得荣誉值，即可获取奖励。

◆ 限时奖励 ◆
● 限时活动期间，通过完成指定任务目标，可获取对应奖励。

◆ 活动提示 ◆
● 「黄金嗷呜大师赛」限时活动结束后，开拓者将无法获取活动期间的限时奖励，但仍可前往场景「生命花园」体验活动并获取常驻奖励。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
● Okhema is abuzz with the "Chimera World Tournament"! Assemble your lineup and get ready for spectacular matches against thirteen familiar chimera trainers!

◆ Event Rules ◆
● In the "Chrysos Awoo Championship," Trailblazers will join the famed "Chimera World Tournament" of Okhema. Recruit the right chimera, build your lineup, and defeat opponents to earn Honor on your way to victory!

◆ Challenge Match ◆
● Complete all event missions to unlock the Challenge Match.
● In the Challenge Match, Trailblazers can use their saved chimera lineups to compete in single-round matches against Chrysos Heirs or other players.

◆ Regular Rewards ◆
● Defeat opponents to earn Honor and claim your rewards.

◆ Limited-time Rewards ◆
● During the limited-time event, completing specified missions will earn you corresponding rewards.

◆ Event Reminders ◆
● After the Chrysos Awoo Championship limited-time event ends, Trailblazers will no longer be able to obtain the limited-time rewards, but they can still visit the Garden of Life map to experience and obtain permanent rewards.

C: 不知何时拍下的照片，但那真实的触感毋庸置疑。在过去，这一幕切实地发生过了，并以此留下证明——尽管少有人知，但当一位少女回忆起曾经的美梦时，将会为此微笑。 做梦的人，也是造梦的人。造梦的人，也是做梦的人。 献出自己的往事，才能织就最美好的梦境。 人们不会沉溺其中，不愿复醒。他们会在美梦中，重新获得面对未来的勇气。 然后，向着明天。
E: A photo taken at an unknown time, but the reality of its touch is undeniable. In the past, this scene truly came to pass, leaving behind a proof of its transpiration. Though few are aware, a young girl will smile when she recalls a beautiful dream she once had. The dreamer is also the dream-maker. The dream-maker is also the dreamer. Only by offering up one's past can the most beautiful dreams be woven. People will not lose themselves within them, unwilling to awaken. In their beautiful dreams, they will regain the courage to face the future. And then, walk toward tomorrow.

C: 「折纸大学谐乐学院院长、首席调研员联袂推荐！」 「此生不得不读的十套书之一！」 「妙趣横生的文章，最好的睡前读物！ ——*一位以私接商单闻名的博识学会研究员*。」 导言 虫潮自大拉铂尔星升起，掠过众星，留下一片废墟。 十数个琥珀纪于宇宙而言不过弹指一瞬，但宇宙的一次颤动需要千万年来准备。命途随之孳生、颠覆，此消彼长，等待另一次漫长的洗牌。 此套丛书中的书目，汇集蝗灾中有关「秩序」的数件具备发端性的事件，旨在论述这样一种可能：「秩序」在蝗灾肆虐期间并未式微。无数星球在鞘翅的阴影下结合为同一个意志：对生存的渴求，令它在其命途上行向了更远。 那么太一的陨灭，究竟是因衰弱而枯竭，还是达到顶峰、走向歧途后的自反？这个问题恐怕要留待读者在翻阅本丛书后解答。 《尼古尔-C4考古报告》 作者：甘索托考古队 出版社：博识学会第三十二出版社         1932琥珀纪，一颗漂流已久的行星被甘索托星俘获。次日，一笔来自公司的专项资助抵达甘索托，武装考古学派随即将之接管。劝走围观的无名客，又击毙几个跃跃欲试的星际盗宝者，他们得出的勘探结论令人惊异：轨道上濒临解体的行星，正是早已消失于星图的尼古尔-C4。数百个琥珀纪前，它竟奇迹般地从奥博洛斯的齿缝间生还。         散漫、闭塞曾是尼古尔部落的代名词，他们以香料的垄断贸易为生，屡次拒绝筑墙者投来的橄榄枝。本书将讲述尼古尔人如何在虫群的侵袭之下走出岩洞，在短短四十年中抛弃一切传统，制定秩序，将松散部落结为盟邦，筑造对抗虫群的壁垒，并在直面古兽时殊死一搏。尽管最终尼古尔人难逃消亡命运，他们笃信的箴言却被刻在岩壁上送到了我们的时代：一切为了生存…… 《祂说，我们将一切均匀分割》 作者：佚名 出版社：惊梦儿童文学出版社         一道不断向内塌陷的弦…像一个甜甜圈。虫群散去，一切可吃的都被吃尽了，一切可用的都被用尽了。热量不再流动，斯缇人被遗弃在空无一物的城市，一座热寂的孤岛，徒劳地想念着氟利昂驱动的制冷器、百货大楼门前的绿荫、冷冻食品五颜六色的包装。就在这时，祂示现在柏油路延伸至天际的热浪里…像一个甜甜圈。         祂说，尚未到来。         于是他们焚烧城市。人流井井有条地行走，默契地将每一栋建筑点燃。黑色的粉尘沉降，将一切染为同一种颜色。         祂说，尚未到来。         于是他们焚烧自己。野火沿着煤矿矿坑向下沉降，泥炭在岩层中闷烧。城市跌入地幔，他们感到皮肤在向胸口以内坍缩……         祂说，尚未到来。         虫灾散去后数个琥珀纪，筑墙者用推土机般厚实笨重的舰船的巨大铲斗清扫这片星域。在斯缇星曾在的坐标，他们只望见一个黑洞在不断坍缩，冷静、沉默、心口如一。 《笑到最后：笑话理论考古学》 作者：红鼻老人 出版社：虚构史项目基金会         十位愚者来到群星间的抛锚地。弗朗伯罕星平动点L2，航天器、虫群与遇难者的残骸在一片黑暗中沉积。愚者撷取一颗泪滴，从它暗淡的光芒中获悉，伶人的贡多拉曾停泊此处，为这座坟场落泪，但如今早已启程远航。         愚者尚未从错失面具的失落中平复，虫潮便已来临。虫群嗅到船舱中所剩不多的氧气和有机物，不眠不休地撞击舱门。饥肠辘辘之时，愚者也不得不订立规则：每夜讲一个笑话，谁的笑话最无聊，谁就出局。这显然不是一件好笑的事。         十日后，只剩一位幸运儿见证虫灾散去。最后一位对手在听他的笑话时忍俊不禁，他因此赢得了属于自己的假面，上面九副重叠的面孔神色各异，也得到了有关笑话最初的理论。在无名坟场的十夜，「欢愉」第一次为「秩序」沾染，那些在阐释、争辩和呜咽中得出的理论，将取乐的艺术规范到每一个标点，其中第一条延续至今：切不可解释笑话。 「若有错字、破损、缺页请联系出版社调换。」 「欢迎随时订购！」
E: "Endorsed by the Dean and Chief Investigator of the Charmony Academy at Paperfold University!" "A must-read! One of the 10 most important series of our time!" "Full of witty insights and the perfect way to wind down your day. —*A researcher from the Intelligentsia Guild who's notorious for writing paid reviews*." Preface The Swarm came from Lapole Major, a torrent that left the cosmos in ruin. To the universe, dozens of Amber Eras are mere moments, but a single cosmic shift takes millions of years to build. Paths are forged and shattered, waxing and waning, then waiting for fate to shuffle the deck again. The books in this series analyzed multiple events regarding the Order that initiated something new during the Swarm, all to posit this possibility:The Order did not wither during the ravages of the Swarm Disaster. Countless planets were bound into a single will beneath the shadow of carapace wings. The yearning for survival drove this concept to walk further along its Path. Was the fall of Ena, then, a consequence of weakness? Or was it the paradoxical self-destruction of a power that, having peaked, had nowhere to go but inward? The answer lies would have to be answered after you have read all of these pages. The Nigul-C4 Archaeological Report Author: The Gansoto Archaeological Team Publisher: The 32nd Press of the Intelligentsia Guild Amber Era 1932: a planet, having drifted for ages, is captured by the planet Gansoto. The following day, a special IPC grant arrived, and the Armed Archaeologists faction promptly took over the site. After sending away the Nameless onlookers and putting a few eager interstellar looters in the ground, their survey leads to a startling conclusion: The planet now crumbling in orbit is none other than Nigul-C4, long-vanished from the astral charts. Against all odds, it had survived the fangs of Oroboros hundreds of Amber Eras ago. The Nigul tribes had always been known for being scattered and insular, subsisting on a spice monopoly and consistently rejecting overtures from the Wallbuilders. This book recounts the Nigul people's dramatic transformation under the Swarm's assault. In just four decades, they abandoned all tradition to forge a new order, uniting their disparate clans, building defenses against the Swarm, and resisting till their last breath when facing a Leviathan. Though their race did not escape their destined death, their creed lasted till our time, etched onto rocks: Whatever it takes to survive... "THEY Said, We Shall Divide Everything Evenly" Author: Anonymous Publisher: Dreamjolt Children's Literature Press A string collapsing inward endlessly... like a doughnut. The Swarms dissipated. Everything edible had been eaten. Everything usable exhausted. Heat no longer flowed. The Stii people were abandoned in a city stripped bare, a lonely island of heat-death, longing in vain for Freon-driven coolers, shades in front of department stores, and the rainbow packaging of frozen foods. And then, THEY appeared in the heat waves above the asphalt road stretching to the horizon... like a doughnut. THEY said, not yet. So they burned the city. People walked in perfect order, setting every building aflame in tacit understanding. Black dust settled, coloring everything the same shade. THEY said, not yet. So they burned themselves. Wildfires sank downward along the coal pits. Peat smoldered deep in the rock layers. The city sank into the planetary mantle, and they felt their skin collapsing inward toward somewhere within their chests... THEY said, not yet. Several Amber Eras after the Swarm calamity, the Wallbuilders swept this segmentum with massive scoops, as steady and slow as bulldozers, mounted on space ships. At the location where the Stiis' planet had been, all they saw was a black hole collapsing endlessly... Calm, silent, the same within as it is without. "Last Laugh: Archaeology of Joke Theory" Author: Red-Nosed Old-Timer Publisher: Fictional History Project Foundation Ten Fools arrived at an anchoring area among the stars. At Flamborghan's L2 liberation point, spacecrafts, the Swarm, and the wreckage of victims floundered in darkness. The Fools plucked a single teardrop and, from its dim glow, learned that the Actors' Gondola had once docked here, shedding tears for this graveyard, but now had long since sailed away. Before the Fools could recover from the loss of having missed their masks, the Swarm arrived. Sensing the dwindling oxygen and organic matter in the cabins, the Swarm assaulted the doors tirelessly. Starving, the Fools were forced to make a rule: Each night, everyone must tell a joke, and whoever told the dullest joke would be out. Clearly, this was no laughing matter. Ten days later, only one lucky Fool remained to witness the departure of the Swarm. The final opponent, unable to resist his joke, laughed, and the survivor claimed his own mask, layered with nine distinct faces, and received the original theory of jokes. On those ten nights in the nameless graveyard, the Elation became first touched by the Order. Those theories derived through explanation, debate, and sobbing codified the art of amusement down to every punctuation mark, the first rule of which persists to this day: Never explain a joke. "If there are typos, damages, or missing pages, please contact the publisher to replace them." "You're always welcome to place an order!"

C: 进入蓄力状态，7回合后施放【太初有为】。
E: Enters the Charge state. After 7 turns, uses "Im Anfang war die Tat."

C: 从我方队伍左侧起横扫攻击我方3个连续目标，造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Starting from the leftmost target, uses a sweeping attack on 3 consecutive targets, dealing minor Imaginary DMG.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量火属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入【焚烧】状态。
E: Deals minor Fire DMG to one designated target and has a high chance to inflict "Enkindle."

C: 我方可选择1名角色，随后对选定的我方角色造成冰属性伤害并使其陷入【幻身】状态，【幻身】状态下的我方角色及其召唤物<u>离场</u>。同时召唤【致幻人鱼】，代替该离场角色继续战斗，【致幻人鱼】视为我方角色。
E: The target can select 1 character. Then, deals Ice DMG to the selected character and causes them to enter the "Phantom Illusion" state. In "Phantom Illusion" state, the target character and their summon are <u>Departed</u>. At the same time, summons "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" to replace the Departed character in battle. "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" is considered as a non-friendly target.

C: 分裂，腐化，吞吃
E: Rend, Putrefy, Engorge

C: 旋覆甲壳
E: Whirling Carapace

C: 造物的工
E: Work of Creation

C: 罪血锯刑
E: Hemotort Saw

C: 流萤到达匹诺康尼，感觉这里和现实世界没什么不同，这让银狼感到困惑。银狼帮流萤搞定了身份，但遇到了新的麻烦事。
E: When Firefly arrived in Penacony, she found it not much different from the real world, which confused Silver Wolf. Though Silver Wolf helped Firefly sort out her identity, they ended up running into new trouble.

C: 黑天鹅受星期日的委托来寻找知更鸟，并以口信「谐乐鸽」取得其信任。黑天鹅指出，大丽花以<color=#f29e38ff>背叛</color>为天性，绝不可能被星核猎手接纳。
E: Black Swan, under Sunday's request, sought out Robin and gained her trust with the message "Charmony Dove." Black Swan pointed out that The Dahlia's nature was rooted in <color=#f29e38ff>the Betrayal</color>, making it impossible for her to be accepted by the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 在黑天鹅的引导下，你从梦中醒来。黄泉为你介绍，这里是梦境与现实的狭间，属于那些从<color=#f29e38ff>太一之梦</color>中清醒的人。
E: Guided by Black Swan, you awoke from the dream. Acheron explained that this place was the rift between dream and reality, a space reserved only for those who had awakened from <color=#f29e38ff>Ena's dream</color>.

C: 通关时，至少拥有1个赐福残晶（阈值协议4及以上）
E: Possess at least 1 Benediction Shard when clearing the run (with Threshold Protocol 4 or higher)

C: 在蚀心影魔「困难」难度中，达成2个挑战目标
E: Complete 2 challenge goals in the Corrupting Shadowfiend challenge in Hard mode

C: 完成戮力双雄「简单」难度挑战
E: Complete the Synergy Duo challenge in Easy mode

C: 获得该奇物时，立即获得<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>宇宙碎片。战斗胜利后每有1名满血角色，获得<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>宇宙碎片【该奇物可以通过事件升级】
E: When obtaining this Curio, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments. After winning a battle, gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments for each character at full health. This curio can be leveled up through Occurrences.

C: 被添加的额外量子弱点，量子属性抗性降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Additionally implanted Quantum Weakness. Decreases Quantum RES by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 伤害降低
E: DMG Reduction

C: 凡俗众生
E: Mortal Beings

C: 橡木鸣蛀之梦，梦主实行一切阴谋的地方——当然，律令所说的话不能尽信。既然阴差阳错来到了这里，想办法获取更多关于梦主的线索吧。
E: The Dream of Gnawing Oak, the place where the Dreammaster executes all his schemes... Of course, the words of the laws can't be taken at face value. Since I've ended up here by a twist of fate, I'll see if I can find more clues about the Dreammaster.

C: 流萤一直在和某位同伴进行通讯，从她们的交流来看，她们的身份和目的都绝不简单。\n继续追索吧，联想到此前感知到的杂音，她们一定与梦境的异常有关。
E: Firefly has been communicating with a partner. From their conversation, their identities and objectives are clearly not what they seem.\nI need to stay on their trail. Considering the static I sensed before, they must be connected to the anomalies in the dreamscape.

C: 选择一条道路继续前进
E: Choose a path to proceed on

C: 完成美梦的谢幕
E: Complete the ending of the sweet dream

C: 别着急，我没有伤害你的同伴，你看见的一切，只在你我之间。
E: Don't worry. I haven't harmed your companions. What you've seen stays between us.

C: 想起那无法入梦，也不愿醒来的少女……
E: Think of that girl who could neither enter dreams, nor wished to wake...

C: 别在意，他从来都是这样。请好好享受家族为各位打造的美梦乐园吧，我们就先失陪了。祝你玩得开心！
E: Don't mind him. He's always like that. Please enjoy the beautiful dreamscape The Family has built for everyone. We shall take our leave. Have a blast!

C: 也对。从小到大，没有什么事是哥哥办不到的。
E: That's true. Ever since we were kids, there's nothing my big brother couldn't handle.

C: 我还有事，先告辞了。如果你们有需要，就找附近的幼犬联络我吧。祝你们享受这场美梦。
E: I need to get going. If you need help, you can reach out to me through the young Bloodhounds in this area. I wish you an enjoyable experience in this land of dreams.

C: 那女孩…自称鸢尾花家系的艺者？可她的声音里，我听不见共鸣……
E: That girl... claims to be an artist from the Iris Family? But I can't hear any resonance in her voice...

C: 前方是——知更鸟女士？！
E: Is that... Miss Robin!?

C: 猛然穿过忆质，总要经历一阵恍惚。那位忆者心思不太单纯呢，她有能力将你们一齐送走，却刻意将你留了下来。
E: Passing through memoria so suddenly always leaves you in a daze. That Memokeeper had ulterior motives. She could have sent all of you away, but deliberately kept you behind.

C: 「梦主」二字，不是说他掌控了梦境——而是已让梦境本身，化作自己的第二副躯壳。
E: The title "Dreammaster" doesn't mean he merely controls the dreamscape. Rather, it means he has already turned the dreamscape itself into his second body.

C: 能帮我带她离开吗？我不想让她独自留下。
E: Could you help me take her away? I don't want to leave her here alone.

C: 此后，在黑天鹅的指引下，你试着查出流萤之死的真相。可是，你应该也注意到了，无论是与同伴断开联系，还是无法启动机甲的窘迫…
E: After that, guided by Black Swan, you tried to uncover the truth behind Firefly's death. However, as you must have noticed, be it losing contact with her companions, or the embarrassment of being unable to activate her mech...

C: 即使必须为之而死，我也不能逃开。
E: Even if I have to die for it, I cannot run away.

C: 得来全不费工夫。就是这只八音盒——泯灭帮收到的「邀请函」……
E: It's a cinch. This music box, the "invitation" received by the Annihilation Gang... There are latent memories that linger on it yet.

C: 在那片原始忆域，我的感知处处受阻，原以为是家族的原因，结果，却是有位同僚在场？你是因何而来？
E: In that Primordial Memory Zone, my acuity was blocked at every turn. I thought it was because of The Family, but it turns out there was a colleague present. What brings you here?

C: …还真够不小心呢，很像一位老朋友。
E: ...Pretty careless indeed, just like an old friend of mine.

C: 让它自由自在地飞翔吧。
E: Let it soar free and wild.

C: 过来吧孩子，我为你准备了「临别之礼」。
E: Come here, child. I've prepared a "farewell gift" for you.

C: 多亏您伸出援手，我对这里已经熟悉起来了。
E: Thanks for your help. I'm starting to get familiar with this place.

C: …我为什么要去追她？自负的天鹅，如果我刚才没有取走她的记忆，那我究竟对她做了些什么呢？
E: ...Why would I chase after her? Arrogant swan... if I didn't take her memories just now, then what exactly did I do to her?

C: 与「梦主」的合作，虽是与虎谋皮，却也没有更好的选择。
E: Working with the Dreammaster may be like dancing with the devil, but I have no better choice.

C: 很快，知更鸟就会知道那簇火花真正的用意，并因此感谢我。
E: Soon, Robin will understand the true purpose of those sparks, and thank me for it.

C: 她曾登上星穹列车，是位出色的测绘师。多年前，为了探明原初梦境的秘密，她只身一人进入忆域，从此不知所踪。
E: She once boarded the Astral Express as an outstanding Surveyor. Years ago, in pursuit of the Primordial Dreamscape's secrets, she ventured alone into the Memory Zone and was never seen again.

C: 自他尝试融入梦境时，他就将自身化为四条「太初律令」。
E: When he attempted to merge with the Dreamscape, he transformed himself into four Primordial Divine Laws.

C: 别太生气，那时我的确还不是星核猎手，但匹诺康尼发生的一切，不就是加入的最好契机吗？
E: Don't be too mad. I wasn't a Stellaron Hunter back then, but wasn't everything that happened in Penacony the perfect opportunity to join?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>所有你抛在身后的过去，早已决定了你的未来</color>。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>All the past you've left behind has already determined your future</color>.

C: 自始至终，恐怕从未有过寰宇蝗灾的「死灭之蛹」吧？
E: I suspect there was never any Chrysalis of Extinction from the Swarm Disaster to begin with, was there?

C: …流萤小姐，您曾思索过命运吗？
E: ...Miss Firefly, have you ever pondered over destiny?

C: 其一，是由星期日掌握的「太一之梦」，它为每一个入梦者编织了美好的幻觉，使人们沉沦其中。
E: First, there's Ena's Dream controlled by Sunday. It wove a beautiful illusion for every dreamer, making them flounder in it.

C: 我们已经从第一重醒来了吗？
E: Have we woken up from the first layer yet?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>一道「翡翠」色的光芒，仍然沉于梦境的深处。而它的解放，不需要持有者在场。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A jade-colored light still sleeps deep within the dreamscape, and it does not require the presence of its owner to unleash its powers.</color>

C: 我也会义无反顾地开拓下去。
E: I will continue to trailblaze without hesitation.

C: 格拉默铁骑。
E: Glamoth's Iron Cavalry.

C: 只要钟表还在转动，死若有时——
E: As long as the clock keeps ticking, death comes for us all eventually...

C: 黄泉
E: Acheron

C: 一切结束之后，我们想让你烧掉一些{NICKNAME}的记忆。
E: After everything is over, we want you to burn some of {NICKNAME}'s memories.

C: 正因如此，我相信哥哥总有一天，也能想清楚这一切。他犯下过错误，已被制止。我不希望他在监牢中度过余生，<color=#dbc291ff>我想让他…也得到自己拯救自己的机会。</color>
E: That's why I believe my brother will come to understand all of this one day as well. He made mistakes, but he was stopped. I don't want him to spend the rest of his life in prison. <color=#dbc291ff>I want him to... also have a chance to save himself.</color>

C: 慢慢地，所有想说的话，还没有相见之前，就已经说完了。
E: Slowly but surely, all the things we want to say would have already been said before we even met the person.

C: （感觉不对…难道是方向错了？从头再试试吧。）
E: (Something's not right... Maybe the direction is wrong? Let me try again from the start.)

C: 看着水珠沿凸起的石刺滴落，你内心泛起一股伤感，直到有脚步声从洞穴深处传来——你并非独自一人。
E: As you watch droplets trickle down the protruding stone spikes, a wave of melancholy washes over you, until footsteps echo from deep within the cave. You're not alone.

C: 寂寞的声音是「咕咕」，充实的声音是「嗝嗝」。
E: The sound of loneliness goes "grooowl," while the sound of contentment goes "buuurp."

C: 先是一股浓腻的香气，随后是花蕊兴奋的颤舞…似乎嗅到了你身上熟悉的危险气息，花蕊突然停顿，瑟缩回花苞之中。
E: First came a thick, cloying fragrance, followed by an exhilarated dance of the stamen... Seemingly detecting the familiar-yet-dangerous aura about you, the flower's stamen suddenly paused, shrinking back into its bud.

C: 被蛀空的星空，沦为虫群孵育子嗣的卵床…梦境向你展示了一段残酷的回忆。
E: The hollowed-out starscape, reduced to a breeding ground for the Swarm's offsprings... The dreamscape revealed a cruel memory to you.

C: 好啊，奇美拉工作不饱和是吧。
E: Oh, so the chimera's not getting enough work, huh?

C: 大概…就是这种解说词，然后场面就急转直下了。我也不懂嗷呜。
E: That's pretty much how the commentary went, and then everything went downhill from there. Don't ask me why though, awoo.

C: 你还能坐在这也挺厉害的。
E: Pretty impressive that you can still sit here.

C: 感觉不如奇美拉上班…
E: Feels worse off than watching chimera work...

C: 不到最后，可都还说不准哦？
E: Nothing's set in stone until the very end, you know?

C: 好啦，剩下的就交给灰宝吧。
E: Alright, I'll leave the rest to you, Grayie.

C: 对小奇美拉使用<color=#f29e38ff>道具</color>，可以让它们变强。灰宝快试试吧！
E: Use <color=#f29e38ff>items</color> on little chimeras to make them stronger. Give it a try, Grayie!
